pattern noise、mask rate noise 和 data noise，并指出 AR 只吃最后一种。这个结论很关键，因为它把 MDM 与 AR 的训练差距从经验观察变成了可诊断对象，对 diffusion LM、masked/any-order LM 的优化设计都有直接启发。","technical_approach":"作者的核心贡献是先做方差分解，再围绕每一项方差源设计六种降方差方法。理论上，他们认为 MDM 的额外不稳定来自两层随机性：一是 mask 到哪些位置，二是 mask 比例是多少；这些随机性会让梯度估计比 AR 更噪。基于这个分析，方法不是盲目换 optimizer，而是针对性减少 masking scheme 带来的采样波动。摘要没有列出六种方法的具体形式，但从框架看，它们应当覆盖固定或重参数化 mask rate、更平滑的 masking pattern、以及降低估计方差的训练技巧。与已有经验性稳定化手段相比，这篇工作的区别在于先解释“噪声从哪来”，再有针对性处理。","experiments":"摘要给出的关键事实是：即便 MDM 和 ARM 在预训练初始化时能力接近，后续任务训练中 MDM 往往因高方差而发散或显著落后；作者提出的方法系统性降低了这种训练方差并提升稳定性。可惜摘要没有给出模型规模、任务类型、基线、方差下降比例或最终性能提升数字，因此不能补全。最值得关注的实验应包括：梯度方差实测与理论分解的一致性、六种方法分别对 A/B/C 三类方差的作用、以及在 matched initialization 下 MDM 与 ARM 训练轨迹是否明显收敛得更稳。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles the core optimization weakness of masked diffusion models: their training variance is much higher than that of autoregressive models, which makes fine-tuning noisy and unstable even when the two are similarly strong at pretrained initialization. Earlier work observed the gap, but lacked a clean explanation of where the variance actually comes from.","importance":"This is a meaningful method-level advance for alternative language modeling paradigms. The key contribution is the first decomposition of MDM training variance into masking-pattern noise, masking-rate noise, and data noise, with AR models affected only by the last term. That matters because it turns the MDM-vs-AR optimization gap from an anecdotal fact into a diagnosable object, which is directly useful for diffusion LM and masked/any-order LM research.","technical_approach":"The technical strategy is theory first, intervention second. The paper decomposes the variance and then proposes six variance-reduction methods targeted at the identified sources instead of treating instability as a generic optimizer problem. The central claim is that MDMs inherit two extra layers of stochasticity from masking decisions: which positions are masked and how much of the sequence is masked. Those choices inject gradient noise beyond ordinary data noise. The abstract does not list the six methods, but the framework suggests they are designed to smooth or control masking randomness rather than merely changing the optimizer. That is the main difference from prior heuristic stabilization tricks.","experiments":"The abstract establishes the qualitative result: even when pretrained MDMs and ARMs start from comparable strength, MDMs often diverge or underperform during downstream training because of higher variance, and the proposed methods reduce this instability. It does not provide model sizes, tasks, baselines, variance reductions, or performance margins, so no numeric results should be invented. The most important evidence in the full paper would be empirical validation of the variance decomposition, source-by-source ablations, and visibly improved training trajectories under matched initial conditions.","authors_note":""},"tags":["masked-diffusion","training-variance","diffusion-lm","optimization"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010468","title":"ByteFlow: Language Modeling through Adaptive Byte Compression without a Tokenizer","authors":["Chunyuan Deng","Sanket Lokegaonkar","Colin Lockard","Besnik Fetahu","Nasser Zalmout","Xian Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$21","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010468"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010468","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是固定 tokenizer 带来的建模粒度僵化问题。现代 LM 一旦选定 BPE 或 unigram 等子词切分，模型整个训练和推理都被锁死在这个粒度上，结果是遇到新形态词、拼写变体、跨语言混合和符号序列时经常出现不自然甚至脆弱的行为。过去虽然有 byte-level 或 self-tokenizing 路线，但要么效率差，要么切分机制不够动态。","importance":"结论上，这是一个直接触及预训练基本接口的工作：它不是调 tokenizer，而是尝试取消 tokenizer，让模型自己学压缩和切分。对 pretrain 研究而言，这类工作潜在影响很大，因为 tokenization 会影响序列长度、频率统计、跨语言共享、优化稳定性和 scaling efficiency。若 ByteFlow 这类方法可扩展，它挑战的是“先离线定 tokenizer，再训 LM”这个几十亿参数时代的默认假设。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 ByteFlow Net：直接在原始 byte 流上建模，并依据潜在表示的 coding rate 做压缩驱动的动态分段。模型会评估把若干 bytes 合成一个 chunk 的信息代价，从而自适应决定边界。和传统 tokenizer 预先固定词表不同，它把 segmentation 变成训练中可学习、随上下文变化的过程；和很多早期 self-tokenizing 方法不同，作者强调其基础是信息论上的压缩准则，而不是仅靠局部启发式合并。这个设计为什么可能有效很清楚：好的 tokenization 本质上就是在长度压缩和语义可组合性之间找平衡，而 coding rate 正好提供了一个统一标准。代价则是模型和训练实现会更复杂，且需要证明它不会把收益吃在额外计算里。","experiments":"摘要可确认的实验结论是：ByteFlow Net 能在无 tokenizer 前提下学习语义上有意义的分段，并将 byte-level 建模与自适应压缩结合起来。作者明确将其定位为区别于已有 byte-level/self-tokenizing 方法的新架构。由于摘要没有给出参数规模、训练语料、与 BPE/byte baseline 的 perplexity、速度、序列压缩率和跨语言泛化数字，无法判断它当前是研究原型还是已接近可替代生产 tokenizer 的水平。可以保守地说，论文的价值首先在于提出了一个更强的建模框架，而非证明现阶段全面胜出。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets the rigidity imposed by fixed tokenizers. Once a language model adopts a BPE or unigram tokenizer, the entire training and inference pipeline is locked to that granularity, which often leads to brittle behavior on morphological variation, spelling noise, mixed-language text, and symbolic sequences. Byte-level and self-tokenizing alternatives exist, but they have usually suffered from poor efficiency or weakly adaptive segmentation.","importance":"This work directly touches a core pretraining interface. Rather than improving a tokenizer, it attempts to remove the tokenizer and let the model learn compression and segmentation itself. That is potentially important because tokenization affects sequence length, frequency statistics, cross-lingual sharing, optimization behavior, and scaling efficiency. If ByteFlow scales, it challenges the long-standing default recipe of fixing a tokenizer offline and then training the LM on top of it.","technical_approach":"The core proposal is ByteFlow Net, which models raw byte streams and performs compression-driven segmentation using the coding rate of latent representations. The model dynamically estimates the information cost of grouping bytes into chunks and decides boundaries on the fly. Unlike standard tokenizers, segmentation becomes a learned, context-dependent process. Unlike many earlier self-tokenizing methods, the design is grounded in an information-theoretic compression criterion rather than mostly local merge heuristics. The appeal is clear: good tokenization is a trade-off between sequence compression and semantic compositionality, and coding rate offers a unified way to express that trade-off. The obvious concern is whether the extra modeling complexity outweighs the benefits.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical claim is that ByteFlow Net learns semantically meaningful segmentation without a tokenizer, combining byte-level modeling with adaptive compression. The paper is positioned as a new architecture rather than a minor extension of prior byte-level or self-tokenizing systems. The abstract does not report parameter scale, training corpus, perplexity against BPE or byte baselines, speed, compression ratio, or cross-lingual results, so it is not possible to judge whether this is already a production-competitive alternative to tokenizers. A cautious reading is that the contribution is first to propose a stronger modeling framework.","authors_note":""},"tags":["tokenizer","byte-level","architecture","adaptive-compression"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010474","title":"Soft-Masked Diffusion Language Models","authors":["Michael Length: Quantifying Long-Range Information for Long-Context LLM Pretraining Data","authors":["Haoran Deng","Yingyu Lin","Zhenghao Lin","Xiao Liu","Yizhou Sun","Yian Ma","Yeyun Gong"],"institutions":["Tsinghua University","UCLA"],"abstract":"Long-context language models unlock advanced capabilities in reasoning, code generation, and document summarization by leveraging dependencies across extended spans of text. However, a significant portion of readily available long-text data lacks meaningful long-distance dependencies; most spans can be predicted using only local context. Training on such data is inefficient, making careful data selection crucial. Therefore, we introduce LongFilter, a framework for curating training data tailored to long-context pretraining. LongFilter measures the information gain provided by extended context by contrasting model predictions under long-context versus short-context settings, thereby identifying samples where long-range dependencies are essential. Experiments with LLaMA-3-8B, extending its context length from 8K to 64K, show that LongFilter efficiently selects high-quality data and yields substantial improvements on benchmarks such as HELMET, LongBench, and RULER. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010884"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010884","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"长上下文 pretrain 的数据中，大量文本虽然很长但缺乏有意义的长距离依赖——大部分 span 用局部上下文就能预测。在这种数据上训练效率低下，需要一种方法筛选出真正需要长距离信息的训练样本。","importance":"数据级贡献，直接服务于长上下文 pretrain。这是一个非常实际的问题：长上下文训练的计算成本高，如果大部分数据的长距离依赖是虚假的（只是文本碰巧很长），那训练效率会很差。LongFilter 提供了一个可操作的数据筛选框架。","technical_approach":"LongFilter 的核心思路是对比模型在长上下文 vs 短上下文设定下的预测差异，用信息增益（information gain）来量化扩展上下文带来的额外信息。信息增益高的样本说明长距离依赖是真实存在的、对预测有帮助的。这比简单按文本长度筛选要精准得多，因为长度不等于长距离依赖。","experiments":"在 LLaMA-3-8B 上做了长上下文扩展实验（摘要截断，具体数字不完整）。核心验证逻辑是用 LongFilter 筛选的数据 vs. 随机长文本数据训练后的长上下文能力对比。","authors_note":"Xiao Liu 和 Yizhou Sun 分别来自清华和 UCLA，在 LLM 和图学习方向有知名度。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Much readily available long-text data lacks meaningful long-range dependencies—most spans are predictable from local context alone. Training on such data for long-context pretraining is computationally wasteful. A principled data selection method is needed.","importance":"Data-level contribution directly serving long-context pretraining. Long-context training is expensive; if most long documents don't actually require long-range reasoning, training efficiency suffers. LongFilter provides an actionable data curation framework.","technical_approach":"LongFilter measures information gain from extended context by contrasting model predictions under long-context vs. short-context settings. High information gain indicates genuine long-range dependencies essential for prediction. This is far more precise than filtering by text length alone, since length does not imply long-range dependency.","experiments":"Experiments on LLaMA-3-8B for context extension (abstract truncated, specific numbers unavailable). Autoregressive modeling has been a popular approach, partly because of its training efficiency; however, that comes at the cost of sensitivity to overfitting. On the other hand, masked-diffusion models are less efficient to train while being more resilient to overfitting. In this work, we demonstrate that dual-objective training achieves the best of both worlds. To derive the optimal balance between both objectives, we train and evaluate 50 language models under varying levels of data repetition. We show that it is optimal to combine both objectives under all evaluated settings and that the optimal balance is similar whether targeting autoregressive or masked-diffusion downstream performance. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010905"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010905","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["diffusion-lm","autoregressive","dual-objective","masked-diffusion","training-efficiency"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010941","title":"On the Reasoning Abilities of Masked Diffusion Language Models","authors":["Anej Svete","Ashish Sabharwal"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Masked diffusion models (MDMs) for text offer a compelling alternative to traditional autoregressive language models. Parallel generation makes them efficient, but their computational capabilities and the limitations inherent in their parallelism remain largely unexplored. To this end, we characterize what types of reasoning problems MDMs can provably solve and how efficiently. We do this by connecting MDMs to the well-understood reasoning frameworks of chain of thought (CoT) and padded looped transformers (PLTs) in the finite-precision log-width setting: We show that MDMs and polynomially-padded PLTs are, in fact, equivalent in this setting, and that MDMs can solve all problems that CoT-augmented transformers can. Moreover, we showcase classes of problems (including regular languages) for which MDMs are inherently more efficient than CoT transformers, where parallel generation allows for substantially faster reasoning. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010941"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010941","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文回答的是：masked diffusion language model 到底能做哪些推理，以及并行生成的限制在哪里。过去大家知道 MDM 在生成范式上不同于 AR，但对它的“计算能力”缺少清晰刻画，讨论通常停留在经验效果或直觉比较。作者想做的是把 MDM 放到一个可证明的复杂度框架里，回答它是否真的因为并行性而丧失推理能力，还是只是把计算搬到了不同的迭代形式里。","importance":"结论是：这篇工作更像范式级理论澄清，而不是提出一个更强模型。它对 pretrain 研究的重要性在于，它给 diffusion LM / masked LM 这条线补上了一个长期缺失的“能力边界”说明：MDM 并不天然弱于 CoT 风格的 transformer，在有限精度、对数宽度设定下，它可以覆盖 CoT-augmented transformer 能解决的问题。这个结论会直接影响我们如何看待非 AR 语言建模——不是只把它当生成效率技巧，而是当作一种有独立计算表达力的建模范式。","technical_approach":"核心方法是理论构造与等价性证明，不是新训练算法。作者把 MDM 与两类已有推理框架连接起来：一类是 chain-of-thought transformer，另一类是 padded looped transformers。关键结论是，在 finite-precision log-width 设定下，MDM 与 polynomially-padded PLT 等价，并且 MDM 可以求解所有 CoT-augmented transformer 能求解的问题。这个设计的价值在于，它没有直接拿 MDM 去和任意图灵完备模型比，而是选了两个与现代 LLM 推理更贴近的参照系，因此结论更有解释力。摘要还提到存在某些问题类别——包括 regular languages——MDM 的并行迭代形式可能更自然或更高效，这意味着它不是简单模仿 AR 推理，而是有自己的优势区域。","experiments":"这篇工作的主体显然是理论结果，摘要没有给出常规意义上的模型规模、训练数据和 benchmark 数字。可确认的核心“实验事实”其实是证明层面的：一，MDM 与多项式 padding 的 looped transformer 等价；二，MDM 覆盖 CoT transformer 的可解问题类；三，还展示了某些问题类上 MDM 可能有优势。阅读时应重点看证明依赖的设定边界——有限精度、log-width、迭代步数与输入长度的关系——因为这些条件决定了结论能否外推到现实中的大规模 diffusion LM，而不是把它直接当成工程上“MDM 全面不输 AR”的证据。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a foundational question: what reasoning problems can masked diffusion language models actually solve, and what are the real limits imposed by parallel generation? MDMs have been discussed mostly through empirical comparisons with autoregressive LMs, but their computational capabilities have remained poorly characterized. The authors aim to place MDMs in a formal reasoning framework instead of treating them as just a faster decoding variant.","importance":"This is a paradigm-level clarification rather than a new model recipe. Its value for pretraining research is that it gives diffusion/masked language modeling a much clearer capability story: under finite-precision, log-width assumptions, MDMs are not inherently weaker than CoT-style transformers, and can in fact solve everything CoT-augmented transformers can. That matters because it reframes non-AR language modeling as a potentially distinct computational paradigm, not merely an efficiency trick.","technical_approach":"The paper is centered on theoretical constructions and equivalence proofs. It connects MDMs to two more interpretable reasoning frameworks: chain-of-thought transformers and padded looped transformers. The key result is that MDMs are equivalent to polynomially padded PLTs in the finite-precision log-width setting, and that they can solve all problems solvable by CoT-augmented transformers. This is a sensible framing because it avoids overclaiming against arbitrary universal models and instead compares MDMs to abstractions that are closer to how modern LLM reasoning is discussed. The mention of problem classes such as regular languages also suggests MDMs may have native advantages on some iterative-parallel computations rather than merely emulating AR reasoning.","experiments":"This is primarily a theory paper, and the abstract provides no model sizes, datasets, or benchmark numbers. The practical reading should focus on the assumptions behind the theorems—finite precision, logarithmic width, and how iteration count scales with input length—because those assumptions determine how 的三段行为；并通过谱分析、有效秩或下游长上下文任务表现来支撑理论。对工程侧最有用的观察应是 β_n 与 n 的推荐增长关系，而不是单点最优超参。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper explains a real pathology in long-context transformers: as context For pretraining long-context models, the key message is that attention scaling is not just a heuristic boost; it likely needs to sit in a critical regime. That matters because the wrong scaling can either collapse representation diversity or destroy useful token mixing.","technical_approach":"The authors analyze a simplified but tractable model and show that the attention scaling factor β_n induces a phase transition. Too little scaling drives all tokens toward a shared direction; too much scaling makes attention behave like the identity, removing mean-field aggregation. The useful regime lies in between, with a critical polylogarithmic scaling that preserves both separation and interaction. The strength of the paper is that it turns an empirical trick into an explicit trade-off.","experiments":"The abstract does not include empirical numbers, but it strongly suggests validation of the theoretical phase transition on both simplified settings and real transformers. Small Training Runs Reliably Guide Data Curation? Rethinking Proxy-Model Practice","authors":["Jiachen (Tianhao) Wang","Tong Wu","Kaifeng Lyu","James Y Zou","Dawn Song","Ruoxi Jia","Prateek Mittal"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011765"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011765","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["data-quality","data-mixture","scaling","proxy-model","pretraining"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011858","title":"SPG: Sandwiched Policy Gradient for Masked Diffusion Language Models","authors":["Chenyu Wang","Paria Rashidinejad","Andy (DiJia) Su","Song Jiang","Sid Wang","Siyan Zhao","Cai Zhou","Shannon Shen","Feiyu Chen","Tommi Jaakkola","Yuandong Tian","Bo Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as an efficient alternative to autoregressive models due to their ability to decode multiple tokens in parallel. However, aligning dLLMs with human preferences or task-specific rewards via reinforcement learning (RL) is challenging because their intractable log-likelihood precludes the direct application of standard policy gradient methods. While prior work uses surrogates like the evidence lower bound (ELBO), these one-sided approximations can introduce significant policy gradient bias. To address this, we propose the Sandwiched Policy Gradient (SPG) that leverages both an upper and a lower bound of the true log-likelihood. Experiments show that SPG significantly outperforms baselines based on ELBO or one-step estimation. Specifically, SPG improves the accuracy over state-of-the-art RL methods for dLLMs by 3.6% on GSM8K, 2.6% on MATH500, 18.4% on Countdown, and 27.0% on Sudoku. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011858"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011858","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"Diffusion LLM（dLLM）的 log-likelihood 不可解析计算，导致标准 policy gradient 方法无法直接用于 RL 对齐。现有方法用 ELBO 等单侧近似作为替代，但会引入显著的策略梯度偏差。","importance":"方法级贡献，解决 diffusion LM 对齐的核心技术瓶颈。随着 dLLM 逐渐成为 AR 的替代方案，如何对其做 RLHF/RLVR 是一个必须解决的问题。SPG 提供了比 ELBO 更准确的梯度估计，是 dLLM 实用化的关键一步。","technical_approach":"提出 Sandwiched Policy Gradient（SPG）：同时利用 log-likelihood 的上界和下界来夹逼真实梯度。ELBO 只提供下界，导致梯度估计有系统性偏差；SPG 通过上下界的组合减小偏差。'Sandwiched' 的含义就是用上下界把真实值夹在中间。与基于 ELBO 或 one-step estimation 的方法相比，SPG 的梯度估计更准确。","experiments":"声称 SPG 显著优于基于 ELBO 和 one-step estimation 的 baseline。摘要未给出具体数字和任务。需看全文确认在哪些 dLLM 架构和任务上测试，以及计算开销的增加。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Diffusion LLMs have intractable log-likelihoods, preventing direct application of standard policy gradient methods for RL alignment. Existing approaches use ELBO as a surrogate, but this one-sided approximation introduces significant policy gradient bias.","importance":"Method-level contribution solving a core technical bottleneck for dLLM alignment. As dLLMs emerge as AR alternatives, enabling RLHF/RLVR for them is essential. SPG provides more accurate gradient estimates than ELBO-based methods.","technical_approach":"Sandwiched Policy Gradient (SPG) uses both an upper and a lower bound on the true log-likelihood to sandwich the real gradient. ELBO alone provides only a lower bound, causing systematic gradient bias. By combining both bounds, SPG reduces this bias. Compared to ELBO-based or one-step estimation baselines, SPG yields more accurate gradient estimates.","experiments":"Claims SPG significantly outperforms ELBO-based and one-step estimation baselines. Specific numbers, dLLM architectures, and tasks require the full paper. Computational overhead analysis also needed.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion-lm","policy-gradient","rl-alignment","masked-diffusion"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011903","title":"Why Low-Precision Transformer Training Fails: An Analysis on Flash Attention","authors":["Haiquan Qiu","Quanming Yao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$30","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011903"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011903","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解释了一个很顽固的训练失败现象：低精度 Transformer 训练配合 flash attention 时，loss 会突然爆炸，而且常规上常被当成随机数值不稳定。作者的结论是，这不是偶发噪声，而是由注意力内部相似的低秩表示与低精度舍入偏差相互放大，形成系统性失稳回路。","importance":"这项工作的重要性很高，属于训练稳定性机制级贡献。低精度和 flash attention 已经是大规模预训练的主流工程栈，如果这里的 failure mode 没被讲清楚，很多经验性 workaround 只能治标不治本。对 pretrain 的直接启示是：数值格式、kernel 实现和表示几何不是分离问题，某些表示结构会选择性放大算子级误差，最终改变优化轨迹甚至导致训练崩溃。","technical_approach":"核心方法是机理分析而不是单点 trick。作者识别出两个耦合因素：一是 attention 中出现相似、近低秩的表示，使某些计算路径对微小偏差更敏感；二是低精度算术中的 biased rounding error 会在 flash attention 的特定实现里持续累积。两者结合后，误差不再是零均值噪声，而会沿训练过程形成正反馈，污染权重更新，最终触发 catastrophic loss explosion。这个解释比“低精度动态范围不够”更细，因为它指出了为什么同样低精度设置在某些表示状态下会突然从可训变成不可训。摘要没有写具体修复策略，但按这一路径，可能的解法会围绕去偏舍入、关键路径高精度保留、或抑制 attention 低秩塌缩。","experiments":"摘要声称给出了 first mechanistic explanation，并验证了失稳由上述两个因素共同驱动。没有提供模型规模、精度格式（FP8/BF16/FP16）、失败出现的训练步数、不同 attention 实现的对照，也没有给出修复后能恢复多少稳定训练区间。即便缺数字，这里最关键的实验价值在于因果拆分：如果单独控制低秩相似性或单独控制舍入偏差都不足以复现爆炸，而两者同时出现才能触发，那么这个解释就远比一般性的数值分析更有操作性。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper explains a stubborn failure case in modern transformer training: when low-precision training is combined with flash attention, training can abruptly diverge with catastrophic loss spikes. The key claim is that this is not random numerical noise but a structured instability caused by the interaction between similar low-rank attention representations and biased rounding errors in low-precision arithmetic.","importance":"This is a high-value mechanistic contribution for training stability. Low precision and flash attention are now standard parts of large-scale pretraining stacks, so understanding where they fail matters more than another heuristic workaround. The broader lesson for pretraining is that numerical format, kernel implementation, and representation geometry cannot be treated independently; certain internal states can selectively amplify operator-level error and alter the optimization trajectory.","technical_approach":"The contribution is an analysis rather than a single trick. The authors identify two coupled drivers: first, attention develops similar, near-low-rank representations that make computations highly sensitive to small perturbations; second, low-precision arithmetic introduces biased rounding errors that compound under flash attention’s computation pattern. Together, these errors stop behaving like harmless zero-mean noise and instead form a positive feedback loop that corrupts updates and eventually explodes the loss. This is more informative than saying low precision has insufficient dynamic range, because it explains why the same precision setup can be stable in one regime and fail in another. The abstract does not specify the mitigation, but the mechanism points naturally to debiased rounding, selective high-precision paths, or methods that prevent rank-collapse-like states in attention.","experiments":"The abstract claims the first mechanistic explanation and says the instability is driven jointly by the two identified factors. It does not provide model sizes, precision formats, failure onset steps, attention-kernel comparisons, or the stability gains achieved by a fix. Even without those details, the critical experimental value is causal isolation: if neither low-rank similarity alone nor rounding bias alone is sufficient to trigger divergence, but their interaction is, the explanation is much stronger than a generic numerical stability diagnosis.","authors_note":""},"tags":["training-stability","low-precision","flash-attention","loss-spike"],"notable_authors":["Haiquan Qiu","Quanming Yao"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006480","title":"Cautious Optimizers: Improving Training with One Line of Code","authors":["Kaizhao Liang","Lizhang Chen","Bo Liu","Qiang Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"AdamW has been the default optimizer for transformer pretraining. For many years, our community searched for faster and more stable optimizers with only constrained positive outcomes. In this work, we propose a \\textbf{single-line modification in Pytorch} to any momentum-based optimizer, which we rename cautious optimizer, e.g. C-AdamW and C-Lion.  Our theoretical result shows that this modification preserves Adam's Hamiltonian function and it does not break the convergence guarantee under the Lyapunov analysis. In addition, a whole new family of optimizers is revealed by our theoretical insight. Among them, we pick the simplest one for empirical experiments, showing not only consistent speed-up on LLM pretraining and post-training tasks, but also better results in MAE pretraining, with minimum extra tuning on hyperparameters. Standard masked diffusion is fast because it unmasks many positions at once, but that same parallelism weakens cross-dimensional coordination in low-step regimes.","importance":"This is a meaningful method contribution within non-AR discrete generation. The key idea is that latent-variable structure can restore some of the global dependency modeling that few-step masked diffusion tends to lose. That is relevant not just for discrete diffusion itself, but also for any unified token-based generative setup where fast parallel generation matters.","technical_approach":"VADD augments discrete diffusion with a variational latent layer and an auxiliary recognition model for amortized inference. The underlying issue is distributional forgetting: the model drifts away from the base distribution before classical overfitting is visible, which hurts downstream RL adaptation.","importance":"This is highly relevant to the pretrain–posttrain interface. It reframes a practical tuning question—how much SFT to do before RL—as a measurable training-dynamics problem. The broader lesson is that pre-RL SFT should optimize for RL readiness, not just immediate supervised performance. Preserving entropy, diversity, and connection to the base model distribution can matter more than squeezing out the last few points on the SFT benchmark.","technical_approach":"The work analyzes cold-start dynamics and then advocates a lightweight SFT stage designed to prepare, rather than pre-solve, the RL problem. The abstract indicates that diversity-based metrics such as output entropy are used to detect harmful drift earlier than standard validation scores. Relative to common practice, the novelty is not a new RL algorithm but a different objective for the pre-RL stage: stop earlier, preserve exploration capacity, and avoid collapsing the model into a narrow supervised mode.","experiments":"The abstract gives two concrete empirical takeaways: the best SFT checkpoint by evaluation metrics is often not the best one for RL, and diversity metrics expose this mismatch by tracking distributional forgetting. Even without those details, the practical implication is strong: many current RL pipelines may be overdoing SFT before the actual reward-driven phase slow token-by-token decoding. Prior autoregressive video models often gave up either architectural unity or practical efficiency.","importance":"This looks like a meaningful step toward unified multimodal pretraining and generation. Second, it uses discrete diffusion to reduce the latency of pure next-token video decoding. Relative to prior AR video systems, the point is not to attach a large external vision stack, but to keep the model LLM-compatible while fixing the two places where a vanilla LM would fail: positional encoding and decoding efficiency. Concepts","authors":["Jihoon Tack","Jack Lanchantin","Jane Dwivedi-Yu","Andrew Cohen","Ilia Kulikov","Janice Lan","Shibo Hao","Yuandong Tian","Jason E Weston","Xian Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$37","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006726"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006726","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：next-token prediction 虽然是 LLM 预训练的默认目标，但它把学习信号几乎全部压到离散 token 上，未必是最样本高效的表征学习方式。过去大家通常通过蒸馏、辅助 loss 或 latent target 来补这个问题，但很少把连续概念直接混进语言模型主干状态中共同训练。","importance":"这项工作是比较典型的 pretrain 方法创新，而且带一点范式探索意味。它的潜在冲击不在于替代 AR，而在于提示我们：token 预测目标可以和更抽象的连续语义目标并行优化，且这可能比单纯蒸馏更有效。对预训练研究的启发是，稀疏自编码器学到的“概念方向”也许可以成为一种可扩展的中间监督接口。","technical_approach":"核心方法 CoCoMix 把离散 next-token prediction 和连续 concepts 联合起来训练。具体做法是先从预训练好的 sparse autoencoder 中提取连续概念表示，再把这些 concept 表示与 token hidden states 交错混入模型隐状态，使模型在做 token 预测的同时也对齐到更高层的连续结构。这个设计和常见蒸馏的关键区别是：它不是要求学生模仿另一个 LM 的 logits 或 hidden states，而是引入一组较稀疏、可解释性更强的概念信号，并把它们作为主训练流的一部分。这样做可能有效，因为它给每个位置额外提供了压缩语义结构，减少了纯 token loss 的局部性；边界则是 concept 质量高度依赖 SAE 训练语料与稀疏性设置，如果概念不稳定，混入主干可能带来干扰。","experiments":"摘要明确声称：CoCoMix 在语言建模和下游推理任务上都比标准 next-token prediction 与 knowledge distillation 更样本高效、且表现更好。摘要没有给出参数规模、训练 token 数、SAE 容量、对比 baseline、perplexity 或 reasoning benchmark 的具体提升数字，因此暂时无法判断提升量级。正式论文里最值得看的实验包括：只加 concept prediction、不做 hidden mixing 是否仍有效；concept 数量/稀疏度的 scaling；以及在固定训练 token 预算下样本效率收益是否持续到较大模型。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper questions whether next-token prediction alone is the best pretraining signal for representation learning in LLMs. Standard LM training pushes almost all supervision through discrete token targets, and prior fixes usually rely on distillation or auxiliary losses rather than injecting continuous semantic structure directly into the model’s hidden stream.","importance":"This is a genuine pretraining-method contribution with some paradigm-exploration flavor. It does not reject autoregression, but it expands the target space beyond discrete tokens and suggests that continuous concept supervision can improve sample efficiency more effectively than conventional distillation. For pretraining research, that is interesting because sparse autoencoder features may become a scalable interface between representation learning and language modeling.","technical_approach":"CoCoMix jointly trains on next-token prediction and continuous concepts extracted from a pretrained sparse autoencoder. The concept representations are interleaved with token hidden states so the model learns token-level prediction while also aligning to higher-level continuous structure. The main difference from knowledge distillation is that the target is not another LM’s logits or hidden states, but a sparse concept space that is potentially more structured and interpretable. This could help because token loss is local and indirect, whereas concept targets provide a compressed semantic scaffold. The downside is obvious: if the SAE concepts are unstable or poorly matched to the LM training distribution, they may inject noise rather than useful supervision.","experiments":"The abstract claims that CoCoMix is more sample efficient and consistently outperforms standard next-token pretraining and knowledge distillation on language modeling and downstream reasoning benchmarks. But there are no model sizes, token budgets, SAE sizes, baselines, or quantitative gains in the abstract, so the scale of the benefit is still unclear. The most informative details to check are whether concept prediction alone suffices without hidden-state mixing, how performance scales with concept sparsity and count, and whether the sample-efficiency gains persist at larger model sizes.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pretraining","objective","representation-learning","continuous-latent","next-token"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006782","title":"Intrinsic Entropy of Context Length Scaling in LLMs","authors":["Jingzhe Shi","Qinwei (Martin) Ma","Hongyi Liu","Hang Zhao","Jenq-Neng Hwang","Lei Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Long Context Language Models have drawn great attention in the past few years. There has been work discussing the impact of long context on Language Model performance: some find that long irrelevant context could harm performance, while some experimentally summarize loss reduction by relevant long context as Scaling Laws. This calls for a more thorough understanding of how long context impacts Language Modeling. In this work, we (1) propose to use `Intrinsic Entropy' for explaining the impact of context length on language modeling; and (2) conduct experiments on natural language and synthetic data, validating our proposed theoretical assumptions and deductions. Our theoretical framework can provide practical insights such as establishing that training dataset size dictates an optimal context length and bounds context length scaling for certain cases. We hope our work may inspire new long context Language Models, as well as future work studying the physics of Language Models. Non‑Autoregressive Text Generation via Sampling‑Hybrid Inference","authors":["Egor Sevriugov","Nikita Dragunov","Anton Razzhigaev","Andrey Kuznetsov","Ivan Oseledets"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$3b","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007040"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007040","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"非自回归文本生成的核心难点是离散序列依赖难建模，很多 NAR 方法要么质量差，要么推理又退化成复杂的迭代采样。","importance":"这是 NAR/diffusion/flow 方向的范式推进：把 conditional flow matching 用 KL 几何（logit 空间线性插值）落到离散文本上，并给出“最大似然=恢复速度场”的理论对齐，减少方法设计的拍脑袋成分。","technical_approach":"Logit-KL Flow Matching 的关键是用 KL divergence 的测地线作为插值路径，对应到实现上就是在 logit 空间做线性插值，从而定义更自然的离散分布演化。作者证明在该设定下最大化条件似然会精确恢复 flow matching 的 velocity field，给训练目标提供严格依据；推理上采用 sampling-hybrid inference（摘要未展开），意图是在少量采样步骤下补足依赖建模。取舍是：logit 插值依赖良好的校准与数值稳定性，且 NAR 的并行优势往往要用更多训练/推理技巧换质量。","experiments":"摘要未给出数据集（如 WMT/LM1B）、模型规模、推理步数、与 AR/NAR baseline 的 BLEU/困惑度/速度对比数字，也未给出 hybrid inference 的具体开销；目前能确认的主要是理论结果与方法动机。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Non-autoregressive text generation struggles to model discrete dependencies: many NAR methods either lose quality or reintroduce expensive iterative sampling at inference.","importance":"This is a paradigm advance for NAR/flow-style sequence modeling: it instantiates conditional flow matching for discrete text using KL-geodesic interpolation (linear in logit space) and provides a tight theory link between conditional MLE and recovering the flow velocity field.","technical_approach":"Logit-KL Flow Matching uses KL-divergence geodesics as the interpolation path, which becomes linear interpolation in logit space, yielding a geometrically principled evolution of discrete distributions. The paper proves that maximizing conditional likelihood in this setup exactly recovers the flow-matching velocity field, reducing ad-hoc objective choices. Inference is “sampling-hybrid” (not detailed in the abstract), aiming to regain dependency modeling with few sampling steps. Trade-offs include numerical stability/calibration in logit-space interpolation and the usual NAR tension between parallelism and quality.","experiments":"The abstract does not report datasets, model sizes, inference steps, or numeric quality/speed comparisons against AR and prior NAR baselines, nor the overhead of the hybrid inference. Existing work compensates with sampling-based tricks such as self-consistency or tree search, but the model’s internal reasoning channel is still fundamentally single-track.","importance":"This is a paradigm exploration rather than an incremental optimization. The important claim is that continuous chain of thought (CoT2) is not just a different representation of intermediate reasoning; it may change the amount of parallel search a model can carry out within a forward pass. For pretraining and post-training, the implication is significant: if useful reasoning can live in continuous latent trajectories, future reasoning models may not need to bind every step of thought to natural-language tokens. That is still far from production practice, but it is a serious research direction.","technical_approach":"The method replaces discrete CoT tokens with continuous-valued tokens and studies reasoning in that latent space. The paper first proves that CoT2 can track multiple discrete traces in parallel within a single continuous representation, and quantifies the achievable parallelism and its inference benefit. It then gives a one-layer Transformer construction based on CoT2 that solves subset sum with sufficient embedding dimension. The key design idea is not smoother hidden states for their own sake. It is to use continuous space as a superposable computational substrate that can carry multiple candidate branches at once. Compared with standard autoregressive CoT, this trades interpretability and textual readability for potential parallel search.","experiments":"The abstract emphasizes theory and a constructive subset-sum example, but does not report large-scale language-model experiments. So the current value is mainly a capability argument, not a drop-in training recipe. The decisive empirical questions are whether neural training can reliably discover useful parallel search in practice, whether CoT2 actually beats discrete CoT on token budget or wall-clock, and whether continuous thoughts collapse into opaque, unstable scratchpads. Without that evidence, the paper’s impact is conceptual rather than immediately practical.","authors_note":""},"tags":["continuous-cot","latent-reasoning","non-autoregressive","parallel-reasoning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007159","title":"The Devil behind the mask: An emergent safety vulnerability of Diffusion LLMs","authors":["Zichen Wen","Jiashu Qu","Zhaorun Chen","Xiaoya Lu","Dongrui Liu","Zhiyuan Liu","Ruixi Wu","Yicun Yang","Xiangqi Jin","Haoyun Xu","Xuyang Liu","Weijia Li","Chaochao Lu","Jing Shao","Conghui He","Linfeng Zhang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$3d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007159"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007159","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心结论是：扩散语言模型有一类 AR LLM 不同的安全脆弱性，现有对齐机制在 masked-input、context-aware 攻击下会失效。过去大家更多把 dLLM 的优势放在并行解码和双向建模上，但这些同样带来了新的攻击面：攻击者可以利用 mask 与文本交错输入，操纵模型在填充过程中绕过安全边界。","importance":"这项工作很重要，因为它不是泛泛讨论 jailbreak，而是第一次系统性指出 dLLM 的安全问题与其建模机制直接相关，属于新范式安全边界研究。对 pretrain 研究的启示也很直接：如果你选择 diffusion LM 这条路，安全训练和红队方法不能直接照搬 AR LLM。新的生成接口会带来新的 threat model，这应当在训练目标和对齐数据设计阶段就被考虑。","technical_approach":"作者提出 DIJA，专门针对 dLLM 的 jailbreak 攻击框架。它构造 adversarial interleaved mask-text prompts，利用 dLLM 的两个结构特性：双向上下文建模和并行去噪生成。与 AR jailbreak 常靠逐 token 诱导不同，DIJA 的关键是让有害语义被分散到 mask 和明文上下文的组合里，使安全模块难以在局部或单向条件下识别整体意图。这个攻击框架的价值不只是更强攻击成功率，更在于揭示 dLLM 对齐失效发生在哪个机制接口上。","experiments":"摘要明确声称这是首个系统化研究，并表明现有对齐机制在这类攻击下失守，但没有给出具体模型、攻击成功率和对比基线。最关键的实验应包括：不同 dLLM 架构和对齐方案下的 ASR；与 AR LLM 在类似 threat model 下的差异；以及防御手段如 mask-aware safety training、双向上下文过滤或去噪阶段约束是否有效。若结果显示攻击能稳定跨模型迁移，这会成为 diffusion LM 走向实用前必须补的缺口。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The central claim is that diffusion LMs have a distinct safety vulnerability that standard alignment mechanisms fail to cover. The issue appears specifically under context-aware masked-input attacks. The same features that make dLLMs attractive—bidirectional conditioning and parallel decoding—also open a new attack surface that does not map cleanly onto autoregressive jailbreak assumptions.","importance":"This matters because it is not just another jailbreak paper. It is a safety-boundary study for a different language-modeling paradigm. The broader implication for pretraining is straightforward: if you build diffusion LMs, you cannot assume AR-style alignment recipes and red-teaming protocols will transfer. A new generation interface creates a new threat model, and that needs to be reflected in both training objectives and safety evaluation.","technical_approach":"The paper introduces DIJA, a jailbreak framework tailored to diffusion LMs. It builds adversarial interleaved mask-text prompts that exploit two structural properties of dLLMs: bidirectional context modeling and parallel denoising generation. Unlike many AR jailbreaks that rely on token-by-token steering, DIJA distributes harmful intent across masks and visible context so that safety mechanisms struggle to detect the full semantics from local or one-directional cues. The value of the framework is not only stronger attacks, but a clearer diagnosis of where alignment fails in the dLLM generation pipeline.","experiments":"The abstract claims this is the first systematic study and that existing alignment mechanisms fail under DIJA-style attacks, but it does not report model names, attack success rates, or baseline comparisons. The most important experiments will measure attack success across different dLLM architectures and alignment schemes, compare the failure mode against AR LLMs under analogous threat models, and test defenses such as mask-aware safety training, bidirectional context filtering, or denoising-stage constraints. If the attacks transfer reliably across models, this becomes a major practical blocker for diffusion LM capabilities through pre-training. However, the pre-training dynamics remains a black box. In this work, we track linear interpretable feature evolution across pre-training snapshots using a sparse dictionary learning method called crosscoders. We find that most features begin to form around a specific point, while more complex patterns emerge in later training stages. Feature attribution analyses reveal causal connections between feature evolution and downstream performance. Our feature-level observations are highly consistent with previous findings on Transformer's two-stage learning process, which we term a statistical learning phase and a feature learning phase. Our work opens up the possibility to track fine-grained representation progress during language model learning dynamics. Our code is available at https://github.com/OpenMOSS/Language-Model-SAEs. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007251"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007251","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：预训练过程中概念和可解释特征是如何逐步形成的，能否在训练快照之间连续追踪，而不是只看最终模型。过去关于 pretraining dynamics 的结论多来自 loss 曲线、线性 probe 或少量层级分析，缺少能跨训练阶段稳定对齐的特征级观察工具。","importance":"这是一个高价值的机制分析工作。它的重要性在于把预训练动态从粗粒度的性能演化，推进到“哪些特征在什么时候出现、哪些更晚形成、它们与下游能力有没有因果联系”这个粒度。对 pretrain 研究的启示很直接：所谓两阶段学习过程不只是 loss 现象，而可能对应可解释特征从统计模式到复杂概念的真实演化。","technical_approach":"作者使用 crosscoders 这种稀疏字典学习方法，对不同预训练快照中的线性可解释特征进行对齐和跟踪。核心方法不是重新训练一个解释器去看某个单点模型，而是构造跨时间共享或可对应的特征表示，从而观察特征的 birth time、演化轨迹和复杂度变化。然后再用 feature attribution 分析，把特征演化与下游性能变化联系起来。与常见 SAE 或 probe 分析相比，这里的关键区别是强调跨快照一致性；没有这一步，很难说某个特征是“形成了”还是只是局部可分性变化。","experiments":"摘要给出几个明确结论：大多数特征会在某个特定训练点开始形成，更复杂的模式出现在更后期；特征归因分析显示这些演化与下游性能存在因果联系；整体观察与 Transformer 两阶段学习结论高度一致。摘要没有给出模型规模、训练 token 数、快照密度和具体下游任务，因此目前无法判断结论是否跨架构、跨规模稳定。最值得看的实验是：不同层的特征形成时间是否系统错位、复杂特征是否更依赖后期 token、以及如果只训练到“统计学习阶段”下游哪些能力会明显缺失。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies how interpretable concepts emerge during pretraining, and whether they can be tracked continuously across checkpoints instead of only being analyzed in the final model. Existing work on pretraining dynamics mostly relies on losses, probes, or snapshot-specific analysis, which leaves feature formation largely opaque.","importance":"This is a strong mechanistic contribution to pretraining science. Its importance lies in moving from coarse training curves to feature-level evolution: which features appear when, which ones require later training, and whether their emergence is causally tied to downstream capability. For pretraining research, that directly sharpens the common two-stage learning narrative.","technical_approach":"The authors use crosscoders, a sparse dictionary-learning method, to align and track linear interpretable features across pretraining snapshots. The key design is temporal alignment of features rather than fitting a separate interpreter at each checkpoint. That allows them to talk about feature birth times, trajectories, and increasing complexity in a meaningful way. They then use feature attribution to connect those trajectories to downstream performance. Compared with standard probes or SAE-style one-checkpoint analysis, the main difference is that this framework is built to preserve correspondence over time.","experiments":"The abstract reports three central findings: most features emerge around a specific point in training, more complex patterns appear later, and feature attribution reveals causal links to downstream performance. These observations align closely with the previously reported two-stage learning dynamics in Transformers. This goes beyond pure empirical fitting by proposing a unifying explanation. The obvious limitation is that norm-based complexity may not capture all of the training dynamics relevant to modern large-scale models.","experiments":"The abstract supports two clear claims: the analysis spans models from perceptrons to deep networks, and it describes the entire training trajectory rather than only the end of training. Matching Reward Distributions for LLM Reasoning","authors":["Xuekai Zhu","Daixuan Cheng","Dinghuai Zhang","Henry Li","Kaiyan Zhang","Che Jiang","Youbang Sun","Ermo Hua","Yuxin Zuo","Xingtai Lv","Qizheng Zhang","Lin Chen","Fanghao Shao","Bo Xue","Yunchong Song","Zhenjie Yang","Ganqu Cui","Ning Ding","Jianfeng Gao","Xiaodong Liu","Bowen Zhou","Hongyuan Mei","Zhouhan Lin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$49","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007683"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007683","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：当前 LLM reasoning RL 过于追求高回报轨迹，容易把少数高频奖励模式学得很尖，反而压掉低频但同样有效的推理路径。PPO、GRPO 这类 reward-maximizing 方法默认“更高 reward 就更该集中概率”，但在数学和代码推理里，正确解往往不止一种，过度 mode-seeking 会伤害探索、多样性和跨题泛化。","importance":"这是 post-train RL 方法级的工作，但对 pretrain/posttrain 接口有直接启发。它的意义在于把 RL for reasoning 的目标从“最大化期望奖励”改成“匹配奖励诱导出的目标分布”，等于明确承认 reasoning 需要保留多条可行轨迹，而不是把策略压缩到单一路径。这个视角和近期对 diversity collapse、reward hacking、以及 test-time search 质量退化的担忧是对齐的。若实验结论可靠，它更像对 RL objective 的范式修正，而不是单纯调参。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 FlowRL：不用策略直接追最高 reward，而是先把标量 reward 变成一个归一化的目标分布，再让策略去匹配这个分布。作者引入一个可学习的 partition function，把不同轨迹的 reward 映射成相对概率质量，然后最小化 policy 与目标分布之间的 reverse KL；实现上采用 flow balancing 形式做优化。这样设计的原因是，纯 reward maximization 会天然鼓励 mode collapse，而 reverse KL 到一个由 reward 定义的分布，可以在偏好高回报的同时保留多样解。与 PPO/GRPO 相比，它舍弃了“只要均值 reward 高就行”的单指标最优，转而约束整条 reward distribution 的形状。代价是训练目标更复杂，也更依赖目标分布构造是否稳定。","experiments":"摘要说明实验覆盖数学和代码推理任务，并以 reasoning diversity 与泛化能力作为关键观察点。主结论是：FlowRL 相比 reward-maximizing baseline 能保留更多有效推理路径，同时提升下游推理性能。摘要没有给出模型参数量、训练数据规模、具体 benchmark 名称、以及相对 PPO/GRPO 的精确增益，因此无法可靠复述数值。仅从摘要可提炼的实验判断是：论文不是只比较最终准确率，而是强调 reward distribution matching 对 exploration 和 out-of-distribution generalization 的帮助，这一点比单点分数更有方法学价值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a common issue in RL for LLM reasoning: reward-maximizing objectives tend to over-concentrate probability mass on dominant high-reward trajectories and suppress alternative valid reasoning paths. Methods such as PPO and GRPO optimize expected reward well, but in reasoning tasks there are often multiple correct or useful trajectories, so aggressive mode-seeking hurts diversity and generalization.","importance":"This is a post-training RL contribution, but it matters for the broader pretrain-to-posttrain pipeline because it changes what the policy is asked to preserve. The key idea is to move from maximizing scalar reward to matching a reward-induced trajectory distribution. That is a meaningful shift: it treats diversity as part of the target rather than a side effect. If the empirical gains hold, this is closer to an objective-level correction for reasoning RL than a small optimization tweak.","technical_approach":"FlowRL first converts scalar rewards into a normalized target distribution using a learnable partition function, then trains the policy to match that distribution by minimizing reverse KL. The optimization is implemented with a flow-balancing formulation. The motivation is clear: pure reward maximization is naturally mode-seeking, while matching a reward-shaped distribution can still favor high-reward trajectories without collapsing onto only the most common ones. Compared with PPO or GRPO, the method gives up the idea that expected reward alone is sufficient, and instead constrains the full shape of the reward-weighted policy. The trade-off is a more elaborate objective and potential sensitivity to how the target distribution is parameterized.","experiments":"The abstract reports experiments on both math and code reasoning tasks, with diversity and generalization as explicit evaluation targets. The main claim is that FlowRL preserves more valid reasoning trajectories and improves downstream reasoning performance over reward-maximizing baselines. However, the abstract does not provide model sizes, training scale, benchmark names, or exact gains over PPO/GRPO, so there is no reliable way to state quantitative results here. The most useful experimental signal is that the paper evaluates more than final accuracy and ties gains to exploration quality.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rl","reasoning","reward-modeling","flow-matching","diversity"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007720","title":"Unveiling the Basin-Like Loss Landscape in Large Language Models","authors":["Huanran Chen","Zeming Wei","Yao Huang","Yichi Zhang","Yinpeng Dong","Jun Zhu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$4a","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007720"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007720","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：大模型参数空间里的 loss landscape 到底是什么形状，以及这件事如何解释预训练与对齐微调的能力保留和能力冲突。过去很多讨论默认 fine-tuning 容易破坏原能力，但缺少对大模型尺度下“哪些方向平、哪些方向危险”的系统刻画。","importance":"这是机制分析与训练稳定性方向的重要工作。它的核心贡献是提出并实证支持一种 basin-like 视角：随着模型变大，参数空间中出现大面积性能近似不变的稳定盆地，预训练形成基础能力盆地，对齐微调再在其上形成 safety、math、coding 等特定能力盆地。对 pretrain/posttrain 接口的意义很直接——如果 benign fine-tuning 主要在盆地内部移动，就不应显著伤害已有能力；真正危险的是沿近最坏方向移动。这个结论对继续预训练、SFT、对抗调优乃至 model merging 都有参考价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是对 LLM loss landscape 做参数扰动和方向性分析，识别随机方向与 worst-case 方向下的稳定性差异，并比较预训练与对齐后模型的盆地结构。作者观察到：模型规模越大，对随机参数扰动越不敏感，说明存在更宽的稳定区域；而沿最坏方向的景观依然尖锐，能力会快速崩塌。基于此，论文把预训练和对齐理解为在不同能力子空间上塑造盆地，而 adversarial fine-tuning 则会沿近最坏方向把模型推出原盆地。与传统“平坦最优值”讨论相比，这篇工作的区别是它强调能力视角的多盆地结构，而不是只看单一 loss 平坦性。","experiments":"摘要给出了几个明确结论：第一，随着模型尺度增大，LLM 对随机参数扰动更鲁棒，出现大范围性能近似不变的 basin；第二，预训练先形成基础能力 basin，alignment 再形成 safety、math、coding 等 specific capability basins；第三，worst-case direction 始终尖锐，adversarial fine-tuning 会沿近最坏方向移动并造成破坏。摘要没有给出模型系列、参数规模、扰动半径、能力评测指标和具体下降幅度，因此无法写出数值。但这些观察如果在多个模型族上都成立，会强烈影响我们对 fine-tuning 安全区间和灾难性遗忘机制的理解。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies the shape of the loss landscape in large language models and uses it to explain why some fine-tuning preserves prior capabilities while other updates damage them. There has been plenty of discussion about catastrophic forgetting and alignment trade-offs, but much less understanding of which parameter directions are actually safe or dangerous at LLM scale.","importance":"This is an important mechanistic and training-stability contribution. The central claim is a basin-like view of LLM optimization: as model scale grows, large regions of parameter space emerge where performance stays nearly unchanged. Pretraining forms a basic capability basin, and alignment fine-tuning creates additional basins for specific capabilities such as safety, math, and coding. That matters directly for the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. If benign fine-tuning stays inside a basin, prior capabilities should mostly survive; if optimization moves along near-worst directions, collapse becomes likely.","technical_approach":"The method is a loss-landscape analysis based on parameter perturbations and directional probes. The paper compares random directions against worst-case directions and studies how the resulting stability regions change with scale and with post-training. The key observation is that larger LLMs become increasingly robust to random perturbations, indicating wide stable basins, while worst-case directions remain sharp and highly destructive. From this, the authors interpret pretraining and alignment as shaping different capability basins, and adversarial fine-tuning as pushing the model along near-worst directions that leave those basins. Compared with generic flatness discussions, the contribution here is a capability-centric multi-basin view rather than a single scalar notion of flat minima.","experiments":"The abstract reports several concrete findings: robustness to random parameter perturbations increases with scale; pretraining creates a basic capability basin; alignment forms specific basins for safety, math, and coding; and worst-case directions remain sharp, with adversarial fine-tuning moving close to those directions. The abstract does not provide model families, parameter counts, perturbation magnitudes, evaluation suites, or numerical degradation, so exact metrics cannot be summarized. If these patterns hold across multiple model families, they would significantly shape how we think about safe fine-tuning ranges and capability 到 pretrain 的接口有现实意义。当前很多高性能推理/对齐方案都在探索 replay、拒绝采样回流和异步数据使用；如果 off-policy RL 不稳定，就很难把这些更高效的数据管线做大。BAPO 的意义在于，它试图把这个不稳定性从‘经验问题’变成可分析、可修正的目标函数问题。","technical_approach":"BAPO 的核心是 Balanced Policy Optimization with Adaptive Clipping。作者提出两点关键洞见：第一，负优势样本在梯度里占主导会压制有用行为并诱发梯度爆炸；第二，固定 clipping 存在 Entropy-Clip Rule，会系统性阻止那些本该提升策略熵的更新。基于这个分析，BAPO 一方面平衡正负优势样本对优化的贡献，另一方面让 clipping 随状态或更新情形自适应，从而减少对探索有利更新的误杀。与标准 PPO 或其 off-policy 变体相比，它的不同点不是加更多正则，而是直接修目标中的不对称偏置。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型规模、任务集和数值提升，因此无法报告精确效果。可以确定的是，论文既有理论分析也有经验验证，关注的核心指标应包括 policy entropy、训练稳定性、collapse 发生率，以及最终对齐/推理性能。对这类方法，真正有价值的实验不只是最终 reward，而是离线数据占比上升、replay 更旧、优势分布更偏时，BAPO 相对 PPO 是否还能稳住；如果能，这对大规模异步 RLHF/RLVR 会更有意义。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a central problem in off-policy RL for LLMs: stale-policy data improves sample efficiency, but training often becomes unstable, entropy collapses, and the policy can degenerate. The authors argue that the issue is not just stale data in the abstract. It is tied to a specific optimization imbalance in PPO-like objectives under off-policy training.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with practical consequences for large-scale alignment. Many modern RL pipelines want replay, asynchronous data reuse, or rejection-sampled traces. If off-policy optimization is inherently brittle, those efficiency gains are hard to realize. The paper matters because it tries to turn a messy empirical failure mode into a targeted objective-design problem.","technical_approach":"BAPO introduces Balanced Policy Optimization with Adaptive Clipping. The key claims are that negative-advantage samples can dominate the gradient and suppress useful behavior, and that fixed clipping systematically blocks entropy-increasing updates through what the authors call the Entropy-Clip Rule. The proposed fix is therefore twofold: rebalance gradient contributions across positive and negative advantages, and replace fixed clipping with an adaptive mechanism that is less likely to kill exploratory updates. Compared with standard PPO variants, the focus is not on adding another regularizer but on correcting an objective asymmetry.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model sizes, benchmarks, or numeric gains, so exact results cannot be summarized. Strong evidence would show robustness as stale data increases or as the advantage distribution becomes more skewed, because that is where standard PPO-style training usually breaks accuracy、Pass@K 和 CoT-Pass@K 的共同变化；这种提升是否在难题上更明显；以及正确推理链的增加是否伴随错误但长 CoT 的同步增加。如果 CoT-Pass@K 的改善明显大于单纯答案 Pass@K 的改善，这将是‘RL 改变了推理能力而非仅改采样’的更强证据。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The This makes it hard to systematically understand their relationships or explore new designs.","importance":"A method/theory-level contribution that unifies multiplicative rotations and additive biases under group actions. Direct pretrain value: (1) provides a principled design space for position encoding search; (2) learned commuting generators may outperform hand-designed RoPE frequencies; (3) the framework clarifies the mathematical basis of length extrapolation.","technical_approach":"GRAPE uses group actions as the unifying principle. Multiplicative GRAPE operates in SO(d) with G(n)=exp(nωL) where L is a rank-2 skew-symmetric generator; RoPE is recovered exactly when the d/2 planes are canonical coordinate pairs with log-uniform spectrum. Additive GRAPE arises from unipotent actions in GL, unifying ALiBi-style methods. The key extension is learning commuting generator matrices rather than fixing them to RoPE's block-diagonal structure, opening a larger design space.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide specific experimental numbers. Full paper needed to assess whether learned GRAPE variants improve over RoPE/ALiBi on language modeling and long-context tasks.","authors_note":""},"tags":["position-encoding","transformer","long-context","architecture"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007935","title":"GPG: A Simple and Strong Reinforcement Learning Baseline for Model Reasoning","authors":["Xiangxiang Chu","Hailang Huang","Xiao Zhang","Fei Wei","Yong Wang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Reinforcement Learning (RL) can directly enhance the reasoning capabilities of large language models without extensive reliance on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). In this work, we revisit the traditional Policy Gradient (PG) mechanism and propose a minimalist RL approach termed Group Policy Gradient (GPG). Unlike conventional methods, GPG directly optimizes the original RL objective, thus obviating the need for surrogate loss functions. By eliminating the critic and reference models, avoiding KL divergence constraints, and addressing the advantage and gradient estimation bias, our approach significantly simplifies the training process compared to Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Our approach achieves superior performance without relying on auxiliary techniques or adjustments. As illustrated in Figure 1, extensive experiments demonstrate that our method not only reduces computational costs but also consistently outperforms GRPO across various unimodal and multimodal tasks. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007935"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007935","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"GRPO 等 RL 方法在增强 LLM 推理能力时引入了代理损失函数、critic 模型、参考模型和 KL 约束等复杂组件，增加了训练复杂度。能否回归最朴素的策略梯度，去掉这些附加组件，同时保持甚至超越 GRPO 的性能？","importance":"方法级贡献，提出了一个极简的 RL baseline。对 pretrain↔posttrain 接口的启示在于：如果一个去掉 critic、参考模型和 KL 约束的极简方法就能 work，说明 GRPO 中很多组件可能不是必要的，这有助于简化 R1-Zero 范式的训练流程。作为 strong baseline 的价值可能比方法本身更大。","technical_approach":"GPG（Group Policy Gradient）直接优化原始 RL 目标，不使用代理损失函数。去掉了 critic 模型、参考模型和 KL 散度约束，同时修正了 advantage 估计和梯度估计中的偏差。与 GRPO 的核心区别是：GRPO 用 group-level 的相对 advantage 和 PPO 风格的 clipped surrogate loss，GPG 则直接用策略梯度，更简洁。","experiments":"摘要提到在不依赖辅助技巧的情况下取得了优于 GRPO 的性能，但未给出具体数字和模型规模。需要看全文确认在哪些推理 benchmark 上验证、模型大小和训练成本对比。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"GRPO and similar RL methods for LLM reasoning introduce surrogate losses, critic models, reference models, and KL constraints, adding training complexity. Can we go back to vanilla policy gradient, remove these components, and still match or beat GRPO?","importance":"A method-level contribution proposing a minimalist RL baseline. For the pretrain-posttrain interface, if such a stripped-down method works well, it suggests many GRPO components may be unnecessary, simplifying the R1-Zero training pipeline. Its value as a strong baseline may exceed its novelty as a method.","technical_approach":"GPG (Group Policy Gradient) directly optimizes the original RL objective without surrogate losses. It removes the critic model, reference model, and KL divergence constraints while correcting bias in advantage and gradient estimation. The key difference from GRPO: GRPO uses group-relative advantages with PPO-style clipped surrogate loss; GPG uses direct policy gradient, which is simpler.","experiments":"The abstract claims superior performance over GRPO without auxiliary techniques but does not provide specific numbers or model scales. 和 student 如果 tokenizer 不同，就没法直接比较 next-token likelihood。现有蒸馏通常默认共享词表，或者退回 sequence-level 目标，原因不是这个问题不重要，而是跨 tokenizer 的概率空间不对齐很难做严谨。随着边缘部署需要更小词表、更小 embedding，这个问题变得值得重新认真解决。","importance":"结论上，这是一个方法级基础问题，影响不只在蒸馏，也涉及评估、对比学习和任何需要跨模型概率对齐的训练。对 pretrain 的启示很明确：tokenizer 不只是前处理，它决定了训练目标所在的概率空间；如果能在不同词表之间稳定地转移 likelihood，teacher-student 设计空间会明显扩大，小模型也不必被迫继承大模型的高成本词表。它的影响面比论文标题看起来更广。","technical_approach":"核心方法是利用 BPE 的隐式递归结构，构造 cross-tokenizer likelihood scoring 的概率框架。直观上，作者不是强行把一个 tokenizer 的 token 概率直接映射到另一个 tokenizer，而是利用 BPE 可分解、可递归展开的性质，在更细粒度的分解路径上计算序列 likelihood，从而让不同词表上的评分变得可比较。和常见的近似做法相比，这种方案的优势是概率意义更清楚，也更适合用于蒸馏中的 likelihood ratio 目标；代价则是计算图会更复杂，且方法主要依赖 BPE 这类具有可递归合并结构的 tokenizer。","experiments":"摘要明确的事实是，方法支持在 teacher 原生 tokenizer 之外评估序列 likelihood，目标场景包括用更小词表学生模型做蒸馏。当前没有给出 teacher/student 模型规模、词表大小差异、任务集和蒸馏收益数字。若论文实验扎实，核心证据应包括：跨 tokenizer 评分误差与近似方法对比、蒸馏后 student 困惑度或下游指标提升、以及词表压缩带来的内存节省与性能折损曲线。这里无法从摘要确认具体数值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical obstacle in distillation: next-token likelihood comparisons are straightforward only when teacher and student share the same tokenizer. Most existing pipelines either assume a shared vocabulary or fall back to sequence-level objectives, not because the issue is unimportant, but because the probability spaces are misaligned. As smaller edge models increasingly need smaller vocabularies for lower memory cost, this becomes a real bottleneck.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with implications beyond distillation. It matters for any training or evaluation setup that needs probability comparisons across models with different tokenizers. The main lesson for pretraining is that tokenization is not just preprocessing; it defines the space where the language modeling objective lives. If likelihood can be transferred reliably across vocabularies, teacher-student design becomes much more flexible and small models no longer need to inherit large, expensive vocabularies from their teachers.","technical_approach":"The method exploits an implicit recursive structure in BPE to build a probabilistic framework for cross-tokenizer likelihood scoring. Instead of forcing a direct token-to-token mapping between incompatible vocabularies, it leverages the fact that BPE tokens can be recursively decomposed and related through finer-grained merge structure, allowing sequence likelihood to be evaluated in a common probabilistic manner. Compared with heuristic approximations, this is cleaner and better suited to likelihood-ratio-based distillation. The trade-off is extra computational complexity, and the approach is naturally tied to tokenizers with BPE-like recursive structure.","experiments":"The abstract clearly states that the method enables sequence likelihood evaluation outside the teacher’s native tokenizer, with distillation into smaller-vocabulary student models as a target use case. Ermon"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$54","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008084"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008084","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作解决的是离散 diffusion model 如何做基于奖励或偏好的对齐，而不是只会最大似然去噪。现有思路如果直接把最终样本奖励反传到整条去噪轨迹，信用分配很差、优化也重，和 autoregressive LM 上成熟的 preference optimization 框架相比，离散 diffusion 还缺少一个自然对应物。作者要做的是把“轨迹对齐”拆成可训练、可解释的逐步目标。","importance":"结论上，这是一篇新型语言建模范式里的关键接口工作：它把 RL/偏好对齐从 AR LM 更系统地迁移到 discrete diffusion。对 pretrain 研究的意义不在于又多一个对齐 trick，而在于它补上了 diffusion LM 从 pretrain 走向 post-train 的方法链条。如果 discrete diffusion 想成为 AR 的可替代范式，除了生成质量，还必须回答如何做偏好学习、如何兼容任意 reward、如何避免高方差优化；这篇正面回应了这些问题。","technical_approach":"核心方法是通过 stepwise decomposition 做离散 diffusion trajectory alignment。作者不是只对最终输出施加 reward，再把梯度粗暴穿过整个反向扩散过程；而是把全局目标分解成每一步 posterior matching 的局部对齐目标，使每个去噪步都能得到更直接的训练信号。摘要里一个很关键的点是，作者声称这种分解与原始轨迹优化有等价最优解，这说明它不是简单启发式，而是有较强目标一致性。与 RL 式高方差策略梯度相比，这种离线偏好优化更稳定，也更适合离散 diffusion 的训练结构。","experiments":"摘要能确认的事实包括：方法是 offline preference optimization，兼容任意 reward function，并且理论上与原目标等价。当前没有给出具体模型类型（如 D3PM/MDLM/SEDD 风格）、任务、参数规模、奖励来源和改进数字。若论文实验完整，最值得看的证据应是：与 final-reward backprop、RL-based alignment 或无对齐 diffusion baseline 相比，在偏好胜率或 reward 指标上有稳定提升；同时展示 stepwise posterior matching 对训练稳定性和 sample quality 的影响。没有数字时不应虚构 SOTA。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses how to align discrete diffusion models with rewards or preferences, instead of training them only with maximum-likelihood denoising. A straightforward approach would put reward on the final sample and backpropagate through the full denoising trajectory, but that creates a difficult credit-assignment problem and a heavy optimization burden. Compared with autoregressive LMs, discrete diffusion still lacks a clean analogue of preference optimization.","importance":"This is an important interface paper for alternative language modeling paradigms. Its value is not just another alignment trick, but a more principled bridge from pretraining to post-training for discrete diffusion models. If diffusion LMs are meant to be serious alternatives to AR models, they need credible answers to reward optimization, arbitrary reward compatibility, and low-variance training. This work goes directly after that missing piece.","technical_approach":"The method performs trajectory alignment through stepwise decomposition. Instead of placing reward only on the final output and pushing gradients through the entire reverse diffusion chain, it decomposes the global objective into local stepwise alignment terms by matching per-step posteriors. That gives each denoising step a more direct learning signal. A key claim in the abstract is that this yields an equivalent optimal solution to the original trajectory-level objective, which makes the method stronger than a heuristic reweighting scheme. Relative to RL-style policy gradients, the offline preference formulation should also be more stable for discrete diffusion training.","experiments":"What is explicit from the abstract is that the method is an offline preference optimization framework, supports arbitrary rewards, and comes with an optimal-solution equivalence claim. LLM 一类把语音 token 放到语言模型外部单独生成，文本决策感知不到正在合成的语音；另一类虽做 joint autoregressive modeling，但单一分辨率的语音表示很难同时兼顾语义对齐和声学细节。作者想构建一个真正并行、互相感知的 speech-text conversation model。","importance":"结论上，这是统一语音-文本语言建模方向里的实做推进。对 为核心。当前没有可确认的数据集、模型参数量、实时率、词错率、自然度或对话一致性指标。若实验完整，最有价值的结果应包括：与非联合建模、单分辨率 joint AR baseline 相比，在文本质量、语音自然度和响应同步性上同时提升；以及 ablation truly co-designed. Some end-to-end systems generate speech tokens outside the language model, so text generation is unaware of concurrent speech synthesis. Others use joint autoregressive modeling, but a single speech token resolution struggles to balance semantic alignment with fine acoustic detail. The goal is a speech-text conversational model where both modalities are generated in a genuinely parallel and mutually aware way.","importance":"This is a concrete step in unified speech-text language modeling. For pretraining, the broader lesson is that multimodal unification is not just about concatenating tokens from different modalities; it also requires handling severe mismatches in temporal resolution. Speech is much denser than text, and naive AR unification can become dominated by low-level acoustic tokens. The proposed dual-resolution interface is therefore an important design pattern, analogous to how image or video tokens must be integrated into a unified LM.","technical_approach":"DrVoice is a joint autoregressive speech-text conversation model built around dual-resolution speech representations. The key design choice is to use a coarse speech representation for semantic-level alignment together with a finer representation for pronunciation, timbre, and detailed acoustics. This lets text and speech constrain each other within the same AR process without letting one extremely long acoustic sequence dominate the modeling problem. Compared with generating speech independently, it improves cross-modal awareness; compared with simple interleaving at a single scale, it better handles time-scale mismatch. The trade-off is added complexity in training and decoding schedules.","experiments":"What is explicit in the abstract is the task setting—parallel speech-text voice conversation—and the central role of dual-resolution speech tokens. Language Model Knows the Answer Before It Decodes","authors":["Pengxiang Li","Yefan Zhou","Dilxat Muhtar","Lu Yin","Shilin Yan","Li Shen","Yi Liang","Soroush Vosoughi","Shiwei Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$58","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008174"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008174","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["diffusion-lm","inference-efficiency","non-ar","planning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008183","title":"Achieving low-bit Muon through subspace preservation and grid quantization","authors":["Huaijin Wu","Bingrui Li","Yebin Yang","Yi Tu","Zhanpeng Zhou","Jianfei Chen","Junchi Yan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$59","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008183"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008183","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：如何把 Muon 优化器的状态进一步做低比特压缩，而不被其正交化步骤放大量化误差。现有低比特优化器压缩方法大多默认更新是逐元素或逐向量稳定的，但 Muon 会对矩阵更新做正交化，这会把原本可控的小误差重分布并放大，导致直接套用 AdamW 那套量化办法效果很差。","importance":"这项工作的意义主要在方法级和系统级交界处：它把“低比特 optimizer state 压缩”第一次较完整地扩展到了 Muon 这类正交化优化器。对 pretrain 的启示是明确的——如果社区继续探索只保留一阶矩、并依赖几何结构约束的优化器，那么压缩策略不能只盯着数值范围，还要盯着更新所在的谱子空间；否则省下来的显存会被训练不稳定吃回去。","technical_approach":"作者的核心方法是针对 Muon 设计一套保留主奇异子空间的低比特量化方案，并配合 grid quantization 控制误差形状。关键判断是：正交化后最致命的误差并不平均分布，而是集中来自 top singular subspace 的扰动；因此他们不是一味提高全量精度，而是优先保护这些主导方向，再把其余部分用更粗的离散网格表示。和通用 8-bit optimizer 压缩不同，这里设计目标不是还原原始张量本身，而是还原“经过正交化后仍然有效的更新方向”。这类设计有效的原因是 Muon 的收益本来就来自更新方向的几何性质，因此 preserving subspace 比 preserving element-wise value 更关键。代价是实现更依赖矩阵结构，未必能直接迁移到非矩阵化状态或其他优化器。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是：作者系统分析了量化误差在正交化前后的放大机制，并证明所提方法能实现低比特 Muon。摘要没有给出模型参数量、训练 token 数、具体 bit-width、baseline 名称和提升数字，因此不能编造。可以合理提炼的实验信息只有两点：一是他们做了误差来源分解，指出 top singular subspace 是主因；二是方法应当在显存占用与训练性能之间取得比直接量化更好的折中。是否达到与全精度 Muon 接近的收敛质量、以及收益在不同规模下是否稳定，还需要看正文。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a specific bottleneck: how to quantize Muon optimizer states to low bit-width without letting Muon’s orthogonalization step amplify quantization noise. Existing optimizer compression methods mostly assume elementwise or vectorwise error behaves benignly, but Muon applies matrix orthogonalization, which can reshape and magnify small errors enough to hurt training.","importance":"The contribution matters at the method-and-systems boundary: it extends low-bit optimizer-state compression to an optimizer whose behavior is governed by matrix geometry, not just moment statistics. For pretraining, the takeaway is practical: if we want memory-efficient first-moment optimizers such as Muon to scale, compression must preserve the right spectral structure, not merely shrink storage.","technical_approach":"The proposed approach is a Muon-specific low-bit scheme that preserves dominant singular subspaces and uses grid quantization for the remaining degrees of freedom. The key insight is that the harmful error after orthogonalization is not uniform; it is driven mainly by perturbations in the top singular subspace. So instead of spending precision evenly, the method protects those directions and quantizes the rest more aggressively. This differs from generic 8-bit optimizer compression, whose target is usually the raw tensor value; here the target is the update direction that remains useful after orthogonalization. That design makes sense because Muon’s benefit comes from geometric structure, so subspace fidelity matters more than elementwise fidelity. The trade-off is reduced generality: the method is tailored to matrix-structured updates and may not transfer cleanly to other optimizers.","experiments":"From the abstract, the solid experimental claim is that the authors perform a systematic analysis of quantization error under orthogonalization and use it to build a workable low-bit Muon variant. The abstract does not provide model sizes, token counts, bit-widths, baselines, or exact gains, so those should be treated as unknown. The most useful reported findings are the error attribution result—top singular subspace dominates the damage—and the implied memory/performance trade-off being better than naïve quantization. KaVa is the first framework to distill knowledge from compressed KV-cache into latent reasoning tokens. We identify which components of the gradient signal from the next-token prediction objective give rise to this phenomenon, and we propose a method to estimate the influence of those components on the emergence of specific features. After validating our approach on toy tasks, we use it to interpret the origins of the world model in OthelloGPT and syntactic features in a small language model.  Finally, we apply our framework to a pretrained LLM, showing that features with extremely high or low influence on future tokens tend to be related to formal reasoning domains such as code. Overall, our work takes a step toward understanding hidden features of Transformers through the lens of their development during training. Bianchessi","Yasmin C. Aguirre","Rodrigo C Barros","Lucas S. Kupssinskü"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Transformer-based language models rely on positional encoding (PE) to handle token order and support context length extrapolation.  However, existing PE methods lack theoretical clarity and rely on limited evaluation metrics to substantiate their extrapolation claims.  We propose the Bayesian Attention Mechanism (BAM), a theoretical framework that formulates positional encoding as a prior within a probabilistic model.  BAM unifies existing methods (e.g., NoPE and ALiBi) and motivates a new Generalized Gaussian positional prior that substantially improves long-context generalization.  Empirically, BAM enables accurate information retrieval at $500\\times$ the training context length, outperforming previous state-of-the-art context length generalization by more than $25\\times$ in retrieval accuracy while maintaining comparable perplexity and introducing minimal additional parameters. The appeal of this formulation is that it makes distance bias explicit: the model’s preference for locality versus long-range retrieval is encoded as a controllable prior rather than buried inside ad hoc position functions. The key difference from prior PE work is not just a new curve, but a unifying lens for why some encodings extrapolate better than others.","experiments":"The headline result is unusually large: BAM reportedly enables accurate retrieval at 500× the training context length and improves state-of-the-art context-length generalization by more than 25× in retrieval accuracy terms. LLM 训练上下文拉到百万 token 时，真正卡住的首先不是算力而是显存，尤其是随序列长度线性增长的 activation 和不断膨胀的 KV cache。过去长上下文训练常用 checkpointing、并行切分等手段缓解，但在百万级长度上仍会因为显存碎片、缓存梯度和数据搬运而碰到系统瓶颈。","importance":"这是典型的系统级贡献，但对 pretrain 很关键，因为它直接决定原生超长上下文训练是否可做。对研究者的启示是，长上下文不是单一算法问题；当 activation 内存被压到常数级后，瓶颈会转移到 KV cache 和内存管理，系统设计必须跟着改变，否则理论上能训、工程上训不起来。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 OOMB，一个面向百万 token 上下文的高显存效率训练系统。它首先采用 隐藏传输延迟，以及其他未在摘要中展开的系统优化。这个设计的关键判断很清楚：既然 activation 已不再主导，就不要继续只优化 activation checkpoint，而要把工程重心移到 cache 生命周期管理。代价是系统复杂度提高，而且 recurrent chunk training 可能带来训练语义与全局全注意力不完全一致的问题。","experiments":"摘要明确给出两个关键事实：activation memory 被压到常数级 O(1)，系统目标是支持 million-token context 的 LLM 训练。遗憾的是，没有提供具体模型规模、GPU 数量、可达上下文长度、吞吐量、与
