训练框架相比的收敛质量。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets the main practical barrier to million-token LLM training: memory, not raw compute. At that scale, activations and then the growing KV cache dominate GPU memory, and standard techniques such as checkpointing and parallel partitioning are no longer enough to keep training feasible.","importance":"This is a systems contribution with direct pretraining relevance. It shows that native ultra-long-context training is constrained by memory hierarchy and cache management as much as by model architecture, and that once activation memory is controlled, the bottleneck simply moves to KV storage and fragmentation.","technical_approach":"OOMB combines chunk-recurrent training with on-the-fly activation recomputation to reduce activation memory to O(1), then attacks the next bottleneck—the KV cache—with a set of coordinated systems optimizations. Layers When: Learning to Skip Compute in LLMs with Residual Gates","authors":["Filipe Laitenberger","Dawid Kopiczko","Cees G Snoek","Yuki Asano"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"We introduce GateSkip, a simple residual-stream gating mechanism that enables token-wise layer skipping in decoder-only LMs. Each Attention/MLP branch is equipped with a sigmoid-linear gate that compresses the branch’s output before it re-enters the residual stream. During inference we rank tokens by the gate and skip low-importance ones using a per-layer budget. While early-exit or router-based Mixture-of-Depths models are known to be unstable and need extensive retraining, our smooth, differentiable gates fine-tune stably on top of pretrained models. On long-form reasoning, we save up to 15% compute while retaining >90% of baseline accuracy. On instruction-tuned models we see accuracy gains at full compute and match baseline quality near 50% savings. The learned gates give insight into transformer information flow (e.g., BOS tokens act as anchors), and the method combines easily with quantization, pruning, and self-speculative decoding. Gu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$65","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008794"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008794","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：tokenization 仍然是端到端 foundation model 的外部先验，限制了模型自己学习层级结构和分段策略。过去大家默认先分词、再建模、再反解码，这个流水线很有效，但它把离散切分规则固定死了，模型无法根据内容和上下文动态决定什么应该组成一个更高层单元。","importance":"这项工作有范式意义，属于新型序列建模方向。对 pretrain 的启示很直接：如果动态 chunking + 三段式。关键设计取舍在于，作者没有完全放弃层级结构，而是把层级显式建进网络里，因为纯端到端序列模型如果没有归纳偏置，很难稳定学出有效切分。和固定 tokenizer 相比，这种方法的潜在收益是自适应表示、更少人为先验；代价则是训练更复杂、优化更不稳定，而且需要证明在计算受限时仍值得。","experiments":"摘要能确认的关键信息是：作者在 compute-matched 条件下进行比较，并把目标设定为用单一端到端模型替代传统 tokenizer pipeline。摘要没有给出处理的是字符级、字节级还是其他原始输入，也没有提供模型规模、数据规模、和 Transformer 或 state space baseline 的具体比较数字。考虑到作者名单里有 Albert Gu，正文很可能会重点分析层级建模在长序列上的效率与质量权衡。最有价值的实验应是：在等算力下对比固定 tokenizer 模型，观察 learned chunking 是否形成稳定层级、如何随上下文变化，以及在哪些语言或序列类型上收益最大。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a foundational limitation: tokenization is still a hand-designed preprocessing prior in most language models, which prevents the model from learning its own segmentation and hierarchy end to end. The standard tokenize-then-model pipeline works well, but it hard-codes the boundaries of the basic units and removes the possibility of context-dependent segmentation.","importance":"This is potentially a paradigm-level contribution in sequence modeling. For pretraining, the implication is straightforward: if dynamic chunking with a hierarchical network can match or beat tokenizer-based pipelines under comparable compute, then learned segmentation could become a viable alternative not only for text but eventually for speech and multimodal discrete representations as well.","technical_approach":"The method combines dynamic chunking with an explicit hierarchical network, H-Net. Dynamic chunking learns content- and context-dependent segmentation, meaning the model decides which raw elements should be grouped into higher-level chunks. H-Net then processes these chunks across levels, replacing the usual tokenization → language modeling → detokenization stack with a single end-to-end model. A key design choice is to keep hierarchy explicit rather than hoping a flat model will discover it implicitly. That is a pragmatic trade-off: fewer hand-crafted priors and more adaptive representations, at the cost of a harder optimization problem and a higher burden to show compute efficiency.","experiments":"The abstract indicates that comparisons are made under compute-matched settings and that the goal is to replace the standard tokenizer-based pipeline with a single end-to-end model. The most valuable evidence in the full paper will be whether the learned chunking forms stable, meaningful hierarchies, how it adapts with context, and under which sequence regimes it offers the best quality-efficiency trade-off.","authors_note":""},"tags":["tokenizer","end-to-end","sequence-modeling","hierarchical","representation"],"notable_authors":["Albert Pass@ 1: Self-Play with Variational Problem Synthesis Sustains RLVR","authors":["Xiao Liang","Zhong-Zhi Li","Yeyun Gong","yelong shen","Yingnian Wu","Zhijiang Guo","Weizhu Chen"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$68","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009025"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009025","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是 RLVR 在提升 Pass@1 的同时压缩策略熵、损害 Pass@k 的问题，也就是模型变得更会“押一个答案”，但不再保留多样推理路径。此前很多 RLVR 工作默认 verifiable reward 足够强，只要单样本正确率上涨就是训练成功；但对复杂推理任务，Pass@k 往往更接近模型真实上限，而熵坍缩会把这个上限一起拉低。","importance":"这项工作很值得 pretrain/post-train 交界的人关注，因为它把 RL 后训练里的一个核心矛盾讲清楚了：优化可验证奖励并不自动等于提升思维空间质量。它的启示是，训练样本分布本身会决定策略熵能否维持，因此数据在线扩展和自博弈式问题生成，可能比继续调 PPO/GRPO 超参数更有效。这和预训练里“数据决定学习动态”的经验是同一类问题。","technical_approach":"SvS 的核心是在线 self-play with variational problem synthesis：训练过程中持续生成并更新问题，而不是固定在一组静态可验证题目上做 RLVR。作者的机制判断是，熵坍缩不只是优化器问题，也是题目覆盖不足导致策略过早收缩；所以他们用变分式问题合成去扩展训练分布，并通过 self-play 让题目难度和模型能力共同演化。和只做 response-level exploration 的方法相比，SvS 把探索从“答案空间”上移到了“问题空间”。这通常更能维持多样推理，但也带来一个边界：若合成题分布偏离真实任务，策略可能学会适应合成器而不是真实 benchmark。","experiments":"摘要里的关键结论是：通过增强并动态更新训练问题，可以缓解 RLVR 训练中的熵坍缩，并持续提升 Pass@k，而不只是 Pass@1。可惜摘要没有给出基座模型规模、任务类型、reward 形式、相对 baseline、Pass@1/Pass@k 具体提升和熵统计，因此目前只能确认作者做了系统分析，并将结论落到一个在线问题合成框架上。最关键的实验应包括：静态题库 vs 在线题库、仅增加题量 vs 变分合成、以及策略熵与 Pass@k 的联动曲线。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a common RLVR failure mode: improving Pass@1 while collapsing policy entropy and hurting Pass@k. Many recent RL-with-verifiable-rewards setups implicitly treat single-sample accuracy as the main target, but for reasoning tasks Pass@k is often a better proxy for the model’s reachable capability, and entropy collapse reduces that ceiling.","importance":"This matters because it exposes a core post-training trade-off that also informs pretraining intuition: reward optimization can narrow the policy even when headline accuracy improves. The practical lesson is that maintaining diversity may depend more on the evolving training problem distribution than on tweaking RL hyperparameters alone.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, Self-play with Variational problem Synthesis (SvS), keeps generating and updating training problems online during RLVR. The key idea is that entropy collapse is partly a data-distribution issue: if the problem set is static or narrow, the policy overfits to a small reasoning regime and loses diversity. SvS moves exploration from the response space to the problem space by synthesizing tasks that co-evolve with the current policy. That is a meaningful design shift relative to methods that only inject exploration at generation time. The risk is distribution drift if the synthetic problems stop matching the intended target tasks.","experiments":"The abstract claims that augmenting and refreshing training problems mitigates entropy collapse and sustains Pass@k gains during RLVR. It does not provide model sizes, benchmarks, reward definitions, or exact improvements, so the effect is qualitative from the abstract alone. The most informative experiments would be static versus online problem sets, entropy trajectories during RL, and the relation between entropy preservation and 的人是直接的风险提示。","technical_approach":"作者先按奖励来源把 URLVR 分成 intrinsic（来自模型自身信号）与 external（来自外部可验证器/环境）两类，再给出统一理论框架：所有 intrinsic 方法都会把初始策略分布“变尖”（对高置信动作更偏置）。这在“初始置信度与正确性正相关”时等价于放大正确解的概率，但在两者错位时会把错误也放大，导致不可逆的性能塌陷；因此 intrinsic URLVR 的关键不是算法细节，而是如何保证早期置信度校准或引入纠错信号。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体模型大小、任务集合与提升/退化数字；但明确提到做了大规模实验与分类学对照来验证 variants it is unclear how far they scale and when they fail.","importance":"This is a paradigm-level clarification with sharp boundaries: it unifies intrinsic URLVR methods under a single mechanism (distribution sharpening) and makes the success condition and catastrophic failure mode explicit—highly actionable for self-bootstrapped RL/R1-Zero-style training.","technical_approach":"The paper categorizes URLVR by reward source (intrinsic vs external) and develops a unified theory showing intrinsic methods converge to sharpening the model’s initial distribution (increasing mass on high-confidence outputs). Yuan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$6e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009132"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009132","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"现有低秩/参数高效训练在预训练场景常面临三难：性能掉点、额外计算开销、以及对 activation memory 的节省有限。","importance":"这是一个架构/训练效率层面的工作：它利用跨层残差的低秩性做结构化重构，目标是同时改善质量与训练/显存效率，对大规模持续预训练或多阶段 mid-train 有潜在价值。","technical_approach":"CR-Net 的关键假设是“层间 activation residual 近似低秩”，因此可以用跨层低秩结构去重构当前层激活，而不是在每层单独插 LoRA/低秩分支。实现上是双路径结构：一条主路径传递前层输出，另一条低秩残差路径补足信息，从而减少需要学习/存储的自由度；相对逐层 LoRA，这种跨层共享可能降低冗余计算并带来更好的 activation memory 节省，但边界在于低秩假设若在某些层/任务不成立，模型可能需要更高秩或退回全参更新。","experiments":"摘要未给出预训练规模、参数量、吞吐/显存节省比例、以及与 LoRA/其他低秩方法的精度对比数字；只能确认作者声称同时缓解性能、计算开销与激活显存三项问题。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Low-rank / parameter-efficient training for (pre)training often hits a three-way trade-off: quality loss, added compute overhead, and limited activation-memory savings.","importance":"This is an architecture/training-efficiency contribution: it exploits cross-layer low-rank structure in activation residuals to target quality and efficiency simultaneously, potentially useful for large-scale continual pretraining and multi-stage mid-training.","technical_approach":"CR-Net is built on the observation that inter-layer activation residuals are approximately low-rank, enabling cross-layer low-rank reconstruction of activations rather than per-layer independent adapters. It uses a dual-path design: a main path carrying previous-layer outputs and a low-rank residual path that reconstructs what’s missing. Compared to layerwise LoRA, cross-layer sharing can reduce redundant computation and improve activation-memory savings, but it relies on the low-rank assumption; when it breaks, higher rank or full updates may be needed.","experiments":"The abstract does not report pretraining scale, parameter counts, throughput/memory savings, or numeric accuracy comparisons to LoRA and other baselines; it Reweighting  Offers Better Generalization than Offline Methods","authors":["Wanru Zhao","Yihong Chen","Yuzhi Tang","Wentao Ma","Shengchao Hu","Xu Hu","Alex Iacob","Abhinav Mehrotra","Nic Lane"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$6f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009246"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009246","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心结论是：LLM 训练中的数据整理不应主要靠离线筛选和配比，而应在训练过程中在线重加权，因为在线方式泛化更好，也更适应模型和任务变化。过去的数据选择、过滤、mixing 往往先离线定好再训练，这样工程上重，遇到模型规模变化或目标任务变化时很脆弱，而且硬过滤常牺牲数据多样性。","importance":"这项工作对 pretrain 很重要，属于数据方法级贡献。它挑战的不是某个具体过滤器，而是整套 curation workflow：从‘训练前决定哪些数据重要’改成‘训练中动态判断哪些样本更该被学’。这个转变很有现实意义，因为大模型训练越来越长、目标越来越变动，离线 curation 的一次性决定成本高且容易失配。若在线重加权稳定有效，它可能比反复重跑 data pipeline 更实用。","technical_approach":"作者提出 ADAPT（Adaptive Data reweighting for Pretraining and FineTuning），把数据整理建模成动态 loss weighting 问题，而不是静态预处理。核心机制是根据训练过程中的信号动态调整样本重要性，用权重而非删除/重采样来影响梯度贡献。这个设计保留了数据覆盖面，减少了离线筛选带来的多样性损失，也更容易在模型或任务变化时复用同一数据池。与离线方法相比，它放弃了‘先验一次性最优配比’的假设，改为接受样本价值会随训练阶段变化这一事实；这和 curriculum、mid-train rebalancing 的思路是一致的。","experiments":"摘要明确声称在线重加权比离线方法有更好的泛化，但没有给出预训练规模、数据集、基线方法和具体提升数字，因此无法写出定量结论。最关键的实验应该包括：在 pretraining 和 finetuning 两种场景下与 data selection、data mixing、resampling 的直接对比；在模型或任务切换时是否无需重跑整个 curation pipeline；以及在线权重是否会坍缩到少量样本，还是能保持数据多样性。若论文能证明后者，这会是对实际大规模训练最有价值的部分。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The main claim is that data curation for LLM training should move from offline filtering and mixing to online reweighting during training, because the online formulation generalizes better and adapts more naturally to model and task shifts. Traditional pipelines decide sample importance before training, which is expensive to rerun and often brittle when the setup changes. Hard filtering also tends to discard useful diversity.","importance":"This is an important pretraining contribution at the data-method level. It challenges not a single filter but the overall curation workflow: instead of deciding once which data matters, it argues for updating sample importance as training evolves. That is practically meaningful because modern training runs are long and objectives change. If online reweighting works reliably, it could be a more scalable alternative to repeatedly rebuilding offline curation pipelines.","technical_approach":"The proposed framework, ADAPT (Adaptive Data reweighting for Pretraining and FineTuning), formulates curation as dynamic loss weighting rather than static preprocessing. Sample importance is adjusted online based on training signals, so data influences optimization through weights instead of deletion or resampling. This preserves coverage and avoids some of the diversity loss caused by aggressive offline filtering. Conceptually, the method gives up the assumption that there is one fixed optimal data mixture before training starts, and instead treats data value as stage-dependent, which aligns with curriculum and mid-training rebalancing ideas.","experiments":"The abstract clearly claims that online reweighting yields better generalization than offline methods, but it does not report model sizes, datasets, baselines, or numerical gains. The most important experiments to inspect are direct comparisons against data selection, data mixing, and resampling in both pretraining and finetuning settings; robustness under model or task shifts without rerunning the curation pipeline; and whether the online weights collapse onto a small subset of data or retain diversity. That last point is especially important for large-scale training the Context of Pretrained LLMs by Dropping Their Positional Embedding","authors":["Yoav Gelberg","Koshi Eguchi","Takuya Akiba","Edoardo Cetin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$73","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009468"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009468","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心结论很直接：延长 pretrained LLM 上下文长度，不一定需要昂贵的长序列再训练；把训练后的 positional embeddings 去掉，配合合适处理，模型就可能在更长长度上泛化。过去长上下文扩展通常默认要做 continued pretraining 或 long-context finetuning，因为显式位置编码把模型绑定在预训练见过的长度范围内，超出后外推容易崩。","importance":"如果这个结论成立，它对长上下文研究是方法级且带一点范式意味的冲击。它不是又一个 RoPE scaling trick，而是在问：位置编码在训练期和测试期的作用是否应该分开看。对 pretrain 研究者的启示是，某些训练时必要的 inductive bias 可能会在推理时变成长度泛化障碍；因此架构部件不能只按收敛期收益评估，还要按 test-time extrapolation 成本评估。这种观点对长上下文、时间建模，甚至多模态序列建模都有外延价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 DroPE：模型训练完成后，直接丢弃 positional embeddings，而不是继续长序列微调。作者的论证基于三点：位置编码在预训练时帮助收敛；模型对这种显式位置信号会过度依赖，从而妨碍未见长度泛化；而有效语言建模并非绝对需要保留这一显式位置信号。方法本身很简单，但设计判断很大胆——它押注于 Transformer 其余部分已经学到足够的序列建模能力，去掉位置编码后，短程局部模式和内容驱动对齐仍能维持。和传统 context extension 方法相比，它舍弃了额外训练成本，但边界也明显：如果模型严重依赖绝对或相对位置模式，DroPE 可能损伤近程性能，或者在需要精确位置引用的任务上退化。","experiments":"摘要明确声称：无需超出预训练长度的昂贵 finetuning，也能有效扩展上下文。作者把这一效果建立在理论与经验观察上，但摘要没有给出所测模型规模、原始与扩展上下文长度、比较对象（如 PI、NTK-aware scaling、YaRN、long finetune）以及短上下文性能损失。对实践者来说，最关键的实验点不只是长上下文 perplexity 或 needle-in-a-haystack，而是：去掉位置编码后，短上下文语言建模是否稳、长文档检索与多跳引用任务的收益是否一致、收益是否随模型规模变化而扩大或减弱。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper makes a strong claim: extending the context window of a pretrained LLM may not require expensive long-context finetuning at all. Instead, simply dropping positional embeddings after training can improve extrapolation to longer sequences. The usual assumption has been that explicit position mechanisms tie the model to the pretraining length range, so pushing beyond that requires additional long-sequence training.","importance":"If the result holds broadly, it is method-level important and mildly paradigm-shifting for long-context work. This is not just another RoPE scaling tweak. It raises a more general question: should we treat positional information as a training-time aid and an inference-time liability separately? For pretraining research, the paper suggests that an inductive bias that accelerates optimization can later become the reason extrapolation fails. That is a useful lens not only for long-context LMs but potentially for other sequence and multimodal models as well.","technical_approach":"The method, DroPE, removes positional embeddings after pretraining instead of performing continued long-context training. The paper motivates this through three claims: positional embeddings are helpful for convergence during training; over-reliance on them harms generalization to unseen sequence lengths; and effective language modeling does not fundamentally require keeping them at inference time. The design is simple but bold. It assumes that the rest of the network has already learned enough content-based sequential structure that generation remains coherent without explicit positional signals. Compared with standard context-extension methods, DroPE trades away extra training cost. The clear risk is that models relying heavily on explicit position may lose short-range quality or degrade on tasks that require precise positional reference.","experiments":"The abstract claims effective context extension without expensive finetuning beyond the pretraining length. However, it does not report model sizes, original and extended context lengths, or comparisons against standard baselines such as RoPE scaling or long-context finetuning. It also does not quantify any short-context regression. For practitioners, the important questions are not just whether perplexity improves at long lengths, but whether short-context performance stays intact, whether gains hold on retrieval and multi-hop reference tasks, and how the effect changes with model scale.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","positional-embedding","context-extension","inference"],"notable_authors":["Yoav Gelberg","Takuya Akiba"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009473","title":"Buffer Matters: Unleashing the Power of Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning in Large Language Model Reasoning","authors":["Xu Wan","Yansheng Wang","Wenqi Huang","Mingyang Sun"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Traditional on-policy Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) frameworks suffer from experience waste and reward homogeneity, which directly hinders learning efficiency on difficult samples during large language models post-training. In this paper, we introduce Batch Adaptation Policy Optimization (BAPO), an off-policy RLVR framework to improve the data efficiency in large language models post-training. It dynamically selects training batches by re-evaluating historically difficult samples and reusing high-quality ones, while holding a lower bound guarantee for policy improvement. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that BAPO achieves an average 12.5\\% improvement over GRPO across mathematics, planning, and visual reasoning tasks. Crucially, BAPO successfully resolves 40.7\\% of problems that base models consistently fail to solve. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009473"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009473","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：RLVR 在大模型推理后训练里太依赖 on-policy，新样本利用率低，难题训练信号又被快速冲淡。现有像 GRPO 这样的框架每轮只吃当前策略采出的数据，历史高价值轨迹和难例往往被浪费，导致学习效率不高，也不利于持续修正模型在困难样本上的策略。","importance":"这项工作的意义是把“buffer 设计”重新带回 LLM reasoning RL。它说明后训练未必只能坚持近似 on-policy 的保守路线；只要批次选择和策略改进约束设计得当，off-policy 经验复用在 verifiable reward 场景下可以明显提高数据效率。对 pretrain/post-train 闭环的启发在于：当 reward 足够干净时，真正的瓶颈可能不是 credit assignment 本身，而是你如何组织和再利用训练分布。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 BAPO，Batch Adaptation Policy Optimization，一个 off-policy RLVR 框架。它通过重评估历史难样本、复用高质量样本，并动态选择训练 batch，来提高学习效率；同时作者声称给出了 policy improvement 的下界保证，用来控制 off-policy 更新的偏移风险。和 GRPO 这类纯 on-policy group comparison 方法相比，BAPO 的关键改变不只是多了个 replay buffer，而是把“哪些历史样本值得重新学”作为训练核心。这样做的机制很合理：推理任务中 reward 同质化严重，真正有信息量的是少数边界样本；把这些样本留下来反复学，比不断采一堆容易题更有效。代价则是分布陈旧和偏差累积，因此理论约束和重评估策略是否足够严谨很关键。","experiments":"摘要给出了一条明确结果：BAPO 在数学、规划和视觉推理任务上平均比 GRPO 提升 12.5%。作者还强调它解决了传统 on-policy 方法中的某个失败现象，但摘要截断后看不到完整表述。当前已知信息里没有模型规模、训练步数、buffer 大小、奖励定义和计算开销，因此还无法判断这 12.5% 是 sample-efficient gain、最终性能 gain，还是两者兼有。读者应重点看 ablation：去掉历史难例重评估、去掉高质量样本复用、或缩小 buffer 后收益分别掉多少，这能判断真正有效的是 off-policy 本身，还是更好的 curriculum / replay 机制。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical weakness of RL with verifiable rewards for LLM reasoning: standard on-policy training wastes experience and under-trains on hard examples. Frameworks such as GRPO mainly learn from fresh samples generated by the current policy, so informative trajectories and difficult cases are quickly discarded even though they are exactly where additional learning would help most.","importance":"The contribution is important because it reopens the case for off-policy learning in LLM reasoning. The message is that post-training does not have to stay strictly near on-policy if replay and update constraints are designed carefully. In verifiable-reward settings, where rewards are relatively clean, training efficiency may be limited less by reward noise and more by how the training distribution is organized and reused.","technical_approach":"The method is BAPO, Batch Adaptation Policy Optimization, an off-policy RLVR framework. It dynamically constructs training batches by re-evaluating historically difficult samples and reusing high-quality ones, while maintaining a claimed lower-bound guarantee on policy improvement. Relative to GRPO-style group-based on-policy updates, the important change is not merely adding a replay buffer. The algorithm makes sample selection itself a core optimization lever. That makes sense for reasoning tasks because rewards are often homogeneous on easy examples, while the useful signal is concentrated on hard boundary cases. The trade-off is familiar: replay improves efficiency, but stale data can bias updates, so the quality of re-evaluation and the strength of the improvement guarantee matter a lot.","experiments":"The abstract reports an average 12.5% improvement over GRPO across math, planning, and visual reasoning tasks. It also claims to resolve a failure mode of traditional on-policy training, but the abstract is truncated before giving the full detail. There is still no information on model size, buffer size, training budget, reward formulation, or compute overhead, so it is unclear whether the gain is mainly in sample efficiency, final performance, or both. The most useful ablations to inspect are the effect of removing difficult-sample re-evaluation, removing high-quality sample reuse, and shrinking the replay buffer, since these would show whether the win comes from off-policy learning itself or from a better replay curriculum.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlvr","off-policy","reasoning","data-efficiency"],"notable_authors":["Xu Wan","Yansheng Wang","Wenqi Huang","Mingyang Sun"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009489","title":"Music Flamingo: Scaling Music Understanding in Audio Language Models","authors":["Sreyan Ghosh","Arushi Goel","Lasha 的自动标注可靠性、人评一致性，以及模型在歌曲语义、乐器识别、结构理解和开放问答上的增益是否一致。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a clear bottleneck: open audio-language models remain weak at music understanding, not just because models are small, but because high-quality music data and fine-grained annotations are scarce. As a result, many existing systems produce only short generic captions, answer shallow questions, and generalize poorly across musical cultures and song structure.","importance":"The contribution is primarily data-level with a systems component. The paper argues that scaling generic audio-language training is not enough for music. For audio LM and multimodal pretraining research, the main lesson is that music is a dense, layered signal that needs task-specific supervision and richer labels to support foundation-level understanding. Without that, models mostly learn surface description rather than deeper musical semantics.","technical_approach":"The approach has two parts: a new large audio-language model called Music Flamingo and a supporting dataset, MF-Skills. Instead of relying on coarse captions, the dataset is built through a multi-stage labeling pipeline that produces richer captions and questions intended to capture hierarchical musical information, including instrumentation, style, structure, cultural context, and song-level content. Relative to prior open audio-understanding models, the difference is not only scale but supervision design: music is treated as a distinct modeling problem with higher annotation granularity. That design is sensible because music is dynamic and information-dense, and a single high-level caption provides too weak a signal. The trade-off is the complexity of the annotation pipeline and the need to control label quality carefully.","experiments":"The abstract states that Music Flamingo is designed to advance understanding of music and songs, and motivates it by the limitations of earlier models on short captioning, shallow QA, and cross-cultural generalization. At this stage, the paper’s main claim is that data richness and task definition are central bottlenecks. Existing linear approximations either lose too much quality or don't achieve real speedups. A strictly linear-time alternative is needed.","importance":"Architecture/systems-level contribution. If quality holds up, strictly linear attention directly shifts the feasibility boundary for long-context pretraining. The open question is whether the approximation quality degrades gracefully at scale.","technical_approach":"RACE Attention replaces the exponential kernel with sharpened angular similarity and approximates outputs via Gaussian random projections combined with soft Locality-Sensitive Hashing (LSH). Complexity is strictly linear in both sequence length and embedding dimension. The key trade-off: giving up exact softmax for true linear scaling.","experiments":"The abstract highlights that FlashAttention-2/3 cannot complete a single forward-backward pass beyond ~4M tokens on an NVIDIA GH200 (96GB), while RACE Attention can. Specific quality metrics (e.g., perplexity comparisons) are not provided in the abstract.","authors_note":""},"tags":["linear-attention","long-context","training","efficiency"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009502","title":"MATH-Beyond: A Benchmark for RL to Expand Beyond the Base Model","authors":["Prasanna Mayilvahanan","Ricardo Dominguez-Olmedo","Thaddäus Wiedemer","Wieland Brendel"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$76","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009502"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009502","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"当前开源 RL 数学推理方法（受 DeepSeek-R1 启发）看似提升了数学能力，但在 MATH-500 和 AIME 2024 上，base model 用 pass@1024 已经几乎能解所有题。这说明 RL 主要是在 sharpen 已有解法分布，而非发现新能力。缺少一个能真正测试 RL 是否带来新技能的 benchmark。","importance":"Benchmark/诊断级贡献，对 pretrain↔posttrain 接口有重要启示。它直接质疑了当前 RLVR 范式的实际增益：如果 RL 只是把 base model 已有的低概率解法提权，那 RL 的价值就被高估了。这对 pretrain 研究者理解 RL fine-tuning 到底在做什么、以及如何设计更好的 pretrain 来支撑 RL 探索，都很有价值。","technical_approach":"构建 MATH-Beyond（MATH-B）benchmark，刻意选择 base model 在大量采样下仍无法解决的数学问题，从而测试 RL 是否真正带来了超越 base model 覆盖范围的新能力。设计原则是让 pass@k 在 k 很大时仍然为零，迫使 RL 必须做真正的探索而非仅仅 sharpen。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体实验数字，但核心观察是：在 MATH-500 和 AIME 2024 上，sufficiently many draws（如 pass@1024）下 base model 已接近全解。MATH-B 的设计目标是打破这一天花板。","authors_note":"Wieland Brendel 是 Tübingen/ELLIS 系统的知名研究者。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Current open-source RL math reasoning methods appear to improve performance, but base models already solve nearly all MATH-500 and AIME 2024 problems with pass@1024. RL is mostly sharpening existing solution modes, not discovering new ones. A benchmark that tests genuine skill acquisition is missing.","importance":"A benchmark/diagnostic contribution with significant implications for the pretrain-posttrain interface. It directly challenges the claimed gains of RLVR: if RL only up-weights low-probability solutions already in the base model, its value is overstated. This matters for pretrain researchers thinking about what base model capabilities RL can actually leverage.","technical_approach":"MATH-Beyond (MATH-B) is constructed with problems that base models cannot solve even with very large sample budgets (e.g., pass@1024 = 0). ecosystem."},"tags":["rlvr","benchmark","reasoning","base-model"],"notable_authors":["Wieland Brendel"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009579","title":"UltraMemV2: Memory Networks Scaling to 120B Parameters with Superior Long-Context Learning","authors":["Zihao Huang","Yu Bao","Qiyang Min","Siyan Chen","Ran Guo","Hongzhi Huang","Defa Zhu","Banggu Wu","Yutao Zeng","zhou Xun","Siyuan Qiao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$77","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009579"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009579","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：能否用 memory-layer 架构保留 MoE 的参数效率，但避免 MoE 推理时高昂的 memory access 成本。此前的 UltraMem 已经证明这条路线可行，但性能大致只追平 2-expert MoE，离实际常用的 8-expert 级别还有明显差距，所以问题从“能不能做”变成了“能不能做到足够强”。","importance":"这项工作属于架构级和系统效率级改进。对 pretrain 的意义在于，它试图提供一条不同于标准 MoE 的大模型扩展路径：参数可以继续做大，但激活和访存模式更友好。如果 UltraMemV2 真的能扩到 120B 且接近或追平强 MoE，这会直接影响未来大模型在训练后部署、长上下文推理和吞吐受限场景下的架构选择，因为很多时候瓶颈不是 FLOPs，而是带宽和随机访存。","technical_approach":"核心方法是对 memory-layer 架构做了一次系统重设计，而不是只在原版 UltraMem 上微调几个超参。摘要里提到五个关键改动：把 memory layer 插入每个 transformer block，而不是稀疏放置；把 value expansion 简化为单线性投影，减少不必要的复杂度；采用来自 PEER 的 FFN 式 value processing，说明作者认为 memory retrieval 后仍需要较强的局部变换能力；增加更有原则的参数初始化，解决大规模训练稳定性；以及重新平衡 memory 模块与其他子层的参数预算。整体思路很清楚：之前 memory 架构弱，不一定是范式不行，更可能是集成位置、值变换能力和初始化方式都没调到位。与 MoE 相比，它放弃了显式 expert routing 的高度条件化计算，换取更低的 memory access 代价和更规则的执行路径。","experiments":"摘要明确给出模型可扩展到 120B 参数，并声称长上下文学习更强，但没有给出训练 token 数、评测集、对比 baseline 和具体数值。可推测核心对比对象至少包括原始 UltraMem、2-expert 与 8-expert MoE，以及标准 dense transformer。真正值得看的实验有三类：第一，等训练算力或等激活参数下，和 8-expert MoE 的质量差距还剩多少；第二，长上下文任务上的优势来自 memory-layer 本身，还是来自更大的总参数量；第三，五项改动各自贡献多少，尤其是“每层插 memory”和“初始化策略”是否是主要增益来源。如果论文没有把质量、吞吐、显存、带宽访问一起报清楚，那么‘优于长上下文学习’的结论会比较难落地评估。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether memory-layer architectures can match the scaling benefits of MoE without paying MoE’s high inference-time memory access cost. Earlier UltraMem results showed the idea was viable, but only around the level of 2-expert MoE. The real question is whether this family can close the gap to stronger 8-expert regimes that matter in practice.","importance":"This is an architecture and systems-efficiency contribution. For pretraining, it matters because it explores a different scaling path from standard MoE: very large parameter counts with more deployment-friendly activation and memory behavior. If UltraMemV2 truly scales to 120B while approaching strong MoE quality, it could change the trade space for long-context serving and bandwidth-limited inference, where memory movement often dominates arithmetic cost.","technical_approach":"UltraMemV2 is presented as a full redesign of the memory-layer stack, not a minor patch over UltraMem. The abstract lists five changes: inserting memory layers into every transformer block, simplifying value expansion to a single linear projection, using FFN-style value processing inspired by PEER, adopting principled initialization, and rebalancing parameter allocation across memory and other components. The design logic is coherent: previous underperformance may have come less from the paradigm itself and more from weak integration, insufficient post-retrieval transformation, and poor large-scale optimization. Relative to MoE, the model gives up explicit expert routing and conditional specialization in exchange for lower memory access overhead and more regular execution.","experiments":"The abstract states scaling to 120B parameters and claims superior long-context learning, but provides no token count, benchmark suite, baselines, or quantitative gains. The most important evidence will be: how close it gets to 8-expert MoE at matched training or activated-compute budgets, whether long-context gains remain after controlling for total parameter count, and how much each of the five redesign choices contributes. In particular, the impact of per-block memory insertion and initialization quality will be worth checking. Without a joint report of model quality, throughput, memory footprint, and bandwidth behavior, the practical advantage over MoE would remain only partially established.","authors_note":""},"tags":["moe","memory-layer","architecture","scaling","long-context"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009691","title":"On Powerful Ways to Generate: Autoregression, Diffusion, and Beyond","authors":["Chenxiao Yang","Cai Zhou","David Wipf","Zhiyuan Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$78","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009691"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009691","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：diffusion language model 相比自回归语言模型，到底在计算能力上强在哪里、边界在哪里。最近非自回归生成在实践上越来越强，但理论上大家还不清楚：any-order 和并行生成只是工程加速，还是会带来 AR 做不到的表达与计算优势。","importance":"这项工作属于范式级的理论澄清，对新型语言建模研究很重要。它的意义不在于直接提升某个 benchmark，而在于帮我们判断 diffusion LM、masked generation 这条路线值不值得继续作为 AR 替代范式投入。对 pretrain 研究者来说，这类结果的价值是划清边界：哪些收益可能来自更好的并行时间复杂度，哪些则不是建模能力本身的扩张。","technical_approach":"核心方法是对 Masked Diffusion Models 和 Auto-Regressive Models 的计算能力做形式化比较。论文给出的结论有两层：第一，具有足够大上下文长度的 MDM 在计算上是通用的，并且其解码步数可以匹配 PRAM 下的最优并行时间复杂度；第二，在控制其他因素后，MDM 的 any-order 生成灵活性并不会自动扩展其可计算函数类。这个结论很重要，因为它把‘并行生成更强’拆成了两件事：一件是时间复杂度优势，另一件是表达能力优势；前者成立，后者未必。和很多经验论文不同，它没有把 diffusion 的好处笼统归结为“更全局”或“更灵活”，而是试图严格说明这些说法到底落在哪个层面。","experiments":"从摘要看，这篇论文主要是理论工作，核心贡献不依赖常规大规模实验。真正值得看的不是 benchmark 分数，而是形式化设定是否贴近实际 LM：比如上下文长度假设有多强、PRAM 对应到实际硬件并行是否合理、ARM 与 MDM 的对比是否控制了总计算和访存模式。若论文附带实验，合理预期是一些构造性任务或复杂度示例，用来验证理论结论的可观测后果，比如解码步数与问题结构的关系。对实践者而言，最有用的 takeaway 不是‘diffusion 比 AR 强’或相反，而是：若你押注 diffusion LM，主要该看并行解码和生成控制上的系统收益，而不是期待 any-order 本身带来无限制的能力跃迁。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a foundational question: what, exactly, do diffusion language models gain over autoregressive ones in terms of computational power? Non-autoregressive generation has become increasingly competitive in practice, but it is still unclear whether any-order and parallel generation offer only engineering speedups or genuinely expand what the model class can compute.","importance":"This is a paradigm-level theory paper, and it is highly relevant to work on alternative language modeling objectives. Its value is not in benchmark gains but in clarifying where diffusion-style generation may truly differ from next-token autoregression. For pretraining researchers, that boundary matters: it tells us which benefits are likely to come from better parallel time complexity and which are unlikely to reflect a fundamentally richer model class.","technical_approach":"The paper gives a formal comparison between Masked Diffusion Models (MDM) and Auto-Regressive Models (ARM). The abstract highlights two main results. First, with sufficiently large context length, MDM is computationally universal and can achieve decoding steps matching optimal parallel time complexity in the PRAM setting. Second, after controlling for other factors, the flexibility to generate in any order does not by itself enlarge the class of computable problems. That distinction is important. It separates two claims that are often conflated in empirical discussions: faster parallel generation versus strictly greater representational or computational power. The paper argues for the former more than the latter.","experiments":"This appears primarily to be a theory paper, so the main evidence is likely formal rather than empirical. The practical questions will therefore be about how realistic the assumptions are: how strong the context-length requirement is, whether the PRAM abstraction says something meaningful about actual hardware parallelism, and whether the ARM-versus-MDM comparison properly controls for compute and memory considerations. If the paper includes experiments, they are likely to be constructive tasks or complexity-driven demonstrations rather than standard language benchmarks. The useful takeaway for practitioners is not that diffusion categorically beats AR, but that its strongest case lies in parallel decoding and controllable generation, not in an automatic expansion of computational power from any-order generation alone.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion-lm","non-ar","theory","expressivity","generation"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009745","title":"ParallelBench: Understanding the Trade-offs of Parallel Decoding in Diffusion LLMs","authors":["Wonjun Kang","Kevin Galim","Seunghyuk Oh","Minjae Lee","Yuchen Zeng","Shuibai Zhang","Coleman Hooper","Yuezhou Hu","Hyung Koo","Nam Ik Cho","Kangwook Lee"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$79","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009745"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009745","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"Diffusion LLM（dLLM）的核心卖点是并行解码加速推理，但并行解码的条件独立假设忽略了 token 间依赖，当依赖较强时生成质量必然下降。现有工作大多忽视这个 trade-off，标准 benchmark（数学/代码）也无法充分暴露并行解码的质量退化。","importance":"对 diffusion LM 这一新型语言建模范式有直接的评估和理论贡献。这是 pretrain 研究者需要关注的：如果 dLLM 的并行解码在 token 依赖强的场景下系统性退化，那么 dLLM 相对 AR 的推理速度优势就需要重新评估。ParallelBench 提供了一个更诚实的评估工具。","technical_approach":"先从信息论角度分析并行解码的质量损失来源（条件独立假设导致的互信息丢失），再在可解析的合成任务（list operations）上做 case study 验证理论预测，最后构建 ParallelBench 来系统评估 dLLM 在不同 token 依赖强度下的表现。关键贡献是把 dLLM 的 speed-quality trade-off 从模糊直觉变成可量化的分析框架。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体数字。核心实验设计包括：信息论分析、合成任务 case study、ParallelBench 评估。需要看全文了解具体 dLLM 模型（MDLM/SEDD 等）的表现和退化幅度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Diffusion LLMs promise faster inference via parallel decoding, but the conditional independence assumption ignores token dependencies, inevitably degrading quality when dependencies are strong. Qiao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$7c","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009912"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009912","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：MoE 里的 router 决策和 expert 真正擅长处理什么，常常并不对齐。现有做法通常靠 load balancing、z-loss 或容量约束去稳训练和防塌缩，但这些约束主要管“分得均不均”，不管“分得对不对”，所以路由常会学成一个弱相关的分桶器。","importance":"这项工作的意义在方法层面比较直接：它试图给 MoE 补上一个长期缺失的监督信号，让 router 选择和 expert 能力形成显式耦合。对 pretrain 来说，这很重要，因为大规模 MoE 的收益并不只取决于 sparsity 和吞吐，router-expert 是否语义一致会直接影响 token specialization、样本效率和最终可扩展性。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 ERC loss，一个轻量辅助损失。作者把每个 expert 的 router embedding 视作该 expert 所接收 token 的 proxy token，再把加了扰动的 router embedding 送入各个 expert，观察中间激活，并施加两类约束：一是每个 expert 对自己的 proxy 响应要强于对其他 expert 的 proxy；二是每个 proxy 要更强地激活其对应 expert 而非其他 expert。这个设计的关键不是再加一个分类头，而是直接在 expert 内部表征空间里校准“谁该处理谁”；相比只做负载均衡，它更关注功能对齐，但额外前向也会带来一些训练开销。","experiments":"摘要没有给出参数规模、训练 token、基线和具体提升数字，因此无法写出定量结论。可以明确的是，作者主张 ERC loss 能提升模型性能；如果正文可信，最值得关注的证据应包括：与标准 auxiliary losses 的对比、不同 expert 数量下的收益是否稳定、router entropy 与 expert specialization 是否同步改善，以及该损失是否在不牺牲 load balance 的前提下提升 perplexity 或下游分数。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a core weakness in MoE training: routers are not explicitly trained to make assignments that reflect what each expert is actually good at. Standard regularizers mostly enforce balanced usage or stable optimization, but they do not ensure that routing decisions are semantically aligned with expert capability.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with clear relevance to pretraining. In large MoE models, efficiency gains only translate into real quality gains if experts become meaningfully specialized; a loss that directly couples routing and expert competence could improve token specialization, sample efficiency, and scaling behavior beyond what load balancing alone can deliver.","technical_approach":"The proposed ERC loss is a lightweight auxiliary objective that treats each expert's router embedding as a proxy token for the tokens assigned to that expert. Perturbed router embeddings are passed through the experts, and the resulting intermediate activations are constrained in two ways: each expert should respond more strongly to its own proxy than to others, and each proxy should preferentially activate its matched expert. The key idea is to align routing and expert function inside the representation space of the experts themselves, rather than adding another superficial routing constraint. The likely trade-off is some extra training compute due to additional forward passes.","experiments":"The abstract provides no model sizes, data scales, baselines, or exact gains, so the quantitative summary must remain limited. The claimed result is improved MoE performance; the most important evidence to look for in the paper is whether ERC beats standard auxiliary losses consistently, whether the gains persist across different expert counts, and whether specialization improves without hurting load balance or training stability.","authors_note":""},"tags":["moe","routing","auxiliary-loss","training-dynamics","optimization"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009924","title":"From Collapse to Control: Understanding and Extending Mamba-Transformer 模型一旦推到训练窗口之外，长上下文能力会突然崩掉，而原因此前并不清楚。纯 Transformer 的长上下文外推已有 RoPE scaling 一类方案，纯状态空间模型也有各自稳定化技巧，但混合架构里两套位置/状态机制耦在一起，现有方法不能直接套。","importance":"这篇工作的重要性比较高，因为它既给出失效机理，也给出训练免费修复方案。对 pretrain 和架构研究者来说，价值不只是一个 long-context trick，而是一个更一般的教训：混合模型的外推失败往往来自不同子模块的尺度不一致，必须联合分析内部动力学，而不是只在输入位置编码上做表面 patch。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Universal Position Interpolation, UPI，一个 rescale，从而控制状态增长并保持跨模块位置语义一致。相比只改 RoPE 或只截断状态，这个设计更像是全局校准，因此更适合 hybrid 架构；代价是它依赖对具体层动力学的假设是否成立。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型规模、训练上下文长度、测试长度和提升数字，因此不能写出精确结果。可以明确的是，作者声称这是首个系统分析 hybrid collapse 的工作，并且 UPI 能在无需再训练的情况下实现可靠长上下文泛化；正文里最值得看的实验应包括：相对 NTK/RoPE interpolation 等 Transformer-only 方法的对比、不同 Mamba/Transformer 配比下是否都有效、以及随着 context 拉长，loss 或 retrieval 指标何处开始退化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a concrete failure mode in hybrid Mamba-Transformer models: they often collapse when evaluated beyond the training context window, and the reason has been poorly understood. Pure Transformers already have several context-extension tricks, and pure state-space models have their own stabilization methods, but hybrid architectures couple two different positional/state mechanisms, so existing fixes do not transfer cleanly.","importance":"This is a strong contribution because it combines diagnosis with a training-free remedy. For pretraining and architecture work, the broader lesson is valuable: long-context extrapolation in hybrid models fails when internal scales across submodules drift apart, so one needs a joint dynamical treatment rather than a superficial positional-encoding patch.","technical_approach":"The proposed Universal Position Interpolation (UPI) is a closed-form, training-free scaling method for hybrid models. The authors first identify two failure drivers: uncontrolled state growth in the Mamba branch and uneven receptive-field contributions across the hybrid stack. UPI then rescales both sides in a unified way, stabilizing Mamba's cumulative decay while rescaling Transformer rotary frequencies so that positional semantics remain coherent across modules. Compared with methods that only modify RoPE or only clip state growth, this is a more global calibration mechanism tailored to hybrid architectures.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide exact model sizes, train/test context lengths, or numerical gains, so a precise quantitative summary is not possible here. robustness across different Mamba/Transformer mixes, and the degradation curve as context length stretches far beyond the training window.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","mamba","hybrid-architecture","position-interpolation","scaling"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010046","title":"SemHiTok: A Unified Image Tokenizer via Semantic-Guided Hierarchical Codebook for Multimodal Understanding and Generation","authors":["Zisheng Chen","Chunwei Wang","Runhui Huang","Hongbin Xu","Xiuwei Chen","Jun Zhou","Jianhua Han","Hang Xu","Xiaodan Liang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$7e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010046"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010046","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：能否用一个统一的离散图像 tokenizer 同时服务多模态理解和高保真生成，而不是在语义和像素细节之间做一个脆弱折中。过去的统一 tokenizer 通常把语义蒸馏和像素重建硬绑在同一套码本或同一训练目标里，结果往往是理解需要的高层语义和生成需要的低层纹理互相拉扯；这个问题现在重要，是因为原生多模态预训练越来越依赖共享 token 空间，tokenizer 的偏置会直接限制上层 LM 的统一建模能力。","importance":"这是一篇方法级、同时带有一点范式接口意义的工作。它的重要性不在于单纯把图像压得更好，而在于尝试把“理解 token”和“生成 token”放进同一个分层离散表示体系里，给统一多模态 LM 提供更一致的视觉接口。对 pretrain 的启示是：视觉 tokenizer 不一定要靠单一损失做 compromise，更合理的路线可能是把语义层级和像素层级显式解耦，再通过层次化码本去对齐它们各自的训练信号。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个语义引导的分层码本 tokenizer，而不是传统单层 VQ 或简单多损失联合训练。按摘要信息，作者的关键判断是：理解与生成关注的特征层次不同，所以不应让二者在同一粒度上直接竞争；因此 SemHiTok 用 hierarchical codebook 把高层语义和低层视觉细节分开承载，再用语义引导机制约束离散表示的一致性。这样设计的好处是，上层语义 token 更稳定，适合多模态理解；下层细节 token 保留局部像素信息，适合重建和生成。它和最接近工作的区别，不是再加一个蒸馏 loss，而是改了表示结构本身，把 trade-off 从“同一空间里权衡”变成“不同层里分工”。边界也很明显：分层结构通常会带来编码复杂度、码本利用率不均和训练调参成本。","experiments":"摘要没有给出参数规模、数据规模和具体数值，所以目前只能确认实验主线而不能确认量级。可以确定的是，作者把该 tokenizer 放在两类任务上评估：多模态理解和图像生成，并且主张其离散表示在两端都更一致。按这类工作常见设置，关键 baseline 大概率会包括偏理解型 tokenizer、偏生成型 tokenizer，以及联合损失的统一 tokenizer；真正值得关注的实验点会是三类：一是重建/生成质量是否明显优于联合训练基线，二是下游理解任务上是否不再掉点，三是分层码本的 ablation 是否证明语义引导比单纯加深码本更关键。由于摘要截断且没有数字，不能宣称其达到 SOTA，也不能判断提升幅度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a concrete bottleneck: building one discrete image tokenizer that works for both multimodal understanding and high-fidelity generation, instead of making a fragile compromise between semantics and pixels. Prior unified tokenizers usually mix semantic distillation and pixel reconstruction in a single code space, but those objectives pull representations toward different feature levels. This matters now because native multimodal pretraining increasingly depends on a shared token interface, and the tokenizer can become the main bottleneck for unified modeling.","importance":"This is primarily a method-level contribution with clear implications for multimodal pretraining interfaces. The value is not just better compression or reconstruction, but a cleaner way to expose vision tokens to a unified LM without forcing understanding and generation to fight in the same representational slot. The pretraining takeaway is straightforward: a unified visual tokenizer may work better when semantic and low-level signals are structurally separated, rather than balanced by a single joint loss.","technical_approach":"The core idea is a semantic-guided hierarchical codebook, not a standard single-level VQ tokenizer with extra losses. The design choice is motivated by a simple observation: understanding and generation prioritize different feature granularity, so they should not compete at the same level of discretization. SemHiTok appears to assign high-level semantics and low-level visual details to different layers of the codebook, while using semantic guidance to keep the overall representation consistent. This should make upper-level tokens more useful for recognition and reasoning, while preserving lower-level fidelity for reconstruction and generation. Relative to prior unified tokenizers, the main change is representational structure rather than another loss term. The trade-off is also clear: hierarchical codebooks usually increase training complexity and can suffer from uneven codebook usage.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model sizes, data scale, or headline numbers, so the evidence can only be summarized at a high level. The evaluation clearly spans both multimodal understanding and image generation, which is the right test for a unified tokenizer. The most informative comparisons should be against understanding-oriented tokenizers, generation-oriented tokenizers, and prior joint-training unified tokenizers. The key ablations to look for are whether the hierarchical design, rather than simply a larger codebook, drives the gain; whether semantic guidance improves both reconstruction and downstream understanding; and whether the tokenizer avoids the usual trade-off where one side improves at the expense of the other. No SOTA claim should be inferred from the available text.","authors_note":""},"tags":["visual-tokenizer","unified-tokenizer","hierarchical-codebook","multimodal-pretrain"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010048","title":"On Code-Induced Reasoning in LLMs","authors":["Abdul Waheed","Zhen Wu","Carolyn Rose","Daphne Ippolito"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$7f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010048"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010048","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心问题是：代码数据为什么能提升 LLM 推理，真正起作用的是代码的语义、结构，还是更抽象的程序组织形式。过去很多工作把“加代码数据有用”当经验事实接受了，但缺少可控拆解，因此很难指导 pretrain 数据配比、合成 reasoning data 设计，或者判断 pseudocode/flowchart 这类替代形式是否足够。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要是数据机理层面的。它不是提出新的推理模型，而是把“代码提升推理”这个高频观察拆成可验证因素，并且用大规模受控实验给出偏清晰的答案：结构性比精确语义更关键。对 pretrain 的直接启示很强——如果这个结论成立，那么让模型接触明确的层次结构、控制流和可执行样式的组织形式，可能比单纯扩大真实代码语料更高效；这会影响代码数据混合比例、合成数据格式，甚至 reasoning-centric tokenizer 和 curriculum 设计。","technical_approach":"方法上它是一个系统的数据中心研究，而不是架构创新。作者构造了跨 10 种编程语言的平行指令数据集，并设计受控扰动，分别破坏代码的结构属性和语义属性，再在 5 个模型家族、8 个尺度上做微调评估。这个设计有效的原因是：只有把任务内容、表达形式和监督量尽量对齐，才能把“代码有用”进一步归因到“是因为结构化表达有用，还是因为可执行语义有用”。摘要给出的关键发现是，模型对结构扰动更敏感，尤其体现在数学和代码任务上；同时 pseudocode 和 flowchart 这类恰当抽象可以和真实代码一样有效，说明帮助 reasoning 的未必是具体编程语言知识，而可能是明确的分步结构与约束表达。","experiments":"实验规模是这篇论文最硬的部分：共做了 3,331 组实验，覆盖 10 种编程语言、5 个模型家族和 8 个模型尺度。评估任务包括自然语言、数学和代码，摘要里最重要的事实是：结构性扰动造成的性能下降显著大于语义扰动，且在 math/code 上最明显；另一个关键结果是，pseudocode 和 flowcharts 在适当设计下可达到与代码相当的效果。摘要没有给出具体模型名称、参数量和提升/下降的精确数字，因此不能写具体百分点，但可以明确判断：这不是孤立于某个模型或某种语言的现象，而是跨模型、跨语言都观察到的稳健趋势。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a focused question: when code data improves LLM reasoning, what is actually responsible for the gain—program semantics, structural organization, or some more abstract procedural format. Prior work largely treated “code helps reasoning” as an empirical fact, but that is not enough to guide pretraining mixtures or synthetic reasoning data design.","importance":"This is a mechanism and data study rather than a new model, and that is exactly why it matters. It turns a broad empirical claim into a controlled causal question and suggests a practical answer: structure appears to matter more than exact code semantics. For pretraining, that is useful because it implies that exposing models to explicit control flow and structured decomposition may be more efficient than simply scaling raw code corpora.","technical_approach":"The method is a systematic, data-centric intervention study. The authors build parallel instruction datasets across ten programming languages and introduce controlled perturbations that separately damage structural and semantic properties of code, then fine-tune models from five families at eight scales on each variant. This setup is strong because it holds the task and supervision relatively constant while changing only the representational property of interest. The main result from the abstract is clear: models are more sensitive to structural corruption than semantic corruption, especially on math and code tasks. The additional finding that pseudocode and flowcharts can match code suggests the useful signal is often structured procedural expression, not necessarily full programming-language fidelity.","experiments":"The experimental footprint is substantial: 3,331 experiments across 10 languages, 5 model families, and 8 model scales. Evaluation spans natural language, math, and code. The key empirical fact is directional rather than numeric in the abstract: structural perturbations hurt more than semantic ones, with the strongest effects on math and code. Another important result is that well-designed abstractions such as pseudocode and flowcharts can be as effective as code. The abstract does not provide exact model names, parameter counts, or metric deltas, so the safest conclusion is that the observed pattern is broad and controlled, not tied to a single language or diffusion loss 之后，为什么它往往比条件扩散更稳、更能纠正条件误差。过去很多工作观察到 AR+diffusion loss 有效果，但更多停留在经验层面，没有解释“条件是错的时为什么不会一路错下去”。","importance":"它的价值主要是建模机制层面的。对统一预训练和 AR+diffusion 联合范式来说，这篇工作试图说明二者的结合不是简单叠加，而是自回归条件生成会主动修正上游噪声，使条件分布逐步稳定；如果这个分析站得住，它会支持更多把 diffusion-style denoising objective 嵌入 token AR 体系的设计，而不是把扩散和 AR 视为两套彼此独立的生成路线。","technical_approach":"方法上它做了两件事：先从理论上比较 条件时都在做局部去噪与条件重整，因此前序条件里的误差不会像在一次性条件扩散里那样持续污染后续生成，而是会指数级衰减。这个设计背后的取舍很清楚：AR 路线牺牲并行性，换取了对条件链条的在线修正能力；它和纯 diffusion 的差别不只是在 loss，而在条件是逐步生成、可被后续步骤再净化。","experiments":"摘要给出的实验结论是：作者不仅有理论比较，还在实验上验证了自回归条件生成会 refinement condition，使 condition error 的影响呈指数衰减，并带来更稳定的条件分布。摘要没有列出模型大小、图像分辨率、数据集、FID 或生成质量数字，因此无法补全具体成绩。若论文完整实验扎实，最重要的证据应包括：人为注入条件误差后的误差传播曲线、AR+diffusion loss 与 conditional diffusion 的稳定性对比，以及 patch 粒度、生成顺序或噪声调度对误差衰减速率的 ablation。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tries to explain a pattern that has been observed but not well justified: why autoregressive image generation with a diffusion loss can be more stable than standard conditional diffusion, especially when the conditioning signal is imperfect. Earlier work showed the hybrid works, but did not really explain how condition errors are corrected instead of amplified.","importance":"This is mainly a mechanistic contribution for hybrid generative modeling. For unified pretraining and AR-plus-diffusion designs, the useful message is that the gain may come from sequential condition refinement rather than from simply adding a denoising objective on top of an AR model. If that argument holds, it strengthens the case for integrating diffusion-style losses into token-based autoregressive frameworks.","technical_approach":"The paper combines theory and modeling insight. It compares conditional diffusion with an autoregressive model trained using a diffusion loss, then interprets the latter through a condition-error refinement lens. The key claim is that when the model generates conditions patch by patch, each step performs a local denoising-and-correction operation, so upstream condition errors decay exponentially rather than contaminating the whole generation process. The trade-off is clear: the AR route gives up full parallelism but gains iterative self-correction of the conditioning chain.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical result is that autoregressive condition generation refines conditions over time and causes the influence of condition errors to decay exponentially, yielding a more stable condition distribution. Transformers","authors":["Chengting Yu","Xiaobo Shu","Yadao Wang","Yizhen Zhang","Haoyi Wu","Jiaang Li","Rujiao Long","Ziheng Chen","Yuchi Xu","wenbo su","Bo Zheng"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$83","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010276"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010276","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：递归 Transformer 虽然能把计算深度和参数深度解耦，但在相同计算预算下，少参数多迭代的递归模型通常仍比普通非递归模型差。过去大家把原因笼统归结为容量不足，但作者认为更准确的问题是：同一隐状态被迫同时承载长期状态和瞬时计算结果，且每轮迭代的计算模式缺乏分化。","importance":"它的重要性在于给 recursive transformer 这条高效建模路线补上了一个更可信的瓶颈解释，并给出结构级改进。对 pretrain 研究来说，这不是小修小补，因为如果递归架构真能在固定参数下通过更多 compute step 换更强能力，它直接关系到 test-time compute、参数效率和小模型放大路线；MeSH 的价值就在于指出问题未必是“算得不够多”，而是“状态管理方式错了”。","technical_approach":"MeSH 的核心是把 memory 从单一 hidden state 中拆出来，做成显式 memory buffer，并用轻量 router 决定每次递归迭代该走哪种计算路径。这样做有两个直接效果：一是长期信息和当前迭代的瞬时信息不必挤在同一状态里，缓解 information overload；二是 router 让不同迭代可以执行不同职能，缓解 undifferentiated computation。和传统 recursive transformer 相比，它不是单纯增加 recurrence 次数，而是给 recurrence 加上状态高速路和迭代分工。代价则是系统复杂度上升，需要处理 memory 读写和路由稳定性。","experiments":"摘要给出的实验结论是：通过 probing hidden states，作者先定位了两大瓶颈，再证明 MeSH 能在参数复用的递归框架下缩小与非递归模型的性能差距。具体模型规模、训练数据、计算配比和提升数字摘要里没有给出，因此不能补。最关键的实验应当包括：在 matched compute 下和非递归、普通递归模型对比；memory buffer 与 router 分别拿掉后的 ablation；以及 hidden-state probing 证明长期/短期信息分离和迭代功能分化确实发生了。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a long-standing weakness of recursive transformers: even though they decouple compute depth from parameter depth, parameter-reused recursive models often underperform non-recursive models at matched compute. The authors argue that the issue is not just insufficient capacity, but poor state management and lack of functional differentiation across iterations.","importance":"This is a useful architecture-level contribution for efficient pretraining. Recursive models matter because they offer a plausible route to more capability through extra compute rather than more parameters, which is relevant to parameter efficiency and test-time scaling. The paper’s main value is that it identifies a more actionable bottleneck: the model is not simply too small, it is forcing long-lived memory and transient computation into the same state and repeating near-identical computation every iteration.","technical_approach":"MeSH introduces an explicit memory buffer and lightweight routers into a recursive transformer. The memory buffer externalizes state that should persist across iterations, while the routers let different iterations follow different computational roles. This directly targets the two diagnosed problems: information overload is reduced because long-term and short-term content no longer compete inside one hidden state, and undifferentiated computation is reduced because iteration behavior is no longer forced to be uniform. Compared with standard recursive transformers, the key change is not more recurrence but structured recurrence with explicit memory highways. The cost is additional system complexity and potential routing instability.","experiments":"The abstract claims that hidden-state probing identifies two main bottlenecks and that MeSH improves recursive transformers under matched compute, narrowing the gap to non-recursive baselines. It does not report model sizes, datasets, compute budgets, or exact performance gains, so those remain unavailable. The most important evidence in the full paper would be matched-compute comparisons, ablations removing the memory buffer or routers, and probing results showing actual separation of persistent memory from transient computation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["recursive-transformer","architecture","memory","depth"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010275","title":"D-AR: Diffusion via Autoregressive Models","authors":["Ziteng Gao","Mike Zheng Shou"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$84","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010275"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010275","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文想解决的是：能不能把 diffusion 过程完全改写成标准 next-token 自回归建模，从而直接复用成熟的 AR 训练和推理栈，而不是为图像扩散单独维护一套模型机制。过去 AR 和 diffusion 一直被视为两条生成路线，混合工作也常需要改 mask、改 objective 或改 sampling；这篇工作试图把二者统一到更纯粹的 AR 形式里。","importance":"这项工作有明显的范式探索价值。对统一预训练尤其重要的一点是，它不是简单做 AR+diffusion 联合 loss，而是声称 diffusion 可以被离散化成一串 coarse-to-fine token，然后用 vanilla next-token prediction 学出来。若这个表述在实证上成立，影响会比一个局部 trick 大，因为它意味着图像生成中的扩散动态也许能在统一 token LM 里原生表达，这对多模态统一建模是很强的信号。","technical_approach":"D-AR 的核心设计是一个特殊 tokenizer：把图像变成离散 token 序列，并让不同位置的 token 对应 pixel-space diffusion 中不同去噪步。由于扩散天然有从粗到细的演化顺序，这些 token 也自然形成 coarse-to-fine 序列，于是可以直接做标准自回归 next-token 训练，不需要改 causal mask，也不需要单独设计 diffusion 式训练/采样流程。关键选择在于把“时间步去噪”编码进 token 排序，而不是在网络结构里显式模拟扩散链。这样做的好处是最大化复用 AR 基建；边界则在于 tokenizer 是否足够忠实地保留 diffusion 结构，以及长序列 AR 代价是否会抵消部分收益。","experiments":"摘要没有给出定量结果，但它明确声称：顺序生成这些 token 可以直接镜像 pixel diffusion 过程，并且整个系统建立在 vanilla AR 框架上。最值得看的实验会是：与标准 diffusion、离散图像 AR、以及现有 AR-diffusion hybrid 的生成质量与效率对比；tokenizer 设计是否真的学到 coarse-to-fine 去噪顺序；以及在统一 multimodal LM 骨架里是否更容易接入文本条件或共享训练基础设施。缺少模型、数据和指标数字，因此这里不能补充成绩。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a bold unification question: can image diffusion be recast entirely as standard autoregressive next-token prediction, so that the same AR training and inference stack can model what is usually treated as a diffusion process? Prior hybrid work often mixed AR and diffusion objectives, but still kept diffusion-specific machinery. This paper tries to collapse the process into vanilla AR form.","importance":"This is a paradigm-level exploration with clear relevance to unified multimodal pretraining. The interesting claim is not merely that AR can help diffusion, but that the diffusion trajectory itself can be serialized into discrete coarse-to-fine tokens and learned with standard next-token prediction. If that works empirically, it strengthens the idea that diffusion-style generation may fit inside a unified token LM without bespoke diffusion infrastructure.","technical_approach":"D-AR is built around a tokenizer that converts an image into discrete tokens whose positions correspond to different denoising stages in pixel-space diffusion. Because diffusion naturally follows a coarse-to-fine progression, these tokens form an autoregressive sequence. The model then uses plain next-token prediction with standard causal masking and standard AR training/inference procedures. The crucial design choice is to encode denoising time into token order rather than into a dedicated diffusion model architecture. The upside is maximal reuse of mature AR infrastructure; the main risk is whether the tokenizer can preserve the right diffusion structure without making the AR sequence too long or too lossy.","experiments":"The abstract does not report quantitative results, but it does make a clear empirical claim: sequential generation of the proposed tokens mirrors the pixel diffusion process while staying fully within a vanilla AR setup. The full paper should be judged on comparisons against standard diffusion models, discrete image AR baselines, and prior AR-diffusion hybrids, as well as analyses showing that the tokenizer truly induces a coarse-to-fine denoising order. If the length is too short, performance collapses on harder tasks; if it is too long, compute is wasted and quality can even degrade.","importance":"This matters because it addresses a deployment bottleneck rather than a marginal modeling tweak. Diffusion LMs will remain awkward for open-ended generation as long as they cannot adapt response length the way autoregressive models effectively do. A training-free variable-length inference scheme, if reliable, would make DLLMs much more usable and narrow a major practicality gap with AR LLMs.","technical_approach":"The proposed method is training-free variable-length denoising. Instead of retraining the model or changing the architecture, it reads internal model signals that correlate with the optimal response length and uses them to adapt denoising length at inference time. That is a sensible design choice because it targets the rigid inference policy rather than the pretrained model itself. The core shift is from a static externally chosen length to a length decision driven by the model’s own state. The obvious failure mode is noisy length estimation, which could cause premature stopping or unnecessary extension.","experiments":"The abstract provides the key qualitative claim: DLLMs contain internal signals that correlate with optimal response length, and these signals can be used for training-free variable-length denoising. It does not report model names, tasks, quality metrics, or compute savings, so no numbers should be added. There's no unified approach handling both short-term detail and long-term prediction.","importance":"Directly relevant to cross-modal unified pretraining. The next clip diffusion paradigm is a concrete instance of AR + diffusion joint modeling for video—AR handles inter-clip temporal dependencies while diffusion handles intra-clip generation. Aligned in spirit with Transfusion-style work but applied to the more challenging video modality. Method-level contribution.","technical_approach":"Video-GPT treats video as a sequence of clips (analogous to tokens in GPT). Shao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$8e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010855"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010855","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：在 RLVR 训练大推理模型时，像熵、回答长度这类训练统计确实和推理行为相关，但现有做法通常靠手工 reward/advantage shaping 注入这些先验，方向和强度都很难调。问题不在于这些先验没用，而在于‘简单地奖励更长/更短、更高熵/更低熵’过于僵硬，容易把训练往错误方向推，甚至直接训崩。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是 RL 训练信号设计层面的改进。它的重要性在于给出了一个比手工 shaping 更稳的方式去利用行为先验，这对 reasoning RL 很关键，因为现在很多成功经验都带有较强经验主义色彩。对 pretrain/post-train 接口的启示是：后训练里那些与推理风格相关的统计量确实有用，但它们不适合作为固定方向的硬偏好，更适合作为条件化、上下文相关的 advantage 放大器。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 CANON，Conditional Advantage Estimation。它不是直接在 reward 上加一个一刀切偏置，而是根据条件信息去放大某些轨迹的 advantage，使长度、熵等先验以更柔性的方式影响策略更新。关键设计思路是把‘这个指标高是不是好事’变成条件相关判断，而不是预先写死；例如在某些题上更长回答代表更充分推理，在另一些题上则可能只是冗余。和 reward shaping 相比，CANON 试图减少手工超参数和错误归纳偏置导致的训练失败。","experiments":"摘要明确的实验背景是大模型在可验证任务上的 RL 训练，尤其是数学推理。可以预期关键 baseline 包括 vanilla PPO/GRPO 类 RLVR、长度或熵的 reward shaping、以及其他 advantage shaping 策略。作者想证明的核心事实应是：CANON 比固定方向的 shaping 更稳、更少依赖超参数，并带来更好的 reasoning behavior 或最终准确率。摘要未给出模型规模、数据集、训练步数和具体提升数字，因此目前只能确认它是一篇训练稳定性/信号设计论文，而不是提出新的环境或基础模型。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real failure mode in RLVR for large reasoning models: useful behavioral signals such as entropy or response length are often injected through hand-crafted reward or advantage shaping, but those priors are brittle. A fixed preference like longer-is-better or lower-entropy-is-better can be badly wrong depending on the problem, and poor tuning can destabilize training entirely.","importance":"This is a training-signal design contribution. Its value is that it offers a more reliable way to exploit behavioral priors that practitioners already know are informative, without hard-coding them as universal directional preferences. For the pretrain/post-train interface, the message is important: these statistics are helpful, but they should influence policy updates conditionally rather than as globally fixed biases.","technical_approach":"The method, CANON—Conditional Advantage Estimation—modulates the effect of trajectory-level signals through condition-dependent advantage amplification instead of blunt reward shaping. The central design choice is flexibility: whether a property such as long output or high entropy is desirable should depend on context, not on a universal sign chosen beforehand. Compared with standard shaping, CANON is meant to reduce manual hyperparameter dependence and avoid the training failures caused by overstrong inductive biases.","experiments":"The abstract positions the method in RLVR for verifiable reasoning tasks, especially mathematics. scaling law 默认更多数据单调更优，但 LIMO、s1 一类结果说明在某些 regime 下 aggressive curation 反而更有效，现有解释多停留在经验层面，缺少能给出边界条件的理论框架。","importance":"它的重要性主要是理论层面的，但与 pretrain 数据配比和数据质量高度相关。对预训练的启示不是简单鼓励少数据训练，而是提供一个判断框架：当筛选 oracle 的质量、样本难度分布和标签可靠性满足某些条件时，扔掉部分数据是有利的；否则“less is more”只是偶然现象。对做数据治理的人，这比口号更有价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是建立一个关于 data curation 的理论模型，其中一个不完美 oracle 根据样本难度和正确性选择训练样本，并分别分析 label-agnostic 与 label-aware 的筛选规则。作者给出的不是泛泛的上界，而是 test error 的精确 scaling law 曲线，因此可以明确看到不同筛选策略何时优于全量数据训练。这个建模很关键，因为现实中的数据筛选器也几乎从来不是完美 oracle；如果理论只讨论完美选择器，结论对实际高噪声 web data 价值有限。","experiments":"摘要看起来以理论结果为主，没有给出具体实验规模和数值。能确定的是，论文会展示在不同 oracle 误差、难度分布和标签感知能力下，测试误差如何随保留数据比例变化，并指出与经典 scaling law 的偏离区间。对工程读者最值得关注的不是某个 toy result，而是相图式结论：在哪些参数区间应继续扩数据，在哪些区间应更激进去重、清洗或重采样。若有实证部分，也多半是用合成或可控实验去验证理论曲线。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a question that has become hard to ignore: when can using less data actually improve generalization? Classical scaling-law intuition says more data is better, but recent curated-data results suggest there are regimes where aggressive filtering wins, and the field lacks a clean theory for when that should happen.","importance":"The contribution is primarily theoretical, but it is directly relevant to pretraining data quality and curation. The practical value is not a slogan that ‘less is more’; it is a decision framework for when imperfect filtering can help and when it will hurt. That is exactly the kind of boundary condition data-centric pretraining work needs.","technical_approach":"The authors formulate data curation through an imperfect oracle that selects examples based on difficulty and correctness, and they analyze both label-agnostic and label-aware curation rules. Importantly, they derive exact test-error scaling curves rather than only asymptotic upper bounds. That makes the theory operational: it can characterize when keeping only a subset improves generalization and when classical more-data scaling still dominates.","experiments":"The abstract reads as theory-first and does not report empirical model sizes or benchmark numbers. What we can infer is that the paper should present controlled validations of the theoretical curves under different oracle qualities and curation rules. For practitioners, the most useful output will likely be phase-diagram-style regimes indicating when to prioritize more data and when to prioritize stronger filtering or reweighting.","authors_note":""},"tags":["data-curation","scaling-law","data-quality","theory","less-is-more"],"notable_authors":["Elvis Dohmatob","Mohammad Pezeshki","Reyhane Askari Hemmat"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011312","title":"RL's Razor: Why Online Reinforcement Learning Forgets Less","authors":["Idan Shenfeld","Jyothish Pari","Pulkit Agrawal"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Comparison of fine-tuning models with reinforcement learning (RL) and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) reveals that, despite similar performance at a new task, RL preserves prior knowledge and capabilities significantly better. We find that the degree of forgetting is determined by the distributional shift, measured as the KL-divergence between the fine-tuned and base policy evaluated on the new task. Our analysis reveals that on-policy RL is implicitly biased towards KL-minimal solutions among the many that solve the new task, whereas SFT can converge to distributions arbitrarily far from the base model. We validate these findings through experiments with large language models and robotic foundation models and further provide theoretical justification for why on-policy RL updates lead to a smaller KL change. We term this principle $\\textit{RL’s Razor}$: among all ways to solve a new task, RL prefers those closest in KL to the original model.
