Discrete Diffusion: Learning how to noise to denoise faster","authors":["Grigory Bartosh","Teodora Pandeva","Sushrut Karmalkar","Javier Zazo"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Discrete diffusion models are a powerful class of generative models that demonstrate strong performance across many domains. However, for efficiency, discrete diffusion typically parameterizes the generative (reverse) process with factorized distributions, which makes it difficult for the model to learn a target process in a small number of steps and necessitates a long, computationally expensive sampling procedure. To reduce the gap between the target and model distributions and enable few-step generation, we introduce a learnable noising (forward) process for discrete diffusion. Instead of fixing a Markovian forward chain, we adopt a non-Markovian formulation and introduce learnable marginal and posterior distributions. This allows the generative process to remain factorized while matching the target defined by the noising process. We train all parameters end-to-end under the standard variational objective. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011583"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011583","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["discrete-diffusion","diffusion-lm","objective","sampling-efficiency"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011612","title":"Routing Manifold Alignment Improves Generalization of Mixture-of-Experts LLMs","authors":["Zhongyang Li","Ziyue Li","Tianyi Zhou"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$9d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011612"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011612","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：MoE LLM 的容量很大，但 router 经常不是最优的，导致实际下游泛化和“如果路由选对了本该有的表现”之间存在明显差距。过去很多工作把重点放在 expert 扩容或负载均衡上，而没有认真处理 router 表征是否真的和任务结构对齐；作者认为这才是 MoE 泛化差距的重要来源。","importance":"这项工作属于方法级改进，但对 MoE 预训练和后训练都很有启发。它指出 router 不是单纯的工程部件，而是决定泛化的核心表示层。更重要的是，作者声称现有 MoE 与最优路由之间有 10–20% accuracy gap，这个量级如果稳，说明大量 MoE 能力被路由质量锁住了。对 pretrain 研究而言，这意味着除了专家数和激活 sparsity，router 的几何结构和任务可分性也该被当成第一类问题。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 RoMA：在 post-training 时加入一个 manifold regularization，让 routing weight 的流形和 task embedding 的流形更对齐，同时只微调 router，冻结其余参数。它不是重新训练 MoE，也不是显式搜索 oracle routing，而是通过几何约束让相似任务在路由空间中也更接近，从而提升未见任务上的路由泛化。和标准 router finetuning 相比，RoMA 的关键区别是优化目标不只看任务损失，还显式约束“路由结构应该像任务结构”。这样设计有效的原因在于，router 若只追逐训练集局部最优，容易学到脆弱的分区边界；加上流形对齐后，路由决策更平滑。边界在于，这种方法依赖 task embedding 的质量；如果任务表征本身噪声大或不能反映求解机制，相似性约束可能反而误导路由。","experiments":"摘要给出了最关键的数字背景：现有 router 相对最优路由存在 10–20% 的准确率差距，而 RoMA 旨在缩小这部分 gap。除此之外，摘要没有提供模型规模、专家数和具体 benchmark 分数。实验上最值得关注的是三件事：第一，RoMA 在冻结 backbone 和 experts、只调 router 的条件下能回收多少性能；第二，提升是否主要来自 OOD/generalization 任务，而不是训练分布内记忆；第三，流形正则项的权重是否存在明显 sweet spot。若这些都成立，这比单纯的 router 校准更有说服力。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a recurring weakness in sparse MoE LLMs: the router is often far from optimal, leaving a sizable gap between observed downstream performance and what the same experts could achieve under better routing. Much prior work has focused on scaling experts or balancing load, while treating routing quality as a secondary issue. This work argues that router-task misalignment is a major source of lost generalization.","importance":"This is a method contribution with strong implications for both MoE pretraining and post-training. The notable claim is that existing MoE LLMs can be 10–20% behind optimal routing on broad downstream evaluations. If that gap is robust, the message is important: MoE quality is not just about how many experts you have, but about whether the router geometry reflects task structure. That makes routing a first-class research object rather than a plumbing detail.","technical_approach":"RoMA adds a manifold regularization term during post-training so that the manifold of routing weights aligns better with the manifold of task embeddings, while keeping the rest of the model frozen and finetuning only the routers. This is not oracle routing search and not full MoE retraining. The core design choice is to optimize not only task loss, but also structural consistency between task similarity and routing similarity. The intuition is that routers trained only on local task loss can form brittle partitions; manifold alignment encourages smoother, more transferable routing decisions. The limitation is that the method depends on the quality of the task embedding space. If task embeddings are noisy or fail to reflect the real solution structure, the regularizer may enforce the wrong geometry.","experiments":"The abstract provides one important quantitative context: current routers can be 10–20% behind optimal routing in accuracy. It does not provide model sizes, expert counts, or benchmark numbers. The most important experimental questions are how much of that gap RoMA recovers when only routers are finetuned, whether gains are concentrated on out-of-distribution generalization rather than in-domain fitting, and how sensitive the method is to the regularization strength. Those results would determine whether the method is genuinely improving routing structure or simply calibrating a few benchmarks.","authors_note":""},"tags":["moe","routing","generalization","manifold-alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011631","title":"Fast-dLLM: Training-free Acceleration of Diffusion LLM by Enabling KV Cache and Parallel Decoding","authors":["Chengyue Wu","Hao Zhang","Shuchen Xue","Zhijian Liu","Shizhe Diao","Ligeng Zhu","Ping Luo","Song Han","Enze Xie"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$9e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011631"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011631","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：Diffusion LLM 虽然提供了非自回归文本生成路线，但开源模型在实际推理速度上通常仍落后于 AR 模型，主要因为 bidirectional 结构难以复用 KV cache，且并行解多个 token 时常出现质量下降。问题不在于 diffusion LM 能不能生成文本，而在于它还没有一个足够接近 AR serving 习惯的高效解码栈。","importance":"这项工作对 diffusion LM 很关键，属于系统级但带有范式推进意义。原因很简单：如果 DLM 在推理效率上始终落后，它即使在建模上有优点也很难进入主流。Fast-dLLM 的价值在于直接攻击两个最现实的瓶颈——cache 复用和并行解码质量——而且是 training-free 的，不要求重新训练模型。对 pretrain 研究者来说，这会影响我们如何判断 DLM 与 AR 的实际竞争力，因为范式比较不能只看离线 perplexity 或质量。","technical_approach":"核心方法有两个部件。第一，作者为双向 diffusion 模型设计了 block-wise approximate KV cache，让部分历史计算可以复用，目标是在几乎不掉质量的前提下降低重复计算。第二，他们分析并行解码质量下降的根因在于 conditional independence 假设打断了 token 依赖，于是提出 confidence-aware parallel decoding，在并行和依赖保留之间做折中，而不是盲目一次并行很多 token。和已有 DLM 推理做法相比，这篇的关键贡献是把 AR 时代非常成熟的 cache 思路改写到双向生成里，同时承认并行不是越多越好。边界在于，近似 cache 的误差会随 block 设置累积，而 confidence 机制的收益也依赖模型自身置信度是否可靠。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型名、加速比和质量变化数字，但实验主张很明确：Fast-dLLM 能在几乎无性能下降下启用 KV cache，并缓解并行解码导致的质量退化。最关键的实验应包括：相对原始 DLM 解码的 wall-clock speedup、token/s 提升、不同并行度下的质量曲线，以及 cache 近似粒度对速度和质量的 trade-off。若作者还与 AR baseline 做了 end-to-end latency 对比，那会更有参考价值，因为这决定它到底是理论上更快，还是系统层面真正可用。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses the practical inference gap of diffusion LLMs. Although they offer a non-autoregressive text generation paradigm, open-source DLMs often remain slower than autoregressive models in real serving setups because bidirectional decoding does not naturally support KV cache reuse, and decoding many tokens in parallel tends to hurt quality.","importance":"This is a systems contribution with broader paradigm relevance. If diffusion LMs cannot close the inference-efficiency gap, their modeling advantages will have limited impact in practice. Fast-dLLM matters because it attacks the two most immediate bottlenecks—cache reuse and degraded parallel decoding quality—without requiring retraining. For pretraining researchers, that changes how fair AR-versus-DLM comparisons should be framed: modeling quality alone is not enough if the inference stack is not competitive.","technical_approach":"The method has two main parts. First, it introduces a block-wise approximate KV cache tailored to bidirectional diffusion models, allowing partial reuse of previous computation with negligible quality loss. Second, it identifies the quality drop in parallel decoding as a dependency problem caused by conditional-independence assumptions, and proposes confidence-aware parallel decoding to balance parallelism against token dependency preservation. Compared with prior DLM inference schemes, the paper’s main contribution is to adapt the highly effective AR cache idea to a bidirectional setting while explicitly acknowledging that more parallel tokens are not always better. The key limitations are approximation error from block-wise caching and the dependence on well-calibrated confidence estimates.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model names, speedups, or exact quality numbers, but the empirical claims are clear: Fast-dLLM enables KV cache reuse with negligible performance drop and reduces the quality degradation of parallel decoding. The most important results to inspect would be wall-clock speedup over vanilla DLM decoding, throughput gains, quality-versus-parallelism curves, and the trade-off induced by cache approximation granularity. End-to-end latency comparisons against AR baselines would be especially useful for judging practical competitiveness.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion-lm","kv-cache","parallel-decoding","inference-acceleration"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011646","title":"MoM: Linear Sequence Modeling with Ober","Aniruddh Raghu","Andrew Gordon Wilson"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$a2","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011795"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011795","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：离散序列上的 diffusion 现在分成三套主要路线——离散状态空间 diffusion、欧氏空间 Gaussian diffusion、以及 simplex diffusion——它们都在建模同一类对象，但算法、理论和数值特性彼此割裂，导致研究者在 DNA、蛋白、语言等任务上很难系统比较和迁移方法。过去的统一理论往往只覆盖其中两类，或者停留在很抽象的层面，不能解释 practical trade-off：离散 diffusion 域最自然，Gaussian diffusion 算法最成熟，simplex diffusion 理论上兼得两边优点但常被数值不稳定拖累。作者要做的是给三者一个共同框架，并说明它们何时等价、何时只是近似相关。","importance":"这项工作的价值偏理论框架级，但对新型语言建模范式很重要。对做 diffusion LM、离散生成、序列预训练的人来说，这不是单纯数学整理，而是在帮助回答‘我们到底在选什么建模对象和噪声几何’。如果统一框架足够清晰，它会直接影响算法迁移：哪些 Gaussian diffusion 的成熟技巧可以搬到离散序列，哪些 simplex 方法的数值问题是实现细节、哪些是结构性限制。它的冲击不一定体现在单个 benchmark 刷分，而体现在让离散/连续/单纯形三条技术线更容易互相借力。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出一个统一 discrete、Gaussian、simplicial diffusion 的理论视角，把三类模型放进同一生成-退化框架中进行比较和推导。摘要没有给出完整技术细节，但可以确认作者不仅做概念并列，还试图统一算法结构和 trade-off 解释，特别是 simplex diffusion 为什么理论上像桥梁、实践中却数值脆弱。这样的工作通常会明确状态空间、前向噪声过程、逆过程参数化及其连续极限之间的对应关系，并给出把一种模型视为另一种特例或极限情形的条件。与过去工作的区别在于覆盖面更完整，且目标是让 practitioner 可以在 downstream 应用中切换模型，而不只是证明若干抽象等价式。边界在于：统一并不意味着性能统一，尤其当数值稳定性和近似误差主导训练时，理论对应关系未必直接转成可用算法。","experiments":"摘要显示作者既有理论也有实验，并希望帮助实践者在不同 diffusion 形式间切换。摘要没有提供任务、模型规模、数据集或指标，因此无法判断实验是概念验证还是强基准比较。最值得看的是三类 diffusion 在同一序列任务上的 controlled comparison：相同模型容量、相近噪声调度和训练预算下的似然、生成质量、数值稳定性和采样效率；以及 simplex diffusion 数值稳定性的具体改进或失败边界。如果实验能证明某些技巧在统一框架下可跨范式迁移，那这篇论文的实际影响会明显大于纯理论论文。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a fragmentation problem in diffusion modeling for discrete sequences. Today, practitioners choose among discrete-state diffusion, Gaussian diffusion in Euclidean space, and diffusion on the simplex. These methods target the same kinds of data—language, proteins, DNA—but they come with separate algorithms, theoretical stories, and practical trade-offs. Existing unifications are partial and do not fully explain when these models are equivalent, when they are only related by approximation, and why simplex diffusion looks attractive in theory but unstable in practice.","importance":"This is primarily a theory-and-framework contribution, but it matters directly for non-autoregressive language modeling and discrete generative modeling. The practical value is not a single benchmark gain. It is a cleaner answer to what exactly changes when we choose one diffusion geometry over another. If the unification is done well, it can make algorithm transfer easier across paradigms and help practitioners decide whether they are trading off natural data domain, algorithm maturity, or numerical stability.","technical_approach":"The core contribution is a unified view of discrete, Gaussian, and simplicial diffusion under a common framework. The abstract suggests the paper goes beyond a conceptual taxonomy and aims to align the algorithms, theory, and trade-offs across all three families, especially clarifying the bridge role of simplex diffusion. In practice, that likely means specifying correspondences between state spaces, forward corruption processes, reverse-process parameterizations, and limiting cases under which one formulation recovers another. Relative to earlier work, the novelty appears to be the scope of the unification and its focus on practitioner-facing model switching rather than purely abstract equivalence. The obvious boundary is that theoretical unification does not automatically yield equal training behavior once numerical instability and approximation error dominate.","experiments":"The abstract indicates both theoretical analysis and empirical study, with the goal of enabling model choice and transfer across diffusion families. It does not include tasks, model sizes, datasets, or metrics, so the empirical depth cannot be assessed from the provided text alone. The most useful experiments would be controlled comparisons on the same sequence tasks under matched capacity and training budget, evaluating likelihood or generation quality together with numerical stability and sampling efficiency. Detailed analysis of where simplex diffusion fails or succeeds numerically would be particularly valuable, because that is where theory and practice currently diverge the most.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion-lm","discrete-diffusion","theory","objective","non-ar"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011804","title":"Latent Denoising Makes Good Tokenizers","authors":["Jiawei Yang","Tianhong Li","Lijie Fan","Yonglong Tian","Yue Wang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$a3","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011804"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011804","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：tokenizer 对生成模型极其关键，但大家通常按重建误差、感知质量或压缩率去训练 tokenizer，却没有直接回答‘什么样的 tokenization 对下游生成最有利’。作者的判断是，现代生成模型无论是 diffusion 的高斯去噪、masked modeling 的掩码恢复，还是其他 corruption-reconstruction 范式，核心训练目标都可以看成 denoising；因此如果 tokenizer 学到的 latent embedding 在被噪声污染后仍容易恢复原信号，那么它会更适配生成建模。过去 tokenizer 往往和下游生成目标脱节，只保证编码-解码重建，不保证 latent 本身适合做 denoising 学习。","importance":"这项工作的意义不小，因为它把 tokenizer 设计从‘压缩器’重新拉回‘预训练接口’。对统一多模态预训练、视觉 tokenization、甚至语音离散化都有启发：好的 tokenizer 不只是让重建更好，而是要让下游建模目标更容易优化。这个观点如果成立，影响是方法级但触达基础设计层。尤其在图像生成里，tokenizer 常常决定上层模型能否稳定扩大规模；而“latent denoising 对齐”提供了一个比 VQ 重建或感知损失更贴近下游目标的训练原则。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Latent Denoising Tokenizer，一种直接围绕 latent denoising 目标训练的图像 tokenizer。做法上，它不是只把图像编码成 latent 再解码重建，而是对 latent embedding 施加插值噪声或随机 masking，然后要求 tokenizer 能从被扰动的 latent 恢复干净图像。这个设计的关键在于把鲁棒可恢复性作为 tokenizer 表示质量的一部分，从而使 latent 空间对后续 diffusion 或 masked generative learning 更友好。与传统 tokenizer 相比，区别不是架构多复杂，而是训练准则变了：关注 latent 在 corruption 下的可逆性，而不是仅关注无噪声编码下的重建质量。边界也很清楚：如果下游模型并不是以 denoising 为核心，比如强自回归 patch LM，收益可能没有那么直接。","experiments":"摘要给出的结论很明确：作者认为对齐 latent denoising 目标能得到更好的 tokenizer，并在生成建模上带来明显好处。摘要没有提供数据集、token 数、码率、上游 tokenizer baseline、下游生成器类型和具体指标，因此无法确认是在哪些图像生成设置上提升最大。最值得关注的实验包括：在相同 token budget 下，与 VQ-VAE / VQGAN / 连续 latent tokenizer 等 baseline 比较下游生成质量；不同 corruption 形式（插值噪声、masking）对 tokenizer 泛化的影响；以及 tokenizer 训练目标与下游生成目标匹配程度的 ablation。如果论文显示同一个 tokenizer 同时利于 diffusion 和 masked generation，那它的泛化价值会更强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a foundational question: what actually makes a tokenizer good for generative modeling? Existing tokenizers are usually trained for reconstruction, perceptual quality, or compression efficiency, but those objectives do not directly align with the training dynamics of downstream generators. The authors argue that many modern generative models—from diffusion to masked reconstruction—share a denoising structure. So a useful tokenizer should produce latent embeddings that remain recoverable even after corruption, not just latents that reconstruct well in the clean case.","importance":"This matters because it reframes tokenization as an interface design problem for pretraining, not merely as a codec problem. The idea is relevant beyond images: in multimodal pretraining, visual and audio tokenizers often determine whether the upper-level model trains stably and scales well. If latent denoising alignment consistently improves downstream generation, that would be a meaningful method-level result with broad implications for tokenizer design. It proposes a training principle tied directly to the downstream objective rather than to stand-alone reconstruction quality.","technical_approach":"The Latent Denoising Tokenizer is trained not only to encode and decode images, but also to reconstruct clean images from corrupted latent embeddings. The corruption includes interpolative noise and random masking. This changes the objective from plain autoencoding to denoising in latent space, encouraging embeddings that preserve information under perturbation and are therefore easier for downstream denoising-based generators to model. Compared with conventional tokenizers, the novelty is less about architecture and more about objective alignment: latent robustness and recoverability become first-class training targets. The boundary is also clear: if the downstream model is not denoising-based—for example, a strongly autoregressive patch language model—the benefit may be weaker or task-dependent.","experiments":"The abstract makes a direct claim that aligning tokenizer training with latent denoising leads to better tokenizers for generative modeling. But it provides no datasets, token budgets, bitrate settings, tokenizer baselines, downstream generator types, or quantitative gains, so the empirical scope is still unclear. The most informative experiments should compare against VQ-style and continuous-latent tokenizers under matched token budgets, examine which corruption schemes transfer best to downstream models, and test how strongly the gains depend on objective match between tokenizer and generator. If one tokenizer improves both diffusion-style and masked generation, that would make the case much stronger than a single benchmark win.","authors_note":""},"tags":["tokenizer","latent","denoising","representation-learning","generative-modeling"],"notable_authors":["Yonglong Tian","Yue Wang"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011837","title":"Fast-dLLM v2: Efficient Block-Diffusion LLM","authors":["Chengyue Wu","Hao Zhang","Shuchen Xue","Shizhe Diao","Yonggan Fu","Zhijian Liu","Pavlo Molchanov","Ping Luo","Song Han","Enze Xie"],"institutions":["MIT"],"abstract":"$a4","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011837"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011837","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"AR LLM 的逐 token 解码限制了推理效率，而从头训练 diffusion LLM 需要海量数据（如 Dream 用了 580B token）。如何低成本地将已有 AR 模型转化为支持并行生成的 diffusion LLM？","importance":"范式级贡献，直接关联 diffusion LM 这一新型语言建模方向。核心价值在于：只需约 1B token 的微调（比 Dream 少 500 倍）就能将 pretrained AR 模型适配为 block diffusion LLM，同时保持原模型性能。这大幅降低了 diffusion LLM 的入门门槛，使得现有 AR pretrain 投资可以被复用。","technical_approach":"提出 Fast-dLLM v2，结合 block diffusion 机制和互补注意力掩码（complementary attention mask）。Block diffusion 将序列分成块，每块内部用 diffusion 并行生成，块间保持因果依赖。互补注意力掩码的设计让模型在块内做双向上下文建模的同时不破坏 AR 的训练信号——这是关键的工程选择，使得微调量极小。与 Dream 等全注意力 diffusion LLM 的区别在于：不需要从头训练，而是在 AR 模型基础上做最小改动。","experiments":"微调数据量约 1B token，比 Dream（580B token）少约 500 倍。声称保持了原 AR 模型的性能水平。具体的生成速度提升倍数和下游任务指标需看全文。","authors_note":"作者包括 Song Han（MIT）。这是 diffusion LLM 实用化的重要一步。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"AR LLMs decode sequentially, limiting inference speed. Training diffusion LLMs from scratch requires massive data (e.g., Dream uses 580B tokens). The question is how to cheaply convert existing AR models into parallel-decoding diffusion LLMs.","importance":"Paradigm-level contribution to the diffusion LM direction. Achieves AR-to-dLLM adaptation with only ~1B tokens of fine-tuning (500× less than Dream) while preserving original model performance. This makes diffusion LLMs practical by reusing existing AR pretrain investments.","technical_approach":"Fast-dLLM v2 combines block diffusion with a complementary attention mask. Sequences are split into blocks; within each block, tokens are generated in parallel via diffusion, while blocks maintain causal dependencies. The complementary attention mask enables blockwise bidirectional context modeling without destroying AR training signals—this is the key design that keeps fine-tuning data minimal. Unlike full-attention dLLMs like Dream, it builds on top of pretrained AR models with minimal modifications.","experiments":"Fine-tuning uses ~1B tokens, approximately 500× less than Dream (580B tokens). Claims to preserve original AR model performance. Specific speedup factors and downstream metrics require the full paper.","authors_note":"Song Han (MIT) is a co-author. This is a significant step toward practical diffusion LLMs."},"tags":["diffusion-lm","block-diffusion","parallel-decoding","ar-to-diffusion"],"notable_authors":["Song Han"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011843","title":"Probing Rotary Position Embeddings through Frequency Entropy","authors":["Yui Oka","Kentaro Hanafusa","Taku Hasegawa","Kyosuke Nishida","Kuniko Saito"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$a5","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011843"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011843","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"RoPE 被广泛使用但其内部频率结构缺乏系统理解。已有研究对高频和低频维度的作用给出了相互矛盾的结论，缺少统一的解释框架。","importance":"机制分析级贡献。提出 Frequency Entropy（FE）指标来量化 RoPE 每个频率维度的有效利用程度，为理解和改进位置编码提供了可操作的分析工具。基于 Llama-4（同时包含 RoPE 和 NoPE 层）的分析尤其有价值——这是少有的能在同一模型内对比有无位置编码的机会。","technical_approach":"定义 Frequency Entropy（FE）：对 RoPE 的每个正弦分量，计算其在模型表示中的有效利用程度。FE 高意味着该频率维度被充分利用，FE 低意味着该维度对模型贡献小。用这个指标逐维度分析 RoPE 的贡献，统一解释了此前关于高频/低频维度作用的矛盾发现。在 Llama-4 上的分析利用了其混合 RoPE/NoPE 架构的天然对照。","experiments":"主要在 Llama-4 上做分析。摘要未给出具体数字，但声称 FE 指标能统一解释此前矛盾的实验发现。需看全文确认 FE 与下游性能的相关性以及是否有改进 RoPE 的实际建议。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"RoPE is widely used but its internal frequency structure is poorly understood. Unifies various RoPE extension strategies under a mixed-radix number system perspective, which is both theoretically elegant and practically productive (yields two training-free methods). Valuable for pretrain research since long-context capability is a core pretraining need, and a unified framework enables systematic search for better extrapolation strategies.","technical_approach":"Views RoPE positional encoding as a number system representation, where different extension methods correspond to different radix conversion strategies. NTK-aware scaling, PI, etc. are all specific radix conversions in this framework. Proposes MrRoPE-Uni (uniform radix conversion) and MrRoPE-Pro (progressive radix conversion) as training-free extensions. Key insight: the radix conversion choice determines how frequency dimensions are scaled, and progressive strategies better preserve low-frequency information.","experiments":"Abstract does not provide specific numbers. Both methods are training-free and claim to achieve train-short-test-long generalization. Full paper needed for quantitative comparisons with YaRN, NTK-aware, etc. across models and context lengths.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rope","positional-encoding","long-context","mixed-radix"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011862","title":"StableToken: A Noise-Robust Semantic Speech Tokenizer for Resilient SpeechLLMs","authors":["Yuhan Song","Linhao Zhang","Chuhan Wu","Aiwei Liu","Wei Jia","Houfeng Wang","Zhou Xiao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$a7","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011862"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011862","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"主流语义语音 tokenizer 对与语义无关的声学扰动（如噪声）非常脆弱——即使在高信噪比下语音完全可懂，token 序列也会剧烈变化，增加下游 LLM 的学习负担。根源是单路径量化架构和对中间 token 稳定性无感的训练信号。","importance":"方法级贡献，直接关联语音 LM 方向。语音 tokenizer 是语音 LM（VALL-E、Moshi 等）的基础组件，其稳定性直接影响下游 LLM 的训练效率和鲁棒性。StableToken 解决的是一个被忽视但影响很大的问题：tokenizer 的噪声敏感性会传播到整个语音 LM pipeline。","technical_approach":"提出 StableToken，核心是共识驱动（consensus-driven）机制：多分支架构并行处理音频，然后通过 bit-wise 投票机制将多个分支的表示合并为单一稳定的 token 序列。多分支提供冗余，投票消除随机扰动的影响。与单路径 tokenizer 的区别在于：单路径对任何输入变化都敏感，而多分支+投票天然具有去噪效果。训练信号也被改进为对中间 token 稳定性敏感。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体数字。声称在高 SNR 下 token 序列稳定性显著提升，降低了下游 LLM 的学习负担。需看全文确认具体的稳定性指标、下游任务表现和与 HuBERT/EnCodec 等的对比。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Mainstream semantic speech tokenizers are fragile to meaning-irrelevant acoustic perturbations—even at high SNRs where speech is perfectly intelligible, output token sequences change drastically, increasing the learning burden for downstream LLMs. Root causes are a brittle single-path quantization architecture and training signals indifferent to intermediate token stability.","importance":"Method-level contribution directly relevant to the speech LM direction. Speech tokenizers are foundational components for speech LMs (VALL-E, Moshi, etc.), and their stability directly affects downstream LLM training efficiency and robustness. StableToken addresses an overlooked but high-impact issue: tokenizer noise sensitivity propagates through the entire speech LM pipeline.","technical_approach":"StableToken uses a consensus-driven mechanism: a multi-branch architecture processes audio in parallel, then a bit-wise voting mechanism merges branch representations into a single stable token sequence. Multiple branches provide redundancy; voting eliminates the effect of random perturbations. Unlike single-path tokenizers that are sensitive to any input variation, multi-branch + voting inherently denoises. Training signals are also redesigned to be sensitive to intermediate token stability.","experiments":"Abstract does not provide specific numbers. What if we were not compute-limited, should we still use decoder-only Transformers? In this work, we introduce Encoder-only Next Token Prediction (ENTP). We explore the differences between ENTP and decoder-only Transformers in expressive power and complexity, highlighting potential advantages of ENTP in settings with unbounded compute. We introduce the $\\operatorname{Count3}$ task and show, both theoretically and experimentally, that while ENTP can perform this task easily, a decoder-only Transformer cannot. Finally, we empirically demonstrate the superior performance of ENTP across representative tasks where next-token prediction based Transformers can be evaluated, including addition, in-context learning, and language modeling. Model Collapse via Synthetic Data Verification:  Near-term Improvements and Long-term Convergence","authors":["Bingji Yi","Qiyuan Liu","Yuwei Cheng","Haifeng Xu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$af","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006538"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006538","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：模型反复用自己的合成数据再训练，是否注定会 model collapse，以及有没有简单条件能避免它。以往关于 collapse 的讨论常停留在“会越来越差”的警告，但工业界又不可能完全不用 synthetic data；因此真正关键的问题不是要不要用，而是在哪些再训练机制下会坏、在哪些条件下反而能变好。","importance":"这项工作的贡献偏理论，但对大模型数据闭环非常关键。它给出的核心启示是：只要合成数据在进入下一轮训练前经过外部 verifier 注入新信息，collapse 并非必然，甚至短期可以带来改进、长期收敛到更好状态。对 pretrain 和 posttrain 都有冲击，因为现在无论是 self-instruct、synthetic preference、RLAIF 还是 self-play，本质上都在做不同形式的 synthetic retraining，而 verifier quality 可能比“synthetic 占比”本身更关键。","technical_approach":"方法上，作者不是提出新的生成模型，而是分析一种 verifier-guided synthetic retraining 机制。关键设计是引入外部验证者——可以是人，也可以是更强模型——对合成样本进行校验或筛选，从而持续把模型自身分布之外的信息注入闭环。理论分析放在线性回归这个基础设置里，目的是把 collapse 与信息注入条件讲清楚，而不是直接在复杂神经网络上硬证明。和单纯 self-training 相比，区别就在于 verifier 打破了“只从自己当前错误分布采样并强化自己”的封闭循环。","experiments":"摘要给出的结论有两个层次：理论上，verifier-guided retraining 可以得到近中期改进，并在长期避免 collapse、趋于收敛；经验上，论文应当还有与理论对应的实验验证，但摘要未提供任务、模型和数值。由于明确提到理论建立在线性回归上，读者需要注意它给的是机制条件而不是对所有 LLM pipeline 的直接定量预测。即便如此，这个结论对设计 synthetic data 闭环已经很有指导意义。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether iterative retraining on self-generated synthetic data inevitably leads to model collapse, and if not, what intervention prevents it. This is timely because synthetic data is now operationally unavoidable in many frontier pipelines, so the real question is not whether to use it, but how to keep the feedback loop from degenerating.","importance":"The contribution is primarily theoretical, but highly relevant to modern large-model training. The central message is that collapse is not inevitable if an external verifier injects information into the synthetic retraining loop. That has implications well beyond classical self-training: it speaks to synthetic instruction data, preference data, self-play, and any pipeline where models repeatedly learn from model-produced outputs.","technical_approach":"The paper studies verifier-guided synthetic retraining rather than proposing a new model architecture. The crucial ingredient is an external verifier—human or stronger model—that validates or filters synthetic data, thereby breaking the closed loop in which a model only reinforces its own current distributional errors. The theory is developed in linear regression, which is a deliberate simplification to isolate the information-flow mechanism cleanly.","experiments":"The abstract makes two high-level empirical/theoretical claims: verifier-guided retraining can yield near-term improvements and avoids long-run collapse by converging instead of deteriorating. An important boundary is that the formal analysis is in linear regression, so the result should be read as a mechanism-level guide rather than a direct quantitative prediction for every LLM pipeline.","authors_note":""},"tags":["synthetic-data","model-collapse","data-quality","verification","self-training"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006577","title":"Sign-SGD via Parameter-Free Optimization","authors":["Daniil Medyakov","Stanko Sergey","Gleb Molodtsov","Philip Zmushko","Grigoriy Evseev","Egor Petrov","Aleksandr Beznosikov"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$b0","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006577"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006577","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"Sign-SGD 作为内存高效的优化器（单机训练）和梯度压缩方法（分布式训练）有实用价值，但其有效步长依赖于未知的问题相关量，无法事先确定，需要大量调参。本文提出 parameter-free 版本，消除手动步长选择。","importance":"方法级贡献，直接关联 LLM 训练优化。Sign-SGD 在大模型训练中因内存效率（只存梯度符号）和通信效率（分布式场景下压缩梯度）而受关注，但步长敏感性限制了实际采用。parameter-free 版本降低了使用门槛，对大规模训练的优化器选择有实际参考价值。","technical_approach":"核心是将 parameter-free optimization 的理论框架应用到 Sign-SGD 上。分析了确定性单机、随机单机和多节点三种场景，并扩展到带动量的变体。还提出了只存梯度符号的内存高效版本。关键技术选择是：不依赖 learning rate schedule 的先验知识，而是让算法自适应地确定有效步长。与标准 Adam 等优化器的区别在于：Sign-SGD 本身只用梯度符号（极端量化），parameter-free 版本在此基础上进一步去掉了步长超参。","experiments":"Abstract 截断，具体实验规模和对比结果未完整给出。需看全文了解在 LLM 训练上的实际表现和与 Adam/AdamW 的对比。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Sign-SGD is useful as a memory-efficient optimizer and gradient compression method, but its effective stepsize depends on unknown problem-specific quantities, requiring extensive tuning. This work removes manual stepsize selection entirely.","importance":"Method-level contribution directly relevant to LLM training optimization. Sign-SGD is attractive for large-scale training due to memory efficiency (storing only gradient signs) and communication efficiency (distributed gradient compression), but stepsize sensitivity limits adoption. A parameter-free version lowers the barrier to practical use.","technical_approach":"Applies the parameter-free optimization framework to Sign-SGD. Covers deterministic single-node, stochastic single-node, and multi-node settings, with momentum extensions and a memory-efficient variant storing only gradient signs. The key design: the algorithm adaptively determines effective stepsizes without relying on prior knowledge of learning rate schedules. Compared to Adam-family optimizers, Sign-SGD uses only gradient signs (extreme quantization), and this parameter-free version further eliminates the stepsize hyperparameter.","experiments":"Abstract truncated; specific experimental scale and comparison results not fully available. Full paper needed for LLM training results and comparisons with Adam/AdamW.","authors_note":""},"tags":["optimizer","sign-sgd","parameter-free","training-efficiency"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006605","title":"Programming by Backprop: An Instruction is Worth 100 Examples When Finetuning LLMs","authors":["Jonathan Cook","Silvia Sapora","Arash Ahmadian","Akbir Khan","Tim Rocktaeschel","Jakob Foerster","Laura Ruis"],"institutions":["UCL","Meta"],"abstract":"$b1","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006605"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006605","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 训练数据中大量内容是声明式的（规则、指令、描述），而非示范式的（展示如何执行）。现有训练方式难以让模型从声明式知识中习得可复用的程序性行为。本文提出 Programming by Backprop (PBB)，让模型通过训练中遇到的声明式指令直接将行为「编程」进权重。","importance":"范式级启示。这触及了 pretrain 的一个根本问题：训练数据中的声明式知识（如「回答要简洁」）和程序性知识（如实际简洁回答的示例）之间的鸿沟。PBB 的核心发现——一条指令的效果相当于 100 个示例——如果成立，对训练数据构建和 SFT 数据效率有重大影响。对 pretrain↔posttrain 接口的理解也有价值：如何让模型更高效地从规则描述中学习行为。","technical_approach":"核心原则是将「理解指令如何映射到行为」和「内化新指令」两个过程分离。设计了两种 PBB 课程（curricula）来利用这一原则。具体做法是：训练时遇到声明式指令，通过反向传播将指令对应的行为模式写入模型权重，而不是仅仅让模型记住指令文本。这与标准 SFT（从示范中学习）形成对比——PBB 从规则/描述中学习，数据效率大幅提升。","experiments":"通过控制实验验证了 PBB 的效果，标题声称「一条指令抵 100 个示例」。具体实验规模和任务因 abstract 截断未完整给出，需看全文了解具体数字和泛化性。","authors_note":"作者包括 Tim Rocktaeschel，UCL/Meta 的知名研究员，在 RL 和 NLP 交叉方向有大量工作。Arash Ahmadian 在 RLHF/对齐方向有贡献。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Much of LLM training data is declarative (instructions, rules, descriptions) rather than demonstrative (showing how to execute). Standard training struggles to convert declarative knowledge into reusable procedural behaviors. PBB enables LLMs to acquire procedural knowledge directly from declarative instructions encountered during training.","importance":"Paradigm-level insight. This addresses a fundamental gap in pretraining: the divide between declarative knowledge ('be concise') and procedural knowledge (actual concise responses). The claim that one instruction equals 100 examples, if validated, has major implications for training data construction and SFT data efficiency. Also valuable for understanding the pretrain-posttrain interface.","technical_approach":"Core principle: separate learning how instructions map to behavior from internalizing new instructions. Two PBB curricula leverage this separation. During training, declarative instructions are used to program corresponding behavioral patterns into model weights via backpropagation, rather than just memorizing instruction text. This contrasts with standard SFT (learning from demonstrations)—PBB learns from rules/descriptions with much higher data efficiency.","experiments":"Controlled experiments validate PBB; the title claims 'one instruction is worth 100 examples.' Previously, there was no fine-grained method to detect and quantify such noise, nor targeted denoising training strategies.","importance":"Method-level contribution relevant to both long-context pretraining and inference. The Integrated Gradient (IG) score provides an actionable tool for context noise detection. The finding that even simple noise mitigation substantially boosts attention on critical tokens reveals a systematic weakness in current long-context attention mechanisms, informing loss design and data construction for long-context pretraining.","technical_approach":"Proposes the Integrated Gradient (IG) score to detect and quantify context noise—IG is an attribution method measuring each token's actual contribution to the final prediction; tokens with low contribution but high attention weight are identified as noise. Simple noise mitigation significantly improves attention on critical tokens. A denoising training strategy is built on this (details truncated in abstract), reframing long-context modeling from a context denoising perspective.","experiments":"Abstract truncated; specific experimental setup and improvement numbers not fully available. Key finding: noise mitigation substantially improves model attention on critical tokens and downstream prediction quality.","authors_note":"Authors include Lijun Wu, who has multiple works in NLP and sequence modeling."},"tags":["long-context","context-denoising","noise-robustness","attention"],"notable_authors":["Lijun Wu"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006714","title":"RL for Reasoning by Adaptively Revealing Rationales","authors":["mohammad hossein amani","Aryo Lotfi","Nicolas Baldwin","Samy Bengio","Mehrdad Farajtabar","Emmanuel Abbe","Robert West"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$b3","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006714"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006714","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：在长链式推理这类组合爆炸的序列任务里，纯 RL 奖励太稀疏，纯 SFT 又过度依赖完整示范，是否存在一个更可学的中间地带。过去这类问题通常在“给全量 rationale”与“完全不给过程监督”之间二选一，作者认为部分监督其实是一个被低估的训练信号形态。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于，它把 partial supervision 明确做成了可操作的 RL 训练接口，而不是简单的数据增强技巧。对 post-train 尤其是 reasoning RL 的启发很直接：如果能按样本难度自适应地暴露一段正确前缀，就能缓解 cold start 和 sparse reward，同时避免完整 teacher forcing 带来的探索抑制。这不是 pretrain 范式级创新，但对 pretrain↔posttrain 接口很相关。","technical_approach":"核心方法 AdaBack 是一个按样本动态调节“揭示多少目标前缀”的 curriculum RL 算法。它的关键设计不是固定 reveal ratio，而是根据该样本历史奖励信号决定下一轮给多少前缀，让模型逐步从“补全后半段推理”过渡到“独立完成整条链”；这比标准 SFT 少给监督，比纯 policy optimization 多给支架。与最接近的方法相比，它不是用静态课程或统一难度调度，而是做 per-sample backtracking，因此更适合样本难度分布很宽的推理任务。代价是训练流程更复杂，而且如果奖励噪声大，前缀暴露策略可能震荡。","experiments":"摘要给出的实验结论是：AdaBack 能让模型逐步学会完成 reasoning chain，并优于纯 RL 与全监督两端的做法。摘要没有提供模型大小、任务集、奖励定义、主要 baseline 名称、具体指标和提升数值，因此目前只能判断方向成立，不能判断量级。值得重点看正式论文里的实验点包括：不同 reveal 调度的稳定性、对错误 rationale 的鲁棒性、以及随着链长增长其相对优势是否扩大。","authors_note":"作者中包括 Samy Bengio、Mehrdad Farajtabar。机构与团队代表作仅凭当前信息无法可靠确认。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a real bottleneck in reasoning training: pure RL is crippled by sparse rewards on long sequences, while pure SFT depends on full demonstrations that scale poorly and reduce exploration. The authors argue that partial supervision is a useful middle regime that has been underused in sequence learning.","importance":"Its contribution is mainly at the training-interface level: it turns partial supervision into a practical RL curriculum for reasoning. This matters for post-training because it offers a way to reduce cold-start difficulty without falling back to full teacher forcing. It is not a new pretraining paradigm, but it is highly relevant to the pretrain–posttrain loop where reasoning data and reward quality shape what the model can actually learn.","technical_approach":"AdaBack is a per-sample curriculum method that adaptively reveals a prefix of the target rationale based on past reward for that specific sample. The design choice is important: the reveal length is not fixed globally, but adjusted online so the model gradually moves from completing partially solved trajectories to solving them end to end. Relative to standard SFT, it exposes less supervision; relative to pure RL, it gives a denser learning signal. The likely strength is better handling of heterogeneous difficulty, while the main risk is instability if reward estimates are noisy.","experiments":"The abstract claims that AdaBack improves learning of reasoning chains over the extremes of full supervision and sparse-reward RL. SFT 轨迹，学到的更多是 teacher-forced 模仿，而不是真正的探索能力。作者想回答的是，能不能用 RL 真正把这种并行推理习惯训练出来，而不只是蒸馏一个老师的格式。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于把‘parallel thinking’从提示工程或 SFT 模式，推向显式 RL 训练框架。对 reasoning post-training 的并行展开与整合。边界在于，若奖励不能正确评价多路径搜索质量，模型可能学会冗长分叉而不是有效并行。","experiments":"摘要只给出定性结论：Parallel-R1 是首个针对 parallel thinking 的 RL 框架，并在复杂真实推理任务上有效。没有模型规模、任务集合、baseline、pass@k/accuracy/token cost 等具体指标，因此现阶段无法判断它是小幅增益还是显著改变推理行为。正式论文中最值得看的实验应包括：并行分支数与效果/成本的关系、与纯 SFT 平行推理数据训练的对比、以及 RL 后是否出现 branch collapse 或无效冗长。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a gap in The fundamental question: can comparable performance be achieved with significantly smaller models and substantially less data?","importance":"Theory-level contribution. Proves that permutation-invariant functions can be compressed to polylog(d) scale with vanishing error, and this is the optimal compression rate. Directly connects lottery ticket hypothesis and neural scaling laws, providing theoretical limits on model and data compression in pretraining.","technical_approach":"Proves a universal theorem: a generic permutation-invariant function of d objects can be asymptotically compressed into a function of polylog(d) objects with vanishing error, shown to be the optimal rate. self-correction 涌现提供了理论基础。对理解 RL posttrain 如何产生推理能力、以及如何设计更好的 RL 训练信号有直接启示。","technical_approach":"将反思性探索重新建模为 Bayes-Adaptive RL：agent 维护对环境（任务）的后验信念，在推理过程中通过生成额外 token 来更新信念（即 in-context exploration 有信息价值）。这解释了为什么非 Markovian 的历史依赖策略（即利用之前尝试的信息）是有益的。与标准 RL 的区别：标准 RL 的探索只在训练时有用，而 Bayes-Adaptive RL 的探索在推理时也有价值。","experiments":"摘要截断，具体实验不可得。预期在数学推理或代码生成等需要反思的任务上验证 Bayes-Adaptive RL Directly informs how RL post-training produces reasoning capabilities and how to design better training signals.","technical_approach":"Models reflective exploration as Bayes-Adaptive RL: the agent maintains a posterior belief over the environment (task) and updates it by generating additional tokens (in-context exploration has information value). We propose the Free Energy Mixer (FEM): a free-energy (log-sum-exp) read that applies a value-driven, per-channel log-linear tilt to a fast prior (e.g., from queries/keys in standard attention) over indices. Unlike methods that attempt to improve and enrich the $(q,k)$ scoring distribution, FEM treats it as a prior and yields a value-aware posterior read at unchanged complexity, smoothly moving from averaging to per-channel selection as the learnable inverse temperature increases, while still preserving parallelism and the original asymptotic complexity ($O(T^2)$ for softmax; $O(T)$ for linearizable variants). We instantiate a two-level gated FEM that is plug-and-play with standard and linear attention, linear RNNs and SSMs. It consistently outperforms strong baselines on NLP, vision, and time-series at matched parameter budgets. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006790"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006790","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"标准 attention 的 value 读取是 per-head 凸平均（softmax 加权），无法做 channel-wise 选择——所有 channel 共享同一组注意力权重，限制了表达能力。","importance":"架构级贡献。提出 Free Energy Mixer（FEM），用 log-sum-exp 读取实现 value-aware 的 per-channel 选择，在不改变渐近复杂度的前提下增强 attention 的表达力。对 pretrain 架构设计有直接参考价值——是一种 plug-and-play 的 attention 增强。","technical_approach":"FEM 将标准 attention 的 (q,k) 打分分布视为先验（prior），通过 value-driven 的 per-channel log-linear tilt 得到后验读取。具体机制：用 free energy（log-sum-exp）替代凸平均，引入可学习的逆温度参数，当逆温度增大时从平均平滑过渡到 per-channel 选择。关键设计：保持并行性和原始渐近复杂度（softmax 版 O(T²)，线性化版 O(T)）。实例化为两层门控 FEM，plug-and-play。与改进 (q,k) 打分的方法不同：FEM 不改 prior，而是在 value 端做后验修正。","experiments":"摘要截断，具体实验数字不可得。从描述看是 plug-and-play 模块，预期在语言建模 perplexity 和下游任务上验证相比标准 attention 的提升。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Standard attention reads values via a per-head convex average (softmax weighting), sharing the same attention weights across all channels and blocking channel-wise selection—this limits expressiveness.","importance":"Architecture-level. Proposes Free Energy Mixer (FEM), a plug-and-play attention enhancement that enables value-aware per-channel selection without changing asymptotic complexity. Directly relevant to pretrain architecture design.","technical_approach":"FEM treats the (q,k) scoring distribution as a prior and applies a value-driven per-channel log-linear tilt to obtain a posterior read via free energy (log-sum-exp). A learnable inverse temperature smoothly interpolates from averaging to per-channel selection. Preserves parallelism and original complexity (O(T²) for softmax, O(T) for linearizable variants). Instantiated as a two-level gated FEM, plug-and-play. Key distinction from methods improving (q,k) scoring: FEM doesn't modify the prior but corrects on the value side.","experiments":"Abstract truncated; specific numbers unavailable. RL fine-tuning 往往比单纯 SFT 更能提升 LLM 能力，而且这种增益在不同模型家族上都反复出现。过去大家更多看到结果层面的提升，但对内部机制理解不足，导致我们很难判断 RL 到底是在重配已有回路、激活稀有能力，还是学到了全新功能。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在机制分析层面。它不是提出新的对齐算法，而是试图给出一个跨模型、跨数据集都稳定的内部表征解释：RL 现象；如果在一般指令和非数学任务上也成立，解释力度会强很多。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a missing explanation: why does RL fine-tuning often improve LLM capability beyond SFT, and why does The community often treats on-policy sampling as a default improvement because it better matches the current policy distribution, but the authors argue this is not universally true and that effectiveness differs systematically by model and setting.","importance":"This matters at the data-strategy level for alignment. It challenges an increasingly standard assumption that continuously refreshing preference candidates is inherently superior. For the pretrain–posttrain loop, the implication is that preference optimization quality depends not only on the loss but also on the distribution of candidate responses; ignoring that can waste substantial compute on expensive on-policy pipelines with weak additional signal.","technical_approach":"The contribution is not a new objective but a controlled comparison of static versus on-policy preference candidates within DPO, together with an analysis of when and why they differ. The key framing is to separate preference data by source and collection timing instead of treating DPO as a fixed recipe. Unlike papers that only show on-policy wins, this one argues distribution matching is not monotonically beneficial: if current-policy candidates become too easy to compare or collapse reward margins, they may weaken the learning signal.","experiments":"The main number reported in the abstract is that on-policy data can be 3× more effective than static data for Llama-3, but this advantage is not universal and can shrink or reverse in other setups. The abstract is truncated before giving the full cross-model comparison, benchmark details, annotation source, or final alignment metrics. Still, the experimental contribution is already clear: the paper studies the effectiveness of data sources across models rather than presenting a single benchmark gain. The most useful part in the full paper will be whether it connects effectiveness to measurable factors such as candidate quality, reward margin, and policy drift.","authors_note":""},"tags":["dpo","alignment","on-policy","preference-model"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006943","title":"SkillFactory: Self-Distillation for Learning Cognitive Behaviors","authors":["Zayne Sprague","Jack Lu","Manya Wadhwa","Sedrick Keh","Mengye Ren","Greg Durrett"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$bb","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006943"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006943","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：如果 base model 本来不会显式展示 verification、backtracking、retry 等认知行为，仅靠后续 RL 往往学不出来，那么如何在不依赖更强教师模型蒸馏的前提下先把这些行为“扶上轨道”。过去很多 reasoning 强化依赖一个前提：模型已经偶尔会做对的思维动作，RL 只是放大；但对技能缺失的模型，这个前提并不成立。","importance":"这项工作对 reasoning post-training 很有现实意义，因为它给出了一种比强教师蒸馏更便宜、更闭环的技能引导方案。对 pretrain/posttrain 接口的启示是，很多所谓 RL 学出的认知行为，实际上可能需要先通过合成 SFT 轨迹建立一个最小行为先验；否则奖励再好，探索空间也太大。这个判断对 R1-style 训练 recipe 尤其关键。","technical_approach":"作者提出 SkillFactory，核心是 self-distillation 式的 silver trace 构造：不用更强模型，而是从模型自己的采样中重排、改写出带有某种认知行为格式的监督轨迹，再用这些轨迹做 SFT，为后续 RL 铺路。关键设计不是追求每条 silver trace 完全正确，而是让训练数据在行为结构上体现 verification、回退、换方法重试等模式。和传统蒸馏相比，它放弃了高保真 teacher quality，换取更低成本和更强的自举能力；风险则是如果银样本噪声太大，可能把模型推向表面模仿而非真实技能。","experiments":"摘要中的核心结论是：即便这些自生成的 silver SFT 轨迹并不完美，它们仍能帮助模型在后续 RL 中学会利用此前没有表现出来的认知技能。摘要没有给出模型规模、任务类型、RL 算法、技能类别拆分和最终提升数字，因此目前更像方法主张而不是可精确量化的结果。正文里最值得看的实验是三类：一是与强教师蒸馏相比的成本/效果比，二是先 SkillFactory 再 RL 与直接 RL 的差距，三是技能是否真的迁移到最终答案质量而不是只增加更长的 CoT。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a common failure mode in reasoning training: if a base model does not already exhibit behaviors like verification, backtracking, or retrying, RL often has little to amplify. Many successful reasoning-RL recipes implicitly assume the model occasionally performs the right cognitive moves already; this work asks how to bootstrap those behaviors without relying on a stronger teacher model.","importance":"This is practically important for reasoning post-training because it offers a cheaper, more self-contained alternative to teacher distillation for seeding useful behaviors before RL. For the pretrain–posttrain interface, the message is that many behaviors attributed to RL may actually require an initial behavioral prior from supervised traces; otherwise the exploration problem is too hard, even with a good reward signal.","technical_approach":"The proposed SkillFactory builds silver SFT traces from the model’s own samples by rearranging or reformatting them into trajectories that exhibit target cognitive behaviors. The key design choice is to optimize for behavioral structure rather than perfect teacher correctness: the traces are meant to instantiate patterns like verification, backtracking, and alternative retries, which then prepare the model for subsequent RL. Relative to standard distillation, it trades away teacher quality for lower cost and self-bootstrapping ability, at the risk of teaching superficial imitation if the silver traces are too noisy.","experiments":"The main claim is that even imperfect self-generated silver SFT traces help models acquire and leverage cognitive skills that were not clearly present in the base model, especially when followed by RL. The abstract gives no model sizes, task domains, RL algorithm, skill taxonomy, or numerical gains, so the current takeaway is conceptual rather than fully quantified. The most important experiments in the full paper will be comparisons against strong-teacher distillation, SkillFactory-plus-RL versus direct RL, and whether the induced skills improve final answer quality rather than merely producing longer chains of thought.","authors_note":""},"tags":["self-distillation","reasoning","rl","post-training"],"notable_authors":["Mengye Andreas"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$bc","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006941"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006941","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：哪些序列模型能够同时满足并行训练和高效串行推理，这类‘sequential-parallel duality’ 的模型到底能统一描述到什么程度。Mamba、GLA 等近期模型各自给出工程实现，但缺少一个更一般的理论框架来说明它们为什么能 prefix-scan、边界又在哪里。","importance":"这是一篇偏架构理论的工作。它的重要性不在直接造出更强模型，而在于给出一类比 state space models 更广的统一刻画 Prefix-Scannable Models（PSMs）。对 pretrain 研究的启示是，这种统一视角有助于系统化搜索非注意力架构：哪些设计天生支持近常数时间并行 evaluation 与线性时间、常数空间推理，哪些则注定做不到，而不是靠经验堆模块。","technical_approach":"作者先把一大类 state space models 表述为：其状态更新可由带自定义结合律算子的 parallel prefix scan 计算。然后进一步放宽状态聚合和更新规则，定义更一般的 Prefix-Scannable Models。关键点在于‘可扫描性’不是某个具体递推公式，而是一种代数结构约束：只要状态组合满足可并行归约，训练就能并行；只要单步状态更新保持紧凑，推理就能线性且常数空间。和仅分析某个具体模型不同，这里给的是家族级 characterization。","experiments":"从摘要看，这篇论文的重点更偏理论 characterization 而不是大规模经验刷榜，因此实验部分大概率用于验证 PSM 框架能覆盖 GLA、Mamba 等现有模型并导出新实例。摘要没有提供任何性能数字、复杂度常数或训练结果，因此现阶段不能评价其实用收益。真正值得看的地方是：作者是否给出了严格的必要/充分条件，是否展示了超出已知模型的非平凡新实例，以及这些新实例在语言建模中是否有不差于现有 scan-friendly 架构的性能。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a structural question: which sequence models can simultaneously support parallel training and efficient sequential inference, and how broadly can that sequential-parallel duality be characterized. Recent architectures like Mamba and GLA provide concrete designs, but the field still lacks a general framework explaining why they admit prefix-scan computation and where the limits lie.","importance":"This is mainly an architecture-theory contribution. Its value is not an immediate stronger model, but a broader unifying class called Prefix-Scannable Models (PSMs) that extends beyond standard state-space formulations. For pretraining research, that matters because it can turn non-attention architecture search from recipe tinkering into a more principled design space: which models can fundamentally support near-constant-time parallel evaluation and linear-time constant-space inference, and which cannot.","technical_approach":"The paper first describes a broad class of state-space models whose state updates can be computed with parallel prefix scan under a custom associative operator. It then relaxes the state aggregation and update assumptions to define the more general family of Prefix-Scannable Models. The key idea is that scan-ability is an algebraic property rather than a single recurrence: if state composition admits associative reduction, training can be parallelized; if single-step updates remain compact, inference stays linear-time and constant-space. This is a family-level characterization, not an analysis of one architecture.","experiments":"From the abstract, the work appears theory-first, with experiments likely serving to show that the PSM framework recovers known models such as Mamba and GLA and possibly yields new instances. The abstract provides no benchmark numbers, complexity constants, or training results, so practical impact cannot be judged yet. The most important evidence in the full paper will be whether it gives sharp necessary or sufficient conditions, whether it produces genuinely new nontrivial model instances, and whether those instances remain competitive on language modeling tasks.","authors_note":""},"tags":["sequence-modeling","mamba","linear-attention","architecture"],"notable_authors":["Stefanie 接口的启示是：如果偏好模型的误差主要来自可识别的数据伪相关，那么改进 alignment 未必首先需要更复杂的优化器，而可能先需要更干净、更反事实的偏好数据构造与校准程序。这对减少 reward hacking 和评测失真都很关键。","technical_approach":"作者的方法核心是用 controlled counterfactual pairs 系统测量五类 idiosyncratic miscalibration，并研究训练数据偏差与这些现象的关系，同时提出 mitigation。摘要没有给出具体模型、数据集、偏差量级和缓解后的改善幅度，因此目前无法判断哪类偏差最严重，也无法评价方法是否会损伤偏好模型的整体判别力。正文里最关键的实验应包括：各特征单独和组合时的偏置强度、不同 preference model family 的一致性，以及 mitigation 后在真实奖励建模/自动评测上的收益是否大于代价。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies why preference models systematically overvalue superficial features such as length, structure, jargon, sycophancy, and vagueness, and how those biases relate to artifacts in the training data. Reward hacking from preference models is widely recognized, but the field still lacks a clean mapping from specific observed biases to the data patterns that produce them.","importance":"This is important for alignment because it directly questions the reliability of preference models as both automatic judges and training rewards. For the pretrain–posttrain interface, the implication is concrete: if much of the error comes from identifiable spurious correlations in preference data, then improving alignment may depend less on fancier optimization and more on better data construction, counterfactual control, and calibration. That is central to reducing reward hacking and evaluation distortion.","technical_approach":"The main method is to use controlled counterfactual response pairs to isolate five idiosyncratic features—length, structure, jargon, sycophancy, and vagueness—and measure how strongly each feature biases preference judgments. The authors then connect these measured biases back to training-data artifacts and propose mitigation strategies. This is a strong design because it turns a vague complaint about “bad preferences” into manipulable variables. Compared with simple correlations on natural responses, counterfactual pairs make it much clearer whether the model prefers better content or merely better-looking content.","experiments":"The abstract clearly states that the paper systematically quantifies miscalibration across five bias dimensions and studies the relationship between those phenomena and training-data bias, while also proposing mitigation. Prior work either ignored this or relied on external signals to improve generation. This paper confirms the gap stems from weak generation (not misunderstanding) and turns it into a self-improvement signal.","importance":"Method-level contribution. Proposes a self-improvement framework that uses the model's own stronger understanding to guide its weaker generation, without external signals. For unified multimodal pretraining, the insight is that the generation-understanding asymmetry can be exploited as a self-supervised training signal rather than treated purely as a deficiency.","technical_approach":"Uses the MLLM's understanding capability to score its own generations, selects high-quality image data, then applies SFT or DPO to improve generation. Specifically: why does RFT preserve prior knowledge better than SFT, and what is the mechanism?","importance":"Mechanistic analysis with direct implications for the pretrain-posttrain interface. Reveals a sharp trade-off: SFT enables rapid task acquisition but causes catastrophic forgetting, while RFT learns slower but preserves prior knowledge better. The explanation via learning dynamics (gradient direction and magnitude w.r.t. prior knowledge) provides actionable guidance for choosing post-training strategies.","technical_approach":"Uses jigsaw puzzles—a task absent from pretraining corpora—as a controlled novel task, and systematically compares SFT vs RFT on the Qwen2.5-VL series. Directly relevant to long-context efficiency in pretraining: sparse attention budget allocation should be adaptive since sparsity varies significantly across heads and layers.","technical_approach":"Instead of a fixed token count, Tactic sets a target fraction of total attention scores, so token selection naturally adapts to sparsity variations across heads/layers/contexts. Latent steps provide high information density but can fail to collapse to a single confident solution; explicit steps help convergence and self-checking. The design uses latent for exploration and explicit for consolidation/verification to reduce noise and overthinking. Uniform sampling wastes rollouts on tasks that are either already solved or currently hopeless, while existing task-selection schemes are often too rigid, too expensive to maintain, or too incomplete in the evidence they use. As task pools grow, this becomes a first-order limitation on sample efficiency.","importance":"This is a systems-and-method contribution with direct value for post-training, especially reasoning-focused RFT. Task selection determines the density of useful learning signal. In many settings, choosing what to train on matters as much as the optimizer or RL algorithm. The broader lesson for the pretrain↔posttrain interface is that curriculum should not be treated as a static label assignment; it should evolve with the model.","technical_approach":"The core method is BOTS, a Bayesian Online Task Selection framework. It maintains posterior estimates of task difficulty as the model changes, and combines two evidence sources: explicit evidence from direct evaluation on selected tasks and implicit evidence from training signals such as rollouts or learning progress. The key design choice is to optimize online decisions under limited exploration cost rather than to produce a perfectly calibrated offline notion of difficulty. Compared with heuristic curricula or basic bandit-style approaches, BOTS explicitly reasons about uncertainty, which helps avoid prematurely discarding tasks that are uncertain but potentially high value.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model sizes, number of tasks, or effect sizes, but the natural baselines are uniform sampling, success-rate curricula, and simpler task-scheduling methods. The critical tests are whether BOTS improves reward, pass metrics, or preference outcomes under a fixed rollout budget, whether posterior updates remain stable over training, and whether the method still works under reward noise or task-pool drift. If the gains mostly come from additional evaluation overhead rather than better task selection, the practical efficiency story weakens.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rft","task-selection","alignment","bayesian","reasoning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007171","title":"IA2: Alignment with ICL Activations improves Supervised Fine-Tuning","authors":["Aayush Mishra","Daniel Khashabi","Anqi Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$c4","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007171"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007171","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["sft","icl","alignment","activations","generalization"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007176","title":"Beyond Magnitude: Leveraging Direction of RLVR Updates for LLM Reasoning","authors":["Kexin Huang","Haoming Meng","Junkang Wu","Jinda Lu","Chiyu Ma","Ziqian Chen","xue wang","Bolin Ding","Jiancan Wu","Xiang Wang","Xiangnan He","Guoyin Wang","Jingren Zhou"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$c5","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007176"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007176","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["rlvr","reasoning","update-analysis","alignment","sparsity"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007191","title":"LinguaMap: Which Layers of LLMs Speak Your Language and How to Tune Them?","authors":["J. subword 到 word、DNA 到 amino acid，但没有被系统地视为一个诱导分布上的新 LM。","importance":"这是一个偏范式和理论接口层面的工作。它的重要性在于把“模型输出空间”和“任务需要的语义空间”之间的确定性变换正式纳入语言建模框架，这对 tokenizer、跨表示建模、以及多模态离散 token 统一建模都很有启发。对 pretrain 的直接价值是：我们不一定非要在目标表示上重新训练一个模型，某些场景下可以通过 transduction 在已有 LM 上得到严格定义的新分布与推断算法。","technical_approach":"作者提出的是一个通用的 Transducing Language Models 框架，把字符串到字符串的确定性函数 f 作用到原始 LM 分布上，得到诱导分布 f(X)。关键不是停留在概率论表述，而是把它扩展成可操作的语言模型对象：需要能定义归一化分布、生成、评分，可能还包括边缘化多个原像字符串带来的概率合并。与已有零散做法的区别是，这里不是把转换当 decoding trick，而是把变换后的对象当成一类独立的 LM 来研究。这种设计有效的前提是变换是确定性的，并且原像集合可被高效处理；否则计算会很快变得不可承受。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体实验数字，但从问题设定看，实验大概率会覆盖不同字符串变换场景，例如 BPE 到词级预测，或生物序列从核酸到蛋白的映射，并比较直接在目标空间训练与先建模再转导的差异。最关键的实验应该不是单纯 accuracy，而是：转导后能否保持概率一致性、生成质量是否合理、推断代价增长多少，以及在多对一映射下概率聚合是否稳定。如果论文给出 exact inference 或近似算法的复杂度—性能权衡，这会是最有价值的部分。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a clean question: when a language model is defined over one string space, can a deterministic string-to-string transformation induce a new, fully valid language model over another space? Prior work used such transformations as ad hoc post-processing, but did not treat the transformed distribution itself as a first-class LM.","importance":"This is a paradigm and interface contribution rather than a new scaling recipe. Its value is in formalizing how output representations, tokenization choices, and downstream target spaces relate at the distribution level. For pretraining, this matters because it suggests we do not always need to retrain on the final representation: in some cases, a pretrained LM plus a deterministic transduction may already define the right model class.","technical_approach":"The core proposal is a general framework for transducing language models: start from a base LM over strings, apply a deterministic function f, and study the induced distribution over transformed strings. A usable framework needs to support scoring, generation, and probability aggregation over multiple preimages that collapse to the same output. That distinguishes it from prior decoding-time hacks. The design is compelling when the transformation is deterministic and the preimage structure is computationally manageable; otherwise exact inference can become the bottleneck.","experiments":"The abstract does not report concrete numbers, but the natural evaluations would cover settings such as subword-to-word modeling or biological sequence transformations. The authors argue that forgetting is not something that washes out across samples. Losing one fact and gaining another are distinct events that need to be counted explicitly.","importance":"This is a highly relevant evaluation contribution. Its importance is that it reframes the effect of SFT and other post-training stages at the sample level rather than the task-average level. For pretraining research, that matters because claims such as ‘alignment barely hurts capabilities’ can be misleading if large amounts of sample-wise forgetting are being averaged away.","technical_approach":"The paper proposes a sample-wise paradigm that counts 1→0 transitions as forgetting and 0→1 transitions as backward transfer. For multiple-choice settings, it adds chance-adjusted variants to discount the expected effect of random guessing. The contribution is less about a new model and more about using the right unit of measurement. That design is compelling because two models can have the same average accuracy while covering very different subsets of knowledge.","experiments":"The abstract makes clear that the study is done at scale rather than on a single anecdotal model. The likely evaluation spans several post-training recipes and multiple-choice knowledge benchmarks, showing that task averages obscure substantial sample-level changes. in-context regression 的理论分析里，性能如何随着深度、宽度、上下文长度、训练步数和 batch size 共同缩放，尤其是深度到底什么时候真的有用。过去关于 ICL 的很多理论结果局限于浅层或单一设定，难以解释为什么某些任务里加深 self-attention 模型帮助很大，而另一些几乎没用。","importance":"这是一个偏理论的 ICL/scaling law 工作。它的重要性在于给出更细的条件判断：深度的收益不是普遍存在，而取决于上下文是否受限、以及任务协方差结构是否跨上下文变化。对 pretrain 研究的启示是，ICL 能力的 scaling 不只是参数越大越好，任务分布结构决定了宽度、深度和上下文预算的最优配置。","technical_approach":"作者在深线性 self-attention 模型上研究线性回归型 ICL，在数据维度、上下文长度和 residual width 按比例增长的 joint limit 下，分别分析三种设定：ISO、FS 和 RRS。最关键的理论结论是：在 ISO 和 FS 中，只有当 context length 受限时，增加深度才有帮助；而在 RRS 这种跨上下文协方差会变化的设定里，增加深度能显著改善 ICL。这说明深度主要帮助的是处理跨上下文变化和结构变换，而不是静态同分布回归本身。与只讨论宽度或无限深近似的工作相比，这篇更像是在画资源—任务结构—性能之间的条件相图。","experiments":"摘要已经给出核心结论，但没有任何数值细节。可以确认的是，作者分析了 width、depth、训练步数、batch size 和 data per context 对性能的影响，并在三种任务结构下得到不同缩放规律。合理预期会有理论曲线与模拟实验对照，验证不同 context regime 下深度收益翻转，以及 RRS 设定下深度带来的显著改进。由于没有给出具体误差阶、样本复杂度常数或仿真规模，目前还不能判断这些结果对真实 Transformer ICL in-context regression scales with depth, width, context length, training time, and batch size, with a specific focus on when depth actually helps. Prior ICL theory often works in narrower regimes and does not explain why deeper self-attention models are beneficial in some settings but not in others.","importance":"This is a theory paper on ICL and scaling. Its main value is a conditional result: the benefit of depth is not universal, but depends on whether context is limited and on how task covariance structure varies across contexts. For pretraining researchers, the takeaway is that ICL scaling is not just about making models larger; the task distribution determines which resource axis matters most.","technical_approach":"The authors analyze linear regression in a deep linear self-attention model under a proportional scaling limit for data dimension, context length, and residual width. They study three settings: isotropic tasks and covariates (ISO), fixed structured covariance (FS), and randomly rotated structured covariance (RRS). The central result is that in ISO and FS, depth helps only when context length is constrained, whereas in RRS, where covariance structure changes across contexts, increasing depth yields substantial gains. This suggests depth is most useful for handling cross-context variation and structure changes, rather than static in-context regression alone.","experiments":"The abstract provides the main qualitative findings but no numerical detail. It does make clear that the theory covers width, depth, training steps, batch size, and data per context, and that scaling behavior differs sharply across the three covariance regimes. The natural empirical support would compare theoretical predictions against simulations, especially to show when depth stops helping and when it becomes important in the RRS setting. Without error bounds, constants, or simulation scales in the abstract, it is hard to judge how directly these results transfer to realistic nonlinear Transformers. Lu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$d4","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007465"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007465","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题很明确：现有基于可验证奖励的数学推理 RL，实际上没有把训练重点真正放到难题上。GRPO 这类方法虽然在总体上有效，但对难题的策略更新幅度天然偏小，导致模型更容易反复巩固已经会做的简单题，而不是补足薄弱能力；同时常见数据增强多是在改写表述，不是在系统性提高题目难度，所以训练信号和数据供给两端都在回避真正决定上限的部分。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在方法层和数据构造层的结合，而不是单点技巧。它给出的核心启示是：在 reasoning RL 里，'题目难度如何进入优化过程'和'训练数据是否真的覆盖能力边界'是同一个问题的两面；如果这个判断成立，那么后续 RLVR、GRPO 变体、难例采样和课程学习都需要重新审视，不只是调 reward 或 rollout 数量。","technical_approach":"作者提出的是一个面向难题强化的双模块 MathForge reformulation，不只是同义改写，而是从多个维度重构题目以提升内在难度，比如增加约束、引入更长推理链或扰动问题结构。它和普通 augmentation 的区别在于，后者主要提升表面多样性，前者是试图制造更有训练价值的失败样本。代价也很直接：如果难度估计不准，容易把噪声题或病态题过度放大，训练稳定性可能受影响。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的实验结论是：作者把方法放在数学推理场景下，重点比较了 difficulty-aware 训练与常规 GRPO 及常见改写增强的差别，但摘要没有给出模型规模、数据量和具体指标数字。可以确定的关键信息是，收益来自算法与数据两端的协同，而不是任一单独模块的微弱改进；论文大概率会包含难度分桶分析，证明 hardest split 上提升更明显，否则其核心论点并不成立。需要注意的是，在没有具体数字前，这篇工作更像是一个有明确训练动态假设的方法提案，而不是已被大规模实验完全坐实的范式结论。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a concrete failure mode in RL with verifiable rewards for math: current training does not truly prioritize hard problems. In GRPO-style optimization, harder questions tend to induce smaller effective policy updates, so the model keeps reinforcing easy wins instead of repairing weak reasoning skills; meanwhile, common augmentation mostly rephrases questions rather than increasing intrinsic difficulty, leaving the capability frontier under-trained from both the optimization and data sides.","importance":"The contribution is best viewed as a method-plus-data intervention, not an isolated trick. Its main message is that in reasoning RL, 'how difficulty enters the optimizer' and 'whether data actually pushes the model beyond its comfort zone' are tightly coupled; if that is correct, then future work on RLVR, GRPO variants, hard-example mining, and curriculum design should focus less on reward plumbing alone and more on difficulty allocation across the whole training loop.","technical_approach":"The proposed MathForge framework attacks the issue from two ends at once: it modifies the optimization to upweight harder questions, and it generates reformulations that increase intrinsic difficulty rather than surface diversity. On the algorithmic side, it compensates for GRPO’s tendency to under-update on hard questions, where rewards are sparse, variance is high, and relative advantages are easy to wash out. On the data side, multi-aspect question reformulation goes beyond paraphrasing by changing constraints, reasoning depth, or problem structure to create more informative failures. That is the key distinction from standard augmentation. The obvious trade-off is that difficulty estimation can be noisy; if the pipeline overemphasizes pathological examples, training can become less stable.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical claim is that the gains come from combining difficulty-aware optimization with difficulty-increasing reformulation, rather than from either component alone. The paper is clearly evaluated on mathematical reasoning, but the abstract does not report model sizes, data scale, baselines, or exact margins. The most important evidence to look for in the full paper is bucketed performance by problem difficulty: the thesis only holds if improvements are concentrated on the hardest subsets rather than averaged away on easier ones.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlvr","grpo","math-reasoning","difficulty-aware","data-quality"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007499","title":"Geometric-Mean Policy Wei"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$d5","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007499"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007499","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 GRPO 在 token 级奖励聚合时容易被异常大的 importance-weighted reward 扰动，从而导致策略更新不稳定的问题。现有 GRPO 使用算术平均聚合 token 奖励，一旦某些 token 的 importance sampling ratio 极端，更新就会被少数 outlier 主导；这在 reasoning RL 里尤其麻烦，因为长链推理本来方差就高，局部异常很容易把整个样本梯度放大。","importance":"这项工作是一个比较干净的算法改动，贡献量级更像优化稳定性增强而不是新范式。它的重要性在于说明 GRPO 类方法的一个关键脆弱点可能并不在 reward 设计，而在 token 聚合器本身；如果 geometric mean 真能稳定替代 arithmetic mean，那它会成为一类低侵入、易复用的 RLHF/RLVR 训练补丁。","technical_approach":"作者提出 GMPO，做法非常直接：把 GRPO 中 token-level rewards 的算术平均替换成几何平均。这个改动看起来小，但设计逻辑明确——几何平均对异常大值更不敏感，因此能抑制由极端 importance ratio 诱发的更新爆炸；同时作者给出理论分析，把 GMPO 和 GRPO 都解释为对 token 奖励的不同加权形式，从而说明它不是拍脑袋换平均数。它与最近方法的差别不在 reward shaping，而在聚合统计量的选择。边界也明显：几何平均会更保守，若任务收益本来就依赖少量高价值 token 的强信号，过度抑制 outlier 也可能损失学习速度。","experiments":"摘要没有给出模型大小、训练任务、基线细节和提升数字。可以确认的核心实验应包括：GMPO 与 GRPO 在 reasoning 任务上的训练稳定性比较，例如 loss/kl 波动、极端 ratio 分布、最终 pass rate，以及是否在不同 group size 或 rollout 设定下保持收益。对这种方法，最有信息量的结果不是只看最终平均分，而是看训练曲线是否明显更平稳、seed variance 是否更小；如果这些证据充分，GMPO 的价值会高于一个小幅均值提升。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses an optimization fragility in GRPO: token-level reward aggregation with an arithmetic mean can be dominated by outlier importance-weighted rewards, causing unstable policy updates. This is particularly problematic in reasoning RL, where trajectories are long, variance is already high, and a few extreme importance ratios can distort the gradient for an entire sample.","importance":"This is a clean algorithmic modification rather than a new paradigm. Its significance is that it identifies the token aggregator itself as a likely weak point in GRPO-style training. If a geometric mean can improve stability without changing the rest of the pipeline, it becomes an attractive low-friction patch for RLHF and RLVR setups.","technical_approach":"GMPO simply replaces the arithmetic mean over token-level rewards with a geometric mean. The change is small but principled: geometric means are less sensitive to large outliers, so they naturally damp the effect of extreme importance ratios that can otherwise blow up updates. The authors also provide theoretical framing that casts both GMPO and GRPO as weighted token-reward aggregators, which helps justify the modification beyond heuristics. The trade-off is that GMPO is more conservative. If a task genuinely benefits from strong learning signals carried by a few high-value tokens, suppressing them too much could slow progress.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model sizes, task setup, baselines, or exact gains. The most important empirical evidence should therefore be stability-oriented: smoother training curves, fewer extreme updates, lower seed variance, and competitive or better reasoning accuracy relative to GRPO across multiple settings. For this kind of paper, final average performance alone is not enough; the central claim only matters if the optimization dynamics are measurably better.","authors_note":""},"tags":["grpo","policy-optimization","training-stability","reasoning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007509","title":"SRFT: A Single-Stage Method with Supervised and Reinforcement 和 RL 对 reasoning 的作用方式不同，串联两阶段虽有效，但训练信号割裂、调度复杂，而且常常没有充分利用二者互补性。作者的分析结论是，SFT 更像对策略分布做粗粒度、全局性的牵引，RL 更像对关键区域做细粒度、选择性的修正；如果把两者简单分开跑，前者容易过平滑，后者又容易高方差和不稳定。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于给出一个 pretrain/post-train 接口层面的统一视角，而不只是又一个 reasoning trick。它强调 entropy 可以作为连接 SFT 与 RL 的共同诊断量，这对单阶段联合训练、mid-train 过渡、cooldown/annealing 设计都有启发；如果结果扎实，它会影响大家如何重新组织 reasoning post-training 流程。","technical_approach":"作者提出 SRFT，用单阶段框架把 supervised 和 reinforcement fine-tuning 结合起来，核心机制是 entropy-aware weighting。设计逻辑是：利用 token 分布熵去判断当前样本或位置更适合接受哪类训练信号——高不确定区域可能更需要 SFT 的全局牵引，已形成较明确偏好但仍需精修的区域更适合 RL 的选择性优化。它和先 SFT 后 RL 的常规流水线区别在于，信号不是阶段切换，而是在同一训练过程中动态配比。这个思路有效的前提是熵确实能稳定反映学习状态；若熵与真实可学习性错位，联合训练可能会互相干扰。","experiments":"摘要明确提到作者做了 token distribution、learning dynamics 和 integration mechanism 的分析，并把 entropy
