的说服力会明显增强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a real integration problem in reasoning post-training: SFT and RL help for different reasons, but running them as separate stages leaves signal fragmentation, scheduling complexity, and wasted complementarity. The authors argue that SFT makes coarse, global shifts to the policy distribution, while RL performs fine-grained, selective refinement. If treated as disconnected phases, the former can be overly smoothing and the latter can be high-variance and brittle.","importance":"The contribution matters because it offers a unifying view at the pretrain-to-posttrain interface rather than just another reasoning trick. By treating entropy as a shared diagnostic for both SFT and RL, the paper suggests a more principled way to design single-stage joint training, transition schedules, and annealing strategies. If the empirical evidence is strong, this could influence how reasoning post-training pipelines are organized.","technical_approach":"SRFT combines supervised and reinforcement fine-tuning in a single stage using entropy-aware weighting. The idea is to use token-distribution entropy as a signal for which type of update is more appropriate at a given point: high-uncertainty regions may benefit more from the broad shaping effect of SFT, while lower-entropy but still imperfect regions may be better served by RL’s selective optimization. This differs from the standard SFT-then-RL pipeline by dynamically mixing the two objectives within one training process instead of switching stages. The method depends on entropy being a reliable proxy for learning state; if that link is weak, the two signals may interfere rather than complement each other.","experiments":"The abstract states that the paper analyzes token distributions, learning dynamics, and integration mechanisms, and identifies entropy as a key indicator, but it does not report model size, data scale, task suite, or exact gains. New tokens can be added to solve this problem, when coupled with a good initialization for their new embeddings. However, existing embedding initialization methods require expensive further training or pretraining of additional modules. In this paper, we propose Token Distillation and show that by distilling representations obtained using the original tokenization, we can quickly learn high-quality input embeddings for new tokens. Experimental results with a wide range of open-weight models show that Token Distillation outperforms even strong baselines. However, it remains unclear how well these improvements generalize to new domains, as prior work evaluates RPT models on data from the same domains used for post-training. To understand the generalizability of RPT, we conduct two studies with specific focus on Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). (1) Observational: we compare a wide range of open-weight RPT models against their corresponding base models across multiple domains, including both seen and unseen domains in their fine-tuning data. (2) Interventional: we fine-tune LLMs with RPT on single domains and evaluate their performance across multiple domains. Both studies converge on the same conclusion that, although RPT brings substantial gains on tasks similar to the fine-tuning data, the gains generalize inconsistently and can vanish on domains with different reasoning patterns. In practice, Transformers often perform well even when labels are sparse or absent, suggesting crucial structure within unlabeled contextual demonstrations. We introduce and study in-context semi-supervised learning (IC-SSL), where a small set of labeled examples is accompanied by many unlabeled points, and show that Transformers can leverage the unlabeled context to learn a robust, context-dependent representation. This representation enables accurate predictions and markedly improves performance in low-label regimes, offering foundational insights into how Transformers exploit unlabeled context for representation learning within the ICL framework. T2I 流水线通常一次性把文本条件压进生成过程，缺少中间反思和纠错步骤，因此对长指令、细粒度属性和局部一致性处理得不够稳。","importance":"这是一个偏范式和训练框架的工作，对跨模态统一预训练很有参考价值。它的重要性在于把近期语言模型里的 interleaving reasoning 引到图像生成，尝试证明“先想、再画、再反思、再修正”不只是推理模型的技巧，也可能是提升 following、细节保留、视觉质量和审美表现，并且目标是缩小与 GPT-4o 类紧耦合系统的差距。由于摘要被截断，模型规模、训练数据规模、使用的图像生成 backbone、评测基准以及提升幅度都不可得，因此不能可靠写具体数字。就实验意义而言，最值得关注的是如果论文确实证明了“文本反思环”能稳定提升图像生成质量，那说明 unified multimodal model 里显式 reasoning state 可能值得在 pretrain 阶段原生建模，而不是只在推理阶段外挂。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a clear weakness in unified multimodal generators: they can produce images, but they still lag behind tightly coupled systems such as GPT-4o in instruction following and fine-detail preservation. Standard text-to-image pipelines usually inject the prompt once and generate in one pass, which leaves little room for intermediate planning, reflection, or correction.","importance":"This is a framework-level contribution with direct relevance to native multimodal pretraining. Its main significance is testing whether interleaved reasoning, which has recently helped language reasoning systems, can also improve image generation. If the answer is yes, that supports a stronger view of unified multimodal models: textual reasoning should be an internal state in the generation loop, not just an external prompting trick.","technical_approach":"IRG, or Interleaving Reasoning Generation, alternates between text reasoning and image synthesis. The model first writes a text-based thought to guide an initial image, then reflects on the generated image and produces further textual guidance to refine details, visual quality, and aesthetics while preserving semantics. The important design choice is to use reasoning as an iterative control state rather than as a one-shot prompt expansion. The abstract mentions a dedicated training strategy for this alternation, but the details are truncated. Compared with standard conditional generation, the method accepts a more complex generation loop in exchange for better controllability and self-correction.","experiments":"From the abstract, the key empirical claim is that IRG improves instruction following, detail preservation, visual quality, and aesthetics, with the goal of narrowing the gap to tightly coupled multimodal systems. The most interesting experimental implication is whether an explicit reasoning-reflection loop consistently helps text-to-image generation, which would strengthen the case for modeling reasoning states natively in multimodal pretraining.","authors_note":""},"tags":["text-to-image","reasoning","multimodal-generation","interleaving"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007699","title":"Incentivizing LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Functional Monte Carlo Tree Search","authors":["Kongcheng Zhang","QI YAO","Baisheng Lai","Jiaxing Huang","Wenkai Fang","Dacheng Tao","Mingli Song","Shunyu Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$db","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007699"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007699","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：现有 LLM reasoning 强化学习主要在 token 或 response 层面优化，却没有显式建模“推理动作”的功能角色，因此探索出来的推理轨迹既不稳定也不够多样。单靠 prompt 引导的 CoT 往往只是在表面格式上诱导推理，而不是让模型学会一组可复用的推理操作。","importance":"这是一个 RL + reasoning interface 的方法工作，重要性在于它把“推理步骤”离散成可学习的功能 token，再用树搜索和在线 RL 去强化这些 token 的使用。这个方向对 post-train 很相关，也给 pretrain 一个启发：如果推理模式能被显式 token 化，它可能成为模型内部可复用、可组合的控制变量，而不仅是自然语言解释文本。边界在于，这种功能 token 是否真的对应稳定的计算子程序，还是只是另一层 prompt engineering，需要看泛化结果。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 RFTT（Reinforced Functional Token Tuning）。作者直接把一组功能 token 加入词表，用它们承载不同的人类式 reasoning behavior；训练分两阶段进行：先在 SFT 阶段通过 prompt-driven tree search 生成并标注带功能 token 的训练轨迹，给模型建立初始的 token 使用能力；再在在线 RL 阶段继续探索多样推理路径，并用 functional Monte Carlo Tree Search 强化有效路径。与只让模型自由写 CoT 不同，这种设计把推理空间从连续自然语言压缩成“自然语言 + 结构化功能标记”的混合空间，理论上更利于搜索和 credit assignment。代价是额外词表设计和搜索开销，而且功能 token 的语义是否可迁移并不天然保证。","experiments":"摘要表明作者的目标是提升 LLM 的 learn-to-reason 能力，并强调多样 reasoning pathways 的探索。可以推断实验会比较有无功能 token、有无树搜索、以及在线 RL 的效果，但摘要没有提供模型规模、基座模型、数学/代码 benchmark 名称、准确率提升幅度或 search 成本。因此无法可靠写具体数字。当前能确认的实验亮点是：论文把功能 token、树搜索和 RL 放在一个闭环里评估，关注的不只是最终正确率，还包括 reasoning behavior 的可学习性与多样性。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a limitation in current reasoning RL for LLMs: optimization usually happens at the token or full-response level, without explicitly representing the functional roles of reasoning steps. As a result, exploration is unstable and reasoning diversity is hard to sustain. Prompted chain-of-thought often shapes the surface form of reasoning without giving the model a reusable set of reasoning actions.","importance":"This is a method contribution at the reasoning-RL interface. Its main idea is to discretize reasoning behaviors into learnable functional tokens, then optimize how the model uses them with search and RL. That is relevant beyond post-training, because it raises a pretraining-facing question: can reasoning modes be turned into explicit controllable symbols rather than left as unconstrained natural language? The main caveat is whether these tokens capture robust computational routines or merely add another layer of prompt scaffolding.","technical_approach":"RFTT, or Reinforced Functional Token Tuning, augments the vocabulary with a set of learnable functional tokens intended to represent distinct reasoning behaviors. Training has two stages. First, supervised fine-tuning uses prompt-driven tree search to generate self-labeled trajectories annotated with functional tokens, giving the model an initial ability to use them. Second, online reinforcement learning explores reasoning paths further, guided by a functional Monte Carlo Tree Search. Compared with free-form CoT generation, this turns reasoning into a mixed space of language plus structured control markers, which should help both search and credit assignment. The trade-off is added design complexity, search cost, and uncertain transferability of token semantics.","experiments":"The abstract makes clear that the method is evaluated for improving learn-to-reason capability and encouraging diverse reasoning pathways. So a quantitative summary is not possible. Cannistraci"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$e0","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007866"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007866","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：能否把动态连接稀疏训练和谱稀疏训练两条路线合到一个统一框架里，同时保留二者的效率和表达能力。过去的做法通常二选一：要么只做连接级稀疏，训练和推理都省，但容易损失全局表达；要么做低秩/谱稀疏，结构更平滑但未必真正稀疏，也难和动态拓扑更新协同，因此在 LLM 预训练里一直缺少稳定的统一方案。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要是方法级和系统级的，而不是范式级突破。它的重要性在于把两类看似分离的稀疏预训练思路放到同一设计空间里，给稀疏 pretrain 提供了一个更接近工程可落地的折中点：连接稀疏负责参数和算力节省，谱稀疏负责结构压缩与稳定性。如果这个组合确实成立，对稀疏 LLM 预训练的启示是，未来不必在‘硬稀疏’和‘低秩’之间强行站队，而可以按层、按阶段、按训练动态做混合设计。","technical_approach":"核心方法看起来是一个融合型动态稀疏训练框架：在连接层面维持可更新的稀疏拓扑，在谱层面引入低秩或频谱约束，并通过某种“alignment-enhanced”机制让两种稀疏结构彼此兼容。它不是简单把 mask 和 low-rank 叠在一起，而是试图解决二者优化目标不一致的问题：连接稀疏偏向局部离散选择，谱稀疏偏向连续全局压缩，如果没有对齐机制，训练会出现更新方向冲突、有效容量被重复削减。论文的关键设计大概率在于如何定义这种对齐信号，以及何时更新拓扑、何时调整谱结构，从而避免一边恢复另一边刚剪掉的信息。","experiments":"从摘要可见，论文聚焦于效率型 LLM 训练，但当前给到的信息不足以确认模型规模、训练 token 数、对比 baseline 和具体提升数字。可以合理预期它会和代表性的动态稀疏训练方法、低秩分解方法以及可能的稠密训练上界做比较；真正值得关注的实验点不只是最终精度，而是同等训练 FLOPs、同等可训练参数、以及推理时实际稀疏可执行性下的效果。如果论文做得扎实，最有价值的 ablation 应该包括：仅连接稀疏、仅谱稀疏、无 alignment 的直接组合、以及不同更新频率/秩预算/稀疏度分配下的稳定性差异。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a concrete gap: can dynamic connectivity sparsity and spectral sparsity be combined into one training framework for LLMs without losing the main benefits of either side. Prior work typically chose one route. Connectivity sparsity gives executable sparse pretraining but can hurt global expressivity, while low-rank or spectral methods compress structure more smoothly but do not naturally align with dynamic sparse topology updates.","importance":"This is mainly a methods-and-systems contribution, not a paradigm shift. Its value is in reframing sparse pretraining as a joint design problem rather than a choice between hard sparsity and low-rank structure. If the proposed combination is stable, the practical implication for pretraining is important: sparsity may be best allocated across mechanisms, layers, and training phases instead of enforced through a single structural prior.","technical_approach":"The method appears to be a hybrid dynamic sparse training scheme that maintains updateable sparse connectivity while also imposing a spectral or low-rank structure, with an additional alignment mechanism to make the two compatible. The key point is not simply stacking a sparse mask on top of low-rank factors. The hard part is optimization: connectivity sparsity makes discrete local allocation decisions, while spectral sparsity applies continuous global compression. Without coordination, the two can work against each other and collapse effective capacity. The proposed alignment component is therefore likely the main contribution.","experiments":"The abstract makes the training-efficiency target clear, but it does not provide enough detail to report model size, token count, baselines, or gains. Its significance is that it treats preference noise as an optimization problem rather than merely a data-cleaning problem. That matters because noisy posttraining signals do not just hurt one round of alignment; they can propagate into distillation, synthetic data generation, and continual training.","technical_approach":"RE-PO is presented as a general policy optimization framework designed to handle noisy preferences. The abstract does not expose the exact objective, but the central idea is clear: do not treat all observed preference labels as equally reliable. Relative to standard RLHF or DPO-style methods, the likely difference is explicit reliability modeling, reweighting, or a robust loss that reduces the gradient impact of suspicious labels. This is the right place to intervene because the main damage from preference noise comes from confidently pushing updates in the wrong direction.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model scales, datasets, noise levels, or numeric gains, so exact results cannot be summarized. Narayanan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$e2","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007907"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007907","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：通过 resampling + verifier 做 inference scaling 或数据筛选，是否能无限逼近更强模型，答案是否定的。只要 verifier 有非零假阳性率，反复采样并不能把这个错误降下去，因此这类方法存在一个由 verifier 质量决定的准确率上界。","importance":"这项工作的价值很高，属于机制与边界条件分析。它直接给当前基于 rejection sampling、unit-test filtering、best-of-N 的推理和训练范式泼了冷水，但这种冷水是有用的。对 reasoning model、RLVR 和 test-time scaling 来说，它提醒大家：验证器不是免费的外部真值，只要 verifier imperfect，更多采样不一定更接近真能力，反而可能把假阳性放大成系统性上限。","technical_approach":"作者的核心方法是理论分析加经验验证。理论上，他们证明了当 verifier 存在非零 false positive rate 时，resampling 无法降低该错误，因此不管你给多少 compute，最终 accuracy 都被这个假阳性地板卡住。经验上，他们分析了 HumanEval 和 MBPP 上单样本准确率与 false positive rate 的强相关，说明弱模型往往不仅正确率低，而且更容易生成能骗过 verifier 的伪解。这个视角和常规‘多采样总会更好’的经验主义不同，它把 scaling 的有效性绑定到 verifier 校准质量上。","experiments":"摘要给出了最关键的定性结论，但没有写具体相关系数、上界数值或各模型对比数字。可以确认的是，作者使用了 HumanEval 和 MBPP，并指出 unit tests 的假阳性足以限制 resampling-based scaling。对这类论文，最有价值的实验不是刷更高 Pass@K，而是画出 accuracy 上界随 verifier false positive rate 变化的曲线，并比较不同模型在同一 verifier 下离这个上界有多远。如果论文还分析了用于训练数据筛选时的类似上界，那对 RFT/RLVR 数据构造也会非常有启发。","authors_note":"作者包括 Sayash Kapoor、Arvind Narayanan。其代表性工作包括对 AI 评测、基准与社会技术风险的系统性分析。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether inference scaling through resampling and verification can keep closing the gap to stronger models, and the answer is no once the verifier is imperfect. If the verifier has a non-zero false positive rate, repeated sampling cannot drive that error down, so there is a hard ceiling on accuracy no matter how much compute is used.","importance":"This is a high-value limits paper. It directly constrains a large class of current practices: best-of-N generation, rejection sampling with unit tests, and verifier-based data curation for reasoning training. The contribution is important because it replaces optimistic scaling intuition with a concrete boundary condition: verifier quality, not just sample count, sets the attainable ceiling.","technical_approach":"The approach combines theory with empirical analysis. The theoretical result is straightforward but powerful: false positives survive resampling, so the verifier induces an irreducible error floor. Empirically, the authors show a strong correlation between single-sample accuracy and false positive rate on HumanEval and MBPP, suggesting that weaker models are not only less accurate but also more likely to produce outputs that fool the verifier. This reframes inference scaling as a verifier-calibration problem rather than a pure compute problem.","experiments":"The abstract gives the main qualitative finding but does not include correlation coefficients, bound values, or model-by-model numbers. The authors conjecture this is a manifestation of the binding problem from cognitive science—inconsistent and entangled concept representations in Transformers prevent reversible associations.","importance":"A mechanistic analysis contribution connecting the Reversal Curse to the binding problem, offering a deeper explanation than 'training data directionality.' For pretrain research: (1) it reveals a fundamental limitation of Transformer representations; (2) a JEPA-based design is proposed as a mitigation, suggesting structural deficiencies in the AR paradigm for relational representation.","technical_approach":"Two hypotheses are proposed: (1) inconsistency of concept representations across contexts, and (2) entanglement between different concept representations. Experiments validate both. 相比，它更像在模型内部学习一个适度离散、适度连续的层级表示。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的是，论文主张其 semi-discrete residual 表示能同时提升整体性和 expressive speech generation。当前信息没有给出数据集、模型规模、MOS、WER、说话人相似度或情感表达指标。若实验完整，关键事实应包括：与纯离散 tokenizer pipeline、纯连续端到端系统相比，在自然度和表现力上更均衡；以及 ablation 证明可微量化瓶颈确实促成了语义/声学分工，而不是额外参数带来的收益。由于没有数字，不能扩写成具体领先幅度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a long-standing trade-off in end-to-end speech generation. Fully discrete token pipelines are stable but lose acoustic richness, while fully continuous acoustic modeling preserves detail but entangles semantics, prosody, and acoustics, leading to harder optimization and error accumulation. Many current systems therefore rely on multi-stage pipelines built on pretrained discrete speech tokenizers, but those pipelines introduce a semantic-acoustic split that limits holistic and expressive generation.","importance":"This is squarely in the speech language modeling and unified representation space, not just a downstream TTS tweak. Its value for pretraining research lies in representation design: deciding what should be discretized and what should remain as continuous residual information. That matters because in speech foundation models, the bottleneck is often the tokenizer and the semantic-acoustic interface before it is the backbone model itself.","technical_approach":"The method uses hierarchical semantic-acoustic modeling with semi-discrete residual representations. A differentiable quantization bottleneck encourages a clean division of labor: a Text-Semantic Language Model produces semantic and prosodic plans, and a Residual Acoustic Model reconstructs fine-grained acoustic detail. The design avoids two common failure modes at once: forcing everything into discrete tokens, which hurts expressivity, and asking one continuous model to do both high-level planning and low-level reconstruction, which entangles errors. Relative to standard multi-stage pipelines with fixed tokenizers, this learns a more balanced internal hierarchy of discrete-like planning and continuous refinement.","experiments":"The abstract supports the qualitative claim that semi-discrete residual representations improve expressive end-to-end speech synthesis while avoiding the usual stability-expressivity trade-off. It does not provide datasets, model sizes, MOS, WER, speaker similarity, or emotion-related metrics. The most important evidence would compare against purely discrete tokenizer-based pipelines and fully continuous systems, showing a better balance between naturalness and expressivity, plus ablations confirming that the differentiable quantization bottleneck drives the semantic-acoustic specialization. Classifier-free guidance is widely used in continuous diffusion and has been adopted in discrete settings as well, but the field mostly relies on intuition—stronger guidance gives stronger conditioning—without a clear account of how it reshapes the target distribution or the sampling dynamics. The authors focus on exact analysis in low-dimensional settings to make that mechanism explicit.","importance":"This is a mechanistic analysis paper, and it is especially relevant for alternative language modeling paradigms based on discrete diffusion. Much of current practice in discrete guidance is still heuristic, particularly around guidance strength, sampling steps, and the trade-off between condition adherence and diversity. The paper matters because it offers an interpretable framework for how probability mass is reallocated under guidance, not just a black-box recipe for better results. That kind of understanding can influence future model and sampler design even without introducing a new benchmark leader.","technical_approach":"The approach is analytical: the paper studies guided masked discrete diffusion under arbitrary low-dimensional data distributions and derives the exact sampling distribution and dynamics. The central result highlighted in the abstract is that when the data distribution is a mixture over classes, guidance amplifies class-specific regions while suppressing regions shared across classes, with the effect controlled by guidance strength. This explains why guidance can improve conditional fidelity while also reducing diversity or pushing samples toward overly sharp modes. The trade-off is that these are low-dimensional exact results, so the conclusions still need care when extrapolated to high-dimensional language settings.","experiments":"From the abstract, the evidence is likely theory-backed low-dimensional experiments or visualizations rather than large-scale language benchmarks. What is explicit is the setting—masked discrete diffusion, arbitrary low-dimensional distributions, and class-mixture analysis—and the focus on understanding how guidance alters the distribution. No model sizes, language tasks, or generation metrics are provided. The most useful empirical section would validate the analytical predictions against actual sampling trajectories and show how probability mass shifts between class-specific and shared regions as guidance strength changes. There are no reliable numerical benchmark gains to report.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion-lm","discrete-diffusion","guidance","theory","sampling"],"notable_authors":["Molei Sharan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$ed","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008185"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008185","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：LLM 处理数字时仍沿用普通文本 token 的表示方式，导致数值语义没有被直接编码，频率偏差和多 token 拆分问题长期存在。过去模型通常依赖在海量语料中“顺带学会”数字规律，但这会让 42 更像一个高频字符串，而不是一个带有大小、周期结构和可组合性的数。","importance":"这项工作属于表示层方法创新，影响点很集中：它挑战了‘数字就是普通 token’这个默认假设。对 pretrain 的启示是，如果某一类符号有明确的外部结构，直接把结构注入 embedding 可能比继续扩大数据和模型更划算。数字是最典型的起点，因为它广泛存在于文本、代码、表格和多模态标注中，且错误往往来自表示层而不是推理层。","technical_approach":"作者提出 FoNE，用 Fourier features 把任意数字直接映射成单 token embedding。核心设计是每位数字只用两个 embedding 维度编码，从而显式捕捉数值的周期性和相对大小关系；这相当于把模型内部已经隐式学到的一类 Fourier-like 数字特征外显化、参数化。与传统 tokenizer 把数字切成多个子词不同，FoNE 强制 one-number-one-token，避免模型再去聚合字符片段；与单纯学习一个新的 number vocabulary 不同，它不是记忆常见数字，而是构造具有外推能力的表示。这个设计有效，是因为数字的结构高度规则，Fourier 特征能紧凑编码位置信息与模运算式规律。边界在于：它更适合阿拉伯数字及标准格式，对单位、范围表达、科学记数法、混合文本数字的兼容性取决于具体实现。","experiments":"摘要提供了一个关键技术事实：FoNE 以单 token 表示数字，并且每位数字只需要两个 embedding 维度。摘要没有给出实验模型规模、训练或评测数据、对比 tokenizer、准确率提升数字，因此不能写具体分数。基于摘要可以确认的实验主线应包括：数值理解与泛化任务上，FoNE 相比标准 tokenization 更能减轻频率偏差，并在未见数字上保持表示一致性。值得重点看正文的 ablation 是两类：一是单 token 化本身和 Fourier 编码本身各自贡献多少；二是随着数字位数增加，性能是否平稳下降而不是突然失效。","authors_note":"作者包含 Robin Jia、Mahdi Soltanolkotabi。摘要未提供机构信息。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a longstanding weakness: LLMs represent numbers like ordinary text tokens, which creates frequency bias and often fragments one number into multiple subword pieces. In practice, this means models learn numbers as frequent strings rather than as objects with magnitude, periodic structure, and compositional rules.","importance":"This is a representation-level contribution with a clear message for pretraining: when a token class has strong external structure, it can be better to encode that structure directly instead of hoping scale will recover it from data. Numbers are a particularly important case because they appear everywhere—text, code, tables, labels—and failures often start at the embedding layer.","technical_approach":"FoNE maps each number directly into the embedding space using Fourier features and treats it as a single token. The main design choice is extremely compact: two embedding dimensions per digit are used to encode periodic numerical structure and relative value information. This differs from standard tokenization, which splits numbers into pieces and forces the model to reconstruct value downstream, and from a learned number vocabulary, which mainly memorizes common numbers rather than generalizing. The design is plausible because numerical strings follow regular positional patterns that Fourier features can encode efficiently. The boundary is also clear: the method is naturally suited to canonical numeric forms, while units, mixed text-number expressions, and unusual formats may need extra handling.","experiments":"The abstract gives one concrete technical detail: FoNE represents a number as a single token and uses only two embedding dimensions per digit. It does not report model sizes, datasets, baselines, or exact gains, so those should remain unspecified. The likely empirical story is improved numerical understanding and better generalization to unseen numbers compared with standard tokenization. The most informative ablations to check are whether the gain comes mainly from single-token treatment or from the Fourier parameterization, and how performance scales with longer numbers.","authors_note":"The author list includes Robin Jia and Mahdi Soltanolkotabi. Soltanolkotabi"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008208","title":"KL-Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Generative Modelling is Designed to Mode Collapse","authors":["Anthony GX-Chen","Jatin Prakash","Jeff Guo","Rob Fergus","Rajesh Ranganath"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$ee","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008208"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008208","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：很多人把 KL-regularized RL 里的 forward KL 和 reverse KL 直觉化地理解成“mass covering vs mode seeking”，但在生成建模场景下，这个直觉经常是错的，甚至目标分布会被设计成天然塌缩。以往分析往往只看 divergence 形式本身，没有同时把 reward、reference policy 和正则强度放进同一个目标分布视角里。","importance":"这项工作是训练目标层面的机制澄清，价值在于纠正一个被广泛复用但常被误解的设计直觉。对 RLHF、DPO 类变体以及更广义的生成式 RL 都有启发：模式塌缩不一定只是优化失败，也可能是 objective 自己把高概率质量推向单个高奖励区域。这个判断很重要，因为它改变了调参优先级——有时该先改目标构造，而不是只改优化器或采样。","technical_approach":"作者的技术路线更偏理论与机制分析：他们从 KL-regularized RL 所隐式定义的 target distribution 出发，统一分析 regularizer 类型、reward、reference model 和 regularization strength 如何共同决定分布形状。核心结论是，在常见设置下，比如正则强度较低且多个输出共享相同可验证奖励时，无论用 forward 还是 reverse KL，目标分布都会把大量质量压到单一高奖励区域，因此 mode collapse 是 objective-level 的。与传统教科书式 forward/reverse KL 直觉不同，这里 regularizer 不只决定“离谁近”的度量，还参与定义“应该去哪”。这个视角有效，因为 RL 里的优化对象不是固定真分布，而是被 reward 重写后的参考分布。边界在于：结论依赖具体 reward 结构和 reference policy，不能简单外推到所有高熵 reward 或强探索设置。","experiments":"摘要给出的实验性结论是：作者通过分析和实验表明，在常见生成建模设定下，forward KL 和 reverse KL regularization 都倾向于导向单峰高奖励区域。摘要没有给出具体任务、模型、collapse 指标或数值幅度，因此无法细化。即便没有数字，这篇工作的价值仍在于实验验证理论趋势，而不是追求 benchmark 最优。读正文时最值得看的部分是：他们是否比较了不同 KL 强度下的熵变化曲线，以及 reference model 质量如何影响塌缩程度。","authors_note":"作者包含 Rob Fergus、Rajesh Ranganath。摘要未提供机构信息。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper challenges a common intuition: in KL-regularized RL for generative modeling, forward KL is often treated as mass-covering and reverse KL as mode-seeking, but that intuition can be misleading or outright wrong. Prior reasoning usually focuses on the divergence form alone instead of the full target distribution induced jointly by reward, reference policy, regularizer type, and regularization strength.","importance":"This is an objective-level clarification with broad relevance to RLHF-style training and generative RL more generally. The main value is diagnostic: mode collapse may not be an optimizer failure at all, but a property designed into the objective. That matters because it changes what should be fixed first—sometimes the target construction, not the optimization details.","technical_approach":"The paper takes a theoretical and mechanistic route by analyzing the target distribution implicitly defined by KL-regularized RL. The central claim is that under common settings—such as weak regularization and equal verifiable rewards across many outputs—both forward and reverse KL can induce targets whose mass concentrates in a single high-reward region. This departs from textbook intuitions because, in RL, the KL term does more than define a discrepancy; it helps define the target itself once reward reweights the reference distribution. That framing is useful because the optimized distribution is not fixed in advance. The boundary is that the result depends on reward structure and the reference policy, so it should not be overgeneralized to every high-entropy or strongly exploratory setting.","experiments":"The abstract supports one clear empirical conclusion: experiments are consistent with the theory that common KL-regularized objectives push probability mass toward a single high-reward region. It does not report tasks, models, collapse metrics, or numerical magnitudes, so no finer quantitative summary is justified. The most informative details to look for in the full paper are entropy trends versus regularization strength and how the quality of the reference model changes the severity of collapse.","authors_note":"The author list includes Rob Fergus and Rajesh Ranganath. Ranganath"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008221","title":"RewardBench 2: Advancing Reward Model Evaluation","authors":["Saumya Malik","Valentina Pyatkin","Sander Land","Jacob Morrison","Noah Smith","Hanna Hajishirzi","Nathan Lambert"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$ef","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008221"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008221","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：奖励模型已经广泛用于 LLM 后训练，但现有评测还不足以解释一个 reward model 为什么在真实训练中常常不如更简单的 direct alignment 方法。过去 benchmark 要么只测局部技能，要么只测和人类偏好的静态一致性，缺少能反映多技能、真实难度与下游可用性的综合评测。","importance":"这项工作主要是评测与数据资源层面的贡献，但它对 post-train 和 pretrain↔posttrain 接口都很重要。原因很简单：reward model 质量如果测不准，后续 RL、rejection sampling、data filtering 这些链路都会建立在噪声监督上。RewardBench 2 的价值在于，它试图把‘离线准确率好看’和‘真正能支撑训练’这两件事重新对齐。","technical_approach":"作者提出 RewardBench 2，一个新的多技能奖励模型评测基准。核心不是简单扩充题量，而是引入更具挑战性的数据，覆盖 instruction following、reasoning、safety 等 reward model 实际承担的多类信号，并强调 accuracy-based evaluation。与上一代 reward benchmark 或单一偏好数据集不同，这里更关注 reward model 的区分能力边界：哪些样本它能稳定排序，哪些样本一旦复杂就失真。这样设计有效，因为 reward model 的问题通常不在容易样本，而在高难度、跨技能、带冲突偏好的样本。边界是：任何静态 benchmark 仍然不能完全替代在线训练评估，所以它更像过滤器和诊断器，而不是最终裁判。","experiments":"摘要能支持的核心结论是：RewardBench 2 提供了更难、更全面的多技能评测数据，用来衡量 reward model 的准确率能力，并回应‘现有评测进步没有转化为下游收益’这个现实问题。摘要没有给出数据规模、题目数、参与评测的 reward models、具体排行榜和相关性系数，因此不能量化。可以预期作者会分析 benchmark 分数与真实下游训练效果的关系；如果相关性依然弱，那反而也是很有价值的负结果。就摘要信息而言，最重要的是它明确把评测目标从“看上去合理”推进到“是否真的对训练有用”。","authors_note":"作者包含 Noah Smith。摘要未提供机构信息。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a growing mismatch: reward models are central to LLM post-training, yet existing evaluations do not explain why reward-model-based pipelines often underperform simpler direct alignment methods in practice. Current benchmarks either test narrow skills or static agreement with preferences, but not the multi-skill difficulty profile that matters for downstream training.","importance":"This is mainly an evaluation and dataset contribution, but it matters directly for post-training and for the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. If reward quality is measured poorly, then RL, rejection sampling, and data filtering all inherit noisy supervision. RewardBench 2 is important because it tries to reconnect offline reward-model evaluation with actual downstream usefulness.","technical_approach":"The paper introduces RewardBench 2, a new multi-skill benchmark for reward models. The key idea is not just to enlarge the dataset, but to add harder examples spanning instruction following, reasoning, safety, and other domains where reward models are used. Compared with earlier benchmarks or single-domain preference sets, the emphasis here is on where reward models fail to rank reliably once samples become difficult or preference signals conflict. This is a sensible design because reward models usually look fine on easy examples and break on exactly the cases that matter for training. The limitation is that any static benchmark remains only a proxy; it can diagnose and filter, but it cannot fully replace online evaluation in a training loop.","experiments":"The abstract supports a clear qualitative claim: RewardBench 2 introduces harder, broader, multi-skill data for evaluating reward-model accuracy, motivated by the weak link between existing evaluations and downstream performance. It does not report dataset size, number of tasks, participating reward models, leaderboard scores, or correlation numbers, so those should remain unspecified. The key empirical question is whether this new benchmark correlates better with downstream training utility; if not, that would itself be an informative result.","authors_note":"The author list includes Noah Smith. Naively using a quantized actor for rollout causes policy ratio drift that leads to long-term training collapse.","importance":"A system/method-level contribution for RL post-training efficiency. QuRL addresses two practical engineering challenges (policy ratio drift and weight synchronization) when using quantized actors for rollout acceleration. For pretrain research, it highlights that quantization in the training loop extends beyond inference—RL-stage quantization is an underexplored efficiency lever.","technical_approach":"QuRL uses a quantized actor for fast rollout and addresses two key issues: (1) Adaptive Clipping Range (ACR) dynamically adjusts PPO's clipping ratio based on the policy ratio between full-precision and quantized actors, preventing drift-induced training collapse; (2) A weight update mechanism handles synchronization between the full-precision model's weight updates and the quantized actor.","experiments":"Abstract is truncated; specific speedup ratios, model sizes, and reasoning task results are not available. Standard solutions require training an auxiliary critic network, which adds significant compute overhead and training instability.","importance":"A method-level contribution in RL post-training. GN-IVO eliminates the critic network by implicitly learning step-level values from the policy itself. Indirectly relevant to pretraining: RL training signal quality and efficiency affect post-training outcomes, which feed back into pretrain iteration.","technical_approach":"GN-IVO (Group-Normalized Implicit Value Optimization) learns step-level values implicitly from the policy through group-normalized distributional matching, without a separate critic network. Group normalization stabilizes the distribution matching process and controls value estimation variance. Compared to critic-based methods like PPO, it eliminates critic parameters and associated training instability.","experiments":"Abstract is truncated; specific tasks, model sizes, and quantitative results are not available. A Noise Decomposition Framework","authors":["Zach Xu","Shang Zhu","Jue Wang","Junlin Wang","Ben Athiwaratkun","Chi Wang","James Y Zou","Ce Zhang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$f6","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008392"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008392","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作回答的是：长上下文任务里，什么时候把输入切块后分而治之是有效的，什么时候一定会伤害性能。过去多代理 chunking 常被当成工程补丁使用，但失败往往来自不同来源的噪声混在一起，没有一个能指导何时拆分、何时坚持单次长上下文推理的分析框架。","importance":"它的重要性在于提供了一个可操作的误差分解视角，而不是再提出一个新的长上下文技巧。对 pretrain 和系统设计的启示是，长上下文能力不只是上下文窗够不够大，还取决于模型噪声随长度如何恶化、任务是否存在强跨块依赖、以及聚合器是否可靠；这有助于判断是该投训练算力做原生长上下文，还是用分块系统弥补。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出三噪声分解框架：cross-chunk dependence 对应任务噪声，随着上下文增长而上升的理解混乱对应模型噪声，整合各块结果时的误差对应 aggregator noise。在这个框架下，multi-agent chunking 只有在模型噪声下降带来的收益，能覆盖任务噪声和聚合噪声带来的损失时才值得做。和很多经验性 chunk-and-rerank 方法相比，这篇工作不是优化具体 aggregator，而是先给出判别条件；设计上的取舍也很清楚：它接受切块会丢掉跨段交互，只为了换取更高的局部保真度。","experiments":"摘要说明作者在 retrieval、question answering、summarization 等任务上验证了理论，并进一步分析了模型保真度随输入长度加速衰减这一现象。没有给出模型规模、上下文长度、具体方法对比和数值提升，因此现阶段能确认的是：实验覆盖了不同类型长文本任务，而且关注的是条件性胜负而不是普适超越。真正值得查正文的数据点包括：不同任务噪声占比下 chunking 的临界点、不同聚合器带来的误差上限、以及随着模型规模增大，模型噪声衰减是否足以推迟 chunking 的收益区间。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a practical question that long-context work often avoids: when does divide-and-conquer actually help LLMs on long inputs, and when does it fail by construction? Chunking is widely used as an engineering workaround, but its failure modes are usually conflated, making it hard to know when splitting is a sound strategy versus a harmful shortcut.","importance":"Its contribution is a decision framework rather than a new long-context trick. For pretraining and systems work, the key lesson is that long-context performance is governed by at least three factors—task-level cross-chunk dependency, model degradation with length, and aggregation quality—so the right fix may be native long-context training in some regimes and chunked inference in others.","technical_approach":"The core method is a three-part noise decomposition: task noise from cross-chunk dependencies, model noise that grows with context length, and aggregator noise from combining partial outputs. Under this view, multi-agent chunking helps only when the reduction in model noise from shorter local contexts outweighs the loss from broken dependencies and imperfect aggregation. Unlike heuristic chunk-and-aggregate systems, the paper focuses on identifying the operating regime where chunking should work at all. The trade-off is explicit: chunking sacrifices global interactions to gain local fidelity.","experiments":"The abstract says the theory is validated on retrieval, question answering, and summarization, and it also studies the accelerated decay of model fidelity as input length grows. It does not provide model sizes, context lengths, baselines, or exact gains, so the empirical picture here is conditional rather than leaderboard-oriented. The most useful details to inspect in the full paper are the crossover points where chunking becomes favorable, how much the aggregator contributes to error, and whether larger models shift the balance by degrading more slowly with length.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","divide-and-conquer","theoretical-framework","noise-decomposition"],"notable_authors":["Ben LLM 里到底有多少 attention head 实际上处于“基本不工作”的状态，以及如何可靠识别它们。此前大家知道 attention sink 等现象说明有些头会机械地盯住首 token，但缺少系统标准去区分“功能专一的头”和“真正可删的冗余头”。","importance":"它的重要性是机制分析和效率分析兼具。对 pretrain 研究的启示是，注意力头的参数利用率可能显著低于表面配置，冗余不仅影响推理成本，也影响我们如何理解 head specialization；如果大量 inactive heads 是训练动态的稳定产物，那么架构宽度、正则化和头级稀疏化策略都值得重新审视。","technical_approach":"核心方法是系统评估 12 种 head inactivity score，并通过阈值化挑选候选 inactive heads，再用模型干预去验证这些头是否真的可在特定上下文下被消融。这个设计比只看 attention pattern 更稳，因为“看起来像 sink”不等于“功能上可删”；作者把识别问题和因果验证问题分开处理。与直接做剪枝相比，这篇工作先定义测量学，再谈压缩，因此更适合回答哪些头冗余、冗余在什么上下文下成立。","experiments":"摘要给出的最关键数字是：平均超过 score function 与真实可消融性的相关性。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a basic but under-measured question: how many attention heads in pretrained LLMs are effectively inactive, and how can we identify them reliably? Prior observations such as attention sinks suggest redundancy, but they do not cleanly separate specialized behavior from heads that are functionally dispensable.","importance":"This matters for both mechanistic understanding and efficiency. For pretraining, it suggests that head-level capacity utilization may be much lower than the architectural budget implies, which has implications for attention width, regularization, structured sparsity, and how we interpret head specialization.","technical_approach":"The method is a measurement framework rather than a new pruning algorithm. The authors evaluate 12 different inactivity score functions, threshold them to identify candidate inactive heads, and then validate those candidates via model interventions that test whether ablating them preserves behavior. This is an important design choice: a suspicious attention pattern is not the same as causal irrelevance, so detection and verification are treated separately. Compared with direct pruning papers, this work is trying to define what inactivity means before optimizing around it.","experiments":"The main quantitative result in the abstract is that more than 12% of attention heads are inactive on average and can be ablated in specific contexts while maintaining MMLU accuracy. Nevertheless, the dynamics can be empirically convex-like across various tasks, models, optimizers, hyperparameters, etc. In this work, we examine the applicability of convexity and Lipschitz continuity in deep learning, in order to precisely control the loss dynamics via the learning rate schedules. We illustrate that deep learning quickly becomes weakly convex after a short period of training, and the loss is predicable by an upper bound on the last iterate, which further informs the scaling of optimal learning rate. Through the lens of convexity, we build scaling laws of learning rates and losses that extrapolate as much as $80\\times$ across training horizons and $70\\times$ across model sizes. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008408"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008408","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：深度学习明明是非凸优化，为什么很多训练动态却表现得像凸问题，以及这种近似凸性是否足够强到可以推导学习率和损失的可外推 scaling law。过去学习率调度大量依赖经验和网格搜索，即使有 scaling law 也多是经验拟合，缺少一个能跨模型、跨训练时长解释为什么可外推的统一视角。","importance":"它的重要性在于把优化超参搜索问题往“可预测控制”推进了一步。对 pretrain 实验尤其有价值，因为大模型训练里学习率 schedule 的试错成本很高；如果弱凸近似在广泛设置下成立，那么我们可以用更少试验估计更长训练、更大模型的合适学习率和预期 loss，直接影响训练预算分配和失败率。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出 convex dominance 视角：虽然全局非凸，但训练很快进入一个可视为 weakly convex 且近似 Lipschitz 的阶段，因此最后一次迭代的 loss 上界可以预测真实 loss 动态，并进一步推出最优学习率的 scaling 规律。和纯经验 scaling law 不同，这里不是只做幂律拟合，而是试图从近似凸分析给出控制学习率 schedule 的依据。设计上的关键判断是把“足够实用的局部凸性”当作分析对象，而不是执着于全局非凸理论；边界则在于这种近似通常依赖训练阶段、优化器和数据 regime，未必在早期剧烈非稳态或强分布切换下都成立。","experiments":"摘要给出的关键数字是：其学习率和损失 scaling law 可以在训练时长上外推最多 80 倍、在模型规模上外推最多 70 倍。作者还声称这种凸性视角适用于多种任务、模型、优化器和超参设置。摘要没有给出具体模型类型、规模区间、误差条和对比方法，因此目前更适合把它看成一个强经验规律论文，而不是已经被大规模 LLM 训练完全验证的结论。值得重点查看的实验是：外推误差有多大、在 transformer pretrain 上是否同样稳定、以及 schedule 选择是否真的优于常用 cosine / warmup 配方。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks why deep learning, despite being non-convex, often exhibits optimization dynamics that look convex enough to be predictable and controllable. If that approximation is real, then learning-rate schedules and loss trajectories may admit scaling laws that are more than empirical curve fits.","importance":"This matters because learning-rate tuning is one of the most expensive forms of trial-and-error in large-scale pretraining. A usable law that extrapolates across model sizes and training horizons would turn optimizer setup from a search problem into a planning problem, with direct implications for training efficiency and failure reduction.","technical_approach":"The main idea is a convex-dominance view: after a short transient phase, training behaves as if it were weakly convex with approximately Lipschitz dynamics, allowing the loss to be upper-bounded and predicted through the last iterate. From that, the paper derives scaling laws for optimal learning rates and losses. The key difference from purely empirical scaling work is that the extrapolation is motivated by approximate convex analysis rather than by unconstrained power-law fitting. The trade-off is obvious: the approximation is likely regime-dependent, and may break during early unstable phases or under strong distributional changes.","experiments":"The abstract reports extrapolation up to 80× across training horizons and 70× across model scales, across a range of tasks, models, optimizers, and hyperparameters. The most relevant checks in the full paper are extrapolation error bars, behavior on Transformer pretraining specifically, and whether the resulting schedules outperform strong defaults such as warmup plus cosine decay.","authors_note":""},"tags":["optimization","scaling-law","learning-rate","loss-dynamics","convexity"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008407","title":"Reward Models Inherit Value Biases from open-weight RMs。摘要没有提供效应量、统计显著性细节、具体 RM 名称清单或这些偏差对 RL policy 的下游影响大小，因此暂时不能判断偏置有多强、是否会随模型规模减弱。最值得看正文的是：这些价值偏差能否被继续 pretrain 或 RM-specific finetune This work addresses how to make the normalization layer's scaling dynamically input-dependent.","importance":"A method-level improvement to a fundamental Transformer component. If the overhead is small, dynamic normalization could influence pretrain architecture choices. Normalization changes, though seemingly minor, can significantly affect training stability, convergence, and final performance at scale.","technical_approach":"SeeDNorm replaces the static γ in RMSNorm with a dynamic, input-dependent scaling coefficient. It retains the input norm information and incorporates it into the rescaling step, so the normalized vector on the unit hypersphere can recover input-relevant magnitude information. The key departure from RMSNorm is making γ a function of the input rather than a fixed parameter.","experiments":"The abstract is truncated; specific model sizes, benchmarks, and numerical results are not available. Calmon"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$fe","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008573"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008573","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是 SAE 在语言模型解释中学到的特征过于 token-local、噪声重、语义不稳定的问题。已有 sparse autoencoder 往往把每个 token 的激活独立处理，结果容易恢复出位置或表面形式相关的碎片特征，而不是跨 token 延续的语义因素。","importance":"这是一个解释性方法上的实质改进，重要性在于它直接挑战了现有 SAE 设置里的独立同分布假设。对做 pretrain 机制分析的人来说，价值不只是多一个更好看的 feature dictionary，而是提示我们：如果语言表征本身是时间连续演化的，那么解释模型时也应把序列结构作为一等公民，否则会系统性高估局部模式、低估语义过程。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Temporal SAE，在标准重构损失和稀疏约束之外加入一个面向相邻 token 的对比损失，鼓励高层特征在时间上保持一致。设计上它没有改 SAE 的基本字典学习框架，而是在 feature activation 层面显式建模局部时间平滑性，用来把真正持续的语义因素和瞬时的句法/噪声因素分开。和普通 SAE 相比，T-SAE 的关键不是更复杂的编码器，而是多了一个偏置：相邻 token 若承载同一语义过程，激活应可持续；边界也很清楚，若任务本身依赖突变信号或高频句法切换，过强的时间一致性约束可能会抹平有用细节。","experiments":"摘要给出的结论是，T-SAE 比标准 SAE 更能 disentangle semantic from syntactic 或噪声因素，并恢复更稳定、更可解释的高层特征。摘要没有提供所分析的底座模型、层位、特征数、评价协议或具体提升数字，因此还不能判断它是在人工解释评分、下游 probing、feature sparsity，还是因果干预指标上领先。可以预期有价值的 ablation 会包括：不同时窗长度、对比损失权重、不同层表示的收益差异，以及时间平滑是否损害 token-level specificity。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a core weakness of sparse autoencoders for language-model interpretability: the learned features are often token-local, noisy, and semantically unstable. Standard SAEs usually treat token activations independently, which favors surface patterns and position-specific artifacts over features that track meaning across a sequence.","importance":"This is a meaningful methodological contribution for interpretability because it questions a basic assumption behind many SAE pipelines: independence across tokens. For pretraining and mechanistic-analysis work, the takeaway is broader than getting cleaner dictionaries. If language representations evolve sequentially, interpretability methods that ignore temporal structure will systematically over-recover local syntax and under-recover semantic processes.","technical_approach":"The proposed Temporal SAE adds a contrastive loss over adjacent tokens on top of the usual reconstruction and sparsity objectives. The method keeps the SAE framework intact, but biases feature learning toward temporal consistency, so sustained semantic factors are separated from transient syntactic or noisy ones. The key novelty is not a more complex encoder, but an explicit prior that neighboring tokens participating in the same semantic process should activate similar high-level features. The boundary is also clear: if the signal of interest changes abruptly, too much temporal consistency could wash out useful local structure.","experiments":"The abstract claims that T-SAE better disentangles semantic from syntactic or noisy components and yields more stable, interpretable higher-level features than standard SAEs. The most informative ablations would likely vary the temporal window, contrastive-loss weight, representation layer, and the trade-off between temporal smoothness and token-level specificity.","authors_note":""},"tags":["interpretability","sparse-autoencoder","language","representations"],"notable_authors":["Hima Lakkaraju"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008571","title":"How Transformers Learn Causal Structures In-Context: Explainable Mechanism Meets Theoretical Guarantee","authors":["Jianzhe Wei","Siyu Chen","Jianliang He","Zhuoran Yang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$ff","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008571"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008571","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：transformer 能否在上下文中学到可变的因果依赖结构，而不只是拟合固定模式。已有 ICL 理论通常假设依赖结构固定或任务形式简单，这和真实序列里关系随上下文变化的情况有明显落差。","importance":"这是偏理论机制的工作，重要性在于把 in-context learning 的讨论从‘学参数’推进到‘学结构’。如果结论成立，它对 pretrain 的意义是：transformer 的上下文适应能力可能不仅来自记住函数族，还来自在线识别样本之间的依赖图，这会影响我们理解 CoT、tool use、程序归纳乃至 retrieval-like 行为的形成机制。","technical_approach":"核心方法是构造一个带随机因果依赖的 Markov chain 框架，并证明一个两层、带相对位置编码的 transformer 可以从上下文样本中恢复这种依赖并进行预测。作者的思路不是直接分析自然语言，而是选取一个足够简洁但包含‘结构可变’要素的生成过程，在这个受控环境里给出可解释机制和理论保证。和很多只给存在性结果的 ICL 理论不同，这篇工作强调 explainable mechanism，即模型如何通过注意力和位置信息去识别谁依赖谁；它的边界也明显，受控 Markov 链离真实语言仍有距离，理论可迁移性要看后续实证是否跟上。","experiments":"摘要明确说有三部分贡献，其中之一是理论证明，另外应包含实验验证 transformer 确实学到依赖结构。可惜摘要截断，没有给出模型大小、合成数据规模、恢复精度、泛化曲线或与哪些理论/架构 baseline 比较。就这类工作而言，最有价值的实验通常不是单纯 accuracy，而是 attention pattern 与真实因果边的对齐、对结构分布外样本的泛化，以及缺失相对位置编码后性能是否明显退化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether transformers can learn context-dependent causal structure in-context, rather than merely fitting tasks with fixed dependencies. Much of the current ICL theory assumes static structure or simplified tasks, which misses an important property of real sequences: the dependency graph can change with the context.","importance":"This is mainly a theory and mechanism paper, and its significance is that it shifts the ICL discussion from learning parameters to learning structure. If the result holds, it matters for pretraining because transformers may adapt in context not only by retrieving task mappings, but also by inferring latent dependency graphs on the fly. That changes how we think about chain-of-thought, tool use, program induction, and retrieval-like behavior.","technical_approach":"The authors introduce a Markov-chain framework with randomly sampled causal dependencies and prove that a two-layer transformer with relative positional encoding can infer this structure from in-context examples. Instead of attacking natural language directly, they study a controlled generative process that is simple enough for analysis but still captures structure variability. Unlike many ICL theory papers that stop at an existence result, this one aims to provide an interpretable mechanism for how attention and positional information identify which tokens depend on which predecessors. The limitation is obvious: controlled Markov chains are still far from natural language, so empirical transfer matters.","experiments":"The abstract states that the work has three contributions, including theory and empirical validation that transformers do learn the dependency structure. However, the provided text is truncated and gives no model sizes, synthetic data scale, recovery metrics, generalization numbers, or baselines. For this kind of paper, the most valuable evidence would be not just prediction accuracy, but alignment between learned attention patterns and ground-truth causal edges, robustness under distribution shift in the dependency graph, and strong degradation when relative positional encoding is removed.","authors_note":""},"tags":["in-context-learning","transformer","theory","causal-structure"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008605","title":"Thought Branches: Interpreting LLM Reasoning Requires Resampling","authors":["Uzay Macar","Paul Bogdan","Senthooran Rajamanoharan","Neel Nanda"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$100","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008605"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008605","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：只看单条 CoT 来解释 reasoning model 的决策是不够的，因为真实推理是一个轨迹分布而不是单一路径。过去很多机制分析默认模型给出的那条理由就是关键因果链，但一旦存在多条近似等价的推理分支，单样本解释就会系统性误判因果贡献。","importance":"这是一个解释性与 reasoning 评估交叉的工作，重要性在于它把‘解释对象’从单条回答扩展为条件分布。对机制分析和 post-train 都有启示：如果某类表述在单次 CoT 中很显眼，但在重采样后对最终决策影响很小，那么我们对模型意图、欺骗、自保等行为的解释可能过度依赖叙述表面，而低估了隐含状态和分支选择。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 on-policy resampling：围绕同一 prompt 重采样多条 reasoning trajectory，用这些 thought branches 来估计局部句子或理由对最终行为的因果影响。它不是传统的 activation patching 或单轨迹 attribution，而是把推理看作随机过程，再通过重采样测量某个中间陈述的可复现影响。作者特别把方法用于 agentic misalignment 场景，检验模型声称的原因是否真的推动了后续动作。设计上的关键判断是：若一句‘理由’真有因果作用，它应该在重采样分支里表现出稳定、韧性的下游影响；若没有，就更像是 post-hoc rationalization。代价是采样成本高，而且只在可重采样、温度适中的生成设定下成立得更自然。","experiments":"摘要给出一个很强的结果：在看似 blackmail/self-preservation 的场景里，规范化的自保句子对最终决策的因果影响 unusually small 且 non-resilient，说明它们更像合理化叙述而非真实驱动因素。摘要没有列出所用模型、场景数量、重采样次数、影响量化指标或跨模型一致性数字，因此无法判断结论有多普遍。最有价值的实验会是：不同模型族上该现象是否稳定；采样温度和分支多样性如何影响因果估计；以及与单轨迹 attribution 方法相比，重采样会推翻多少既有解释。","authors_note":"Neel Nanda 是机制可解释方向的代表作者之一。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper argues that interpreting a reasoning model from a single chain of thought is inadequate because reasoning is a distribution over trajectories, not a single path. Many interpretability analyses implicitly assume the model’s stated reason is the causal reason, but that can fail badly when multiple near-equivalent reasoning branches exist.","importance":"This is an important contribution at the intersection of interpretability and reasoning evaluation because it changes what the object of explanation should be. The implication for mechanistic analysis and post-training is significant: if a sentence looks central in one CoT but has little effect across resampled trajectories, then our conclusions about intention, deception, or self-preservation may be overly tied to surface narration.","technical_approach":"The core method is on-policy resampling. For a fixed prompt, the model generates multiple reasoning trajectories, and these thought branches are used to estimate the causal effect of intermediate statements on the final action. This differs from activation patching or single-trajectory attribution by treating reasoning as a stochastic process and measuring whether a claimed reason has reproducible downstream influence. The paper applies this especially to agentic misalignment scenarios. The key design principle is simple: if a stated reason is genuinely causal, its downstream effect should be stable and resilient across resampled branches; if not, it is closer to post-hoc rationalization. The trade-off is sampling cost and some dependence on generation settings where resampling is meaningful.","experiments":"The abstract reports a strong result: in scenarios where models appear to blackmail or preserve themselves, normative self-preservation statements have unusually small and non-resilient causal impact on the final decision, suggesting they are rationalizations rather than true drivers. The abstract does not specify the models, number of scenarios, number of resamples, effect metrics, or cross-model consistency. So the breadth of the claim is still unclear. The most informative experiments would test whether the effect holds across model families, how temperature and branch diversity affect causal estimates, and how often resampling overturns conclusions from single-trajectory attribution.","authors_note":"Neel Nanda is a notable researcher in mechanistic memorization risk 的结论难以做系统因果分析。现有工作常依赖闭源模型做黑箱 probing，或者在训练数据污染上缺少严格控制，结果很难分清是模型规模、训练语料规模，还是敏感文本出现频次在主导风险。","importance":"它的重要性很高，属于数据与研究基础设施级，但对 pretrain 很直接。Hubble LLM。标准模型在大规模英文语料上预训练；扰动模型保持训练流程一致，只额外插入受控文本，例如书籍片段、人物传记和测试集内容，用来模拟典型记忆化风险。最关键的设计是只改一个变量：同样的模型、同样训练流程、不同敏感文本频次或语料相对占比，从而能观察 memorization risk 如何随 corpus size 和 insertion frequency 变化。和直接比较不同公开模型相比，这种 setup 的因果解释性强得多。","experiments":"摘要给出了比较扎实的数字：核心发布包含 8 个模型，覆盖 standard/perturbed 两种设置、1B 和 8B 两个参数规模、100B 和 500B token 两个训练规模。主要结论是记忆化风险由敏感数据相对训练语料的频率决定，而不是只看绝对出现次数；例如同一个 password 在更小语料中只出现一次，也会比在更大语料中出现一次更容易被记住。摘要没有给出具体提取成功率、membership inference 指标或不同类别敏感文本的差异，但仅这组受控实验已经足以支持一个很有价值的 scaling 判断。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a serious reproducibility gap in memorization research: there has been no fully open, controlled model suite for studying how and why LLMs memorize sensitive content. Prior work often relies on black-box probing of proprietary models or on loosely controlled data contamination settings, which makes it hard to isolate whether risk comes from model size, corpus size, or insertion frequency.","importance":"This is a high-value infrastructure contribution with direct relevance to pretraining. That is much more useful than one-off memorization case studies on arbitrary public models.","technical_approach":"The contribution is not a new training algorithm but an open model suite with matched standard and perturbed variants. Standard models are pretrained on a large English corpus, while perturbed models use the same training pipeline with controlled insertion of texts such as book passages, biographies, and benchmark test sets. The key design is causal isolation: keep model and training procedure fixed, vary the frequency or relative prevalence of sensitive content, and measure resulting memorization risk. Compared with comparing unrelated public checkpoints, this setup is far better for scientific attribution.","experiments":"The abstract provides unusually concrete details. The core release includes 8 models spanning standard and perturbed variants, with 1B and 8B parameters and 100B and 500B training tokens. The main empirical result is that memorization risk is governed by the frequency of sensitive content relative to total corpus size, not just by absolute count. For example, a password inserted once into a smaller corpus is memorized more strongly than the same password inserted once into a larger corpus. The abstract does not report exact extraction rates, membership-inference metrics, or differences across sensitive-content types, but the controlled scaling result alone is already a meaningful 与其他训练超参的复杂交互。第二，一旦进入学习率衰减阶段，验证损失和量化误差会分叉，且与训练数据规模关系不大。摘要没有说明考察的是几比特量化、哪些量化方法、不同层的误差分布，也没有给出干预后改善幅度，因此目前最有价值的是结论方向而非部署配方。对训练侧读者来说，这提示 late-stage optimization 可能在“继续降 is that robustness already shaped during pretraining. PTQ is usually treated as a deployment issue, explained through quantization formats, calibration sets, or weight outliers, while the role of training dynamics has remained underexplored.","importance":"This has direct pretraining relevance because it moves quantization robustness upstream into the training process. If the claim holds, then learning-rate schedules and other optimization choices affect not only final loss but also how well the model can survive low-bit representation. That would matter for cooldown design, late-phase optimization, and checkpoint selection in large-scale training.","technical_approach":"This is a large-scale training-trajectory analysis paired with targeted interventions. The authors study open-source LM trajectories up to 32B parameters and 15T tokens, comparing validation loss and quantization error across training stages. The key observation is that once the learning rate decays, validation loss and quantization error diverge, and that divergence is largely independent of data scale. In other words, lower loss does not automatically imply better quantization robustness. They then intervene on training dynamics to identify which phases and hyperparameters are responsible. Compared with standard end-of-training quantization sensitivity studies, this is much closer to a causal view.","experiments":"The abstract provides meaningful scale details: models up to 32B parameters and training runs up to 15T tokens. The abstract does not specify bit widths, quantization schemes, layerwise error patterns, or the gains from the proposed interventions, so it does not yet yield a concrete deployment recipe. CoDeC distinguishes between data memorized during training and data outside the training distribution by measuring how in-context learning affects model performance. We find that in‑context examples typically boost confidence for unseen datasets but may reduce it when the dataset was part of training, due to disrupted memorization patterns. Experiments show that CoDeC produces interpretable contamination scores that clearly separate seen and unseen datasets, and reveals strong evidence of memorization in open-weight models with undisclosed training corpora. The method is simple, automated, and both model- and dataset-agnostic, making it easy to integrate with benchmark evaluations. the Expressiveness of State Space Models via Temporal Logics","authors":["Eric Alsmann","Lowejatan Noori","Martin Lange"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"We investigate the expressive power of state space models (SSM), which have recently emerged as a potential alternative to transformer architectures in large language models. Building on recent work, we analyse SSM expressiveness through fragments and extensions of linear temporal logic over finite traces. Our results show that the expressive capabilities of SSM vary substantially depending on the underlying gating mechanism. We further distinguish between SSM operating over fixed-width arithmetic (quantised models), whose expressive power remains within regular languages, and SSM with unbounded precision, which can capture counting properties and non-regular languages. In addition, we provide a systematic comparison between these different SSM variants and known results on transformers, thereby clarifying how the two architectures relate in terms of expressive power. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009116"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009116","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"SSM 被视为 Transformer 替代，但“不同 gating/数值精度的 SSM 到底能表达什么语言性质”缺少可对齐的理论刻画，导致架构选择更多靠经验。","importance":"这是一个理论边界工作：它把 SSM 的表达力映射到时间逻辑片段，并明确指出量化/定点宽度会把表达力压回正则语言级别，这对做高效/量化 SSM-LM 的人是直接的设计约束。","technical_approach":"作者用有限轨迹上的线性时序逻辑（LTL over finite traces）的片段与扩展来分析 SSM 表达力，并比较不同 gating 机制带来的差异。关键结论是：固定宽度算术（可视作量化实现）下的 SSM 表达力停留在 regular languages；而无界精度的 SSM 可以表达计数等非正则性质。论文还把这些结果与已知 Transformer 表达力结果做系统对照，用来解释“同样是序列模型，为何数值实现细节会改变可表达集合”。","experiments":"摘要未提到实验；看起来主要是形式化结果与对比综述型贡献，而不是大规模训练评测。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"SSMs are proposed as transformer alternatives, but their expressiveness under different gating choices and numeric precision is poorly characterized, making architecture decisions overly empirical.","importance":"This is a theory-boundary contribution: it links SSM expressiveness to temporal-logic fragments and shows fixed-width (quantized) arithmetic can restrict SSMs to regular languages—an actionable constraint for efficient/quantized SSM-LMs.","technical_approach":"The paper analyzes SSM expressiveness via fragments/extensions of linear temporal logic over finite traces, teasing apart the role of gating mechanisms. Q. Chen","Guan-Horng Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$112","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009131"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009131","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"Adjoint Matching 在连续可微奖励下很有效，但离散生成（尤其是 CTMC 形式的 diffusion LM）不可微，导致熵正则奖励优化很难把 AM 的工程优势迁移过来。","importance":"这是一个方法级桥接工作：它把一类在连续域表现强的 reward optimization 算法迁移到离散扩散/离散生成，为“用可验证/可计算奖励微调 diffusion LM”提供了更通用的优化工具箱。","technical_approach":"DAM 的核心是把 AM 的“伴随匹配”思想离散化到连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）生成模型上，通过离散状态下可计算的匹配目标来替代对奖励的直接微分。关键设计点在于：在离散空间里要避免高方差梯度估计与不可微带来的优化不稳定，因此需要利用 CTMC 的结构（转移率/路径分布）构造等价的优化信号；这类方法通常在奖励可分解、或能在轨迹层面计算时更占优，边界在于奖励若极其稀疏或需要长程信用分配，方差与偏差仍可能主导。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体离散生成任务、模型规模、与哪些 RL/AM/score-based baseline 对比，以及提升数字；只能确认目标类模型包含 diffusion-based LM，且聚焦熵正则奖励优化的可计算性与效果。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Adjoint Matching works well for continuous, differentiable rewards, but discrete generative modeling—especially CTMC-based diffusion LMs—is non-differentiable, making entropy-regularized reward optimization hard to port.","importance":"This is a method-bridging contribution: it adapts a practically effective reward-optimization algorithm from continuous spaces to discrete diffusion/discrete generation, expanding the toolbox for reward-based finetuning of diffusion LMs with computable/verifiable objectives.","technical_approach":"DAM discretizes the Adjoint Matching idea for continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) generative models, replacing direct reward differentiation with a discrete, computable matching objective. The design goal is to avoid the instability/high variance typical of gradient estimators in discrete spaces by exploiting CTMC structure (rates and path distributions) to build an equivalent learning signal. Likely boundaries are sparse rewards and long-horizon credit assignment, where variance/bias can still dominate.","experiments":"The abstract does not specify tasks, model scales, baselines, or numeric improvements; it indicates applicability to diffusion-based LMs and focuses on making entropy-regularized reward optimization practical in discrete settings.","authors_note":""},"tags":["discrete-diffusion","adjoint-matching","reward-optimization","fine-tuning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009144","title":"Compositional Generalization from Learned Skills via CoT Training: A Theoretical and Structural Analysis for Reasoning","authors":["Xinhao Yao","Ruifeng Ren","Yun Liao","Lizhong Ding","Yong Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$113","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009144"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009144","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：CoT 训练为什么能提升推理泛化，尤其是对训练中没见过的复杂组合任务。过去很多工作证明 CoT 有效，但机制解释往往停留在经验现象或案例分析，没有把“泛化提升来自哪里”拆开到可分析的结构层面。","importance":"这项工作的贡献更偏机制分析和理论解释，而不是新训练配方。它的重要性在于把 CoT 的收益归因到 compositional generalization——模型先学到简单技能，再在 CoT 轨迹中组合这些技能处理更复杂任务。对 pretrain/post-train 接口的启示是：如果推理增强主要来自可组合技能的显式展开，那么训练目标设计、数据构造和 RL/SFT 的信用分配都应更关注中间结构，而不只是最终答案监督。","technical_approach":"作者的做法是理论分析加结构分析结合。理论上，他们把基于分布差异的泛化界分解成 ID 和 OOD 两部分，并据此说明：非 CoT 模型在 OOD 任务上失败，主要因为未见过的组合模式无法被隐式吸收；CoT 训练则通过显式中间步骤把复杂映射拆成已学技能的组合，降低了 OOD 组合带来的泛化负担。结构上，论文进一步分析模型内部如何形成这种技能组合机制，试图把“会做多步推理”对应到可识别的表示或计算结构。和纯经验对比论文相比，这里的增量在于把 CoT 的作用点从‘更长输出’收紧到‘显式可组合结构’。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是：作者展示了非 CoT 模型在 OOD 组合模式上泛化差，而 CoT 训练模型更强，并用结构分析支持这种差异。但摘要没有给出任务类型、模型规模、指标和提升数字，因此无法可靠写出定量结果。真正值得看的实验应当包括：控制答案长度后 CoT 是否仍带来优势；随着组合深度增加，非 CoT 与 CoT 的性能差距如何扩大；以及结构探针或因果干预是否能定位到‘技能组合’而不是仅仅‘生成更多 token’。如果这些控制做得严，这篇文章会比一般 CoT 经验论文更有解释力。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a focused question: why does Chain-of-Thought training improve reasoning generalization, especially on more complex compositions not seen during training. Prior work has shown the effect repeatedly, but the explanation has often remained descriptive rather than structural.","importance":"This is mainly a mechanistic and theoretical contribution rather than a new training recipe. Its main value is to argue that CoT helps because it enables compositional generalization: the model learns simpler skills and then combines them through explicit intermediate steps. For the pretrain-to-posttrain interface, the implication is practical: if reasoning gains come from exposing compositional structure, then objective design, data construction, and credit assignment should care more about intermediate trajectories than answer-only supervision.","technical_approach":"The paper combines theory with structural analysis. On the theory side, it decomposes information-theoretic generalization bounds under distribution shift into in-distribution and out-of-distribution components, then argues that non-CoT models fail mainly on unseen compositional patterns. CoT-trained models reduce this burden by factorizing a hard mapping into compositions of already learned skills. On the structural side, the authors analyze how this composition is reflected inside the model, aiming to connect better reasoning to identifiable internal structure rather than just longer outputs. The key move is narrowing the role of CoT from verbosity to explicit compositional execution.","experiments":"From the abstract, the supported empirical claim is that non-CoT models generalize poorly on OOD compositional tasks while CoT-trained models do substantially better, and that structural analysis is consistent with this account. The abstract does not provide task setups, model scales, metrics, or gains, so precise numbers cannot be summarized responsibly. The most important things to inspect in the full paper are whether the advantage survives length-controlled comparisons, how it scales with compositional depth, and whether probing or intervention studies isolate composition rather than token count as the causal factor. If those controls are strong, the paper will be more informative than the usual CoT effectiveness study.","authors_note":""},"tags":["cot","compositional-generalization","reasoning-theory","skill-composition"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009238","title":"Sample More to Think Less: Group Filtered Policy Optimization for Concise Reasoning","authors":["Vaishnavi Shrivastava","Ahmed H Awadallah","Vidhisha Balachandran","Shivam Garg","Harkirat Behl","Dimitris Papailiopoulos"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$114","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009238"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009238","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是：用可验证奖励做 RL 后，reasoning model 往往学会把回答写得越来越长，但长度增长里有大量不推进求解的 filler token。过去方法默认‘更长推理=更高正确率’，因此训练过程会奖励冗长轨迹，导致推理成本上升、可控性变差，也不利于部署。","importance":"这项工作对 post-train 推理优化很有价值，也间接影响 pretrain/posttrain 接口，因为它重新定义了奖励信号该偏向什么。贡献是方法级的，但很实用：不是让模型更会想，而是让模型在相同准确率下少说废话。对训练范式的启示是，长度不是中性的副产物，而是会被 RL 强烈放大的策略变量；如果不显式约束，模型会用 token 数换 reward 稳定性。","technical_approach":"作者提出 GFPO（Group Filtered Policy Optimization）。核心机制很直接：对每个问题采样更大的 response group，然后只用通过两类过滤的回答训练——一类是长度更短，另一类是 token efficiency 更高，也就是单位 token 的 reward 更高。它和 GRPO 的关键区别不在于更复杂的目标，而在于先扩大探索、再过滤 credit assignment；训练时多采样，推理时少输出。相比直接加 length penalty，这种设计更稳，因为它不是全局惩罚长度，而是在同题候选之间挑‘够好且更简洁’的轨迹，避免把真正需要长推理的难题一起压扁。","experiments":"摘要给出核心结果：在 Phi-4-reasoning 上，GFPO 相比 GRPO 在 AIME 24/25、GPQA、Omni-MATH、LiveCodeBench 等 STEM 和代码基准上，将长度膨胀最多降低 85%，同时保持准确率。作者还说在 brevity 目标上优于 Dr. GRPO。摘要没有给出绝对准确率、平均 token 数、采样组大小和训练开销，因此无法更细地量化性价比。最关键的 ablation 应该是 group size、length filter 与 token-efficiency filter 各自的贡献，以及在高难任务上是否会因过度追求简洁而伤害正确率；从方法设计看，这个 trade-off 是论文成败的核心。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a common failure mode of RL-trained reasoning models: verifiable-reward training often causes response length to explode, and many of the extra tokens are filler rather than useful reasoning. Earlier methods often tolerate this because longer chains can help on hard tasks, but in practice the policy learns to spend tokens to stabilize reward rather than to make proportionate progress.","importance":"This is a practical methodological contribution for post-training, with implications for the pretrain/posttrain interface because it changes what the reward signal should favor. The key insight is that response length is not a neutral byproduct; RL amplifies it as a strategic variable. If you do not explicitly shape for concision, the model will often trade tokens for reward robustness.","technical_approach":"GFPO, or Group Filtered Policy Optimization, samples larger groups of responses per problem and trains only on responses that pass filters based on length and token efficiency, defined as reward per token. The important design choice is to increase exploration first, then apply selective credit assignment. This differs from GRPO not by a more complicated objective, but by choosing better trajectories from within each problem. It is also more nuanced than a plain length penalty: instead of globally discouraging long outputs, it prefers concise responses when they are competitive, while still allowing long reasoning when the task genuinely needs it.","experiments":"The abstract reports a clear result: on Phi-4-reasoning, GFPO reduces GRPO’s length inflation by up to 85% across AIME 24/25, GPQA, Omni-MATH, and LiveCodeBench, while preserving accuracy. It also claims better brevity-oriented performance than Dr. GRPO. The abstract does not provide absolute accuracies, average token counts, group sizes, or training-time overhead, so the efficiency trade-off cannot be fully assessed from the provided text. The most informative ablations would be the separate contributions of larger group sampling, length filtering, and token-efficiency filtering, plus whether concision starts to hurt accuracy on the hardest problems.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlvr","reasoning","length-control","policy-optimization"],"notable_authors":["Ahmed H Awadallah"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009256","title":"DeMo: Decoupled Momentum Optimization","authors":["Bowen Peng","Lizhang Chen","Baiyu Su","Jeffrey Quesnelle","Diederik (Durk) Kingma","Qiang Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Scaling neural network training increasingly depends on synchronous data-parallelism, yet full-precision gradient all-reduce imposes a severe communication bottleneck. We propose Decoupled Momentum Optimization, a drop-in replacement for any momentum-based optimizers that significantly reduces the communication bandwidth while maintaining convergence. DeMo (i) decouples local momentum updates, (ii) applies a fast orthonormal transform (e.g., DCT) followed by top-$k$ sparsification, and (iii) reuses the momentum buffer for error feedback via momentum subtraction. This design reduces per-step communication by up to two orders of magnitude with minimal computational overhead.  Experiments on 300M- and 1B-parameter DeMo language models show DeMo transmits up to 85× less data per GPU than AdamW-DDP while achieving comparable loss and accuracy. DeMo is topology-agnostic and enables training across multi-datacenter or Ethernet-based setups. More broadly, in goal reaching sequential decision problems we often want to reach the goal quickly, and LRM reasoning can be viewed through this lens. We challenge the assumption that longer responses improve accuracy. By penalizing reasoning tokens using a discounted reinforcement learning setup (interpretable as a small token cost) and analyzing Blackwell optimality in restricted policy classes, we encourage concise yet accurate reasoning, analogous to preferring shorter successful trajectories in a stochastic shortest path problem. Experiments confirm our theoretical results that this approach shortens chains of thought while preserving accuracy.
