Binary Flexible Feedback to bridge between Human Feedback & Verifiable Rewards","authors":["Zhilin Wang","Jiaqi Zeng","Olivier Delalleau","Ellie Evans","Daniel Egert","Hoo-Chang Shin","Felipe Soares","Yi Dong","Oleksii Kuchaiev"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$121","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009717"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009717","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：RLHF 太依赖模糊的人类偏好，容易出现不可解释和 reward hacking；RLVR 又过于依赖 correctness 型 verifier，覆盖不了很多细腻质量维度。作者想找一个中间地带：既保留人类反馈的灵活性，又把奖励形式约束得足够明确，便于训练和审计。","importance":"这项工作属于 post-train 方法级，但对训练信号设计有更广泛启发。它的重要性在于重新组织反馈形式，而不是单纯换一个 RL 算法。若 Binary Flexible Feedback 真的有效，它说明高质量对齐信号未必需要昂贵的全排序偏好，也不一定非得有严格可验证答案；把复杂评价拆成一组可回答的二元原则，可能是一种更可扩展的人机协同监督接口。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 RLBFF：先抽取可二元回答的原则，例如信息是否准确、代码是否可运行、是否遵守格式，再基于这些 binary feedback 训练奖励模型并做 RL。它不是直接学‘哪个回答更好’，而是把偏好判断分解成一组更可解释、更局部的 yes/no 维度。这样做的优势有三点：第一，标注标准更清楚，减少人类反馈的隐式标准漂移；第二，更容易审计 reward model 学到了什么；第三，可以覆盖 correctness 之外的风格、完整性、遵循约束等维度。和 RLVR 相比，它放弃了完全客观的 verifier；和标准 RLHF 相比，它放弃了整体排序的高表达力，换来更结构化、可组合的信号。关键边界在于，复杂回答质量是否真的能由有限个二元原则近似得足够好。","experiments":"摘要没有给出模型、任务、反馈规模和提升数字。最关键的实验应比较 RLBFF、RLHF、RLVR 在多种任务上的综合表现，尤其是正确性之外的维度，如格式遵循、可执行性、事实性、帮助性等。值得重点看的问题有两个：第一，binary principle 的设计是否能迁移，不会每个任务都要重新发明一套规则；第二，reward hacking 是否真的减少，还是只是从‘钻偏好模型漏洞’变成‘钻原则定义漏洞’。如果论文有消融，最有价值的是原则数量、原则粒度、以及人工与程序化二元反馈混合比例对性能的影响。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a familiar trade-off in post-training. RLHF is flexible but often opaque and vulnerable to reward hacking because human preferences rarely come with explicit criteria. RLVR is cleaner and easier to audit, but it mostly works when correctness can be verified directly. The paper aims for a middle ground: feedback that remains expressive enough for nuanced quality judgments while being structured enough for reliable optimization.","importance":"This is a post-training method contribution with broader implications for training-signal design. The key idea is not a new RL optimizer but a new way to package supervision. If Binary Flexible Feedback works well, it suggests that high-quality alignment signals do not always require expensive pairwise preferences or fully verifiable answers. Decomposing evaluation into binary principles may be a more scalable interface between humans, rule-based checks, and reward modeling.","technical_approach":"RLBFF extracts principles that can be answered in binary form, such as whether information is accurate, whether code runs, or whether formatting constraints are satisfied, and then uses those signals to train reward models and perform RL. Instead of learning a monolithic notion of 'better response,' it decomposes quality into interpretable yes-or-no dimensions. This has three practical advantages: clearer annotation criteria, easier reward-model auditing, and broader coverage beyond pure correctness into style, completeness, and constraint following. Compared with RLVR, it gives up fully objective verification. Compared with standard RLHF, it gives up some of the expressiveness of holistic preference ranking in exchange for more structured and compositional supervision. The main open question is whether a finite set of binary principles can approximate complex response quality well enough.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model sizes, tasks, feedback scale, or quantitative gains. The most important experiments should compare RLBFF against RLHF and RLVR across tasks that require not only correctness but also formatting, executability, factuality, and general helpfulness. Two questions matter most. First, do the binary principles transfer across tasks, or does each setting require a bespoke rule set? Second, does reward hacking actually decrease, or does it simply shift toward exploiting loopholes in the principle definitions? The most useful ablations would vary the number and granularity of principles, as well as the mix between human-provided and automatically checked binary feedback.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlhf","rlvr","reward-design","alignment","feedback"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009728","title":"Process-Verified Reinforcement Learning for Theorem Proving via Lean","authors":["Minsu Kim","Se-Young Yun"],"institutions":["KAIST"],"abstract":"$122","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009728"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009728","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"形式化定理证明中的 RL 训练通常只用二值验证信号（证明成功/失败），浪费了证明助手（如 Lean）能提供的丰富结构化反馈。如何把 tactic 级别的细粒度验证信号融入 RL 训练？","importance":"对 RLVR（reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards）范式有方法级贡献。核心启示是：当环境本身能提供 dense、sound 的过程级反馈时，应该充分利用而非压缩成稀疏的 outcome reward。这个思路可以推广到代码执行、数学验证等其他可验证领域的 RL 训练。","technical_approach":"利用 Lean 证明助手作为 symbolic process oracle：将证明尝试解析为 tactic 序列，Lean 的 elaboration 机制标记每个 tactic 是否 locally sound 以及最早失败的步骤，从而产生 dense 的、基于类型论的 credit 信号。这些结构化 reward 被整合进 GRPO 风格的 RL 算法中。与纯 outcome reward 相比，关键区别在于每一步都有验证器 grounded 的反馈，而非只在 episode 结束时给信号。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体数字。需要看全文了解在哪些定理证明 benchmark 上验证、与纯 outcome reward RL 的对比提升幅度、以及 tactic-level reward 对训练效率（样本效率、收敛速度）的具体影响。","authors_note":"Se-Young Yun 是 KAIST 教授，在 RL 和优化方向有持续产出。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"RL for formal theorem proving typically uses only binary outcome rewards (proof success/failure), discarding the rich structured feedback that proof assistants like Lean can provide. The question is how to incorporate tactic-level verified signals into RL training.","importance":"Method-level contribution to RLVR. The key insight generalizes beyond theorem proving: when the environment can supply dense, sound process-level feedback, it should be used rather than collapsed into sparse outcome rewards. Applicable to code execution, math verification, and similar verifiable domains.","technical_approach":"Uses the Lean proof assistant as a symbolic process oracle. Finding Nash equilibrium policies in a game-theoretic framework is more principled, but existing self-play algorithms either diverge or converge only in modified games.","importance":"Method-level contribution advancing alignment theory under general preferences. Indirect pretrain relevance: if alignment targets shift from BT rewards to Nash equilibria, the representation and optimization landscape during pretraining may need rethinking. Currently mainly a theoretical/algorithmic advance.","technical_approach":"Models alignment as a two-player zero-sum game and proposes COMAL, a meta-algorithm that guarantees convergence to Nash equilibrium in the original game—unlike prior self-play methods (SPPO, Nash-MD) that only converge in modified games. These \"inherently serial\" problems—from mathematical reasoning to physical simulations to sequential decision-making—require sequentially dependent computational steps that cannot be efficiently parallelized. We formalize this distinction in complexity theory, and demonstrate that current parallel-centric architectures face fundamental limitations on such tasks. Then, we show for first time that diffusion models despite their sequential nature are incapable of solving inherently serial problems. We argue that recognizing the serial nature of computation holds profound implications on machine learning, model design, and hardware development. Caverlee","Dileep Kalathil","Shuiwang Ji"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$12d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010141"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010141","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心问题是：RLVR 提升推理时，在高难任务上奖励太稀疏，直接上强题往往学不动。过去像 DeepSeek-R1 这类工作证明了可验证奖励能拉起数学和代码推理，但也暴露出一个实际问题：如果训练样本长期集中在困难问题，模型拿不到稳定正反馈，策略优化容易低效甚至停滞。","importance":"这是 post-train 方法工作，但对 pretrain–posttrain 接口很有价值。它的重要性不在于提出一个全新 RL 算法，而在于把 curriculum learning 明确带入 RLVR，并给出经验与理论两侧的支持。对做 reasoning model 的人，这个结论很实用：easy data 不是只能做 cold start，它在 RL 阶段也能作为密集奖励代理，帮助模型先形成可迁移的推理策略；但如果不及时退场，又会导致模型停留在简单模式上。","technical_approach":"方法叫 E2H Reasoner，核心就是按 easy-to-hard 课程式地调度 RLVR 任务，而不是静态混合训练。关键机制有两点：第一，前期加入容易题，提供更密集、更稳定的可验证奖励，让策略先学会基本推理步骤；第二，随着训练推进逐步淡出 easy task，避免模型对低难模式过拟合，腾出优化容量去攻克真正困难的问题。摘要还提到作者给出了收敛性保证，这意味着他们不是把 curriculum 当经验 trick，而是把任务调度纳入了可分析的 RL 框架。和最接近的做法相比，它的区别不在 reward 形式，而在训练分布是随阶段变化的。边界在于：课程划分若不准，或者 easy/hard 的技能迁移弱，收益可能有限。","experiments":"摘要没有给出模型参数、数据规模、具体 benchmark 和数值提升，因此无法写精确结果。可以确认的实验结论有两个：一是 easy tasks 在训练初期确实重要；二是如果不做适当 fading out，会出现过拟合，影响最终对 hard tasks 的表现。按这类论文常规设置，关键比较对象会包括纯 hard-task RLVR、静态 easy+hard 混合、以及可能的 SFT warm-up；最有价值的 ablation 会是不同课程调度曲线、easy task 占比、以及是否存在跨任务迁移门槛。没有数字的情况下，合理结论是：作者证明了课程调度对 sparse-reward reasoning RL 有帮助，但效果量级和适用范围还需看正文。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical limitation of RL with verifiable rewards for reasoning: hard tasks often produce sparse rewards, so training directly on them can be inefficient or stall. Recent RLVR systems show that reasoning can be improved this way, but they also expose the optimization problem created by reward sparsity on difficult math and coding tasks.","importance":"This is a post-training method paper, but it matters for the pretrain-to-posttrain pipeline because it clarifies how task difficulty should be staged during reasoning optimization. The contribution is not a new RL objective; it is the explicit introduction of curriculum scheduling into RLVR, supported by both empirical evidence and theory. The practical takeaway is that easy tasks can serve as dense-reward scaffolding early in training, but they must be phased out to avoid locking the model into shallow solution modes.","technical_approach":"The method, E2H Reasoner, schedules RLVR tasks from easy to hard instead of training on a static mix. The logic is simple and sound: easy tasks early on provide more frequent positive feedback and help the policy learn reusable reasoning behaviors, while gradually reducing them later prevents overfitting and shifts capacity toward the real target distribution of hard problems. The abstract also mentions convergence guarantees, which suggests the curriculum is framed as part of the optimization process rather than an ad hoc heuristic. Compared with standard RLVR baselines, the key difference is dynamic task distribution, not a different reward signal. The boundary condition is also clear: if easy tasks do not transfer meaningfully to harder ones, curriculum gains may be limited.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model size, benchmark names, or quantitative improvements, so the evidence can only be summarized directionally. Two empirical claims are explicit: easy tasks matter early, and fading them out is necessary to avoid overfitting and preserve gains on hard tasks. The critical baselines should include hard-only RLVR, static easy-hard mixtures, and possibly SFT-based warm starts. The most useful ablations would test curriculum schedules, easy-task fractions, and the transfer relationship between task tiers. Without numbers, the safe conclusion is that curriculum scheduling helps sparse-reward reasoning RL, but its effect size and scope cannot be pinned down from the abstract alone.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlvr","reasoning","curriculum","reward","math"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010166","title":"Rote Learning Considered Useful: Generalizing over Memorized Data in LLMs","authors":["Qinyuan Wu","Soumi Das","Mahsa Amani","Bishwamittra Ghosh","Mohammad Aflah Khan","Krishna Gummadi","Muhammad Bilal Zafar"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$12e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010166"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010166","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是一个常见但经常被过度简单化的问题：rote learning 到底只会伤害泛化，还是在合适训练流程下反而可以成为泛化的前置阶段。很多人默认“记忆”和“泛化”是对立的，但对事实知识这类任务，模型首先得把关联记住，问题更像是记住之后能否把这些记忆迁移到有语义的提示空间里。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于挑战了对 memorization 的单向负面叙事，而且是用可控实验做的。对 pretrain 研究，这很重要，因为大模型训练里记忆从来不是可选项，真正关键的是记忆如何被组织和释放。论文给出的“memorize-then-generalize”框架提示我们：某些知识也许可以先通过高容量、低语义干扰的形式写入，再通过少量语义对齐样本把它们接到自然语言接口上。这会影响知识注入、continual pretrain、甚至 tokenizer/键值表示设计。","technical_approach":"核心方法是两阶段训练，而不是简单比较‘多记忆’和‘少记忆’。第一阶段，模型用合成的、语义上无意义的 key token 去 rote memorize factual subject-object association，也就是先把事实以近似任意索引的形式存进模型；第二阶段，再用少量带语义的 prompt 微调，让模型把这些已记忆关联重新映射到自然语言查询上。这个设计为什么有信息量：它最大限度切断了预先语义相似性和表面词形带来的捷径，因此如果模型后续还能泛化，就说明它确实能在记忆表征之上学会一个新的查询接口。和一般知识微调不同，它关注的不是记了多少，而是记忆能否被再参数化为可泛化访问方式。边界在于：这类结果最容易在事实型、关系型知识上成立，未必直接推广到复杂组合推理。","experiments":"摘要给出了两个明确的规模信息：实验覆盖 8 个 LLM，并采用两阶段 memorize-then-generalize 方案。核心结果是，模型能够把最初通过无意义 key 记住的事实，重新索引到有语义的 prompt 上，说明 rote memorized data 并不必然阻碍泛化。最值得关注的实验应包括：第二阶段只用很少语义样本时的迁移曲线、不同模型规模对这种重索引能力的影响，以及如果第一阶段不用无意义 key 而直接用自然语言，结果是否会被语义捷径高估。摘要没有给出具体参数量、数据量和准确率数字，因此不能判断效应有多强，但方向性结论已经足够明确：记忆和泛化不是简单零和关系。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper revisits a widely simplified assumption: does rote learning necessarily hurt generalization, or can it serve as a useful precursor to generalization when training is staged properly. For factual knowledge in particular, models first need to store associations somewhere; the more interesting question is whether those stored associations can later be accessed through meaningful prompts.","importance":"This matters because it challenges the standard negative framing of memorization using controlled experiments rather than rhetoric. For pretraining, the implication is important: memorization is not optional in large models, so the real issue is how memorized content is organized and later exposed through language. The proposed memorize-then-generalize view suggests that some knowledge may be easier to write into the model in a high-capacity, semantically minimal form first, then connect to natural-language access patterns afterward.","technical_approach":"The method is a two-phase training framework. In phase one, the model rote-memorizes factual subject-object associations using synthetic semantically meaningless key tokens, effectively storing knowledge behind arbitrary indices. In phase two, the model is fine-tuned on a small set of semantically meaningful prompts so that it learns to query those memorized associations through natural language. This is a useful design because it removes many semantic and lexical shortcuts from the memorization stage. If the model later generalizes through meaningful prompts, that indicates it can build a new access interface on top of stored knowledge rather than merely exploiting superficial similarities. The approach is best suited to factual and relational knowledge, and it may not transfer as directly to harder compositional reasoning settings.","experiments":"The abstract explicitly states experiments over 8 LLMs. The main empirical claim is that models can recover and generalize over facts first memorized through meaningless keys once given a small amount of meaningful prompt supervision. The most informative analyses should include how little phase-two semantic data is needed, how this ability scales with model size, and whether direct natural-language memorization would overestimate generalization by leaking semantic shortcuts. The abstract provides no parameter counts, dataset sizes, or exact accuracies, so the strength of the effect cannot be quantified here. Still, the directional conclusion is clear: memorization and generalization are not simply opposites.","authors_note":""},"tags":["memorization","generalization","data-quality","scaling","knowledge"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010189","title":"Unveiling Super Experts in Mixture-of-Experts Large pretrain/posttrain 都有启发：如果教师模型的隐性偏置可以通过极少的局部统计痕迹传递给学生，那么数据合成、模型蒸馏、self-play teacher 体系里的隐藏偏差会比想象中更难隔离。它不是提出新训练法，但对训练信号质量的警示很具体。","technical_approach":"作者通过可控实验和机制分析，去检验 subliminal learning 是否依赖全局 分数。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper explains when and how subliminal learning happens in distillation, especially the surprising case where hidden teacher biases transfer even under hard distillation. The usual intuition is that soft targets leak rich information, but that cannot explain why sampled-token supervision alone still carries the bias.","importance":"This is an important mechanistic study of a subtle but practically relevant training pathology. For both pretraining and post-training pipelines, the warning is concrete: hidden teacher preferences may propagate through much thinner channels than expected, which makes bias isolation in distillation, synthetic data generation, and self-improving teacher-student setups harder than it looks. The paper does not introduce a new training method, but it sharpens our understanding of training-signal contamination.","technical_approach":"The authors use controlled experiments and mechanistic analysis to test common hypotheses about subliminal learning. Their main conclusion is that the effect does not require global token entanglement or explicit logit leakage. Instead, it arises from a much smaller and more local transferable signal. That is a strong claim because it rules out more obvious explanations and suggests that even apparently content-free data, such as lists of numbers, can still transmit hidden teacher preferences if local generation patterns remain systematically biased. The exact nature of that local signal is not fully visible in the truncated abstract, so that part should be treated as unresolved here.","experiments":"The abstract gives a representative example: a teacher that 'likes owls' can make the student 'like owls' too, even when the distillation data consists only of number lists. 在不显式写出计划时，是否真的形成了会约束后续生成的内部计划表征。过去大家更多通过最终输出是否像“有计划”来间接判断，或者把 planning 等同于 CoT，但这会把显式推理和隐式内部状态混在一起；作者因此把 latent planning 明确定义为一种内部表征：它既能因果性地指向未来某个词或概念，又会反过来塑造前文，使那个未来目标在语境里变得可生成。","importance":"结论上，这是一篇偏机制分析和能力刻画的工作，不是新训练方法，但对理解规模化预训练后会自发出现什么内部计算很有价值。它的重要性在于把“模型会不会提前想后面”从行为猜测推进到表征层和因果层分析，尤其对 pretrain 研究有两个启示：第一，部分 planning 可能是纯 next-token 训练随 scale 自发长出来的，而不是必须靠显式规划模块；第二，中等规模模型可能已经有“萌芽中的 planning 电路”，只是稳定性和利用效率不足，这会影响我们如何解释 scaling、如何设计 probing 和 post-training。","technical_approach":"核心方法是给 latent planning 一个可操作的机制定义，然后在 Qwen-3 不同尺度模型上做表征与因果干预分析。作者不是只看输出对不对，而是去找内部是否存在代表未来目标词的特征，比如代表 accountant 这类 planned-for word 的特征，并检验这些特征是否在生成前文时就已经出现、是否会推动模型选择 an 而不是 a 这类受未来词首音影响的前置 token。这个设计有效的原因是，它把“提前知道未来词”变成了可局部验证的语法-语义约束，而不是宽泛的高层计划概念；和仅做 probing 的工作相比，作者强调因果性，即这些内部特征不仅相关，而且会驱动前文生成。","experiments":"已知的关键实验结论是：在 Qwen-3 0.6B 到 14B 范围内，latent planning 能力随模型规模上升而增强；14B 级别模型能更清楚地表现出稳定 planning 特征，而 4B 到 8B 虽然行为上不总成功，但内部已出现初步 planning 机制。摘要给出的代表性现象是，具备 planning 的模型会先激活类似 accountant 的未来词表征，并因此在此前输出 an 而不是 a。由于提供的摘要被截断，暂无更完整的任务设置、指标、具体数值和 ablation 细节，因此无法确认它在更复杂任务上的提升幅度或机制是否跨任务稳定。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a precise question: do LLMs form internal plans that constrain earlier generation even when they never verbalize a plan? Prior work mostly inferred planning from outputs, or conflated planning with chain-of-thought. This paper instead defines latent planning operationally: an internal representation must causally point to a future token or concept, and must also shape preceding context so that the future token becomes licensed.","importance":"This is primarily a mechanistic characterization paper rather than a new training recipe, but it matters for pretraining because it sharpens what may emerge from scale alone. The main takeaway is that some planning-like computation may arise directly from next-token training, without explicit planning modules. A second useful implication is that mid-sized models may already contain nascent planning circuits, which means scaling effects are not purely about acquiring a new behavior from scratch but also about stabilizing and exploiting weak internal structure.","technical_approach":"The method is to turn latent planning into something measurable and causal, then study it across Qwen-3 models of different sizes. Instead of checking only whether an output looks planned, the authors search for internal features corresponding to a future target word, such as accountant, and test whether those features appear before the target is generated and whether they influence earlier choices like producing an instead of a. This setup is effective because it reduces planning to a local, testable dependency between future lexical content and earlier syntax, rather than relying on vague high-level notions. Relative to pure probing work, the emphasis here is causality rather than correlation.","experiments":"The key reported result is that latent planning strengthens with scale across Qwen-3 models from 0.6B to 14B. Larger models show clearer and more reliable planning features, while 4B to 8B models already exhibit early-stage planning mechanisms even when behavior is still inconsistent. The representative example in the abstract is that models with planning activate a feature for a future word like accountant and therefore choose an rather than a earlier in the sequence. The abstract provided here is truncated, so task details, metrics, exact gains, and richer ablations cannot be stated reliably.","authors_note":""},"tags":["latent-reasoning","planning","scaling","interpretability","emergence"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010446","title":"Cautious Weight Decay","authors":["Lizhang Chen","Jonathan Li","Kaizhao Liang","Baiyu Su","Cong Xie","Chen Liang","Ni Lao","Qiang Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"We introduce Cautious Weight Decay (CWD), a one-line, optimizer-agnostic modification that applies weight decay only to parameter coordinates whose signs align with the optimizer update. Unlike standard decoupled decay, which implicitly optimizes a regularized or constrained objective, CWD preserves the original loss and admits a bilevel interpretation: it induces sliding-mode behavior upon reaching the stationary manifold, allowing it to search for locally Pareto-optimal stationary points of the unmodified objective. In practice, CWD is a drop-in change for optimizers such as AdamW, Lion, and Muon, requiring no new hyperparameters or additional tuning. For language model pre-training and ImageNet classification, CWD consistently improves final loss and accuracy at million- to billion-parameter scales. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010446"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010446","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是一个很具体但很基础的优化问题：标准 weight decay 在自适应优化器里并不总是朝着“更好优化原始损失”的方向工作。过去大家默认 decoupled weight decay 是安全且普适的正则化，但它实际上对应一个被修改过的目标，可能在某些坐标上和优化更新相互打架，尤其在大模型训练后期会带来无谓的收缩。","importance":"结论上，这是一个方法级但潜在影响面很大的训练改进，因为它几乎是零成本替换。对 pretrain 的价值不在于提出新架构，而在于指出：我们习以为常的优化器细节可能持续把模型往错误方向推一点点，而一个一行改动就能在百万到十亿参数规模上稳定改善 loss 和精度。如果结果足够稳，这类改动值得进入大规模预训练默认配方，因为它不引入新超参，也不改变并行或系统栈。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Cautious Weight Decay：只在参数坐标的符号与优化器更新方向一致时施加 weight decay。直观上，如果当前 decay 会和主更新方向相冲突，就先不衰减该坐标，避免无意义地对着干。作者强调它与标准 decoupled decay 的根本区别在于：CWD 试图保持原始目标不变，而不是隐式优化一个附加了 L2 正则或约束的替代目标；理论上给出 bilevel/sliding-mode 解释，认为它在到达驻点流形后会沿流形滑动，从而搜索原始目标上局部 Pareto 更优的驻点。方法上它是 optimizer-agnostic，可直接加到 AdamW、Lion、Muon 等优化器里。","experiments":"摘要明确给出的结果是：CWD 在语言模型预训练和 ImageNet 分类上都能稳定提升最终 loss 和准确率，覆盖百万到十亿参数规模，并且适用于 AdamW、Lion、Muon 等多种优化器。它是 drop-in 替换，不需要新增超参数或额外调参，这是它最有现实意义的部分。摘要没有给出具体模型名、参数量分档、训练 token 数、指标提升的绝对数值，因此无法写出精确 gain；但从作者强调的范围看，贡献重点是跨任务跨优化器的一致性，而不是某个单点 SOTA。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a specific but important optimization issue: standard weight decay in modern optimizers does not always help optimize the original loss. Decoupled weight decay is often treated as a safe default, but it effectively optimizes a modified objective and can oppose the main update on some coordinates, especially late in training when such mismatches matter more.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with potentially broad practical impact because it is nearly free to adopt. The value for pretraining is not a new architecture but a reminder that small optimizer details can systematically push training in the wrong direction, and that a one-line change can improve final loss and accuracy from million- to billion-parameter scale. If the gains are robust, this is the kind of tweak that can plausibly enter default large-scale training recipes.","technical_approach":"The proposal is Cautious Weight Decay, which applies weight decay only on parameter coordinates whose signs align with the optimizer update. Intuitively, if decay would fight against the main update on a coordinate, CWD skips decay there. The key distinction from standard decoupled decay is conceptual: CWD aims to preserve the original objective rather than implicitly optimize an L2-regularized surrogate. The paper also gives a bilevel and sliding-mode interpretation, arguing that after reaching a stationary manifold, the dynamics can slide along it toward locally Pareto-better stationary points of the unmodified loss. It is optimizer-agnostic and can be plugged into AdamW, Lion, and Muon.","experiments":"The abstract states that CWD consistently improves final loss and accuracy on both language model pretraining and ImageNet classification, across scales from millions to billions of parameters and across multiple optimizers including AdamW, Lion, and Muon. The practical appeal is strong because it requires no new hyperparameters and no extra tuning. The abstract does not provide exact model names, data budgets, or numerical gains, so the precise effect size cannot be reported here. The main empirical message is consistency across settings rather than a single headline 模型的读入方式做公平比较。它的重要性偏方法级和系统级，尤其对线性复杂度长上下文路线是一个关键观点——性能差距未必只能靠更大的状态或更复杂的 recurrence 来补。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Smooth Reading，一种 recurrent architecture 与 inference method 的协同设计。它采用端到端多轮推理，把长上下文分阶段、增量式地处理，并在多个回合中不断总结信息，从而降低固定容量记忆的瞬时负担。和标准一次性读完整上下文再回答不同，Smooth Reading 让 recurrent 模型以更符合自身状态更新机制的方式逐步消化输入。作者还强调发现了 architecture-inference 的适配原则，说明同样的 recurrent backbone 在合适的 reading procedure 下能释放更多潜力。设计上牺牲的是更复杂的推理流程，换取更好的长上下文保真度。","experiments":"摘要明确给出的实验结论是：Smooth Reading 显著缩小了 recurrent LLM 与 self-attention LLM 在长上下文理解上的差距。方法的关键不是单改模型结构，而是配合多轮增量阅读与总结。由于摘要没有给出具体 backbone、参数量、上下文长度、benchmark 名称、主 baseline 和提升数字，无法量化 gap 缩小了多少；但可以确认作者的实证重点是同一 recurrent 架构在不同 inference protocol 下差异明显，这支持了其“推理方式失配”这一核心论点。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles the persistent weakness of recurrent LLMs on long-context understanding compared with self-attention models. Prior work mainly tried to enlarge memory capacity through architectural changes, yet recurrent models still lagged behind. The authors argue that the issue is not only memory size, but also that feeding the entire context at once is a poor inference protocol for recurrent models.","importance":"The main contribution is to reframe the recurrent-model gap as a co-design problem between architecture and inference, rather than a pure architecture deficit. This matters for both pretraining and inference because different inductive biases may require different reading procedures. For linear-complexity long-context modeling, that is an important message: the gap to Transformers may not have to be closed solely by bigger recurrent state or more elaborate recurrence.","technical_approach":"The method, Smooth Reading, jointly designs a recurrent architecture and a multi-round inference procedure. Instead of processing the full context in one shot, it reads the context incrementally and iteratively summarizes information over multiple rounds, reducing the burden on fixed-size memory at any single step. This is different from the standard protocol inherited from self-attention LLMs. The intuition is straightforward: a recurrent model should consume context in a way aligned with how its state updates. The trade-off is a more involved inference process in exchange for better long-context retention.","experiments":"The abstract clearly claims that Smooth Reading narrows the gap between recurrent LLMs and self-attention LLMs on long-context understanding. Explicit hacking may reveal itself in chain-of-thought, but implicit hacking can look benign and bypass CoT monitors. The authors’ key observation is simple and useful: if a model exploits a loophole rather than solving the intended task, it often reaches high reward with less reasoning effort than the task should require.","importance":"This is a practically important evaluation contribution for reasoning models and RL-based training. Its relevance to the pretrain-to-posttrain loop is that, as we increasingly depend on outcome rewards and automated evaluators, reward hacking becomes a systemic risk, and neither final reward nor surface-level CoT inspection is sufficient. TRACE offers a more operational lens: measure how much reasoning was actually needed, not just what the model said.","technical_approach":"The method is TRACE, Truncated Reasoning AUC Evaluation. It progressively truncates a model’s chain-of-thought at different lengths, forces the model to continue from those truncated traces, and measures how early the reasoning becomes sufficient to obtain reward. If a model still receives high reward from very short traces that should be insufficient for genuine problem solving, that is evidence of loophole exploitation. Compared with explicit CoT monitoring or analyses of full reasoning text, TRACE focuses on the effort-reward curve, which is better suited to catching implicit hacking because the intent may never be verbalized even when the effort pattern is suspicious.","experiments":"The abstract supports the main claim that TRACE can detect implicit reward hacking in reasoning models by exposing cases of high reward at abnormally low reasoning effort. The likely comparison points are standard CoT monitors and methods that look only at final reward. The abstract provides no model names, tasks, hacking setups, AUC values, detection rates, or false positive rates, so the effect size cannot be summarized quantitatively here. The core empirical observation is that genuine task solving usually requires a certain reasoning depth, whereas reward hacking makes reward unusually insensitive to truncation.","authors_note":"The author list includes He He. for Multi-Turn Tool-Integrated Reasoning","authors":["Zhenghai Xue","Longtao Zheng","Qian Liu","Yingru Li","Xiaosen Zheng","Zejun MA","Bo An"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$13f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010643"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010643","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：把 RL 用在多轮工具调用推理时，经常越训越不稳，甚至比单轮工具推理更差。作者的判断是，问题不只是 credit assignment 更难，而是 rollout 里工具输出会带来分布漂移和连锁错误，进而产生大量有害负样本，污染策略更新。","importance":"这项工作属于 post-train 方法级贡献，但对 pretrain↔posttrain 接口也有启发。原因是 tool-use RL 现在正在成为推理增强的重要路线，而训练稳定性常常比奖励设计本身更限制落地。论文如果证明“过滤特定坏轨迹比改 RL 算法更有效”，它传递出的信号是：多轮外部交互下，数据质量控制可能比目标函数创新更关键，这和预训练里重视 token 质量的经验是一致的。","technical_approach":"核心方法 SimpleTIR 很简单：在多轮 TIR 的 RL 训练中，识别并过滤掉包含 'void turns' 的轨迹，即某一轮既没有生成代码块，也没有给出最终答案的无效回合，并且不让这些轨迹参与 policy update。作者没有去重新设计复杂的层级 RL 或长程 credit 分配机制，而是直接切断最明显的坏梯度来源，同时保留其余有效多轮交互用于学习。和常见做法相比，这里的关键区别是把训练不稳归因到样本污染而不是优化器本身。这个设计有效的原因很直接：void turn 往往是模型在工具反馈驱动下进入错误状态后的表征，这类样本给出的 advantage 信号通常噪声很大甚至方向错误。边界也明显：如果失败轨迹中含有对恢复策略很有价值的 hard negative，完全过滤可能丢失学习信号，因此适用性取决于 void turn 是否确实高度对应无信息或误导性状态。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型规模、工具环境、任务集合和提升数字，但明确声称该方法能稳定多轮 TIR 训练并改善性能。最值得关注的实验点应包括：与不做过滤的标准 RL baseline 相比，训练曲线是否显著更平稳；在多轮工具使用任务上最终成功率或 pass@k 提升多少；以及单轮任务上该方法是否仍有收益，还是只对多轮分布漂移有效。若正文包含对“void turn”比例随训练变化的统计，以及保留与过滤策略的 ablation，这会直接决定其说服力。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical bottleneck in tool-augmented reasoning: RL training becomes unstable in multi-turn tool-integrated reasoning, often performing worse than simpler setups. The authors argue the issue is not just harder credit assignment. External tool outputs introduce distribution shift and compounding errors, which generate harmful negative trajectories during rollout.","importance":"This is a post-training methods paper, but it is relevant to the pretrain–posttrain interface because tool-use RL is becoming a major route for reasoning enhancement. If the main fix is better trajectory filtering rather than a more elaborate RL objective, the broader lesson is that data quality control in interactive rollouts can matter more than algorithmic complexity. That mirrors what we already know from pretraining.","technical_approach":"SimpleTIR makes one targeted intervention: during RL for multi-turn TIR, it filters out trajectories containing 'void turns'—turns that produce neither a code block nor a final answer—and excludes those trajectories from policy updates. Instead of redesigning the RL algorithm, the method blocks an obvious source of bad gradients while keeping useful multi-turn interactions for learning. The rationale is straightforward: void turns often indicate the model has fallen into an unproductive state after tool feedback, so the resulting advantage estimates are likely noisy or misleading. The limitation is equally clear: if some failed trajectories contain useful recovery signals, hard filtering may discard learnable negatives.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model sizes, environments, benchmarks, or exact gains, but it claims the method stabilizes training and improves multi-turn TIR performance. The most important evidence to look for is whether training curves become materially smoother than standard RL baselines, how much final task success improves, and whether gains are specific to multi-turn settings rather than generic across all tool-use tasks. Statistics on the frequency of void turns and ablations on different filtering policies would be especially informative.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rl","tool-use","reasoning","training-stability"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010649","title":"Detecting Data Contamination from Reinforcement Learning Post-training SFT 阶段已有一些方法，但在越来越关键的 RL 后训练阶段几乎是空白。这个缺口很实际，因为 reasoning 能力现在大量靠 RL 拉升，如果 benchmark 样本以某种形式进入 RL 过程，评测就会被系统性高估，而且现有 pretrain/SFT 检测思路不一定适用于 RL 产生的特殊分布。","importance":"这项工作属于评测与训练闭环接口上的方法级贡献。它的重要性不在于提高模型分数，而在于保护我们对 RL 提升幅度的判断不被污染。对 pretrain 研究者也相关，因为越来越多能力增益来自 post-train，而一旦 RL contamination 无法检测，模型到底是学会推理了，还是见过题了，就很难分清。换句话说，这篇工作是在补一块评测基础设施。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Self-Critique，目标是做 RL post-training 场景下的污染检测。摘要没有给出完整细节，但从命名和动机看，方法应利用模型对自身生成或轨迹的自我审视信号来识别是否存在见过 benchmark 的痕迹，而不是简单套用预训练阶段的 perplexity 或 nearest-neighbor 检测。这样设计合理，因为 RL 后训练中的污染往往不是原样复现训练样本，而是通过 reward shaping、rollout 选择和 repeated exposure 改写成行为偏好，因此需要更贴近行为层面的检测。边界在于：self-critique 类信号本身可能受模型能力与对齐风格影响，如果没有严谨校准，容易把真正会做题误判为污染，或把高相似但非直接泄漏的样本漏掉。","experiments":"摘要只明确说这是第一个系统研究 RL post-training contamination detection 的工作，并提出 Self-Critique，但没有提供模型规模、RL 算法、污染注入方式、检测精确率/召回率等数字。因此目前最值得关注的是实验设计：他们是否构造了可控的 RL 污染场景，是否与 pretrain/SFT contamination detector 做了对比，以及在 reasoning benchmark 上的检测 ROC/AUC、precision@k 或 false positive 控制如何。若正文能显示现有方法在 RL 阶段明显失效，而 Self-Critique 在受控污染强度下保持稳定，这篇文章就有很强的实用价值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a missing piece in contamination analysis: detection for RL post-training. We have methods for pretraining and SFT contamination, but RL is now a major source of reasoning gains, and contamination in this phase can silently invalidate evaluation claims. Existing detectors are not obviously suitable because RL changes behavior through reward-driven exposure rather than standard supervised fitting alone.","importance":"This is an evaluation and training-interface contribution. Its value is not in improving model capability directly, but in protecting our ability to measure what RL is actually buying us. That matters to pretraining researchers too, because more capability is now coming from post-training. If RL contamination cannot be detected, we cannot cleanly separate genuine reasoning improvement from benchmark leakage.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, Self-Critique, is designed specifically for contamination detection in RL post-training. The abstract does not provide full details, but the framing suggests the method uses model-internal self-evaluation signals rather than simply reusing pretraining-era heuristics like perplexity or nearest-neighbor similarity. That makes sense because RL contamination often manifests as behavioral familiarity shaped by reward and repeated rollout exposure, not just verbatim memorization. The main risk is calibration: self-critique signals may depend on capability and alignment style, so the detector could confuse genuine competence with contamination or miss near-leakage cases.","experiments":"The abstract identifies this as the first systematic study of contamination detection for RL post-training, but it gives no model sizes, RL setup, contamination protocol, or detection metrics. The most important things to inspect in the full paper are whether the authors build controlled contamination scenarios, whether they compare against existing pretrain/SFT detectors, and how Self-Critique performs in terms of AUC, precision-recall, and false-positive control on reasoning benchmarks. Strong evidence would be a clear failure mode for prior detectors and stable detection under varying contamination strength.","authors_note":""},"tags":["data-contamination","rl","evaluation","post-training"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010666","title":"From Curiosity to Caution: Mitigating Reward Hacking for Best-of-$N$ with Pessimism","authors":["Zhuohao Yu","Steven Wu","Adam Block"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$141","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010666"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010666","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：Best-of-N 是当前最常见的 inference-time compute scaling 方法之一，但随着 N 增大，reward model 的漏洞会被系统性放大，模型越来越容易选中“讨好 reward 而不是真的更好”的答案，也就是 reward hacking。过去的缓解办法要么靠更强 RM，要么靠很重的分布约束，通常要么不够稳，要么代价太大。","importance":"这项工作属于后训练与推理时优化交叉处的方法级贡献。它的重要性在于，BoN 几乎是最容易部署的 test-time scaling 方案，如果 reward hacking 不能控制，额外采样计算不仅白花，还会把输出质量拉低。对 pretrain/post-train 闭环的启发是：更好的生成模型不等于更好的选择机制，推理时选择器本身需要风险意识。","technical_approach":"作者提出用悲观主义（pessimism）来缓解 BoN 的 reward hacking。直观上，它不是盲信 reward model 给出的高分，而是在选择时对高不确定性或可能被 exploit 的高分候选做保守修正，从而降低极值选择带来的过优化。和“训练更强 RM”相比，这更像是在推理时修补选择偏差；和重型分布正则相比，它的目标是保留 BoN 的简单性与收益。这样的设计有效，是因为 BoN 的核心问题本来就是 order statistics：N 越大，越容易抽到 reward model 的伪高分离群点。悲观修正就是在打压这些可疑极值。边界在于，如果 reward model 本身整体排序很差，单靠 pessimism 只能缓解极端错选，不能凭空恢复正确偏好。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体任务、模型、RM、N 的范围和提升数字，但清楚点出了评价焦点：随着 N 增大，标准 BoN 会因为 reward hacking 出现性能回落，而该方法意在推迟或减轻这种回落。最值得看的实验是性能-样本数曲线：标准 BoN 在多大 N 开始掉头，悲观方法能把最佳点往后推多少；以及相较更强 RM 或分布正则 baseline，是否在相近计算预算下更稳。若正文还能分析不同任务上 reward uncertainty 与真实质量的相关性，这会帮助判断 pessimism 是否抓住了根因。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a known weakness of Best-of-N sampling: as N grows, the reward model's errors get amplified, and selection increasingly favors responses that exploit the reward model rather than genuinely improve quality. Prior fixes typically rely on stronger reward models or heavy distributional regularization, which are either insufficient or too costly.","importance":"This is a methods contribution at the intersection of post-training and inference-time scaling. It matters because BoN is one of the easiest ways to spend extra inference compute, but if reward hacking is not controlled, more sampling can actually hurt output quality. The broader lesson is that better generators alone are not enough; the selector also needs to be robust to reward misspecification.","technical_approach":"The method introduces pessimism into BoN selection. Instead of trusting the reward model's top scores at face value, it applies a conservative correction that discounts candidates likely to be high-scoring outliers due to reward-model imperfections. Relative to training a better reward model, this is a selection-side fix. Relative to strong distributional regularization, it aims to retain BoN's simplicity. The design is sensible because the failure mode is driven by extreme-value selection: larger N makes it more likely to sample reward-hacking outliers. Pessimism directly targets those suspicious extremes. The obvious limit is that if the reward model is poorly calibrated everywhere, conservative selection can only reduce damage, not recover the true ordering.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model names, tasks, reward models, N ranges, or exact gains, but it makes the key empirical objective clear: standard BoN degrades as N increases, and the proposed method is meant to delay or reduce that degradation. The most important plots will be performance versus N, showing where vanilla BoN peaks and falls off, and how much pessimistic selection shifts that frontier. Comparisons to stronger reward models and regularized BoN baselines at similar compute cost will matter most.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reward-model","best-of-n","reward-hacking","inference-time"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010707","title":"Entropy-preserving reinforcement learning","authors":["Aleksei Petrenko","Ben Lipkin","Kevin Chen","Erik Wijmans","Marco Cusumano-Towner","Raja Giryes","Philipp Krähenbühl"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$142","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010707"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010707","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"Policy gradient 算法在训练过程中会自然地降低策略熵（即探索多样性），导致模型越训练越保守，探索能力越来越弱。这在 LLM 推理的 RL 训练中尤其成问题——多样性下降意味着模型难以发现新的、更好的推理路径。","importance":"对 pretrain→posttrain 闭环有直接启示。当前 R1-Zero 范式和各种 RL for reasoning 方法都依赖 policy gradient，如果熵坍缩是一个系统性问题，那么所有这些方法都可能在训练后期陷入局部最优。这篇工作提供了对熵动态的形式化分析和实用的控制机制，对 RL 阶段的训练稳定性有实际价值。方法级贡献。","technical_approach":"作者形式化分析了主流 policy gradient 目标函数对熵动态的贡献，识别出影响熵行为的经验因素（如数值精度），并提出了显式的熵保持机制。核心思路是在训练过程中主动监控和控制熵，而不是被动接受熵的自然衰减。这与简单加熵正则化不同——作者分析了不同 PG 目标函数的熵贡献差异，提出了更有针对性的控制策略。","experiments":"摘要截断，具体的实验设置、任务、baseline 和性能数字不完整。从描述看，作者在 LLM 推理任务上验证了熵保持机制的效果，但需要全文确认。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Policy gradient algorithms naturally reduce policy entropy during training, progressively limiting exploration diversity. For LLM reasoning via RL, this means the model becomes increasingly unable to discover novel, better reasoning paths as training progresses.","importance":"Directly relevant to the pretrain-posttrain loop. The R1-Zero paradigm and RL-for-reasoning methods all rely on policy gradients; if entropy collapse is systematic, all such methods risk converging to local optima. This work provides formal analysis of entropy dynamics and practical control mechanisms. Method-level contribution with broad applicability to RL-based LLM training.","technical_approach":"The authors formally analyze how different policy gradient objectives contribute to entropy dynamics, identify empirical factors (e.g., numerical precision) that significantly impact entropy behavior, and propose explicit entropy-preserving mechanisms. Existing approaches synthesize shorter reasoning data offline (slow) or use length rewards in RL (damages reflection ability and performance).","importance":"Practically valuable for RL-for-reasoning. REA-RL proposes an online RL framework that shortens reasoning chains while preserving reflection capability, offering insights on balancing reasoning efficiency and quality during post-training. Method-level contribution.","technical_approach":"Two key designs: (1) A small reflection model provides efficient scaling during online training via both parallel sampling and sequential revision, avoiding offline data synthesis bottlenecks. (2) A reflection reward prevents the model from sacrificing valuable reflection steps just to shorten output. This is more nuanced than pure length penalty—it distinguishes 'redundantly long' from 'valuably long' reasoning.","experiments":"Abstract is truncated. LLM 做基于环境探索的 RL 时，现有环境要么难扩展、强依赖专家标注，要么学到的能力过于游戏化，迁移不到一般推理。作者认为问题不在 RL 算法本身，而在训练环境没有同时满足可扩展、可验证、可泛化这三个条件，所以 reasoning RL 的收益一直受环境设计卡住。","importance":"这项工作的价值更接近范式接口级：它不是单点改一个 reward 或算法，而是在“什么样的环境能持续产出通用推理能力”这个问题上给出一个框架。对 pretrain/post-train 闭环的启示很直接——如果结构化 in-context 环境能大规模自动生成、自动验分，它就可能成为介于纯 next-token 预训练和昂贵人工 RL 数据之间的一层中间训练信号。真正重要的不是某个基准分数，而是环境设计是否能稳定诱导可迁移的策略。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出 Structured In-context Environment, SIE，用结构化上下文构造可扩展的 reasoning environment。它的设计思路大概率是：把任务实例编码成带规则和上下文依赖的输入，让模型通过与环境交互学会解析结构、执行推理并获得可验证反馈；这样比数学题和代码题更容易程序化生成，又比固定规则游戏更贴近通用符号推理。和已有环境相比，SIE 的关键取舍是牺牲部分真实世界复杂性，换取大规模自动生成和精确评测，从而把 RL 信号密度做高。","experiments":"摘要明确要证明三点：环境可扩展、学到的 reasoning 可泛化、奖励可验证。可以预期实验会包含在 SIE 上进行 RL 微调，并测试向数学、逻辑或其他结构化推理任务的迁移，同时和数学环境、代码环境、游戏环境等做对比。可惜已给摘要被截断，缺少模型规模、环境规模、具体 RL by the environment as by the optimizer. Existing environments are either hard to scale because they rely on expert-curated math or coding tasks, or they are scalable but too game-specific to teach broadly transferable reasoning skills.","importance":"This is best viewed as an environment-design contribution with paradigm-level relevance. If a structured in-context environment can be generated automatically, verified automatically, and still induce transferable reasoning behavior, it becomes a useful training layer between generic next-token pretraining and expensive human-built RL data. For pretrain/post-train research, that matters more than a single benchmark win: it changes where useful supervision can come from.","technical_approach":"The core proposal is SIE, a Structured In-context Environment for RL finetuning. The idea appears to be to encode tasks as structured contexts with explicit internal rules and dependencies, so the model has to interpret the context, reason over it, and receive verifiable feedback from the environment; this is more scalable than math or coding benchmarks and less narrow than game environments. The main design trade-off is realism versus controllability: SIE likely gives up some open-world complexity in exchange for dense, scalable, and precisely checkable training signals.","experiments":"The abstract makes clear that the empirical story is about three properties: scalability, generalizable reasoning, and verifiability. text.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reinforcement-learning","reasoning","environment","rlvr"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010840","title":"ParaS2S: Benchmarking and Aligning Spoken Language Models for Paralinguistic-aware Speech-to-Speech Interaction","authors":["Shu-wen Yang","Ming Tu","Ting-Wei Liu","Xinghua Qu","Hung-yi Lee","Lu Lu","Yuxuan Wang","Yonghui Wu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$146","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010840"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010840","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：当前 speech-to-speech 模型在内容上能对话，但对情绪、语气、说话人属性等副语言信息的理解与响应还不够好，而且缺少高质量、可规模化的监督与评测。过去很多工作把语音交互拆成 ASR→文本 LLM→TTS，导致风格信息在中间表示里被压平；即便端到端 S2S 出现了，大家也缺少一个同时评价内容和 speaking style 的训练闭环。","importance":"这项工作对语音 LM / spoken dialogue 预训练接口很有价值，因为它把副语言信息显式纳入 benchmark、judge 和 RL 对齐流程。重要性不只是做了个基准，而是提出了一种 waveform-level 的优化目标：模型不只学‘说对’，还学‘以合适的方式说对’。对于统一音频语言建模，这是一个关键方向，因为很多真实交互能力恰恰不在文本 token 上。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 ParaS2S，一个面向 paralinguistic-aware S2S 的 RL 框架。它先构建 ParaS2SBench，用有表现力且更具挑战的查询评测输入输出在内容和风格上的自然性；再提出 PolyTone 训练策略去训练自动 judge，使 judge 能同时感知内容与 speaking style；最后在 waveform level 直接做 RL 优化。这个设计的关键取舍是避开纯文本中间监督，因为文本很难承载韵律、情绪和音色条件；但代价是 reward 设计更脆弱，judge 偏差会更直接地影响策略学习。","experiments":"摘要明确的实验目标是验证两个方面：ParaS2SBench 能否有效区分内容与风格自然性，以及 RL 是否能让 S2S 模型在这两个维度同时提升。预期会包含自动评测、人工评测，以及和 SFT 或文本级 reward 方法的比较。摘要没有给出具体模型架构、语音 tokenizer、训练数据量或提升数字，因此目前只能确认论文贡献重心在 benchmark+judge+RL 闭环，而不是某个单一模型的绝对 SOTA。","authors_note":"作者中包括 Hung-yi Lee。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a clear weakness in speech-to-speech systems: they may get the verbal content right, but often mishandle paralinguistic cues such as emotion, tone, and speaker style. The deeper issue is that the field lacks both scalable supervision and faithful evaluation for responses that need to be correct in content and appropriate in how they are spoken.","importance":"This matters for spoken language modeling because it pushes alignment beyond text semantics. The contribution is not just another benchmark; it proposes a training loop in which waveform-level rewards explicitly cover both what is said and how it is said. For unified audio-language modeling, that is significant, since many useful interaction signals do not survive a text-only bottleneck.","technical_approach":"The core proposal is ParaS2S, an RL framework for paralinguistic-aware speech-to-speech interaction. It introduces ParaS2SBench to evaluate naturalness of input-output pairs along both content and speaking style, then trains an automatic judge with a PolyTone strategy so the judge is sensitive to both dimensions, and finally applies RL directly at the waveform level. The key design choice is to avoid relying on text intermediates, which are poor carriers of prosody and style; the trade-off is that reward quality becomes more fragile because judge errors can directly shape the policy.","experiments":"The abstract suggests two main empirical claims: the benchmark can expose failures in both content and style, and RL with the proposed judge improves both dimensions together. 解码，没从范式上减少‘必须把中间思路都说出来’这件事。","importance":"这项工作的意义接近推理范式级讨论，因为它直接挑战了“显式轨迹=推理”的默认设定。对 pretrain 与 post-train 都有启发：如果模型可以依赖 latent 或 fragmental reasoning 而不是完整自然语言轨迹，那么未来训练目标、蒸馏方式和推理对齐都可能重写，尤其是在成本敏感场景。它未必立刻替代 CoT，但至少把‘答案前必须逐字展开思维链’从必要条件降成了可选实现。","technical_approach":"核心方法是从显式 reasoning trajectories 转向 latent representations，作者通过实验表明模型只用 fragmental 的区别在于，后者仍在优化‘怎么更短地说出来’，这里则在问‘哪些步骤根本不必说出来’。","experiments":"摘要给出的明确结论是：模型在不生成完整推理轨迹时，仍能给出准确答案，并显著缓解解码开销。关键实验应当比较 full CoT、compressed CoT、fragmental/latent reasoning 等设定，在数学、逻辑或知识推理任务上对比准确率与 token 开销。摘要没有提供模型规模、任务集、节省比例或性能差值，因此目前只能确认论文主张成立于作者实验范围内，但其适用边界——例如对极长推理链或高可验证任务是否同样稳健——还无法判断。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper challenges a common assumption: that strong reasoning requires fully verbalized chain-of-thought. Current practice treats long explicit trajectories as the necessary carrier of intermediate computation, which makes inference expensive even on relatively simple problems. Existing compression methods shorten those trajectories, but they still operate inside the same token-by-token decoding regime.","importance":"This is close to a paradigm-level question because it separates reasoning from explicit textual rationales. If models can answer correctly using latent or fragmentary reasoning traces, that has implications for how we train, distill, and align reasoning systems under tight inference budgets. The paper does not necessarily overthrow CoT, but it weakens the claim that full verbal trajectories are a necessary ingredient.","technical_approach":"The key move is to shift from explicit reasoning trajectories toward latent representations, with experiments suggesting that fragmental reasoning paths can be sufficient for correct answers. This is not just trajectory shortening. The underlying design seems to keep some intermediate computation in hidden space and expose only sparse textual anchors when needed, rather than forcing every reasoning step to be serialized into natural language. That differs from CoT compression, which still optimizes how to say everything, only more briefly.","experiments":"The central empirical claim is that accurate answers can be produced without full reasoning traces, reducing decoding cost substantially. The claim is not merely that RL adds more optimization, but that it changes what the model can learn when the data distribution underrepresents the rare long trajectories that actually encode the algorithmic solution.","importance":"This is a paradigm-explanation contribution. Practice has already shown that RL after pretraining can unlock reasoning gains, but theory has lagged behind. If the paper rigorously shows how RL extracts generalizable computation from rare long-chain examples that NTP alone fails to use, it offers concrete guidance for training design: when to keep scaling supervised CoT and when sequence-level reinforcement signals become the more effective lever.","technical_approach":"The approach is theoretical. The authors study autoregressive transformers trained on mixtures of short and long chain-of-thought sequences for a single task, using parity over d bits as the main case. The crucial assumption is that long sequences are rare, which mirrors a realistic setting where algorithmically meaningful trajectories are underrepresented relative to superficial patterns. Under this setup, the paper argues that RL after NTP enables generalization while pure NTP does not, suggesting that RL reweights and reinforces the rare but decisive trajectories in a way token-level likelihood cannot.","experiments":"The abstract is theory-first, and the clearest concrete object is the parity task. SFT on such traces teaches models to imitate verbose, uninformative patterns, degrading performance.","importance":"Method-level contribution at the pretrain-posttrain interface. With the R1 paradigm driving widespread CoT distillation/SFT, quality control of CoT data is critical. This work provides an attribution-based automated filtering approach with practical value for CoT data curation.","technical_approach":"Uses integrated gradient attribution to quantify each token's influence on the final answer, then aggregates to segment-level metrics: (1) attribution strength (overall influence magnitude) and (2) direction consistency (whether token attributions within a segment are uniformly positive). AR 和 diffusion 混合图像生成里一个长期没讲清的问题：两种范式各自负责什么、模型容量该怎么分，才不会既丢全局结构又浪费迭代细化能力。现有混合方法通常只是把两者拼起来，缺少系统分析其 trade-off 的 testbed。作者想做的不是单纯再造一个混合模型，而是建立一个可以研究 AR-diffusion 分工的框架。","importance":"结论是：这篇工作的价值更偏范式分析与架构探索。对跨模态统一预训练和 AR+diffusion 联合建模研究有启发，因为它把常见但模糊的直觉——AR 负责长程依赖，diffusion 负责局部高保真——落实到可调的模型分块设计上。它的重要性取决于实验是否真的展示了清晰的容量分配规律；如果有，这类 work 会帮助后续 unified generative model 设计少走很多试错。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 MADFormer，一个 Mixed Autoregressive and Diffusion Transformer。它把图像生成分成空间块：AR 层做跨块的一次性全局条件建模，先建立粗结构和长程依赖；diffusion 层在连续 latent 上对块内或局部内容做迭代细化，补足高频细节。这个设计的关键不是简单串联两套网络，而是明确按空间层级来切分职责。这样做有效，是因为全局布局更适合一次性顺序依赖建模，而纹理和细节更适合连续空间中的逐步纠错。与已有 hybrid 方法相比，论文强调的是“如何分配容量、为什么这样分”，而不是只追求更高指标。边界在于，这种块级分解可能在对象跨块依赖很强时引入接缝或协调成本。","experiments":"摘要没有给出数据集、分辨率、参数规模和具体指标，因此无法写出提升数字。能确认的是，作者把 MADFormer 当作分析 AR-diffusion trade-off 的 testbed，而不是只当一个黑盒生成器。最值得看的实验是：随着 AR 层和 diffusion 层容量比例变化，图像的全局一致性、局部细节和采样速度如何变化；不同空间块划分是否影响生成质量；以及混合模型相比纯 AR 或纯 diffusion 在相同算力下是否有明确优势。若这些规律被系统展示，这篇工作对统一生成架构会比一个单点 SOTA 更有参考价值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a persistent but under-specified question in hybrid image generation: how should autoregressive and diffusion components divide the work and split model capacity? Existing hybrids often combine the two paradigms without a clear account of what each part should handle. The authors aim to build a testbed that makes those trade-offs explicit rather than adding another ad hoc hybrid.","importance":"The value of the paper is mainly in paradigm analysis and architectural exploration. It is relevant to unified multimodal pretraining because it operationalizes a common intuition—AR handles long-range structure, diffusion handles local high-fidelity refinement—into a controllable design. Its impact depends on whether the experiments uncover clear capacity-allocation rules, but if they do, this kind of work can save a lot of downstream trial-and-error in AR+diffusion model design.","technical_approach":"MADFormer is a Mixed Autoregressive and Diffusion Transformer that partitions image generation into spatial blocks. AR layers perform one-pass global conditioning across blocks, establishing coarse structure and long-range dependencies. Diffusion layers then operate in continuous latent space to iteratively refine local content and restore fine detail. The important design choice is the explicit spatial division of labor, not just stacking two generators. That makes sense because global layout is naturally suited to sequential dependency modeling, while texture and detail benefit from iterative correction in a continuous space. The paper’s main distinction from prior hybrids is its focus on why capacity should be allocated in a certain way.","experiments":"The abstract does not report datasets, resolutions, parameter counts, or quantitative results, so no numeric summary can be given. What matters most are the trade-off studies: how image coherence, detail quality, and sampling cost change as AR and diffusion capacity are rebalanced; whether different block partitions affect seams or coordination; and whether the hybrid actually outperforms pure AR or pure diffusion under matched compute. If those trends are made clear, the paper would be more useful as a design guide than as a single-point benchmark 的启示在于：MoE 的有效容量来自专家特化，但专家参数未必都需要独立存储；如果能把专家拆成共享 basis 加少量私有成分，就说明训练阶段形成的大量冗余可被结构化回收。这对后续 MoE 设计也有反馈价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Mixture-of-Basis-Experts（MoBE），把每个 expert 的 up/gate 矩阵分解为 W=AB，其中 A 是专家私有，B 在多个专家间共享或由少量 basis 组合而成。这个设计不是简单低秩压缩，而是把“专家差异”和“共享子空间”分开建模：A 保留专家特化，B 承担跨专家可复用的公共基底。这样做比直接剪枝或把整专家蒸馏掉更稳，因为 MoE 的能力很多来自局部路由后的细粒度差异，完全合并专家容易伤到路由语义。和已有 MoE compression 相比，它的关键点是 basis-sharing，而不是只做 rank reduction。","experiments":"摘要给出了一个重要定性基线：已有方法在较温和压缩率下也会带来 7–14% 的相对精度下降，而作者声称 MoBE 能在压缩时仅带来很小的精度损失。可惜摘要没有给出模型规模、压缩比例、具体任务和绝对/相对分数，因此不能写更细数字。值得关注的实验应包括：在不同压缩率下与低秩分解、专家合并、结构化剪枝的对比；共享 basis 数量对性能的 scaling；以及 gate/up/down 哪些子模块最适合做 MoBE 分解。若只对 up/gate 下手，也说明作者在权衡收益与实现复杂度，避免动到更敏感或收益较低的部分。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a deployment bottleneck of MoE LLMs: sparse activation reduces compute per token, but memory still scales with all expert weights, and existing compression methods often lose too much accuracy even at moderate compression rates. The challenge is to compress experts without destroying the specialization that makes MoE work.","importance":"This is a practical method contribution with clear relevance to large deployed MoE systems such as DeepSeek-V3-class models. The broader lesson for pretraining is that expert specialization may not require fully independent parameter storage; a substantial fraction of expert capacity could live in shared structure, which feeds back into how we think about MoE redundancy during training.","technical_approach":"MoBE decomposes each expert’s up/gate matrix as W = AB, with A kept expert-specific and B shared through a small set of basis components. This is not just low-rank compression. The design explicitly separates expert-specific variation from a shared subspace, allowing the model to preserve routing-sensitive specialization while reclaiming redundancy across experts. That is the key distinction from naive expert merging or standard rank reduction.","experiments":"The abstract provides one useful anchor: prior methods can incur roughly 7–14% relative accuracy drops even under modest compression, while MoBE is claimed to avoid most of that loss. But the abstract does not report model sizes, compression ratios, tasks, or exact metrics, so no stronger numeric summary is possible. The critical experiments should compare against low-rank baselines, expert merging, and pruning across multiple compression levels, with ablations on the number of shared bases and which expert The main takeaway is that robustness to missing modalities is not only an inference issue; it is also a training allocation issue. If the proposed metric reliably measures modality dominance, it could be valuable well beyond the specific module introduced here.","technical_approach":"The approach has two parts. First, a Frequency Ratio Metric (FRM) is used to quantify modality preference in the frequency domain. Second, guided by FRM, a plug-and-play Multimodal Weight Allocation Module adjusts modality contributions to reduce over-dominance. The key claim is that modality dominance is easier to detect in the frequency domain than in raw feature space, making rebalancing more targeted than generic heuristics such as uniform loss reweighting or blind modality dropout.","experiments":"The abstract does not report datasets, architectures, modality types, missingness settings, or exact gains. Dynamic Layer Routing in LLMs","authors":["Ahmed Heakl","Martin Gubri","Salman Khan","Sangdoo Yun","Seong Joon Oh"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$160","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011611"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011611","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：标准 Transformer 对每个 token 一律走完整层数，简单样本浪费算力，困难样本又缺少按需加深的灵活性。已有 adaptive-depth 方法要么需要在线搜索，要么改模型结构，要么要大规模重训，实际常见结果是省了 FLOPs 却掉了精度，所以作者针对“能否低成本 retrofit 到现有 LLM 且不伤精度”这个问题下手。","importance":"这项工作是典型的系统级加方法级贡献。它的价值不在于提出新 backbone，而在于给现有 pretrained LLM 增加动态层路由能力，并且强调“后挂式改造”而不是从头训练。对 pretrain 研究的启示是，深度预算本身可以视作一种 test-time scaling 维度，且 token 难度和所需层深并不均匀；如果这种 routing 足够稳，未来预训练阶段也可能直接把可变深度纳入目标设计，而不只是后处理加速。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Dr.LLM：在每一层前放一个轻量 router，决定当前 block 对该 token 是跳过、正常执行，还是重复执行，从而实现细粒度的动态深度控制。它的关键点不只是加 router，而是用显式监督来训练 router：作者先用 MCTS 搜出在给定计算预算下仍能保精度甚至提精度的高质量层配置，再拿这些配置监督 router 学策略。和依赖强化学习或启发式 early exit 的方法相比，这种做法把训练目标定得更直接，也减少了在线搜索开销。设计上的取舍是，MCTS 生成监督信号本身需要离线成本，而且 router 学到的是“接近最优配置”的近似策略；若任务分布变化很大，离线搜索得到的模式可能会过拟合。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型规模、加速比和精度数字，但提供了足够清楚的比较方向。作者声称 Dr.LLM 在给定计算预算下能保持甚至提升准确率，同时避免许多 adaptive-depth 方法常见的精度退化。实验上最关键的事实应包括：与 full-depth baseline 相比节省多少计算；与已有动态深度/早退方法相比精度差异如何；skip、execute、repeat 三种动作各自贡献了多少收益。若有有价值的 ablation，重点应是显式监督是否显著优于无监督 router 学习，以及 repeat 动作是否主要帮助少数高难 token。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a well-known inefficiency in standard Transformers: every token is pushed through every layer, which wastes compute on easy cases and offers no extra depth for harder ones. Prior adaptive-depth methods often require inference-time search, architectural redesign, or substantial retraining, and many lose too much accuracy to be practically useful.","importance":"This is a method-plus-systems contribution aimed at retrofitting pretrained LLMs rather than replacing them. Its main value is showing that dynamic depth can be added post hoc with lightweight routing and explicit supervision. For pretraining-oriented readers, the broader implication is that depth should be viewed as a controllable test-time resource, and that token-level compute allocation may be as important as width or parameter count when thinking about scaling efficiency.","technical_approach":"Dr.LLM inserts a lightweight router at each layer, allowing each token to skip, execute, or repeat a transformer block. The key design choice is to train these routers with explicit supervision instead of weak heuristics. The supervision comes from Monte Carlo Tree Search, which finds high-quality layer configurations under a compute budget while preserving or improving task accuracy. The routers are then trained to imitate those configurations. Compared with early-exit heuristics or RL-based routing, this makes the learning target clearer and removes expensive online search at inference. The trade-off is that MCTS itself is an offline cost, and the learned routing policy may become distribution-specific if the search trajectories are narrow.","experiments":"The abstract does not report model sizes or exact speed/accuracy numbers, so the summary should stay qualitative. The central empirical claim is that Dr.LLM preserves or even improves accuracy under a fixed compute budget, while avoiding the degradation common in prior adaptive-depth approaches. The most informative results to check are compute savings versus full-depth decoding, comparisons to existing routing or early-exit baselines, and ablations isolating the value of explicit MCTS supervision and the repeat action for genuinely hard tokens.","authors_note":""},"tags":["adaptive-depth","layer-routing","dynamic-inference","efficiency"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011619","title":"Is Finer Better? The Limits of Microscaling Formats in Large Language Models","authors":["Andrea Fasoli","Monodeep Kar","Chi-Chun Liu","Swagath Venkataramani","Viji Srinivasan","Leland Chang","Naigang Wang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$161","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011619"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011619","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：microscaling 量化按直觉应该是 block 越小、表示越细，误差越小，但作者发现当 block size 缩小到某个阈值以下时，LLM 输出质量反而变差。这个现象直接挑战了“更细粒度量化一定更好”的常识，也说明当前对 microscaling 误差来源的理解还不够。","importance":"这项工作是典型的系统与数值分析贡献。它的重要性在于给出一个对训练和推理硬件实现都很关键的负面结果：microscaling 并不是单调受益于更小 block。对 pretrain/serving 工程的启示很直接——量化格式设计不能只看静态重构误差，还要看 native matmul、累积误差和误差缓解策略之间的耦合，否则可能在理论上更细、在实际模型上更差。","technical_approach":"核心方法是对 microscaling 格式在实验和理论上同时做误差拆解，分离不同来源的量化误差，并解释为何更小的 block size 会跨过某个临界点后开始伤害输出质量。论文关注的不是提出新量化格式本身，而是识别这个反直觉退化来自哪里，以及哪些因素是算法层的、哪些是硬件实现层的。和常规量化论文只汇报不同 bit-width/块大小结果相比，这篇更强调机理分析。其价值在于帮助后续格式设计避开错误优化方向；边界则是结论可能依赖具体 microscaling 实现、矩阵乘法路径和误差补偿方法，未必一概外推到所有低精度格式。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型规模、数据集和退化幅度，但最关键的实验结论已经很明确：输出质量在 block size 低于某个阈值后会变差，而不是继续变好。实验上最值得关注的是这一阈值是否随模型层、张量类型、任务和训练/推理场景变化；如果阈值稳定，就说明这是格式层面的普适约束。理论与实验能否对上也很重要：若误差分解能准确预测何时出现退化，这篇工作的说服力会远高于单纯经验观察。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper investigates a counterintuitive failure mode in microscaling quantization for LLMs. One would expect smaller quantization blocks to yield better representations, but the authors find that below a certain block-size threshold, model outputs actually degrade. This challenges the common assumption that finer block granularity is always better.","importance":"This is a systems and numerical-analysis contribution with direct relevance to both training and inference efficiency. Its importance lies in establishing a negative result that matters for hardware-friendly quantization design: microscaling does not improve monotonically as block size shrinks. For pretraining and serving practitioners, the message is that static tensor approximation error is not the whole story; native low-precision matmul behavior and error-mitigation strategies interact in ways that can reverse expected gains.","technical_approach":"The paper combines experiments and theory to decouple different sources of quantization error and explain why smaller block sizes can become harmful past a threshold. The contribution is less about proposing a new format and more about identifying the mechanism behind this non-monotonic behavior. Compared with standard quantization papers that mostly report accuracy across formats and bit widths, this work is more diagnostic and mechanism-oriented. Its practical value is in showing which optimization directions are misleading. The boundary is that the conclusions may depend on the specific microscaling implementation, matmul kernel behavior, and error-compensation scheme.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model sizes, datasets, or exact degradation numbers, but the main empirical claim is clear: performance worsens once the block size becomes too small. The most informative experimental questions are whether the threshold is stable across layers, tensor types, tasks, and training-versus-inference setups, and whether the theoretical error decomposition correctly predicts where degradation begins. If those align, the paper offers more than an isolated empirical anomaly.","authors_note":""},"tags":["quantization","microscaling","training-efficiency","precision"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011629","title":"Watermarking Diffusion Language Models","authors":["Thibaud Gloaguen","Robin Staab","Nikola Jovanović","Martin Vechev"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$162","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011629"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011629","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：现有文本水印方法几乎都为自回归语言模型设计，依赖“前面已经生成的 token”来决定当前 token 的偏置；但 diffusion language model 可以任意顺序生成，很多上下文 token 在当前时刻还不存在，导致 AR 水印方案不能直接搬过去。随着 DLM 成为一类新语言建模范式，缺少专门水印会成为部署缺口。","importance":"这项工作属于新范式配套技术，重要性在于它是面向 diffusion LM 的专用水印方案，而不是把 AR 方法硬套过去。对 pretrain 研究者的意义在于，DLM 不只是训练目标不同，连安全、可追踪性和生成控制手段都需要重做。一个可行的 DLM watermark 说明这类模型开始进入更真实的应用约束讨论，而不是只停留在生成质量比较。","technical_approach":"核心方法有两步。第一，在某些上下文 token 尚未确定时，作者对上下文取期望来施加水印，也就是不要求完整已知前缀才能决定 token 偏置。第二，他们额外偏好那些一旦被选中、又能增强其他 token 水印强度的 token，使局部选择能正向传播到全局检测信号。和 AR watermark 的本质区别是，它必须适配 arbitrary-order generation，而不是顺序前缀条件。这样设计有效的原因是 DLM 的生成图是部分可见上下文，不能依赖严格因果链。代价在于，期望意义下的水印通常更温和，如何在可检测性、文本质量和鲁棒性之间平衡会比 AR 情况更敏感。","experiments":"摘要没有提供模型规模和检测指标数字，但可以确认作者强调两点：一是方法在保持检测性的同时维持文本质量；二是它专门适配 DLM 的生成顺序不确定性。实验上最关键的是检测 true positive / false positive、对改写和扰动的鲁棒性，以及相较直接移植 AR 水印方案的优势。若论文还比较了不同生成顺序或掩码率设置下的检测稳定性，那会非常重要，因为这直接决定方法是不是只在特定 DLM 解码策略下有效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a missing piece for diffusion language models: existing text watermarking methods are designed for autoregressive LMs and rely on already generated prefix tokens to bias the next token. That assumption breaks in DLMs, where tokens can be generated in arbitrary order and some context positions are still unknown when a decision is made.","importance":"This is an enabling contribution for a newer language-modeling paradigm. Its significance is not just watermarking itself, but the fact that DLMs require new control and provenance tools rather than direct reuse of ARLM machinery. For pretraining researchers, the useful signal is that non-AR language models change not only generation dynamics but also the surrounding safety and deployment stack.","technical_approach":"The method adapts watermarking to arbitrary-order generation in two ways. First, it applies the watermark in expectation over partially unknown context, so a token can still be biased even when some conditioning tokens have not been generated yet. Second, it promotes tokens that will later strengthen the watermark signal when they become context for other positions. This differs fundamentally from AR watermarking, which depends on a fully known prefix. The design is sensible because DLM generation exposes only partial context at each step. The trade-off is that expectation-based watermarking is typically more delicate, so balancing detectability, text quality, and robustness may be harder than in the autoregressive case.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model sizes or detection metrics, but it makes clear that the paper aims to preserve watermark detectability while maintaining generation quality in diffusion LMs. The most important experiments would measure detection power and false-positive rates, robustness to paraphrasing or perturbation, and comparisons against naive adaptations of AR watermarking. It would also be important to test stability across different DLM decoding orders or masking schedules, since the method is meant to be order-agnostic rather than tuned to one generation The specific question: in Gold's identification-in-the-limit framework, how much does access to computational traces expand the class of learnable languages?","importance":"Theory-level contribution providing formal foundations for CoT's effectiveness. The main result is striking: with perfect computational traces, all computable languages become learnable (only a subset is learnable in the classic setting). This gives theoretical backing to using CoT data in pretraining—it expands the learning boundary, not just empirical performance.","technical_approach":"Extends Gold's identification in the limit by augmenting the learner with computational traces from the accepting machine, in addition to language examples. setting.","authors_note":""},"tags":["chain-of-thought","learnability-theory","computational-trace","formal-analysis"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011887","title":"Asymmetric Proximal Policy Optimization:
