on Tokens, Calibrated on Concepts: The Emergence of Semantic Calibration in LLMs","authors":["Preetum Nakkiran","Arwen Bradley","Adam Golinski","Eugene Ndiaye","Michael Kirchhof","Sinead Williamson"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$16a","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011892"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011892","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的核心问题是：只用 next-token prediction 训练出来的 base LLM，是否能对“语义上是否答对”给出可信置信度，而不只是对下一个 token 概率做校准。过去大家通常默认 token-level calibration 不足以推出 semantic calibration，因为同一语义可以对应很多表述，token 概率会被表面措辞分散；这篇工作说明，在合适的采样式定义下，语义层面的校准会自然涌现。","importance":"这项工作的价值首先在概念层面：它把“校准对象”从 token 扩展到等价类意义上的语义事件，并给出可操作的形式化定义 B-calibration。对 pretrain 的启示是，标准 AR 训练目标可能已经隐含学到了比大家通常测的更强的不确定性结构，这会影响我们如何理解 base model 置信度、pass@k/self-consistency 的理论依据，以及后训练阶段是否真的需要额外监督去学语义置信度。","technical_approach":"方法上的核心贡献是提出一个由等价类选择参数化的校准定义 B-calibration，并用它统一 token 校准与 semantic calibration。做法不是直接把答案映射成单一 canonical form，而是允许多个表述落入同一语义桶，再通过采样分布估计模型对该语义事件的概率；这样避免了把语言多样性误判为不校准。理论部分进一步解释了为什么这种语义校准会从 next-token 训练中出现：当模型对序列表达的概率质量分配足够贴近真实分布时，按等价类聚合后，语义事件的置信度也会继承校准性质。与已有工作相比，它不是再发明一个 confidence head，也不是靠 verifier 重打分，而是在原始生成分布上重新定义评估对象。","experiments":"实验结论是肯定的：在多种开放式问答任务上，base LLM 在采样式语义校准指标下表现出显著更好的校准性。摘要没有给出模型规模、任务名称、ECE/Brier 等具体数字，因此这里不能报告量化增益；但从描述看，关键比较对象是 token-level 视角与 semantic equivalence 视角的差异，以及不同 base LLM 上是否稳定出现该现象。最有价值的实验设计点应该是：1）用采样近似语义事件概率，而不是只看 greedy 输出；2）在不同等价类定义 B 下检验结果稳健性。如果这一稳健性成立，那么它比单一 benchmark 上的 calibration 改善更有解释力。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a sharp question: can a base LLM trained only with next-token prediction be calibrated about the meaning of its answer, not just about token probabilities. Prior work largely stopped at token-level calibration because semantic correctness is many-to-one—multiple surface forms can express the same answer—so token probabilities alone look like the wrong object. This paper argues that, under a sampling-based semantic notion, meaningful calibration does emerge.","importance":"The main contribution is conceptual but important for pretraining. It reframes calibration over equivalence classes of outputs rather than individual tokens, and introduces a formal notion, B-calibration, to make that precise. If correct, this shifts how we interpret uncertainty in base models: standard AR pretraining may already induce usable semantic confidence without extra heads, verifier models, or task-specific calibration. That matters for reasoning about self-consistency, pass@k-style decoding, and what post-training really adds.","technical_approach":"The core method is to define calibration with respect to equivalence classes of outputs, parameterized by B, instead of forcing a single canonical answer string. Concretely, the model’s probability mass is aggregated over all sampled outputs that fall into the same semantic class, which avoids mistaking paraphrase diversity for miscalibration. The theoretical result explains why this can arise from plain next-token training: if sequence probabilities are learned well enough, calibration transfers after aggregating probability mass over the right equivalence classes. This is notably different from adding a confidence predictor or reranking with a verifier; the change is in the object being measured, not the model architecture.","experiments":"The empirical takeaway is positive: across open-ended QA settings, base LLMs appear substantially better calibrated under the semantic, sampling-based metric than one would infer from token-level views alone. The abstract does not report model sizes, datasets, baselines, or numerical gains, so no precise deltas can be stated here. The most important experimental choices seem to be: estimating semantic event probabilities by sampling rather than greedy decoding, and checking robustness across different choices of the equivalence-class definition B. If that robustness holds, it is stronger evidence than a one-off benchmark win.","authors_note":""},"tags":["calibration","semantic-uncertainty","emergent-property","base-model"],"notable_authors":["Preetum Nakkiran","Adam Golinski","Eugene Ndiaye","Michael Kirchhof"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011901","title":"Language Models are Injective and Hence Invertible","authors":["Giorgos Nikolaou","Tommaso Mencattini","Donato Crisostomi","Andrea Santilli","Yannis Panagakis","Emanuele Rodolà"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$16b","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011901"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011901","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是一个长期默认前提：Transformer 里有非单射模块，比如激活和归一化，因此中间表示应该不可逆，输入信息会丢失。作者的核心结论相反——对离散输入序列到连续表示序列的映射而言，语言模型在几乎处处意义下是单射的，因此理论上可逆，输入并没有在表示层面被压扁到同一点。","importance":"这项工作如果成立，意义是范式级的机制修正。它会直接影响我们如何理解 representation collapse、隐状态是否保留原始 token 信息、特征可逆性、以及 probe/interpretability 结果的边界。对 pretrain 研究尤其重要的一点是：如果表示映射保持输入唯一性，那么“模型忘记表面形式、只保留语义”的说法需要更谨慎，很多抽象可能发生在可线性利用性或局部几何上，而不是信息真的被丢掉。","technical_approach":"技术上分三层。第一层是数学证明：虽然单个 Transformer 组件未必单射，但把离散有限词表上的序列输入放到整个语言模型映射里看，碰撞需要满足非常苛刻的连续参数条件，因此在初始化时成立，并在训练过程中保持。第二层是经验验证：在多个 SOTA LLM 上做数十亿次 collision test，没有观察到不同输入映射到相同表示。第三层是算法化落地：作者提出 SipIt，用来从表示高效、可证明地恢复输入，说明“可逆”不是只停留在存在性层面。与常见的 Jacobian 可逆分析不同，这里抓住的是离散输入域这一关键条件；这也是为什么局部非单射模块并不自动推出全模型对离散序列非单射。","experiments":"实验上最强的事实是覆盖六个 state-of-the-art language models，并进行了 billions 级别的 collision tests，结果未发现碰撞。摘要没有给出具体模型名、参数规模、测试的是哪一层表示、SipIt 的恢复精度/速度，也没有和近似反演 baseline 比较，因此还不能判断这种可逆性在实际长度、噪声和量化条件下有多脆弱。即便如此，经验结果至少支持一个强命题：在正常训练好的 LLM 上，精确输入碰撞如果存在，也极其罕见。后续最值得看的是 SipIt 在深层表示、长序列和不同 tokenization 下的恢复成功率如何衰减。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper challenges a widely assumed premise: because transformers contain non-injective components such as activations and normalization, their hidden representations should be lossy and non-invertible. The authors argue the opposite for language models on discrete sequence inputs: the mapping from token sequences to continuous representations is injective, hence invertible, so distinct inputs do not collapse to the same representation.","importance":"If the claim holds, this is a conceptual correction with broad implications. It changes how we think about representation loss, reversibility, probing, and what hidden states retain from the original tokens. For pretraining research, the important implication is that abstraction in LLMs may be more about accessibility and geometry of information than about literal information destruction. That is a different picture from the common “surface form is discarded, semantics remains” story.","technical_approach":"The contribution has three layers. First, a mathematical argument: while individual transformer components need not be injective, collisions between distinct discrete input sequences require highly special parameter configurations, so injectivity holds at initialization and is preserved during training. Second, a large empirical validation: billions of collision tests across six state-of-the-art LMs show no observed collisions. Third, an operational result: the paper introduces SipIt, an algorithm that can provably and efficiently recover inputs from representations. The key distinction from standard Jacobian-style invertibility arguments is that the domain here is discrete; non-injectivity in the ambient continuous space does not automatically imply non-injectivity over token sequences.","experiments":"The strongest empirical fact in the abstract is scale: six state-of-the-art language models and billions of collision tests, with no collisions observed. The abstract does not specify model names, sizes, which layers were tested, or the accuracy and runtime of SipIt, so practical robustness remains unclear. Still, the empirical evidence supports a strong statement: exact input collisions, if they exist in trained LLMs, are extremely rare. The most useful follow-up question is how recovery quality degrades for deeper layers, longer contexts, and different tokenization schemes.","authors_note":""},"tags":["transformer-theory","injectivity","invertibility","representation"],"notable_authors":["Giorgos Nikolaou","Tommaso Mencattini","Donato Crisostomi","Andrea Santilli","Yannis Panagakis"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011902","title":"Cartridges: Lightweight and general-purpose long context representations via self-study","authors":["Sabri Eyuboglu","Ryan Ehrlich","Simran Arora","Neel Guha","Dylan Zinsley","Emily Liu","Atri Rudra","James Y Zou","Azalia Mirhoseini","Christopher Re"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$16c","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011902"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011902","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是长上下文使用中的一个部署痛点：把整个语料库直接塞进上下文窗口虽然简单，但 KV cache 显存和推理成本都随长度增长，服务代价很高。作者提出的问题是，能不能把“某个固定语料库的长期上下文”预先蒸馏成一个可加载的小型 KV cache，让后续所有针对该语料库的查询都复用它。","importance":"这项工作的意义偏系统级，但对 pretrain 也有方法启发。它把上下文从“每次临时提供的 token”变成“离线训练得到的参数化记忆”，这介于 RAG、prefix tuning 和持续预训练之间。对长期记忆和 corpus-grounded generation 的研究有直接价值：如果固定语料确实能被压缩成稳定可用的表示，那么未来很多企业私域知识场景未必需要反复走全量长上下文推理。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Cartridge：对每个语料库离线训练一个轻量 KV cache，推理时直接加载这个 cache 再解码答案。关键观察是，朴素地用语料上的 next-token prediction 来训练 Cartridge 效果不够好，因为这只逼模型复现语料表面分布，不一定学到对后续查询最有用的可检索信息。因此作者引入了 self-study 方案：让模型围绕该语料自生成或自构造查询/任务，再用这些以查询为中心的训练信号优化 Cartridge。这样的设计更像把 cache 训练成“可被问答调用的外显记忆”，而不是语料压缩器。与直接微调模型权重相比，它保留了基座模型不变；与 RAG 相比，它把重复检索成本换成一次性离线训练成本。","experiments":"摘要明确给出的事实有限：Cartridge 面向代码库、法律文档、聊天记录这类固定大语料，并强调训练成本可以在所有相关 query 上摊销。没有给出模型规模、Cartridge 大小、原始上下文长度、显存节省比例、质量损失或相对 RAG/长上下文 baseline 的数值提升。能提炼出的关键实验点是：1）naive NTP-on-corpus 不足；2）self-study 训练显著更适合构建长期可复用表示。真正决定方法价值的会是两类数字——同等质量下 KV cache 缩小多少，以及随着 query 分布偏离 self-study 生成分布时性能掉多少；摘要里都未披露。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a serving bottleneck in long-context use cases: placing an entire corpus into the prompt is simple, but KV-cache memory and inference cost scale with input length, making repeated corpus-grounded queries expensive. The question is whether the persistent information in a fixed corpus can be compiled offline into a small reusable KV cache that is loaded at inference time.","importance":"This is primarily a systems contribution, but it has methodological relevance for pretraining and memory. It turns context from a transient token sequence into a learned, reusable representation tied to a corpus. That sits somewhere between RAG, prefix tuning, and continued pretraining. If it works well, many repeated-query enterprise settings may not need full long-context inference for every request.","technical_approach":"The method is Cartridge: train a lightweight KV cache offline for each corpus, then load that cache at inference and decode answers against it. The important design choice is that naïvely training the cache with next-token prediction on the corpus is not sufficient, because it teaches reconstruction of surface text rather than query-useful memory. The proposed fix is self-study: the model generates or constructs tasks and questions around the corpus, and the cache is optimized on those query-centered signals. That makes the learned cache behave more like callable memory than like a compressed copy of the corpus. Compared with model fine-tuning, the base model stays unchanged; compared with RAG, repeated retrieval is traded for an upfront training cost.","experiments":"The abstract gives only the broad setting—codebases, legal documents, chat histories—and the key claim that training cost can be amortized across all future queries over the same corpus. It does not report model size, cache size, source context length, memory savings, latency, or quality relative to long-context or RAG baselines. The main experimental takeaway is qualitative: naïve corpus-only next-token training is not enough, while self-study produces more useful long-context representations. The decisive metrics, which are not in the abstract, are how much KV state is reduced at matched quality and how performance degrades when the real query distribution differs from the self-study distribution.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","kv-cache","context-compression","icl"],"notable_authors":["Sabri Eyuboglu","Ryan Ehrlich","Simran Arora","Neel Guha","Dylan Zinsley"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10012097","title":"Dynamic Parameter Reuse Augments Reasoning via Latent Chain of Thought","authors":["Kaitlin Maile","Joao Sacramento"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Standard language models often rely on massive parameter counts for their performance, utilizing each parameter only once per inference pass. This prompts consideration of recurrent structures, where models reuse parameters across sequential time, depth, or training progression to achieve improved performance and reduced training cost. We draw connections in the landscape of parameter reuse, from growing models via stacking to recurrent looping, and postulate that these architectural priors act as a form of Latent Chain of Thought (LCoT), allowing models to reason in a continuous state space. By shifting towards deeper and dynamic computation, grown and recurrent architectures offer a path toward improved reasoning in compact networks, ascending beyond scaling laws of standard architectures. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10012097"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10012097","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文关注的问题是：标准 Transformer 在一次前向里每个参数只用一次，性能主要靠堆参数，而这可能不是推理能力最优的计算组织方式。作者想推动的方向是参数复用——无论是递归、循环还是逐步增长结构——把更多计算深度放到固定参数上，并将其理解为一种 latent chain of thought。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在架构与推理范式层面。它呼应了“更多 test-time/depth-wise compute，未必需要更多静态参数”的趋势，对小模型推理增强、动态计算和 recurrent Transformer 都有启发。对 pretrain 的具体意义是：如果参数复用能系统性改善推理，那么 scaling law 讨论的横轴可能不只应是参数和数据，也应包括可学习的计算深度与复用策略。","technical_approach":"技术上，这篇工作更像统一视角和架构主张，而不是单一新模块。作者把模型 growing via stacking、recurrent looping 等参数复用形式联系起来，提出这些结构先验可以在连续隐状态空间里形成 latent CoT，也就是不显式输出推理链，但通过多步状态演化完成中间推理。与显式 CoT 不同，它不占用输出 token；与标准深层一次性网络不同，它允许在推理时动态增加计算步数。设计上它强调 deeper and dynamic computation，而不是更宽的静态容量。边界是，这类方法常见代价包括训练稳定性、credit assignment 难度和串行时延增加；摘要没有说明作者如何处理这些问题。","experiments":"摘要没有给出任何模型大小、任务、基线或提升数字，也没有说明是提出新模型还是综述现有参数复用路径。唯一明确的实验性主张是：grown and recurrent architectures 为 compact networks 提供了提升推理的路径，并可能超出标准架构缩放规律。没有量化证据时，这个结论只能看作研究假设。真正关键的实验应该包括：同等 FLOPs 或同等参数下与标准 Transformer 的比较、随着循环步数增加的收益曲线、以及是否出现 train-test compute mismatch 的稳定泛化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper questions a basic assumption behind standard transformers: each parameter is used once per forward pass, and capability is largely increased by adding more parameters. The proposed alternative is parameter reuse—through recurrence, looping, or growth—so that more computation is performed with fixed parameters, potentially yielding better reasoning per parameter.","importance":"This is mainly an architecture and reasoning-paradigm contribution. It aligns with the broader shift toward trading static parameters for adaptive or deeper compute. For pretraining, the implication is that scaling laws may need to account not only for model size and data but also for learnable computation depth and reuse. That is especially relevant for compact models and for systems that want stronger reasoning without proportional parameter growth.","technical_approach":"Technically, the paper seems to offer a unifying lens rather than a single novel module. It connects architectures that grow by stacking with recurrent looping schemes and interprets these priors as a form of latent chain of thought: intermediate reasoning occurs in continuous hidden-state dynamics rather than as explicit output tokens. Compared with explicit CoT, this avoids token overhead; compared with standard feedforward depth, it allows compute to be varied dynamically at inference. The core design bias is toward deeper, dynamic computation rather than wider static capacity. The main trade-offs are familiar—harder optimization, credit assignment, and more serial latency—but the abstract does not say how these are handled.","experiments":"The abstract provides no model sizes, tasks, baselines, or quantitative gains, and it is unclear whether the paper proposes a new architecture or mainly synthesizes existing directions. Without numbers, that should be treated as a research hypothesis rather than an established empirical result. style 和交互策略，因此“同一个 base model 既当助手又当用户”会把训练偏好泄漏进评测器。对做对话数据合成、self-play、多代理训练的人尤其重要，因为用户侧分布如果被助手语气污染，后续 preference、tool-use、long-horizon 结论都会偏乐观。","technical_approach":"核心方法是显式训练和评估“用户语言模型”，而不是继续把助手模型通过 prompt 伪装成用户。论文从摘要看先证明 assistant LM 作为 user simulator 会失败，然后围绕 user role 的语言特征重新建模：用户发言往往更不完整、更含糊、更带试探性，并且会在多轮里逐步修正目标，而不是一次性给出高质量需求。和最接近的已有做法相比，它的关键区别不是更强的 prompting，而是承认 user 与 assistant 是两个不同后验分布，需要分开训练、分开评估；这样设计有效，是因为它把 role-conditioned generation 从“指令模板问题”转成了“分布错配问题”。","experiments":"摘要明确给出的关键实验结论是：assistant LMs 作为用户模拟器表现很差，而且这种失真强到足以推翻很多已有多轮评测假设。由于提供的信息被截断，无法确认具体模型规模、数据量、评测基准和数值提升。可以合理推断论文至少比较了真实用户 utterance、assistant-prompted user simulation 与专门训练的 user LM，并分析了多轮行为差异；但在没有正文前，具体数字不应臆测。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper argues that current multi-turn evaluation is built on a bad proxy: prompting assistant-tuned LMs to act as users does not reproduce real user behavior. This shortcut was tolerated because user simulation is expensive and poorly standardized, but it now matters because agent evaluation, self-play, and conversational benchmarking increasingly depend on realistic user turns.","importance":"This is mainly an evaluation-paradigm contribution, with direct implications for post-training and synthetic data pipelines. The key message is that assistant post-training does not merely improve helpfulness; it also distorts style, initiative, and ambiguity, so using the same assistant-shaped model on the user side leaks model preferences into the benchmark. That matters for any setup that relies on simulated interactions to measure robustness, tool use, or long-horizon dialogue quality.","technical_approach":"The main idea is to model the user role explicitly instead of prompt-casting an assistant LM into that role. The paper first establishes that assistant LMs are poor user simulators, then focuses on user-like characteristics that assistants usually suppress: partial effort, under-specification, iterative refinement, and idiosyncratic phrasing. Relative to prior work, the novelty is not better prompting but treating user and assistant utterances as different conditional distributions that deserve separate training and evaluation.","experiments":"The central empirical claim from the abstract is strong: assistant LMs are poor user simulators, to a surprising degree. autoencoder 做 model diffing，比较微调前后内部表征，找出与失对齐共同出现的“misalignment persona features”。和纯行为分析相比，这种设计的优势是能把问题从“哪些 prompt 出错”推进到“哪些中间特征被系统性放大”；代价是 SAE feature This matters for CoT monitoring because a hidden reasoning channel is only a practical evasion route if the model can still sustain strong reasoning performance once its internal work is pushed into an encoded format.","importance":"The contribution is mainly conceptual and evaluative. It shows a useful asymmetry between comprehension and reasoning: being able to decode or translate a representation is not the same as being able to use that representation as a robust workspace for multi-step cognition. That matters for monitoring, hidden-CoT discussions, and broader questions about what representations support reliable reasoning.","technical_approach":"The method is straightforward but well targeted. The authors evaluate up to 10 models across 28 ciphers, using both prompting and finetuning to induce reasoning in the encoded language, and then measure math accuracy as a proxy for reasoning ability. The important design choice is to separate cipher comprehension from ciphered reasoning, since the former can be solved by mapping symbols while the latter requires the model to carry out intermediate computation in that altered space.","experiments":"The abstract supports one robust empirical claim: accuracy drops substantially when models reason in ciphered text, even when they can translate the same cipher successfully. A valuable detail is that both prompting and finetuning were tested, which makes the conclusion stronger than a pure prompt-engineering failure.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reasoning","cot","safety","cipher","monitoring"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006535","title":"Nemotron-Research-Tool-N1: Exploring Tool-Using Language Models with trace。这个设计刻意舍弃了蒸馏链路中最贵也最脆弱的部分——教师生成的详细思维过程——把优化压力全部放到可验证结果上。和已有方法相比，它更像 outcome-supervised tool RL；之所以可能更泛化，是因为模型可以自行搜索对自己可用的决策模式，而不是复刻教师的表面轨迹。","experiments":"摘要确认论文训练出一系列 Tool-N1 模型，并声称相较主要依赖 SFT of a teacher’s format and style more than transferable decision-making. That works reasonably well in-distribution, but generalization suffers when tool combinations, task layouts, or error modes shift.","importance":"This is a post-training method contribution with broader implications for how we build agentic capabilities. That aligns with the broader trend that outcome-based RL can discover more adaptable strategies than process-distilled SFT in some settings.","technical_approach":"Nemotron-Research-Tool-N1 is trained with rule-based RL using only a binary reward for valid tool-call formatting and functional correctness. Relative to prior tool-SFT pipelines, this is a cleaner outcome-supervised setup that gives the model room to learn its own tool-use strategy.","experiments":"The abstract claims improved tool-calling ability and generalization over prior SFT-heavy approaches, but it does not provide reliable details on model sizes, benchmark suites, tool inventories, or absolute gains. Dormant Adversarial Behaviors that Activate upon LLM Finetuning","authors":["Thibaud Gloaguen","Mark Vero","Robin Staab","Martin Vechev"],"institutions":["ETH Zurich"],"abstract":"$174","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006541"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006541","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文揭示了一个新的供应链风险：一个开源权重模型可以在发布时看起来正常、无害、性能也好，但在下游用户用良性数据做 finetune 之后才激活恶意行为。过去大家通常把 finetuning 当成相对可控的后处理过程，默认 benign data 不会凭空制造攻击性策略；这篇论文挑战的正是这个默认前提。","importance":"这是安全层面的重要结果，因为它把后门从传统的 prompt-time trigger 推进到了 training-time trigger。对 pretrain / posttrain 社区的冲击在于：模型权重本身可以被元学习成“对未来微调过程敏感的恶意初始态”，所以只做静态模型评测或上线前行为审计不够，开源模型供应链和 finetune pipeline 都需要新的防御与鉴别手段。它还提醒我们，后训练并不总是修正 base model，也可能被 base model 反向利用。","technical_approach":"作者提出 FAB（Finetuning-activated Adversarial Behaviors）攻击。核心做法是用 meta-learning 显式模拟下游用户的 finetuning 过程，在外层目标里优化“微调后出现对抗行为”，同时加正则保证微调前模型保持通用能力和表面良性。和普通后门不同，它不依赖部署时某个字符串触发器，而是把 trigger 设计成一次看似正常的 downstream finetune。这种设计危险之处在于触发条件天然符合真实工作流，检测难度更高；边界在于攻击者需要预判或近似下游微调分布。","experiments":"摘要确认的事实是：作者展示了首个此类攻击，并且受害模型在被 benign finetuning 之前表现正常、性能好，之后会出现 adversarial behaviors。没有给出底座模型、任务、攻击成功率和保真度数字，因此不能写具体幅度。值得关注的实验点应包括：攻击前后的能力保持、不同微调数据上的激活鲁棒性，以及和传统 backdoor 的比较；但这些细节需要正文确认。","authors_note":"作者中 Martin Vechev 是 ETH Zurich 安全与程序分析方向的知名学者，团队长期关注模型安全、鲁棒性和软件系统安全。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper introduces a new supply-chain threat: an open-weight model can appear benign and high-performing at release time, yet develop adversarial behavior only after a downstream user finetunes it on seemingly harmless data. This challenges a common assumption that benign finetuning is a controlled and intrinsically safe adaptation step.","importance":"This is a significant safety result because it moves the trigger from inference time to training time. For the broader pretrain/posttrain pipeline, the implication is serious: model weights can be optimized to exploit future adaptation dynamics, so static evaluation of a released checkpoint is not enough. It also means downstream finetuning should be treated as part of the attack surface, not only as a mitigation layer.","technical_approach":"The authors propose FAB, a meta-learning attack that explicitly simulates downstream finetuning during optimization. The outer objective encourages adversarial behavior to emerge after finetuning, while regularization preserves benign behavior and strong utility beforehand. Unlike standard backdoors, the trigger is not a prompt pattern but a natural finetuning process, which makes the attack harder to detect and operationally more realistic. The main limitation is that the attacker needs a useful approximation to the downstream finetuning regime.","experiments":"The abstract supports the key empirical claim that compromised models remain capable and apparently benign before finetuning, then activate harmful behavior after benign downstream adaptation. It does not include model names, attack success rates, utility-retention numbers, or benchmark details. The likely important evaluations are pre/post-finetune behavior, robustness across finetuning datasets, and comparisons to conventional backdoor attacks.","authors_note":"Martin Vechev is a well-known ETH Zurich researcher in security, robustness, and program analysis. Prior approaches often separate confidence estimation from generation, which makes calibration an auxiliary output rather than part of the model’s decision policy.","importance":"The contribution is important for post-training and deployment. It treats calibration as a native optimization target for generative models, not a bolt-on estimator. The broader implication is that answer quality and uncertainty expression should be learned jointly if we want models to be useful in settings where knowing when to doubt matters as much as knowing the answer.","technical_approach":"The method uses reinforcement learning with a reward based on the logarithmic scoring rule, directly training the model to emit both an answer and a calibrated confidence estimate. This reward penalizes both overconfidence and underconfidence, and its optimal policy corresponds to perfect calibration in principle. Compared with two-stage methods that estimate confidence after the fact, this couples content generation and uncertainty expression into a single policy.","experiments":"The abstract claims improved calibrated confidence expression on factual question answering, but it does not provide model sizes, datasets, calibration metrics, or numerical margins over baselines. The likely comparisons are against standard LLMs and decoupled confidence-estimation approaches. A useful boundary to note is that the setting is factual QA, so the result should not be overread as solving uncertainty calibration for all open-ended generation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlhf","calibration","confidence","reward-design"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006569","title":"IceCache: Memory-Efficient KV-cache Management for Long-Sequence LLMs","authors":["Yuzhen Mao","Qitong Wang","Martin Ester","Ke Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$176","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006569"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006569","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 推理时 KV-cache 的显存占用随序列长度线性增长，在长序列场景下成为瓶颈。已有的 CPU offload 方案依赖不够精确的 token 选择策略，在需要长程推理（如 chain-of-thought）的任务上性能下降明显。","importance":"系统级贡献。KV-cache 管理是长上下文 LLM 推理的核心工程问题，IceCache 提出的语义聚类+PagedAttention 结合方案，对实际部署有直接价值。对 pretrain 研究者的启示在于：长上下文能力的实际可用性不仅取决于训练，还取决于推理时的 cache 管理效率。","technical_approach":"IceCache 将语义相关的 token 聚类后组织成连续的 page，与 PagedAttention 机制结合。核心思路是：语义相近的 token 往往被同时访问，将它们放在同一 page 中可以提高 GPU-CPU 之间的数据搬运效率，同时让 token 选择更精确——不是逐 token 判断重要性，而是以语义簇为单位做保留/驱逐决策。这比逐 token 的 eviction 策略更稳定，尤其在长生成任务中不容易丢失关键上下文。","experiments":"Abstract 截断，具体数字未完整给出。从描述看，IceCache 针对长生成任务（如 CoT 推理）相比已有 offload 方案有改善，需看全文了解具体指标。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"KV-cache memory grows linearly with sequence length, creating severe bottlenecks for long-context LLM inference. Existing CPU offloading approaches use imprecise token selection and degrade on long-generation tasks like chain-of-thought reasoning.","importance":"A systems-level contribution. KV-cache management is a core engineering problem for long-context serving. IceCache's combination of semantic clustering with PagedAttention is directly deployable. For pretrain researchers, it highlights that long-context capability depends not just on training but also on inference-time cache efficiency.","technical_approach":"IceCache clusters semantically related tokens into contiguous pages compatible with PagedAttention. The insight: semantically similar tokens tend to be accessed together, so grouping them improves GPU-CPU transfer efficiency and makes eviction decisions more stable—operating at the cluster level rather than per-token. This is more robust than per-token importance scoring, especially for long-generation tasks where critical context can span many tokens.","experiments":"Abstract truncated; specific numbers not fully available. Self-modulated and Semantic-aware Token Selection for LLM Fine-tuning","authors":["Xiaohan Qin","Victor Wang","Ning Liao","Cancheng Zhang","Xiangdong Zhang","Mingquan Feng","Jingzhi Wang","Junchi Yan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$17d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006721"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006721","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：SFT 中 token-level 数据选择虽然有效，但现有方法常常需要额外参考模型，而且只看 loss 会误删语义上关键但暂时不好预测的 token。过去这类方法偏向把“模型不喜欢的 token”直接降权，却没有区分它们是噪声，还是高价值但学习尚未完成的信息。","importance":"这项工作的意义是给 token 级数据筛选补上了两个实用缺口：不依赖新增 reference model，以及不把 selection 完全等同于 loss filtering。对 post-train 数据质量控制有直接启发，尤其适合资源受限或持续微调场景；它不是根本性的新训练范式，但很贴近真实 SFT pipeline 中“如何更细粒度地保留有用监督”的问题。","technical_approach":"核心方法 ssToken 是一种 self-modulated、semantic-aware 的 token 选择策略。它利用现成的 history models 计算当前模型与历史模型的逐 token loss 差值，作为一种自调节的学习进展信号；同时再引入语义感知机制，避免只按损失大小删除 token，从而更好保留语义支点。与最接近的 loss-only 筛选方法相比，它关注的是“这个 token 是否仍在带来有效学习”和“这个 token 在语义上是否关键”两件事，而不只是“它当前难不难”。这种设计有效的原因是 SFT 数据里高损失 token 既可能是噪声，也可能是知识密度高的关键位点；边界则是 history model 质量差或语义估计不准时，选择信号会失真。","experiments":"摘要确认的实验结论是：ssToken 相比已有 token-level 选择方法有更强实证表现，且不需要额外参考模型。摘要没有给出基础模型规模、指令数据规模、主要 baseline、保留率、训练成本变化和最终 benchmark 提升数字，因此目前无法判断收益是稳定小幅还是显著。正式论文里最值得看的实验应包括：只用 loss difference 与再加 semantic-aware 模块的增益拆分、不同数据噪声水平下的表现，以及 history model 间隔多大最合适。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical weakness of token-level data selection for SFT: existing methods often need an extra reference model, and loss-only criteria tend to drop tokens that are semantically important but currently hard for the model. In other words, they conflate noise with useful difficulty.","importance":"Its value is pragmatic but relevant: it makes token selection cheaper and more semantically aware. For post-training pipelines, this matters because data quality interventions are often constrained by compute and by the need to preserve high-value supervision rather than simply suppress high loss. It is not a paradigm shift, but it addresses a real bottleneck in fine-grained SFT curation.","technical_approach":"ssToken combines two signals: a self-modulated progress signal from per-token loss differences between the current model and accessible history models, and a semantic-aware mechanism to preserve important tokens that loss alone would penalize. The key design choice is to estimate whether a token still contributes useful learning, not just whether it is hard. Compared with loss-only token filtering, this better separates genuinely noisy tokens from informative but challenging ones. The trade-off is that both the history-model comparison and semantic scoring must be reliable enough to avoid introducing selection noise.","experiments":"The abstract states that ssToken outperforms prior token-level selection methods while avoiding the need for an additional reference model. The most informative results to inspect would be ablations on loss-difference vs semantic-aware components, behavior under varying data noise, and sensitivity to how far back the history model is taken.","authors_note":""},"tags":["sft","data-quality","token-selection","fine-tuning","alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006741","title":"Knowledge Fusion of Large Language Models via Modular SkillPacks","authors":["Guodong DU","Zhuo Li","Xuanning Zhou","Junlin Li","Zesheng Shi","Wanyu LIN","Ho-Kin Tang","Xiucheng Li","Fangming Liu","Wenya Wang","Min Zhang","Jing Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$17e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006741"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006741","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"大模型之间的跨能力迁移（knowledge fusion）在异构、大规模模型上效果差：模型合并只适用于小同构模型，知识蒸馏全参微调容易遗忘学生模型原有能力，PEFT方法又难以充分吸收多源知识。","importance":"方法级贡献。提出模块化 SkillPack 的知识融合方案，对 pretrain 后如何高效整合多个异构大模型的能力有参考价值，尤其在 continual pretrain 和 mid-train 阶段如何避免灾难性遗忘方面提供了一种轻量路径。","technical_approach":"核心思路是将不同源模型的能力拆解为模块化的 SkillPack（可理解为一组 PEFT 模块），通过选择性组合注入目标模型。关键设计在于：不做全参蒸馏，而是用模块化参数隔离不同能力，减少能力间干扰；同时保留学生模型原有参数不动，避免遗忘。与 FuseLLM/FuseChat 的区别在于支持大规模异构模型间的迁移。","experiments":"摘要截断，具体数字不可得。从描述看，目标是将多个大异构模型的能力迁移到轻量模型上，验证多任务集成和压缩场景的效果。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Cross-capability transfer between large heterogeneous LLMs is poorly served by existing methods: model merging only works for small homogeneous models, full-parameter distillation causes catastrophic forgetting, and PEFT struggles to absorb diverse knowledge.","importance":"Method-level contribution. Neurons: A Mechanistic Mapping of Latent Coalitions in Transformer MLPs","authors":["Tanya Chowdhury","Atharva Nijasure","Yair Zick","James Allan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$182","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006840"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006840","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["interpretability","mlp","lora","representation","mechanistic"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006841","title":"Steering MoE LLMs via Expert (De)Activation","authors":["Mohsen Fayyaz","Seyed MohammadAli Modarressi","Hanieh Deilamsalehy","Franck Dernoncourt","Ryan Rossi","Trung Bui","Hinrich Schuetze","Nanyun (Violet) Peng"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) in Large Language Models (LLMs) routes each token through a subset of specialized Feed-Forward Networks (FFN), known as experts. We present SteerMoE, a framework to steer MoE models by detecting and controlling behavior-associated experts. We detect key experts by comparing how often they activate between paired inputs that demonstrate opposite behaviors (e.g., safe vs. unsafe). By selectively activating or deactivating such experts during inference, we control behaviors like faithfulness and safety without fine-tuning. Across 11 benchmarks and 6 LLMs, our steering raises safety by up to +20% and faithfulness by +27%. Alternatively, unsafe steering drops safety by -41% alone, and -100% when combined with existing jailbreak methods, bypassing all safety guardrails. Overall, SteerMoE offers a lightweight, effective, and widely applicable test-time control, while revealing unique vulnerabilities in MoE LLMs. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006841"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006841","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["moe","expert-activation","steering","safety","interpretability"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006920","title":"Decomposing to Generalize: Learning to Reason Through Game Play","authors":["Yunfei Xie","Yinsong Ma","Shiyi Lan","Alan Yuille","Junfei Xiao","Chen Wei"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$184","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006922"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006922","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：能否不用题库式多模态推理监督，而是通过游戏交互训练出可迁移的多模态推理能力。以往 MLLM 的 reasoning 提升大多依赖 benchmark-oriented 数据、人工解题轨迹或蒸馏，这种路径容易过拟合题型，也很难解释模型到底学到了通用策略还是只学会了答题格式；作者试图用游戏这种规则明确、反馈稠密、可大规模采样的环境替代这类监督。","importance":"这是一个有方法意义也有范式意味的 post-train 结果：它表明多模态推理提升不一定要来自“看过更多题”，也可能来自交互式任务中学到的规划、状态跟踪和延迟奖励处理。对 pretrain/posttrain 接口的启示很直接：如果结果成立，后训练信号的来源可以从静态语言监督扩展到具身但低成本的视觉交互环境，这比继续堆高质量 CoT 数据更便于扩展，也更接近可持续生成训练信号的方向。","technical_approach":"作者提出的是一个 RL 式 post-training 框架 ViGaL，本质上是让 7B 级 MLLM 在街机风格小游戏上通过试错学习。关键设计不是把游戏当下游任务做专门适配，而是刻意选用像 Snake 这样规则简单但要求持续视觉状态理解、短中程规划和错误恢复的环境，并且 RL 过程中不提供数学题解、公式或图表监督；这样做的目的，是把训练信号限制在“过程能力”而不是“任务答案模板”上。和常见 reasoning post-training 不同，它不从题目分布上对齐，而是从决策结构上迁移，因此它赌的是技能可转移，而不是表面格式相似。","experiments":"论文最关键的实验事实是：一个 7B MLLM 仅通过简单游戏上的 RL，就能提升 MathVista 和 MMMU 这类多模态 reasoning benchmark，并且超过一些直接在目标 benchmark 风格数据上后训练的 specialist 模型。摘要没有给出具体分数、训练步数、游戏数量、奖励设计和对比基线的完整数字，因此目前能确认的是方向性结论而不是量化上限。值得关注的点有两个：一是提升发生在未见过 worked solutions、equations、diagrams 的设置下，这支持了“能力迁移”而非数据泄漏解释；二是作者强调通用能力和原有能力可以同时保留，如果正文里确实展示了非 reasoning 能力无明显回退，这会比单纯 benchmark 提分更有说服力。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a clean question: can multimodal reasoning improve through interactive gameplay rather than benchmark-style reasoning supervision. Most prior gains in MLLM reasoning come from curated reasoning traces, task-specific post-training, or distillation, which often improves test performance without clarifying whether the model learned general decision skills or just benchmark formats; this work revisits the problem through game-based RL.","importance":"The contribution is method-level with some paradigm implications: it suggests that reasoning gains need not come from seeing more solved problems, but can emerge from learning planning, state tracking, and delayed-credit assignment in interactive environments. For the pretrain–posttrain interface, this matters because it expands the source of useful post-training signal beyond static text supervision into scalable visual interaction, which may be easier to grow than high-quality multimodal CoT data.","technical_approach":"The method, ViGaL, is an RL post-training setup where a 7B MLLM learns by playing simple arcade-style games. The key choice is to train on environments like Snake that require persistent visual state understanding and short- to medium-horizon planning, while deliberately excluding worked math solutions, equations, and diagrams from the RL phase; this forces the optimization signal toward process skills rather than answer templates. Compared with typical reasoning post-training, the transfer target is not the task distribution but the structure of decision-making.","experiments":"The central empirical claim is that RL on simple games improves downstream performance on MathVista and MMMU for a 7B MLLM, and even beats some specialist models post-trained on benchmark-oriented multimodal reasoning data. The abstract does not report exact scores, data budget, game suite size, or baseline details, so the current takeaway is directional rather than fully quantitative. Two observations matter most: the gains happen without exposing the model to solved reasoning examples during RL, which argues against benchmark leakage, and the paper claims capability preservation alongside reasoning gains, which would be more meaningful than benchmark-only improvements if validated in the full paper.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reasoning","multimodal","post-training","rl"],"notable_authors":["Alan Yuille","Junfei Xiao"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006937","title":"Learning is Forgetting; LLM Training As Lossy Compression","authors":["Henry Conklin","Tom Hosking","Yi-Chern Tan","Jonathan Cohen","Sarah-Jane Leslie","Thomas L. Griffiths","Max Bartolo","Seraphina Goldfarb-Tarrant"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$185","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006937"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006937","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：LLM 训练后形成的表示空间是否可以理解为一种有目标约束的有损压缩，以及这种视角能否解释不同模型家族的共性与差异。过去我们常用能力、损失或探针分析模型，但较少直接从 information bottleneck 角度把‘学到什么’和‘忘掉什么’统一起来。","importance":"这是一篇偏理论与表征分析的工作。它的贡献不是给出新的训练方法，而是提出一个对预训练更有解释力的框架：预训练在逼近 next-sequence prediction 所允许的最优压缩。这个视角对 pretrain 研究有价值，因为它把数据、目标函数和模型内部表示联系起来——如果模型确实接近信息瓶颈边界，那么很多看似经验性的 recipe 差异，可能可以重新理解为‘保留哪些信息更划算’的压缩策略差异。","technical_approach":"作者把 LLM 预训练表述为 lossy compression，并用 Information Bottleneck bound 来衡量模型在保留任务相关信息、丢弃无关信息上的最优性。方法上看，论文似乎不是训练新模型，而是对一系列开源模型做表示压缩程度分析，比较不同家族在达到预测目标时的信息保留方式。关键点不在于宣称模型真的做了显式压缩，而是在定量上检验：预训练后的表示是否接近理论上对 next-token/next-sequence 预测足够的最小信息量。","experiments":"摘要声称：多个 open-weight 模型在预训练后都接近针对 next-sequence prediction 的最优压缩，即接近 Information Bottleneck bound；不同家族虽然压缩方式不同，但仍表现出这种接近最优的趋势。摘要没有给出模型名单、层级分析粒度、压缩估计方法和误差范围，因此很难判断结论对估计器是否敏感。真正值得关注的是两点：一是这种‘接近最优’是否随着模型规模增长而增强，二是 recipe 差异到底表现为压缩率不同还是压缩内容不同。如果后者能被具体识别，这篇工作会比一般表征分析更有用。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether LLM training can be understood as objective-constrained lossy compression, and whether that view helps explain both the similarities and differences across model families. We often analyze models through accuracy, loss, or probes, but less often through a unified account of what the model keeps and what it discards during pretraining.","importance":"This is primarily a representation-analysis and theory paper. It does not propose a new training recipe; instead, it argues that pretraining approaches the optimal compression required for next-sequence prediction. That is relevant for pretraining research because it links data, objectives, and internal representations under one lens: many recipe differences may be better understood as differences in which information is worth retaining under a fixed predictive objective.","technical_approach":"The authors cast LLM pretraining as lossy compression and use the Information Bottleneck bound to assess how close learned representations are to retaining only task-relevant information. From the abstract, the work appears to analyze a range of open-weight models rather than train a new system, comparing how different families compress information while still supporting prediction. The important point is not that models explicitly optimize an IB objective, but that their final representations may empirically sit close to the minimum information needed for next-sequence prediction.","experiments":"The main empirical claim is that multiple open-weight models after pretraining approach the Information Bottleneck bound for next-sequence prediction, even though different model families compress in different ways. The abstract does not list the models, estimation procedure, granularity of analysis, or uncertainty of the measurements, so it is hard to judge estimator sensitivity from the available text. The most informative questions for the full paper are whether this near-optimality strengthens with scale, and whether recipe differences change the amount of compression or the content being preserved.","authors_note":""},"tags":["training-dynamics","compression","representation","generalization"],"notable_authors":["Tom Hosking","Sarah-Jane Leslie"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006945","title":"Critique-Coder: Enhancing Coder Models by Critique Reinforcement Learning","authors":["Chi Ruan","Dongfu Jiang","Yubo Wang","Wenhu Chen"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$186","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006945"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006945","category_id":"coding_agent","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：代码模型的 RL 训练通常只奖励“生成解答”，缺少显式培养 critique/反思能力的机制，而这类能力对发现错误解、提升代码鲁棒性很重要。以往 CFT、CGD 等工作说明教模型做 critique 有帮助，但更多依赖监督蒸馏；作者想把这一点直接纳入 RL。","importance":"这项工作的重要性在于把 RL 的优化对象从“直接产出答案”扩展到“判断和批评答案”，这对 reasoning-coder 类模型是很自然也很必要的一步。对 pretrain/posttrain 的启示是，后训练 reward 设计不该只盯着最终任务完成，还可以显式塑造中间认知动作；如果 critique 能通过独立 reward 学稳，再与解题生成结合，可能比单头 answer-only RL 更不容易 reward hack。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Critique Reinforcement Learning（CRL），让模型针对给定的 (question, solution) 生成 critique，并只根据 critique 最终给出的真假判断标签是否与 ground truth 一致来给奖励。这个设计非常克制：reward 不评估 critique 文本是否优雅或详细，只看最终判别是否正确，从而把学习压力集中在‘是否看懂并识别解答对错’上。摘要还提到在此基础上引入了 Critique- 开头的进一步方案，但名字被截断；从已知描述看，论文的核心创新仍是把 critique 作为 RL 主任务，而不是附属辅助头。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体代码 benchmark、模型规模和提升数字，因此暂时无法判断方法在 pass@k、bug detection 还是 explanation quality 上的真实收益。现阶段能确认的实验重点应是：与直接做代码生成 RL 相比，CRL 是否更擅长识别错误程序；这种能力能否反过来提升最终 coding performance；以及仅用二元 judgment reward 是否足够，还是会诱导模型学会短路式启发判断。如果正文有联合训练 critique 与 generation 的结果，会决定这项工作是独立有用的评估器训练，还是能真正提升 coder 主模型。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a gap in RL training for code models: most RL setups reward direct solution generation but do not explicitly train critique or reflection, even though those abilities matter for catching incorrect solutions and improving robustness. Prior critique-focused methods such as CFT and CGD suggest critique helps, but they are mostly supervised or distillation-based; this work moves critique into RL.","importance":"The contribution is important because it broadens the object of RL optimization from producing answers to judging answers. For reasoning-oriented code models, that is a natural extension. The broader implication for pretrain and post-train research is that reward design need not focus only on end-task completion; it can explicitly shape intermediate cognitive actions, and critique-specific rewards may be less prone to some forms of reward hacking than answer-only RL.","technical_approach":"The proposed Critique Reinforcement Learning (CRL) trains the model to generate a critique for a given question–solution pair, with reward determined solely by whether the critique’s final True/False judgment matches the ground-truth label. This is a deliberately minimal reward design: it ignores stylistic quality and detail of the critique, and concentrates optimization on whether the model can correctly inspect and judge a candidate solution. The abstract mentions an additional Critique- variant built on top of CRL, but the name is truncated; from the visible text, the main novelty is clearly to make critique itself the RL task rather than an auxiliary objective.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide benchmark names, model sizes, or quantitative gains, so it is not yet possible to assess impact on pass@k, bug detection, or critique quality. The main experimental questions are whether CRL improves error detection over standard code-generation RL, whether that judgment ability transfers back to stronger coding performance, and whether a binary judgment reward is sufficient or encourages shortcut heuristics. Results that jointly train critique and generation will be especially important for deciding whether this is mainly a critique model or a path to better coder models.","authors_note":""},"tags":["code","rl","critique","post-training"],"notable_authors":["Wenhu Chen"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006978","title":"ReTool: Reinforcement Learning for Strategic Tool Use in LLMs","authors":["Jiazhan Feng","Shijue Huang","Xingwei Qu","Ge Zhang","Yujia Qin","Baoquan Zhong","Chengquan Jiang","Jinxin Chi","Wanjun Zhong"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$187","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006978"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006978","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"纯推理 RL 训练的模型在需要结构化计算的场景（几何推理、精确计算、复杂方程求解）表现不佳，而代码解释器在这些场景有明显优势。如何让模型在长链推理中动态决定何时调用工具、何时用自然语言推理，是一个未被很好解决的问题。","importance":"方法级贡献。ReTool 提出了一个系统化的 RL 训练框架，让模型学会在推理过程中实时交错执行代码，而不是事后调用工具。对 pretrain→posttrain 闭环的启示：工具使用不应该是推理之外的附加能力，而应该作为推理策略的一部分被 RL 直接优化。","technical_approach":"两个关键设计：1）动态交错——在自然语言推理流程中实时插入代码执行，而非推理结束后统一调用；2）自动化 RL 范式——policy rollout 中支持多轮实时代码执行，模型通过 outcome feedback 学习何时以及如何调用工具。训练流程是系统化的：先有基础推理能力，再通过 RL 学习工具调用策略。与纯 prompting 方式的工具使用相比，ReTool 是通过训练让模型内化工具使用决策。","experiments":"在几何推理、计算和方程求解等任务上验证。具体模型规模、baseline 和提升幅度在摘要中未完整给出。核心观察是动态交错代码执行比纯自然语言推理或事后工具调用都更有效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"RL-trained reasoning models struggle with structured problem-solving (geometry, precise computation, complex equations) where code interpreters excel. The challenge is teaching models to dynamically decide when to invoke tools during long-chain reasoning, not just after reasoning is complete.","importance":"Method-level contribution. ReTool provides a systematic RL framework for learning tool-integrated reasoning with real-time code execution interleaved in natural language reasoning. For the pretrain-posttrain loop, the insight is that tool use should be optimized as part of the reasoning policy via RL, not bolted on as a separate capability.","technical_approach":"Two key features: (1) dynamic interleaving of real-time code execution within natural language reasoning, rather than post-hoc tool calls; (2) an automated RL paradigm where policy rollouts include multi-turn real-time code execution, and the model learns when/how to invoke tools from outcome feedback. The training pipeline starts with base reasoning capability, then adds tool-use strategy via RL. Unlike prompting-based tool use, ReTool internalizes tool invocation decisions through training.","experiments":"Validated on geometric reasoning, computation, and equation solving tasks. Specific model scale, baselines, and improvement magnitudes not fully detailed in the abstract. Core finding: dynamic interleaving of code execution outperforms both pure NL reasoning and post-hoc tool invocation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rl","tool-use","reasoning","post-training"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006997","title":"Test-Time Scaling with Reflective Generative Model","authors":["Zixiao Wang","Yuxin Wang","Xiaorui Wang","Mengting Xing","Jie Gao","Jianjun Xu","Guangcan Liu","Chenhui Jin","Zhuo Wang","Shengzhuo zhang","Hongtao Xie"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$188","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006997"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006997","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"Test-time scaling 需要在推理时选择高质量推理轨迹，但现有方法要么依赖独立的 process reward model（PRM，需要过程级标注），要么缺乏统一的策略-评估接口。RGM 提出一种不依赖过程级标注的统一方案。","importance":"方法级贡献。RGM 用共享 backbone + 任务特定 head 的方式统一了策略模型和 PRM，仅增加 50M 参数用于轨迹打分。更重要的是提出了自监督 PRM（SPRM），直接从 outcome reward 学习过程级轨迹选择，消除了对过程级标注的依赖。声称达到 OpenAI o3-mini 水平。对 pretrain→posttrain 的启示：PRM 不一定需要昂贵的过程标注，outcome supervision 可能足够。","technical_approach":"Reflective Generative Form 包含两个创新：1）策略模型和 PRM 共享 backbone，用任务特定 head 分别做推理轨迹预测和打分，仅额外引入 50M 参数；2）自监督 PRM（SPRM）从 outcome reward 直接学习高质量轨迹选择，不需要过程级标注。推理时通过控制生成和评估的交替来实现 test-time scaling。与独立 PRM 方案相比，参数开销极小且避免了标注瓶颈。","experiments":"声称达到 OpenAI o3-mini 的性能水平。PRM 部分仅增加 50M 参数。具体 benchmark、模型规模和对比数字在摘要中未完整给出。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Test-time scaling requires selecting high-quality reasoning trajectories, but existing methods either need separate process reward models (PRMs) with expensive process-level annotations, or lack a unified policy-evaluation interface. RGM proposes a unified solution without process-level annotation.","importance":"Method-level contribution. RGM unifies the policy model and PRM via shared backbone with task-specific heads, adding only 50M parameters for trajectory scoring. More importantly, it introduces a self-supervised PRM (SPRM) that learns process-level trajectory selection from outcome rewards alone, eliminating the annotation bottleneck. Claims o3-mini-level performance. For pretrain→posttrain: PRMs may not need expensive process annotations; outcome supervision can suffice.","technical_approach":"Reflective Generative Form has two innovations: (1) shared backbone for policy and PRM with task-specific heads—only 50M extra parameters for scoring; (2) self-supervised PRM (SPRM) learns high-quality trajectory selection directly from outcome rewards without process-level annotation. At inference, alternates between generation and evaluation for test-time scaling. Compared to standalone PRM approaches: minimal parameter overhead and no annotation bottleneck.","experiments":"Claims performance on par with OpenAI o3-mini. PRM adds only 50M parameters. However, accuracy often degrades sharply when activations are at low bit widths.  Recent work suggests that invertible linear transformations (e.g. rotations) can aid quantization, by reparameterizing feature channels and weights.  In this paper, we propose Sequence Transformation and Mixed Precision (STaMP) quantization, a novel strategy that applies linear transformations along the sequence dimension to exploit the strong local correlation in language and visual data.  By keeping a small number of tokens in each intermediate activation at higher precision, we can maintain model accuracy at lower (average) activations bit-widths. We evaluate STaMP on recent LVM and LLM architectures, demonstrating that it significantly improves low bit width activation quantization and complements established activation and weight quantization methods including recent feature transformations. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007028"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007028","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"低比特激活量化往往比权重量化更容易崩，因为激活分布随 token/位置变化大，直接压到 4bit/更低会出现尖锐精度损失。","importance":"这是量化方法级贡献：把“旋转/线性变换有利量化”的思路从 channel 维扩展到 sequence 维，并用少量高精度 token 做混合精度兜底，面向 LLM/LVM 推理的端到端性价比。","technical_approach":"STaMP 做两件事：第一，在序列维度施加可逆线性变换，利用语言/视觉序列的局部相关性，把难量化的激活能量在 token 维上更均匀地分配；第二，对每层中少量 token 保持更高精度，其余 token 用更低比特，从而在平均 bit-width 很低时仍保精度。为什么有效：序列相关性意味着信息冗余可被“重排/混合”后更适配均匀量化；混合精度把最敏感位置（如特殊 token 或高幅值 token）从量化噪声中保护出来。代价是实现复杂度上升（需要变换与 token 选择策略），并且对长上下文/分布漂移时 token 相关性假设可能变弱。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体 bit 配置（如平均 3.x bit）、token 保高精度的比例、模型与任务、以及与 SmoothQuant/旋转类方法的数值对比；只说明在近期 LVM/LLM 架构上评估并主张低比特激活下更稳。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Low-bit activation quantization often collapses accuracy because activations vary strongly across tokens/positions; pushing activations to ~4-bit or below introduces large quantization noise.","importance":"This is a quantization method contribution: it extends rotation/linear-transform ideas from channel space to sequence space and combines it with token-level mixed precision, targeting better end-to-end efficiency for LLM/LVM inference.","technical_approach":"STaMP applies an invertible linear transform along the sequence dimension to exploit local correlation, making activations more quantization-friendly by redistributing energy across tokens. It then keeps a small subset of tokens at higher precision while quantizing the rest more aggressively, achieving low average bit-width without catastrophic loss. The trade-offs are added implementation complexity (transforms + token selection) and potential brittleness when long-context regimes weaken local correlation assumptions.","experiments":"The abstract does not report exact bit settings, the fraction of high-precision tokens, model/task details, or numeric comparisons against baselines like SmoothQuant or rotation-based methods. Claims are directional rather than fully quantified here.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlvr","data-efficiency","reasoning","policy-optimization"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007051","title":"Semantic-aware Wasserstein Policy Regularization for Large Language Model Alignment","authors":["Byeonghu Na","Hyungho Na","Yeongmin Kim","Suhyeon Jo","HeeSun Bae","Mina Kang","Il-chul Moon"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Large language models (LLMs) are commonly aligned with human preferences using reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). In this method, LLM policies are generally optimized through reward maximization with Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence regularization of the reference policy. However, KL and its $f$-divergence variants only compare token probabilities at identical indices, failing to capture semantic similarity. We propose Wasserstein Policy Regularization (WPR), a semantic-aware regularization for the RLHF framework based on the entropy-regularized Wasserstein distance, which incorporates the geometry of the token space. The dual formulation of the distance expresses the regularization as penalty terms applied to the reward via optimal dual variables, which yield a tractable objective compatible with standard RL algorithms. Empirically, our method outperforms KL- and $f$-divergence-based baselines, demonstrating the benefits of semantic-aware policy distances for alignment. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007051"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007051","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：RLHF 里最常用的 KL 正则只比较同一 token 位点上的概率差异，无法表达“语义接近但词面不同”的策略偏移。过去大家接受 KL，主要因为它稳定、便宜、易优化，但它会把语义等价改写和真正意义上的分布漂移混在一起，导致对齐训练既可能过度约束，也可能错罚。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于把 RLHF 正则项从 token-level matching 推到 semantic-aware matching，属于方法级改动，但如果证据充分，影响会很广。原因很直接：对齐训练里 reward 往往稀疏且噪声大，正则项实际上决定了模型“能偏离参考到什么程度”。如果正则能区分语义邻近和语义偏移，就有机会在不放松安全边界的前提下减少无谓束缚，这对大模型对齐和 reasoning-style post-training 都有现实价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Wasserstein Policy Regularization, WPR：用带熵正则的 Wasserstein 距离替代 KL 作为参考策略约束。它不是简单把一个散度换成另一个，而是显式引入 token 空间几何，把词与词之间的“运输代价”编码进正则里。作者采用对偶形式把 Wasserstein 项改写成对 reward 的可计算惩罚，因此训练接口仍接近现有 RLHF 管线，不需要直接解高成本最优传输。和 f-divergence 类方法相比，差别在于它允许质量从一个 token 流向语义相近 token，而不是只盯住同一索引位置。","experiments":"摘要确认作者做了 tractable objective 设计并在 RLHF 框架中验证，但没有给出模型规模、任务集和具体数字，因此现在只能判断方法动机强、实现路径相对合理。真正值得关注的实验点应包括：相对 KL/PPO 或 DPO-style baseline，在 reward、win rate、长度分布、熵塌缩和 off-distribution 行为上的变化；以及 cost matrix 的构造对结果是否敏感。若正文显示收益主要来自更平滑的探索而非真正语义几何，那这项方法的外推价值会打折。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a limitation in standard RLHF regularization: KL only compares probability mass at the same token index and ignores semantic similarity across tokens. KL has remained dominant because it is cheap and stable, but it cannot tell apart meaning-preserving rewrites from genuinely harmful policy drift. That makes it easy to overconstrain harmless variation and mis-handle semantically nearby actions.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with potentially broad implications. In alignment training, the reward is often noisy and sparse, so the regularizer effectively defines how far the policy is allowed to move from the reference. A semantic-aware regularizer could preserve safety-relevant control while removing unnecessary penalties on paraphrastic or equivalent outputs. If the empirical gains are real, this would matter beyond one algorithm because it changes the geometry of policy optimization itself.","technical_approach":"The core idea is Wasserstein Policy Regularization (WPR): replace KL with an entropy-regularized Wasserstein distance between policies. This is not just swapping one divergence for another. The design explicitly injects token-space geometry through a transport cost, so probability mass can move to semantically nearby tokens at lower penalty. The authors use the dual form to express the regularizer as reward-side penalty terms, which keeps the objective tractable and closer to existing RLHF pipelines than a naïve optimal-transport implementation would. The key difference from KL or other f-divergences is that WPR compares distributions through semantic transport rather than index-wise mismatch.","experiments":"The abstract establishes tractability and claims effectiveness in RLHF, but gives no model sizes, benchmarks, or effect sizes, so the current read is qualitative rather than quantitative. The most important empirical checks are whether WPR improves reward and preference metrics over KL-based baselines without destabilizing training, and whether it changes length, entropy, and off-distribution behavior in useful ways. A crucial ablation will be sensitivity to the token-distance matrix: if gains depend heavily on a hand-crafted geometry, deployment value becomes narrower.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rlhf","wasserstein","kl-divergence","alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007056","title":"To Infinity and Beyond: Tool-Use Unlocks Length Generalization in State Space Models","authors":["Eran Malach","Omid Saremi","Sinead Williamson","Arwen Bradley","Aryo Lotfi","Emmanuel Abbe","Joshua Susskind","Etai Littwin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$18b","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007056"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007056","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心结论是：纯 SSM 不能可靠解决真正意义上的长程生成问题，单靠线性复杂度和固定状态并不能自动带来长度泛化。过去社区常把 SSM 的长上下文效率理解为潜在能力优势，但作者指出，如果任务要求随长度增长持续保存并操作精确信息，固定大小内部状态会构成理论瓶颈。","importance":"这项工作的重要性偏范式和边界澄清。它一方面给 SSM 的“长序列替代 Transformer”叙事泼了冷水，说明效率优势不等于算法能力优势；另一方面也给出建设性路径：把外部工具访问纳入序列模型设计后，长度泛化可以重新成立。对 pretrain 研究的启示是，未来讨论长上下文能力时，不能只看 backbone 的渐近复杂度，还要看是否允许显式外部记忆和交互式计算。","technical_approach":"方法上分两部分。第一部分是理论负结果：作者形式化定义“truly long-form”生成问题，并证明 SSM 无法精确求解这类任务。第二部分是正结果：给 SSM 提供合适的工具接口和按问题构造的训练数据后，模型可以学会通过交互式调用外部工具，把内部有限状态变成控制器而非全部记忆载体。和直接增大隐状态或堆更深网络不同，这里选择的是架构外化——把不可压缩的信息搬到外部工具，使模型学习读写和规划。","experiments":"摘要没有提供具体模型规模、任务设置或数值结果，但主张非常明确：带工具的 SSM 可以在长度上泛化到任意复杂度，而裸 SSM 不行。实验上最关键的价值不在常规 benchmark 分数，而在是否出现 clear extrapolation：训练长度外的成功率是否保持、工具调用是否随问题规模合理扩展、以及和 Transformer/tool-use baseline 相比谁在 sample efficiency 上更好。若正文只在合成任务成立，这更像能力证明；若在程序执行、检索或长推理任务上也成立，影响会更实。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The central claim is that plain SSMs cannot reliably solve truly long-form generation problems. Linear-time recurrence and fixed-size state buy efficiency, but not length generalization on tasks that require preserving and manipulating information that grows with sequence length. The paper pushes back on an implicit assumption in the field: efficient long-context modeling is not the same as solving long-horizon computation.","importance":"This matters at the paradigm and boundary-setting level. It weakens the common narrative that SSMs are a drop-in long-context replacement for Transformers, at least from an algorithmic capability standpoint. At the same time, it offers a constructive alternative: with external tool access, the length-generalization story can be recovered. For pretraining research, the lesson is that long-context claims should be framed in terms of compute model plus memory interface, not backbone complexity alone.","technical_approach":"The paper has two parts. First, a negative theoretical result: the authors define a class of “truly long-form” generation problems and show that SSMs cannot solve them accurately. Second, a positive result: if an SSM is given suitable interactive access to external tools and trained on problem-structured data, it can offload the non-compressible part of the computation and generalize to arbitrary problem length. The design choice is important. Instead of trying to stuff more information into the recurrent state by scaling the model, the approach externalizes memory and uses the SSM as a controller that learns when and how to query tools.","experiments":"The abstract does not include model sizes, datasets, or quantitative metrics, but the empirical claim is clear: tool-enabled SSMs extrapolate in length while vanilla SSMs fail. That assumption is questionable once connectors, pooling, and cross-modal interfaces are involved.","importance":"This is important as a mechanistic diagnostic study rather than a new modeling recipe. If the authors can map the actual visual information pathways, the work helps explain a common LVLM failure mode: the model appears to have seen the image, yet the answer ignores specific visual evidence. For multimodal pretraining, the implication is practical: scaling the ViT or the LLM may not fix the problem if the token transport path itself discards the right signals.","technical_approach":"From the abstract, the focus is on tracing information flow rather than merely identifying salient image tokens. Relative to standard attention-map analysis, this is more about cross-module transmission efficiency and causal contribution to output than local importance in one component. 等偏好目标常常在参数更新层面互相干扰，导致一边提升一边回退。过去很多方法在损失权重、约束优化或数据筛选上打补丁，但没有直接处理“梯度在参数空间里打架”这个根因。","importance":"这项工作的价值在方法级，而且如果结果扎实，对多目标 alignment 很有潜力。它的重要性在于把“目标冲突”从外层权重平衡问题转成参数几何问题。对 post-training 的启示很明确：当多个偏好目标来自不同数据源和奖励模型时，更新空间的解耦可能比继续调 loss 系数更有效。边界是，这类方法只能缓解梯度冲突，不能凭空消除真正不可兼容的人类偏好。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 OrthAlign：将参数更新空间分解为正交子空间，从而让不同目标主要沿彼此不干扰的方向更新。和传统多目标优化只在每步做 gradient projection 不同，OrthAlign 看起来更强调稳定的子空间分解，让共享参数中的不同“功能方向”承担不同目标。这个设计有效的前提是：不同偏好目标至少部分可在几何上分离。如果成立，模型可以减少灾难性干扰；如果不成立，强行正交化可能压缩可用表示容量，带来主任务退化。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体任务、模型规模和提升数字，因此现在只能确认它主打 non-interfering multi-objective alignment。实验上最关键的是：相对 scalarization、PCGrad、MGDA、constraint-based alignment 等基线，是否同时提高多维指标而不是移动 Pareto 点；以及子空间维度、分解频率、参数覆盖范围对结果的影响。还要看是否存在明显副作用，比如训练变慢、某一目标被过度局部化后泛化下降。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a central problem in multi-objective alignment: preferences such as helpfulness, harmlessness, and honesty often interfere at the parameter-update level, so improving one objective degrades another. Prior approaches mostly patch this from the outside through loss weighting, constrained optimization, or data filtering, without directly addressing the fact that gradients are competing in the same parameter space.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with potentially strong relevance to practical alignment. The key shift is to treat objective conflict as a geometric problem in parameter space rather than only a trade-off in scalarized losses. For post-training, that matters because preference objectives often come from different datasets and reward models; reducing update interference may be more effective than endlessly tuning coefficients. The boundary is important too: no geometric trick can eliminate genuinely incompatible human preferences.","technical_approach":"The method, OrthAlign, decomposes parameter update space into orthogonal subspaces so different objectives can update along largely non-interfering directions. Unlike standard multi-objective methods that only project gradients at each step, OrthAlign appears to aim for a more persistent subspace structure, assigning different functional directions of the model to different alignment objectives. This can work if the objectives are at least partly separable in geometry. If they are not, forced orthogonalization could waste representational capacity and hurt the main task.","experiments":"The abstract does not include tasks, model sizes, or effect sizes, so the current read is based on problem relevance rather than demonstrated magnitude. Important ablations should cover subspace dimension, decomposition update frequency, and which parameter blocks are included. If random-order parallel decoding can preserve quality while improving speed, AR generation regains some competitiveness against diffusion on inference efficiency while keeping its strengths as a unified generative framework.","technical_approach":"The method, ARPG, enables Randomized Parallel Generation for visual autoregressive models. The key insight is that random-order generation requires two things: predicting content and deciding which position to fill next. The model therefore decouples positional guidance from content representation, encoding them separately and feeding them into causal attention as queries versus key-value context. This allows fully random-order training and generation without switching to bidirectional attention or masked-reconstruction objectives. Compared with raster-order AR, the generation order becomes an explicit condition instead of a fixed prior. We propose a different paradigm: instead of solely feeding visual features into language, we use language itself to dynamically guide the vision encoder. Our method, Language-Instructed Vision Embeddings (LIVE), leverages language as high-level guidance to produce task-centric embeddings at inference time—without requiring task-specific retraining. Empirically, LIVE reduces visual hallucinations (+34 points on MMVP), outperforms vision–language models with orders of magnitude more parameters on visual question answering, and generalizes to unseen instructions and  tasks---offering a direct path toward adaptive, instruction-driven visual intelligence. capable of generating up to 30 seconds of 44.1kHz audio in 3.7 seconds on a A40 GPU. Reasoning Hop Exposes Weaknesses: Demystifying and Improving Hop Generalization in Large Language Models","authors":["Zhaoyi Li","Jiatong Li","Gangwei Jiang","Linqi Song","Defu Lian","Ying Wei"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$195","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007253"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007253","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：为什么 LLM 在 reasoning hop 超出训练分布时会突然失效，以及这种失效能否被机制化定位和修复。过去大家知道多跳泛化差，但多数分析停留在任务级准确率下降，没有回答错误究竟集中在哪些 token、由哪些内部模块造成。","importance":"这是一个机制分析驱动的方法工作，对推理泛化研究有直接价值。它的重要性在于把“hop generalization 失败”从一个模糊现象，拆成可定位的 token-level error pattern 和特定注意力头的竞争行为。对 pretrain 和 posttrain 的启示是：推理长度外推不只是数据分布问题，也可能是内部电路里少数错误处理头在关键位置抢占了表示通道。","technical_approach":"作者的核心做法是系统分析多域任务中的 token 级错误分布，并将错误追溯到一类 attention heads，称为 erroneous processing heads。关键观察是，错误并非均匀扩散，而是集中发生在少数关键 token 位置和少数错误类型上；这些位置对应的内部竞争，会让错误头压过真正有用的推理头。方法上应该包含 attention/activation tracing、错误类型归因，以及基于这一发现提出的改进策略。与单纯加长 CoT 或做更多长链数据训练不同，这条路线试图直接修理内部竞争机制，因此更接近“找病灶再开药”。","experiments":"摘要明确说作者在多个领域任务上做了系统研究，并发现错误集中而非平均分布，这本身就是重要实验事实。改进部分应当展示在超出训练 hop 数的测试集上显著提升，并对关键 token 位置的准确率提升更明显；但摘要没有提供模型规模、任务名称、训练 hop / 测试 hop 差距、baseline 和具体百分点。最值得关注的消融会是：去掉被识别的错误头后性能是否回升、改进是否只对长 hop 有效、以及是否牺牲训练分布内表现。如果 in-distribution 保持不变而 OOD hop 明显提升，这个结论会比较扎实。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper investigates why LLMs fail sharply when the required reasoning hop count exceeds what they saw in training, even when the underlying algorithm stays the same. Prior work documented the drop, but did not localize where the errors occur or which internal components cause them.","importance":"This is a mechanism-driven reasoning paper with practical implications. Its main contribution is to turn hop generalization failure from a task-level symptom into a token-level and circuit-level diagnosis. For both pretraining and post-training, the takeaway is that length extrapolation is not only a data coverage issue; it can also be caused by a small set of attention heads competing incorrectly at critical positions.","technical_approach":"The method is a systematic analysis of token-level error concentration across multiple domains, followed by attribution to specific attention heads termed erroneous processing heads. The key result is that mistakes are not diffuse. They cluster on a small number of critical tokens and error types, where harmful heads override useful reasoning heads. The proposed improvement likely builds on this diagnosis rather than just adding longer CoT data. That is the main distinction from standard scaling-based fixes: it targets the failure mechanism directly.","experiments":"The abstract clearly states that the authors run a broad study across several tasks and consistently find concentrated token-level failures. The intervention should then show stronger performance on test-time hop lengths beyond the training range, especially at those critical positions, but no concrete model sizes, datasets, baselines, or gains are given in the abstract. The most important ablations would test whether suppressing the identified heads improves long-hop generalization, whether the gain is specific to extrapolation, and whether in-distribution performance is preserved.","authors_note":""},"tags":["cot","reasoning-generalization","hop-generalization","llm-mechanism"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007269","title":"Cache What Lasts: Token Retention for Memory-Bounded KV Cache in LLMs","authors":["Ngoc Bui","Shubham Sharma","Simran Lamba","Saumitra Mishra","Rex Ying"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$196","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007269"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007269","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：在长上下文推理中，KV cache 受内存约束时，应该丢掉哪些 token，现有基于注意力分数的启发式往往不可靠，而且量化、offloading 等方法有额外调度成本。作者要做的是在 token 生成时就预测它未来是否值得保留，而不是等到后面再被动根据瞬时信号做淘汰。","importance":"这是一个推理系统方法，但对训练也有反馈价值。它的重要性在于提出了一个更前瞻的 cache 管理视角：token 的长期效用可以在创建时被估计，并且这种估计可以按层、按头细化。对大模型研究的启示是，记忆预算下的推理质量不一定要靠复杂 orchestration 才能换到，模型内部可能学得出更稳定的 retention policy。","technical_approach":"作者提出 TRIM-KV，其核心是一个轻量 retention gate，在每个 token 创建时输出一个随时间衰减的 retention score，并按层、按 head 建模其长期价值。当内存预算超限时，低分 token 被驱逐，保证 cache 保留更可能长期有用的内容。与基于当前 attention 权重的 eviction 相比，这里不是用事后代理变量猜重要性，而是把“长期可用性预测”做成一个可学习问题。这样设计有效，因为瞬时 attention 往往混杂位置偏置和局部模式，不能稳定代表未来贡献；但代价是需要额外训练 gate，并且 retention 预测若分布外失效，会带来系统性遗漏。","experiments":"摘要表明方法面向 memory-bounded 长上下文推理，并且强调优于注意力代理与高开销方案。合理预期实验会在不同上下文长度和 cache 预算下，对比 heuristic eviction、量化和 offloading 方法，报告准确率或 perplexity 降幅、吞吐与显存占用。摘要没有给出模型大小、上下文长度、预算比例和具体数字，因此还不能判断这是偏小模型验证还是可迁移到生产规模。关键消融应包括：按层/按头 gate 是否必要、衰减机制是否优于静态分数、以及 gate 训练是否能泛化到更长上下文。","authors_note":"作者中有 Rex Ying，长期做图学习与高效系统方向。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical long-context inference question: under a fixed KV-cache budget, which tokens should be retained? Existing eviction heuristics often rely on attention-based proxies that are noisy, while alternatives such as offloading or quantization add orchestration overhead. The authors instead predict retention value when a token is created.","importance":"This is an inference systems paper with useful modeling implications. Its main contribution is a forward-looking view of cache management: a token’s long-term utility can be estimated at birth, and this estimate can be specialized per layer and head. For LLM research, that suggests memory-bounded inference may benefit from learned retention policies rather than only external engineering tricks.","technical_approach":"TRIM-KV introduces a lightweight retention gate that assigns each newly created token a scalar score that decays over time, capturing expected long-term usefulness for each layer and head. When the cache exceeds budget, low-score tokens are evicted. The key difference from heuristic eviction is that importance is learned as a future utility prediction problem rather than inferred from current attention patterns. That is a sensible choice because instantaneous attention is a noisy proxy, often entangled with positional bias and local structure. The trade-off is that the gate itself must be trained and may fail under distribution shift.","experiments":"The abstract establishes the intended setting clearly: memory-bounded long-context inference, with comparisons against attention-based eviction and more expensive memory-saving strategies. The natural metrics are quality degradation versus full-cache decoding, throughput, and memory usage across different budgets and context lengths. But the abstract provides no model scales, context lengths, or exact gains, so it is still unclear how far the approach transfers to production-size models. The most useful ablations would test per-layer/per-head gating, the time-decay design, and generalization to longer contexts than seen during training.","authors_note":"Rex Ying is known for work in graph learning and efficient ML systems."},"tags":["kv-cache","long-context","token-eviction","inference-efficiency"],"notable_authors":["Rex Ying"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007303","title":"Reconstruction Alignment Improves Unified Multimodal Models","authors":["Ji Xie","trevor darrell","Luke Zettlemoyer","Xudong Wang"],"institutions":["UC Berkeley","Meta"],"abstract":"$197","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007303"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007303","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"统一多模态模型（UMM）的训练依赖图文对，但 caption 通常稀疏，无法覆盖图像的细粒度视觉细节，即使用几百个词描述一张简单图像也不够。这限制了理解和生成能力的对齐。","importance":"方法级贡献，对 VLM 预训练/后训练有直接启示。RecA 用模型自身的视觉理解 embedding 作为密集监督信号替代稀疏 caption，以自监督重建损失重新对齐理解和生成，资源高效且通用。这个思路对 native multimodal pretrain 中如何解决图文对齐的信号稀疏问题很有参考价值。","technical_approach":"Reconstruction Alignment (RecA)：将 UMM 自身的视觉理解编码器输出作为密集 'text prompts'，条件化模型去重建输入图像，用自监督重建损失优化。核心设计是绕过 caption 的信息瓶颈，直接用视觉 embedding 提供丰富监督。是 post-training 方法，资源高效，适用范围广。","experiments":"摘要截断，具体模型、benchmark 和提升数字未完整给出。核心 claim 是 RecA 简单但广泛适用，能改善 UMM 的理解-生成对齐。","authors_note":"Trevor Darrell 是 UC Berkeley 的知名视觉研究者；Luke Zettlemoyer 是 UW/Meta 的 NLP 领域重要人物。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Unified multimodal models rely on image-text pairs for training, but captions are sparse and miss fine-grained visual details, limiting understanding-generation alignment.","importance":"Method-level contribution directly relevant to VLM pretrain/post-train.
