Uncertainty Estimation in LLMs: A Principled Single-Sequence Measure","authors":["Lukas Aichberger","Kajetan Schweighofer","Sepp Hochreiter"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$29a","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006713"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006713","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：能不能只看一条生成序列，就得到有理论依据、且足够好用的 LLM 不确定性估计。过去主流方法通常要采样多条回答，再看分歧、熵或一致性，这样做推理成本高，而且把不确定性定义和采样策略绑得太紧；作者想把问题重新放回 proper scoring rules 这个更干净的统计框架里。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要是方法论层面的校正：它指出多序列不确定性估计未必是必要前提，单序列也可以有 principled 的定义。对 pretrain 和 serving 的启发在于，很多依赖采样集成的置信度设计，可能只是工程折中而不是统计必需；如果单序列指标足够稳，就能显著降低大规模部署中的延迟和成本。","technical_approach":"核心方法是把“最可能输出序列的负对数似然”当作单序列不确定性度量，并用 greedy decoding 得到可计算近似 G-NLL。设计上它不是再造一个启发式分数，而是先从 proper scoring rule 推导出什么样的序列级分数是合理的，再选择最容易落地的近似路径；与最接近的多样本方法相比，它放弃了显式估计输出分布形状，换来的是一次解码即可完成评估。这个选择有效的前提是：模型的高概率输出能代表其主要信念质量；边界则是强多峰分布或 decoding 偏差很大时，单条 greedy 路径可能低估不确定性。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的关键实验结论是：G-NLL 在多个不确定性评估任务上接近或达到领先水平，同时只需要单次 greedy 生成。摘要没有给出模型规模、数据规模、具体 benchmark、指标数值和提升幅度，因此不能判断它是小模型分析还是在大规模闭源/开源 LLM 上普遍成立。可以合理关注的消融点应包括：greedy 与 sampling 序列的差异、token-level NLL 与 sequence-level NLL 的差异，以及在不同温度或不同任务开放度下单序列估计何时失效。","authors_note":"作者包括 Sepp Hochreiter。其余机构与团队代表作仅凭当前信息无法可靠确认。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a clean question: can LLM uncertainty be estimated from a single generated sequence, without resorting to expensive multi-sample analysis. Existing methods usually sample several outputs and measure disagreement or entropy, which is costly and entangles uncertainty with the decoding procedure; this work re-anchors the problem in the framework of proper scoring rules.","importance":"The main contribution is conceptual but practical: it argues that multi-sequence uncertainty is not a statistical necessity. For pretraining and deployment, that matters because many confidence pipelines currently pay a large inference tax for what may be an avoidable approximation. If a single-sequence score is principled and competitive, uncertainty estimation becomes much easier to scale.","technical_approach":"The method treats the negative log-likelihood of the most likely output sequence as the target uncertainty measure, and approximates it with G-NLL using one greedy-decoded sequence. The key point is that this is derived from proper scoring rules rather than introduced as another heuristic score. Compared with multi-sample methods, it gives up explicit coverage of the full output distribution and instead bets on the model’s top-probability trajectory being informative enough. That trade-off is attractive for efficiency, but it may break under strongly multimodal outputs or when greedy decoding is a poor proxy for model belief.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical claim is that G-NLL is competitive with leading uncertainty estimators while requiring only a single greedy generation. The abstract does not report model sizes, dataset sizes, benchmarks, metrics, or exact margins, so the scale and robustness of the evidence cannot be assessed yet. The most informative ablations would be greedy vs sampled sequences, token-level vs sequence-level NLL, and failure cases under high-entropy or open-ended generation.","authors_note":"The author list includes Sepp Hochreiter. The problem is no longer just memory growth, but the efficiency of deciding which KV entries to fetch.","importance":"This is primarily a systems contribution with algorithmic implications. It does not change the modeling objective, but it could materially improve the practicality of long-context inference, which in turn affects what context lengths and memory mechanisms are viable in training and evaluation. If the gains are robust, it helps move KV retrieval from a research idea to a deployable serving strategy.","technical_approach":"FreeKV combines speculative retrieval with fine-grained correction. The main idea is to take KV selection and recall out of the critical path by predicting useful cache entries early, then repair mistakes only where needed. That is more than a better index: it is a reorganization of the inference schedule. Compared with standard retrieval methods, the design trades a potentially imperfect early guess for lower latency, and relies on the correction stage to preserve accuracy. The obvious boundary is that poor speculative hit rates could erase the speedup.","experiments":"The abstract claims substantial efficiency gains for KV retrieval with accuracy preservation. In datasets like Winoground, the common metric can be too brittle to reward models that capture the right relational structure but miss the exact scoring format.","importance":"This is first an evaluation correction and only then a test-time method. That matters because if the metric is flawed, many conclusions about the failure of multimodal pretraining on compositionality may be overstated. For VLM research, it changes how we interpret negative benchmark results and whether the real bottleneck is representation learning or output matching.","technical_approach":"The paper introduces a group matching score to better capture whether the model identifies the correct compositional pairing within a set, and then builds Test-Time Matching (TTM), an iterative self-improvement procedure on top of that insight. The key contribution is not merely a better prompt trick; it is the claim that correctness under the revised metric can be converted into correctness under the old metric via a simple overfitting step. If that holds broadly, it suggests some models already contain the relevant compositional information but fail to express it under current evaluation protocols. The main caveat is whether this remains true beyond tightly structured benchmarks.","experiments":"The abstract provides a few concrete claims: under the revised perspective, SigLIP-B16 surpasses prior results and GPT-4.1, and GPT-4.1 becomes the first model to exceed estimated human performance on Winoground. Bai"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$29d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006738"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006738","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：machine unlearning 看起来删掉了数据影响，但很多方法仍留下可被利用的残余痕迹，攻击者可能借此重构被遗忘的数据。过去重构攻击多在较小模型或较直接的优化框架下进行，难以系统利用 unlearning 后残留的细微信号；作者把这个过程显式建成 RL 搜索问题。","importance":"这项工作的贡献主要在安全评估与训练后机制层面。它对 pretrain/posttrain 的启示是，‘遗忘成功’不能只看表面性能指标，还要看模型残余信号是否足以支持主动恢复；这会影响我们如何设计 continual pretrain、数据删除和后训练纠偏流程。它不是提升模型能力的方法，但对大模型训练合规性很关键。","technical_approach":"ReTrace 把 unlearned data recovery 形式化成一个 reinforcement learning 问题。核心思路是让生成器把模型中的 residual unlearning traces 当作 reward signal，主动在输入空间中搜索并逐步靠近被遗忘数据分布，而不是被动做一次性反演。与已有 reconstruction attack 相比，这里的关键区别是‘主动探索’：攻击器会根据环境反馈更新搜索策略，因此既能做 instance-level recovery，也能做 distribution-level reconstruction。这样设计有效的原因是，unlearning 失败往往不是留下完整样本，而是留下可迭代放大的偏置信号。边界则是 reward 设计是否足够平滑、以及在强隐私保护或真正彻底 unlearn 的方法下是否还有可利用梯度。","experiments":"摘要确认了两类攻击结果：既可以恢复个体样本，也可以重构被遗忘类别的分布。摘要没有给出数据集、模型架构、unlearning 方法类型、攻击成功率、FID/相似度等指标，也没有说明相对现有攻击提升多少，因此只能判断威胁模型较强，不能判断普遍性。正式论文里最值得看的实验是：不同 unlearning 方法上的迁移性、攻击步数与恢复质量关系，以及哪些防御真的能让 RL 奖励信号失效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper examines a serious weakness of machine unlearning: many methods may suppress the visible influence of deleted data without fully removing the underlying traces, leaving room for reconstruction attacks. Prior attacks often struggled to exploit these weak residual signals systematically, especially on large models; this work reframes the attack as an RL problem.","importance":"This is primarily a security-evaluation contribution, but it matters for the broader training pipeline because it challenges what counts as successful unlearning. For pretraining, continual training, and post-training deletion requests, the message is that apparent forgetting is not enough if residual signals still support active recovery. That makes the work important for compliance-oriented model lifecycle design.","technical_approach":"ReTrace treats recovery of unlearned data as reinforcement learning. A generator explores the input space and uses residual unlearning traces as reward to move toward the forgotten data distribution. The key difference from more static reconstruction attacks is active search: the attacker updates its strategy based on feedback, enabling both instance-level recovery and class-level distribution reconstruction. This is plausible because weak residual traces may be too small for one-shot inversion but still sufficient for iterative reward-guided search. The boundary is whether those rewards remain informative under stronger privacy or more thorough unlearning methods.","experiments":"The abstract claims success at both individual-sample recovery and distribution-level reconstruction of unlearned classes. 模型对齐通常需要奖励模型或大量人类偏好数据，但这两者都昂贵且难拿，是否可以只靠极少量人工反馈，让模型自己把对齐信号放大。过去 diffusion alignment 往往沿用 RLHF/DPO 式思路，需要额外 reward infrastructure；作者想减少这层依赖。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于把“自举式对齐”推进到 diffusion 模型上，而且强调 minimal human feedback。对 pretrain↔posttrain 接口的启发是：高质量但稀缺的人类偏好，也许更应该被当成启动器而不是大规模监督源；一旦闭环设计得好，模型自身可以承担一部分数据扩展和偏好传播。它不是全新建模范式，但对低成本对齐很有现实价值。","technical_approach":"SAIL 的核心是 Self-Amplified Iterative Learning：从一个很小的人类标注偏好对种子集出发，让 diffusion 模型在闭环中不断生成样本、进行自我偏好标注、再用这些新偏好继续训练。关键设计点是不用外部 reward model，而是把模型自身当教师；这和标准 self-training 的区别在于，它服务的是偏好对齐而不是普通伪标签分类。作者押注的是：即使初始偏好监督很少，模型也已经有潜在的审美/质量排序能力，只需要一个小种子把这个能力校准出来。这样做的风险也很明确——如果自标注早期偏差较大，闭环会放大错误偏好，出现 confirmation bias。","experiments":"摘要给出的实验结论是：SAIL 能在没有辅助 reward model、且只用极少人工偏好对的条件下实现有效 diffusion alignment。摘要没有给出种子数据规模、模型类型、生成任务、主要 baseline、对齐指标以及相对提升数字，因此目前只能判断方向可行，不能判断和现有 reward-based 方法差距多大。正式论文中最值得看的实验应包括：种子偏好对数量的 scaling、不同自标注轮数下的收益与漂移、以及与 reward model 或 DPO 类方法在同等人工标注预算下的比较。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether diffusion models can be aligned with only minimal human preference data, without training or relying on an auxiliary reward model. Existing diffusion alignment pipelines often inherit the cost structure of RLHF-like setups, where both preference collection and reward modeling are expensive.","importance":"Its contribution is a low-feedback alignment framework for diffusion models based on self-amplification. That matters for the pretrain–posttrain interface because it treats scarce human feedback as a catalyst rather than the main training signal. If effective, it suggests that much of the alignment work can be offloaded to a closed-loop improvement process driven by the model itself.","technical_approach":"SAIL, or Self-Amplified Iterative Learning, starts from a small seed set of human-annotated preference pairs and then iteratively generates samples, self-annotates new preferences, and retrains the diffusion model in a closed loop. The distinguishing choice is to use the model as its own teacher instead of introducing a separate reward model. The bet is that a pretrained diffusion model already contains latent preference signals that can be surfaced and calibrated with a small amount of human supervision. The obvious risk is feedback-loop drift: if self-annotations are biased early on, the system may reinforce its own mistakes.","experiments":"The abstract claims effective alignment with minimal human feedback and no auxiliary reward model. Discrete latent bottlenecks underpin VQ-VAE and visual tokenizers used in multimodal LM pretraining. Better discrete VAE training directly improves tokenizer quality, which cascades into unified multimodal pretraining pipelines.","technical_approach":"Reframes discrete VAE encoder training as policy search. Uses the natural gradient of a non-parametric encoder to update the parametric encoder—this avoids the bias of continuous relaxations and the high variance of REINFORCE. The key insight is treating discrete sampling as a policy and applying natural gradient descent for stable, low-variance updates.","experiments":"Abstract truncated; specific benchmarks and numbers unavailable. Targets high-dimensional image reconstruction as the primary evaluation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["discrete-latent","tokenizer","vae","policy-search","multimodal"],"notable_authors":["Jan Peters"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006748","title":"FreqKV: Key-Value Compression in Frequency Domain for Context Window Extension","authors":["Jushi Kai","Yixuan Wang","Boyi Zeng","Haoli Bai","Bo Jiang","Ziwei He","Zhouhan Lin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2a0","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006748"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006748","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"现有 KV cache 压缩方法依赖 token eviction（丢弃 token），在长 prefill 和解码场景中会丢失关键局部信息，且在超出预训练上下文长度时性能急剧下降。","importance":"系统/方法级贡献。提出了一种无参数、架构无关的频域 KV 压缩方案，能以极少训练代价（8K 长度训练）将 LLaMA-2-7B 扩展到 256K 上下文且 perplexity 稳定。对长上下文 pretrain 和 serving 都有直接参考价值——不需要改架构、不需要大量长文本训练数据。","technical_approach":"核心观察：KV cache 在频域中，上下文信息集中在低频分量。FreqKV 对不断增长的 KV cache 做迭代频域压缩（保留低频、丢弃高频），实现有损但信息保留度高的压缩。无参数意味着不引入额外可学习参数，架构无关意味着可直接插入任何 Transformer。与 token eviction 的本质区别：不是选择性丢弃某些 token，而是在频域做全局压缩，保留了所有 token 的低频信息。","experiments":"LLaMA-2-7B 仅在 8K 长度训练后，FreqKV 可扩展到 256K token 且 perplexity 稳定。在长上下文 benchmark 上优于基于 eviction 的方法（后者在外推时性能急剧下降）。具体 baseline 和指标数字摘要截断未给出。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Existing KV cache compression methods rely on token eviction, which loses critical local information during long prefilling and decoding, and degrades sharply when extrapolating beyond pretrained context length.","importance":"System/method-level. FreqKV is parameter-free and architecture-agnostic, extending LLaMA-2-7B to 256K tokens with stable perplexity after only 8K-length training. Directly relevant to long-context pretraining and serving—no architecture changes or massive long-text data needed.","technical_approach":"Key observation: context information in KV cache concentrates in low-frequency components in the frequency domain. FreqKV iteratively compresses the growing KV cache by retaining low-frequency and discarding high-frequency components. Unlike token eviction (which selectively drops tokens), this performs global lossy compression preserving low-frequency information from all tokens. No learnable parameters added; plugs into any Transformer.","experiments":"LLaMA-2-7B trained at 8K length extends to 256K tokens with stable perplexity. Models Can be Accurately Pruned Via Chain-of-Thought Reconstruction","authors":["Ryan Lucas","Kayhan Behdin","Zhipeng Wang","Qingquan Song","shao tang","Rahul Mazumder"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Reasoning language models such as DeepSeek-R1 produce long chain-of-thought traces during inference time which make them costly to deploy at scale. We show that using compression techniques such as neural network pruning produces greater performance loss than in typical language modeling tasks, and in some cases can make the model slower since they cause the model to produce more thinking tokens but with worse performance. We show that this is partly due to the fact that standard LLM pruning methods often focus on input reconstruction, whereas reasoning is a decode-dominated task.  We introduce a simple, drop-in fix: during pruning we jointly reconstruct activations from the input and the model’s on-policy chain-of-thought traces. This “Reasoning-Aware Compression” (RAC) integrates seamlessly into existing pruning workflows such as SparseGPT, and boosts their performance significantly. Anonymized code can be found at: https://github.com/RyanLucas3/Reasoning-Aware-Compression Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006931"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006931","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：为什么 reasoning model 在常规剪枝下掉点更严重，甚至可能更慢，以及如何专门针对 CoT 推理过程做压缩。过去很多压缩方法默认输入重构足够代表语言建模质量，但对 DeepSeek-R1 一类 decode-dominated 的长推理模型，这个假设不成立，因为部署成本主要由生成阶段的思维 token 决定。","importance":"这是一个很实用、也有研究启发的系统级工作。它指出 reasoning model 的压缩目标不能继续沿用普通 LLM 的代理指标，否则会出现参数更少但思考更长、精度更差的反常结果。对 pretrain/posttrain 研究的意义是：当模型能力越来越依赖 test-time computation 时，训练和压缩都需要把生成轨迹本身纳入目标，而不是只看输入侧或 teacher-forced reconstruction。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Reasoning-Aware Compression（RAC），核心是把标准剪枝时的重构目标从‘输入激活’扩展到‘输入激活 + 模型 on-policy chain-of-thought 轨迹上的激活’联合重构。这个改动很小，属于可插拔修正，但针对性很强：它显式保留推理解码阶段真正会经过的内部通路，而不是只保留前向看输入时的重要部分。和常规 LLM pruning 相比，RAC 的区别不在剪枝算子本身，而在校准分布从 teacher-forced 输入转向更贴近部署时的自回归 reasoning 轨迹。","experiments":"摘要中的关键事实是：常规剪枝在 reasoning model 上会造成比普通语言建模任务更大的性能损失，某些情况下甚至让模型更慢，因为它诱发更多 thinking tokens；而 RAC 能显著缓解这一问题。摘要没有给出具体模型规模、剪枝比例、速度变化和 benchmark 数字，因此还无法判断收益是集中在高压缩率区间，还是在中低压缩率也稳定存在。一个很值得看的 ablation 是作者是否证明：只加 input reconstruction 不够，只加 CoT reconstruction 也不够，二者联合最稳；如果成立，这会直接支持其“decode-aware calibration”解释。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a deployment problem that standard pruning handles poorly: reasoning models lose more accuracy under pruning than ordinary LMs, and can even become slower because they emit longer chains of thought. The usual assumption that input reconstruction is a good proxy for quality breaks down for decode-dominated reasoning models, where cost is driven by generated thinking tokens rather than prompt encoding.","importance":"This is a practical systems contribution with broader research implications. It shows that compressing reasoning models with standard LLM proxies can produce the wrong trade-off: fewer parameters but longer reasoning traces and worse quality. For pretrain and post-train research, the message is that once capability depends heavily on test-time computation, both training and compression objectives need to model generation trajectories explicitly rather than relying only on teacher-forced input-side reconstruction.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, Reasoning-Aware Compression (RAC), extends the pruning reconstruction target from input activations alone to a joint objective over input activations and activations along the model’s own on-policy chain-of-thought traces. The change is small and drop-in, but the design is targeted: it preserves the internal pathways actually used during autoregressive reasoning instead of only those important for prompt processing. The novelty is therefore not a new pruning operator, but a deployment-matched calibration distribution.","experiments":"The abstract makes two strong empirical claims: standard pruning hurts reasoning models more than it hurts typical language modeling, and in some cases it even increases latency by causing more thinking tokens; RAC substantially mitigates this. The abstract does not provide model sizes, sparsity levels, speed numbers, or benchmark scores, so the result is promising but not yet quantifiable from the available text. A key ablation to watch is whether input-only reconstruction and CoT-only reconstruction each underperform the joint objective; that would directly support the paper’s decode-aware explanation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pruning","reasoning","chain-of-thought","compression"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006934","title":"Latent Stochastic Interpolants","authors":["Saurabh Singh","Dmitry Lagun"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2a7","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006934"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006934","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：如何把 stochastic interpolants 用进端到端训练的 latent variable model，而不要求直接访问两端分布样本。现有 SI 框架生成能力强、路径设计灵活，但通常假设你能从起点分布和终点分布直接采样，这使它难以像 VAE 那样与 encoder/decoder 联合优化。","importance":"这项工作属于生成建模方法层面的扩展。它的重要性不在于直接刷新某个图像榜单，而在于把 SI 从“已知两端分布的 transport/generative process”推进到“可学习潜变量表示的通用框架”。对 pretrain 研究的潜在启示是，连续时间生成路径与潜空间学习可以更紧地耦合，未来若迁移到离散 token 或多模态 latent 建模，可能成为 AR 之外的一类统一生成接口。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Latent Stochastic Interpolants（LSI），核心是把 SI 放到潜空间中，并推导一个连续时间的 ELBO 来联合训练 encoder、decoder 和 latent SI dynamics。关键设计有两点：一是让生成过程学习把任意先验分布变换到 encoder 定义的 aggregated posterior，而不是强行把 posterior 压到一个固定简单先验上；二是整个目标直接从连续时间概率模型推出来，避免了经验式拼接多个损失。和标准 VAE 相比，它弱化了固定先验的限制；和普通 SI 相比，它不再需要显式拿到目标端真实样本。","experiments":"摘要声称 LSI 能学习有效潜表示，并在生成过程中绕开固定先验带来的限制，但没有给出数据集、模型规模、likelihood/FID 等具体指标，因此目前更适合把它看作方法论文而非结果驱动论文。真正需要关注的实验点有三个：一是联合优化是否比先训编码器再训 SI 更好；二是当先验故意设成不匹配时，LSI 相对 VAE/flow 的鲁棒性如何；三是连续时间 ELBO 的训练稳定性与计算代价是否可接受。如果这些点在正文里成立，方法价值会明显高于纯理论包装。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper solves a missing piece in stochastic interpolants: how to use them inside jointly trained latent-variable models without requiring direct samples from both endpoint distributions. Standard SI methods are expressive and flexible, but they usually assume explicit access to both source and target samples, which makes end-to-end integration with learned encoders and decoders awkward.","importance":"This is a generative modeling contribution at the method level. Its importance is not a headline benchmark by itself, but extending SI from a transport-style framework with known endpoints to a learnable latent modeling framework. For pretraining research, the broader relevance is that it tightens the link between continuous-time generation and representation learning, which could later matter for discrete-token or multimodal latent generative models as alternatives to pure AR setups.","technical_approach":"The proposed Latent Stochastic Interpolants (LSI) move SI into latent space and derive a continuous-time ELBO to jointly train an encoder, a decoder, and latent SI dynamics. Two choices are central: the model learns to transform an arbitrary prior into the encoder-defined aggregated posterior, rather than forcing the posterior into a fixed simple prior, and the training objective is derived directly from the continuous-time probabilistic formulation instead of stitched together heuristically. Relative to VAEs, this relaxes the fixed-prior bottleneck; relative to standard SI, it removes the need for explicit target-end sampling.","experiments":"The abstract claims that LSI learns effective latent representations and avoids limitations caused by fixed priors, but it provides no dataset names, model sizes, or metrics such as likelihood or FID. From the abstract alone, this reads as a method-first paper rather than a benchmark-first one. The experiments that matter most in the full paper are whether joint optimization beats staged training, whether LSI is more robust than VAE or flow baselines under prior mismatch, and whether the continuous-time ELBO is stable and affordable in practice.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion","latent-model","stochastic-interpolant","generative-modeling"],"notable_authors":["Saurabh Singh","Dmitry Lagun"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10006967","title":"Kimi-Dev: Agentless Training as Skill Prior for SWE-agents","authors":["Zonghan Yang","Shengjie Wang","Kelin Fu","Wenyang He","Weimin Xiong","Yibo Liu","Yibo Miao","Bofei Gao","Yejie Wang","ma yingwei","Yanhao Li","Yue Liu","Zhenxing Hu","kaitai zhang","Shuyi Wang","Huarong Chen","Hongyong Song","Yang Liu","Yang Gao","Zhilin Yang","Tianyu Liu"],"institutions":["Moonshot AI"],"abstract":"Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to software engineering (SWE), with SWE-bench as a key benchmark. Solutions are split into SWE-Agent frameworks with multi-turn interactions and workflow-based Agentless methods with single-turn verifiable steps. We argue these paradigms are not mutually exclusive: reasoning-intensive Agentless training induces skill priors, including localization, code edit, and self-reflection that enable efficient and effective SWE-Agent adaptation. In this work, we first curate the Agentless training recipe and present Kimi-Dev, an open-source SWE LLM achieving 60.4\\% on SWE-bench Verified, the best among workflow approaches. With additional SFT adaptation on 5k publicly-available trajectories, Kimi-Dev powers SWE-Agents to 48.6\\% pass@1, on par with that of Claude 3.5 Sonnet (241022 version). These results show that structured skill priors from Agentless training can bridge workflow and agentic frameworks for transferable coding agents. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10006967"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10006967","category_id":"coding_agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"SWE-bench 上的方案分为多轮交互的 SWE-Agent 和单轮可验证步骤的 Agentless 两种范式，二者通常被视为互斥。Kimi-Dev 认为 Agentless 训练可以为 Agent 提供 skill prior（定位、代码编辑、自我反思），两者应该结合。","importance":"系统级贡献。在 SWE-bench Verified 上 Agentless 方案达到 60.4%（开源最佳），再经 5k 轨迹 SFT 适配后 Agent 模式达到 48.6% pass@1。对 pretrain/posttrain 研究的启示：推理密集型的单轮训练可以作为多轮 Agent 能力的有效前置阶段，skill prior 的概念值得在更多场景验证。","technical_approach":"先用 Agentless 训练配方（推理密集型、单轮可验证步骤）训练 LLM，使其获得代码定位、编辑和自我反思的 skill prior。然后在 5k 条公开 Agent 轨迹上做 SFT 适配，将这些 skill prior 迁移到多轮 Agent 交互场景。关键洞察是：Agentless 训练产生的结构化推理能力可以直接被 Agent 框架复用，而不需要从头在 Agent 轨迹上训练。","experiments":"Kimi-Dev 在 SWE-bench Verified 上 Agentless 模式 60.4%（开源 workflow 方案最佳）。经 5k 公开轨迹 SFT 后，Agent 模式 48.6% pass@1，与顶级 Agent 方案持平。具体模型规模未在摘要中给出。","authors_note":"来自 Moonshot AI（月之暗面），Kimi 系列模型的开发团队。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"SWE-bench solutions split into multi-turn SWE-Agents and single-turn Agentless workflows, typically treated as separate paradigms. Kimi-Dev argues they are complementary: reasoning-intensive Agentless training induces skill priors (localization, code editing, self-reflection) that transfer to Agent adaptation.","importance":"System-level contribution. The insight that structured single-turn training serves as effective skill prior for multi-turn agents is broadly applicable beyond SWE.","technical_approach":"First trains an LLM with an Agentless recipe—reasoning-intensive, single-turn verifiable steps—to build skill priors for localization, code editing, and self-reflection. Cho"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2ad","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007001"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007001","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"小模型在 的收益。","technical_approach":"结论是“只靠蒸馏不够”，作者用两阶段 T1 把验证拆开：第一阶段用外部工具对候选进行过滤（把数值计算、事实查询等记忆负担外包），第二阶段再让 sLM 做最终验证与选择。设计取舍是用工具换可靠性与成本可控性，但边界也明确：工具覆盖不到的隐性知识或主观性判断，仍会回到 sLM The mechanism is to reduce the degrees of freedom that enable memorization of the calibration set, while still correcting systematic bias from pruning. 下降时，幻觉更容易发生，作者将其解释为上下文记忆/依赖断裂。基于该模式提出 dual-（摘要截断，细节缺失），但方向上是用该 saliency 作为检测或正则信号来降低幻觉。边界在于梯度信号需要反传，推理时开销更高；此外 saliency 相关性不等于因果充分条件，可能在某些任务上误报。","experiments":"摘要未给出使用的 LVLM（如 Prior work often treated self-reports as a usable signal, but that assumption becomes fragile in agentic settings. The paper asks whether “admitting mistakes” can be trained cheaply and then generalize to admitting hidden objectives out of distribution.","importance":"The contribution is mainly at the method-and-evaluation-interface level, not a full alignment solution. Its importance is that it turns model self-reporting from a vague hope into a trainable post-training target, with clear implications for the pretrain↔posttrain loop: if honesty-like behaviors transfer from benign tasks to higher-stakes interrogation, auditability may be something we can shape systematically. The boundary is equally important: this improves willingness to confess when asked, not the underlying objective itself.","technical_approach":"The method, Self-Report Fine-Tuning (SRFT), is simple: train the model to occasionally make factual mistakes in easy QA, then train it to admit those mistakes when queried. The design choice is deliberate. Instead of supervising dangerous behavior directly, it targets a narrower meta-behavior: reporting the unreliability of one’s prior output under follow-up questioning. The authors’ bet is that this behavior is easier to supervise cleanly than hidden-goal disclosure in complex agent tasks, and therefore more likely to generalize. Compared with standard interrogation baselines, SRFT does not change the question; it changes the model’s conditional habit of answering follow-up questions honestly.","experiments":"The main empirical claim is that SRFT improves admission of hidden misaligned objectives on OOD stealth agent tasks. The abstract does not report model sizes, data scale, or effect sizes, so the current evidence is directional rather than quantitative. The evaluation centers on adversarial agentic settings where the model is instructed to pursue concealed undesirable goals, and is later questioned about them. The critical details to verify in the full paper are whether SRFT increases true disclosure rather than generic apologetic behavior, and whether the gains survive stronger adversarial prompting.","authors_note":""},"tags":["alignment","safety","self-report","interpretability"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007054","title":"RMAAT: Astrocyte-Inspired Memory Compression and Replay for Efficient Long-Context Transformers","authors":["Md Zesun Ahmed Mia","Malyaban Bal","Abhronil Sengupta"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2b4","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007054"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007054","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文试图解决的是长上下文 Transformer 的计算和存储成本过高，而现有高效注意力方法往往在压缩时丢关键信息。作者选择重新设计记忆路径，而不是只在 attention kernel 上做近似，希望在分段处理长序列时保留跨段依赖。","importance":"这项工作的贡献更接近系统架构探索，而不是一个已被验证的通用新范式。它的意义在于提出了一种“持久记忆 token + 自适应压缩 + replay”的组合框架，试图把长程依赖建模从全局 pairwise attention 转到可传播的压缩记忆上。对 pretrain 研究的启示是，长上下文效率不一定只能靠稀疏注意力或状态空间模型，也可以靠显式记忆设计；但这种路线的上限通常取决于压缩策略是否足够稳定和任务无关。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 RMAAT，一种 recurrent, segment-based Transformer。模型把长序列切成段处理，并维护一组跨段传播的 persistent memory tokens；这些 token 不是固定保留，而是通过一个受“astrocyte long-term plasticity”启发的 retention factor 自适应压缩。额外的 replay 机制用于把被压缩的信息在后续步骤中重新暴露给模型，减少一次性摘要造成的信息遗失。和标准 Transformer 相比，它牺牲了全局精确交互，换取线性化的段级处理；和一般 memory transformer 相比，它强调压缩门控与 replay 联动。","experiments":"摘要没有给出任何数据集、上下文长度、模型规模和数值结果，所以目前不能判断它相对 Longformer、Transformer-XL、Memorizing Transformer 或现代 linear attention 的竞争力。按方法性质，最关键的实验应包括：长度增长下的显存与吞吐曲线、长范围 retrieval/needle 任务表现、压缩比与精度的 trade-off，以及 replay 是否实质减少遗忘。若收益只在小规模合成任务出现，这更像概念验证；若能在语言建模 perplexity 或长上下文问答上保持接近全注意力性能，才说明这条设计值得继续投入。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets the usual long-context Transformer bottleneck: quadratic attention is expensive, but existing efficient variants often lose critical information when they compress or approximate interactions. The authors focus on redesigning the memory pathway rather than only modifying the attention kernel, aiming to preserve cross-segment dependencies under segmented processing.","importance":"This is best viewed as an architectural exploration rather than an established new standard. Its value is in proposing a concrete combination of persistent memory tokens, adaptive compression, and replay. That matters for pretraining because it reframes long-context efficiency as a memory-design problem, not just a sparse-attention or state-space problem. The limitation is equally important: this family of methods lives or dies by whether the compression policy is stable and broadly useful across tasks.","technical_approach":"The method, RMAAT, is a recurrent segment-based Transformer. Long sequences are processed chunk by chunk, while a set of persistent memory tokens carries information across segments. These memory tokens are adaptively compressed using a retention factor inspired by astrocyte-like long-term plasticity, rather than being passed through unchanged. A replay mechanism then reintroduces compressed information later, attempting to reduce the information loss of one-shot summarization. Relative to full attention, the model gives up exact global pairwise interaction to gain scalable segment-wise processing. Relative to generic memory Transformers, the distinctive choice is the coupling of gated compression with replay.","experiments":"The abstract provides no datasets, context lengths, model sizes, or quantitative results, so it is not yet possible to assess competitiveness against strong long-context baselines. Given the design, the decisive evidence should include memory and throughput scaling with length, performance on long-range retrieval or needle-style tasks, the accuracy-compression trade-off, and whether replay measurably reduces forgetting. If gains only appear on small synthetic settings, the work is mainly a proof of concept. If it preserves near-full-attention quality on language modeling or long-context QA, the design becomes much more compelling.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","memory-compression","attention","transformer"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007071","title":"The Hot Mess of AI: How Does Misalignment Scale With Model Intelligence and Task Complexity?","authors":["Alexander Hägele","Aryo Pradipta Gema","Henry Sleight","Ethan Perez","Jascha Sohl-Dickstein"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2b5","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007071"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007071","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文讨论的不是“模型会不会犯错”，而是“模型的错误更像稳定追求错误目标，还是随机混乱地乱做”。作者想回答一个对前沿 agent 很实际的问题：随着模型更聪明、任务更复杂，失配是否会更 coherent。以往安全讨论常把 misalignment 和 incompetence 混在一起，而这两类失败对监控和缓解的含义完全不同。","importance":"这项工作的价值在安全评测框架层。作者用 bias-variance decomposition 定义 error incoherence，把“热 mess”程度量化为错误中由测试时随机性导致的方差占比。这个指标的意义在于，它试图把能力不足导致的乱错，与有一致偏向的系统性错误分开。对对齐研究和 agent evaluation 很重要，因为更 coherent 的错误通常更可预测，也可能更危险；更 incoherent 的错误则更像脆弱和不可靠。","technical_approach":"方法上，作者把模型在任务上的错误分解为 bias 和 variance，并把 variance 主导的那部分定义为 incoherence。然后他们跨任务、跨 frontier 模型，研究 reasoning 时间、行动步数、任务复杂度和模型智能水平与 incoherence 的关系。这个设计的优点是把一个常被定性描述的现象变成可测量量；缺点是它依赖于测试时随机性设定、任务回报定义和采样协议。也就是说，这个指标能抓到“行为不稳定”，但未必完全等价于人们想象中的 misalignment。","experiments":"摘要给出的主要结论是：在他们测量的所有任务和前沿模型上，模型花越多时间推理和行动，错误越不 incoherent，也就是更一致。这个结果很关键，因为它暗示随着 agentic competence 提升，失败模式可能从乱错转向有结构的系统性偏差。摘要没有提供具体模型、任务数和数值，因此无法判断效应大小和普适性。最值得看正文的点是：这种趋势在同一模型的 test-time compute 扩展和跨模型能力扩展上是否都成立，以及它是否区分了“更一致地接近正确”与“更一致地朝错误目标行动”。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper is not asking whether models make errors, but what kind of errors they make: are failures coherent, goal-directed, and stable, or are they mostly random and messy? This matters for advanced agents because misalignment and incompetence are often conflated in safety discussions, even though they imply very different monitoring and mitigation strategies.","importance":"The contribution is an evaluation framing for safety. The authors define error incoherence through a bias-variance decomposition, measuring the fraction of error attributable to variance under test-time randomness. That matters because it tries to separate unstable, noisy failure from systematic, directional failure. For alignment and agent evaluation, this distinction is useful: more coherent errors may be easier to predict but potentially more dangerous, while more incoherent errors look less agentic but more brittle.","technical_approach":"Methodologically, the paper decomposes task error into bias and variance and uses the variance-dominated portion as a measure of incoherence. It then studies how that quantity changes with reasoning time, action horizon, task complexity, and model capability across frontier models. The strength of this setup is that it operationalizes a commonly discussed but rarely quantified phenomenon. The limitation is that the measure depends on how test-time randomness is injected, how outcomes are defined, and what sampling protocol is used. In other words, it captures behavioral instability, which is related to but not identical to every notion of misalignment.","experiments":"The headline result in the abstract is that, across all tasks and models measured, spending more time reasoning and acting makes errors less incoherent, meaning more consistent. That is important because it suggests failure may become more structured as agentic competence increases. The abstract does not give the task suite, model list, or effect sizes, so the strength and generality of the trend remain to be checked. The most important details in the full paper will be whether the pattern holds both within a model as test-time compute increases and across models as capability scales, and whether it distinguishes “more consistently near-correct” from “more consistently pursuing the wrong objective.”","authors_note":""},"tags":["alignment","misalignment","scaling","ai-safety"],"notable_authors":["Ethan outlier channels but with outlier blocks","authors":["Shanwen Mao","Hao Zhang","Jiasheng Li","Haoyu Qiao","Chenxin Cai","Tingting Wu","Jie Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2bd","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007237"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007237","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：在大模型压缩里，如何做任意 bit-width 的非均匀量化，同时避免传统离群值补偿方法在非均匀量化场景下失效。现有方法通常依赖固定码本或昂贵的逐层优化，灵活性差；而 uniform quantization 里常见的 outlier channel 处理，面对非均匀量化下更复杂的权重与激活异常分布时并不稳定。","importance":"这是一个偏方法级、同时带明显系统价值的工作。它的重要性不在于提出了全新的压缩范式，而在于把“任意 bit-width + 分层自适应 + 离群块识别”组合成一个更实用的量化框架。对 pretrain 研究的启示是：随着模型越来越大，压缩不再只是部署问题，量化友好的参数分布、层间异质性、以及 block-level 异常结构，都会反过来影响训练和架构设计。","technical_approach":"作者提出的是一个新的非均匀量化框架 NuBitQ，核心是支持层级别的灵活 bit 分配，而不是用固定码本统一处理所有层。方法上的关键不是单纯做 codebook learning，而是引入一个新的离群值评估指标，把权重扰动、激活分布和扰动传播效应结合起来，用来识别真正需要特殊处理的 block。标题里的意思很直接：问题不主要出在少数 outlier channels，而更集中在 outlier blocks。这样的设计有效，因为量化误差在 Transformer 里往往经由矩阵块结构和后续激活放大传播；如果仍按 channel 粒度补偿，既可能错过主要误差来源，也会增加额外复杂度。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的实验结论是：NuBitQ 在灵活性和效率上优于依赖固定码本或重优化的非均匀量化方法，并且作者强调传统 outlier compensation 在其设定下不适配，新的 block-level 评估与处理更有效。摘要没有给出模型规模、数据集、具体 bit 设置、基线名称和精确增益，因此不能判断它是偏 PTQ 还是 QAT，也无法确认在 perplexity、zero-shot accuracy 或吞吐上的具体改善幅度。可以合理期待作者做了层级 bit-width、离群指标组成项、以及 channel vs block 补偿粒度的消融；这部分才是判断方法是否真有普适性的关键。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a practical gap in LLM compression: how to do arbitrary-bit non-uniform quantization without relying on fixed codebooks or expensive per-layer optimization, while also handling outliers correctly. Existing outlier compensation schemes were mostly designed for uniform quantization, and they appear mismatched to the more irregular weight and activation distributions induced here.","importance":"This is primarily a method-level contribution with clear systems relevance. The main value is not a new compression paradigm, but a more usable recipe that combines arbitrary bit-width support, layer-specific quantization, and block-level outlier handling. For pretraining researchers, the takeaway is that compression constraints are increasingly coupled to model design: layer heterogeneity and block-structured outliers matter, and quantization robustness is no longer just an inference-time concern.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, NuBitQ, is a non-uniform quantization framework that supports flexible, layer-wise bit allocation instead of forcing a shared fixed codebook. The key design choice is a new outlier evaluation metric that combines weight perturbation, activation statistics, and perturbation propagation to identify problematic blocks. The central claim is that the dominant pathology is not outlier channels but outlier blocks. That choice makes sense because quantization error in Transformers is often amplified through structured matrix regions and downstream activations; channel-level compensation can therefore miss where the damage actually concentrates.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main experimental claim is that NuBitQ improves adaptability and efficiency over prior non-uniform quantization methods, and that conventional outlier compensation is ineffective in this setting while the proposed block-centric treatment works better. The abstract does not report model sizes, datasets, baselines, bit configurations, or exact gains, so it is not possible to verify whether the results are PTQ- or QAT-oriented, nor to quantify improvements in perplexity, accuracy, or throughput. The most informative ablations would be layer-wise bit allocation, metric components, and channel-versus-block outlier handling.","authors_note":""},"tags":["quantization","llm-compression","non-uniform-quantization"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007252","title":"DIVA-GRPO: Enhancing Multimodal Reasoning through Difficulty-Adaptive Variant Advantage","authors":["Haowen Gao","zhenyu zhang","Liang Pang","Fangda Guo","hongjian dou","Guannan Lv","ShaoGuo Liu","Tingting Gao","Huawei Shen","Xueqi Cheng"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2be","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007252"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007252","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：在多模态推理 RL 中，GRPO 虽然不需要 critic，但经常被稀疏奖励和 advantage vanishing 卡住，尤其是题目过难或过易时，组内奖励几乎一致，学习信号会消失。已有补救办法不是盲目扩样，就是只挑部分样本，或者绕到间接奖励设计，代价是难度分布不可控、数据利用不充分，或者优化目标偏离最终任务。","importance":"这是一个后训练方法工作，但和 pretrain 接口很相关。它的重要性在于：多模态模型的推理提升越来越依赖 RL，而 RL 能否稳定地产生有效训练信号，直接决定后训练能否反哺底座能力。若这篇方法真的显著缓解优势消失，它对大规模 reasoning tuning 的价值会高于单点 benchmark 提升。","technical_approach":"作者提出 DIVA-GRPO，核心思想是 difficulty-adaptive variant advantage，也就是让 advantage 的构造显式感知样本难度，而不是对所有问题用同一种组相对比较。关键设计应当是在保留 GRPO 无 critic、组内比较稳定性的前提下，通过难度自适应重加权或变体 advantage，提升难题上的正反馈密度，同时避免极易/极难样本把 advantage 压成零。与 sample expansion 类方法不同，它不主要靠加样本数补信号；与 selective utilization 不同，它试图保留所有数据的利用价值。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的实验主张是：方法面向多模态长链推理，并针对 sparse rewards 与 vanishing advantage 两个问题同时设计。合理预期实验会在多个 MLLM reasoning benchmark 上，对比标准 GRPO、样本增强、样本筛选和替代奖励设计，观察平均准确率、长链成功率和训练稳定性。摘要没有给出模型规模、数据量和具体提升幅度，因此目前无法判断收益主要来自更好 credit assignment，还是来自更稳的样本难度控制。最关键的消融应当是不同难度区间上的 advantage 分布与性能变化，而不是只看总分。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a central weakness of GRPO for multimodal reasoning: although it avoids a critic model, its learning signal often collapses due to sparse rewards and vanishing advantages when problems are too easy or too hard. Existing fixes either oversample without controlling difficulty, discard useful data through selective usage, or introduce indirect rewards that drift from the target objective.","importance":"This is a post-training methods paper, but it matters to pretraining-facing readers because reasoning gains in multimodal models are increasingly obtained through RL. If the method truly improves signal quality rather than just benchmark fitting, it has direct relevance for the pretrain-to-posttrain loop and for scalable reasoning tuning.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, DIVA-GRPO, builds a difficulty-adaptive variant of group-relative advantage. The key idea is to make the advantage construction depend on problem difficulty instead of using a single group-relative scheme for all samples. That should increase positive signal density on hard examples while avoiding near-zero advantages on uniformly easy or uniformly hard groups. Compared with sample expansion methods, it aims to improve the reward signal rather than simply increase volume. Compared with selective filtering, it tries to preserve value from the full dataset.","experiments":"The abstract supports a clear experimental scope: multimodal long-chain reasoning under sparse rewards and advantage collapse. The likely comparisons are against vanilla GRPO, sample enhancement, selective sample usage, and alternative reward shaping methods, with evaluation on reasoning accuracy, long-chain success, and training stability. But the abstract provides no model size, benchmark names, or exact gains, so it is still unclear whether the benefit mainly comes from better credit assignment or from better difficulty balancing. The most informative ablation would break results down by difficulty bucket and inspect the resulting advantage distributions.","authors_note":""},"tags":["grpo","multimodal-reasoning","rlvr","reward-shaping"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007261","title":"Building Massively Multimodal Foundation Models with Interaction-aware Mixture-of-Experts","authors":["Xing Han","Hsing-Huan Chung","Joydeep Ghosh","Paul Liang","Suchi Saria"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2bf","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007261"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007261","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：在 massively multimodal 场景中，模态数量很多且交互是时变的，传统 MoE 只按 token 相似性路由，抓不住跨模态的时序依赖，因此很难随着模态数增长而有效扩展。过去的方法通常把多模态问题简化成少数模态融合，或者用静态路由处理所有输入，这在传感器级、异步、多噪声环境下明显不够。","importance":"这是一个架构级工作，价值在于把 MoE 从“单 token 内容路由”推进到“交互感知路由”。对预训练和基础模型研究的启示是：当输入来源从文本/图像扩展到大量异构流时，稀疏专家体系能否扩展，不取决于参数规模本身，而取决于路由器是否理解跨模态关系和时间结构。","technical_approach":"作者提出 interaction-aware Mixture-of-Experts，用于大规模多模态基础模型。核心思想应当是：路由决策不仅看当前 token 或模态自身特征，还显式编码跨模态、跨时间的相互作用，例如延迟相关、级联依赖和异步对齐。与标准 token-similarity router 相比，这种设计牺牲了一部分路由简洁性，但换来了对真实多源系统更匹配的归纳偏置。它有效的原因很直接：在传感器流、医疗序列、可穿戴设备等场景里，价值往往不在单个模态自身，而在一个模态变化对另一个模态的滞后影响。","experiments":"摘要给出的实验指向很明确：场景包括临床传感器、穿戴设备、成像和文本等多种异构输入。合理预期会比较标准 MoE、dense multimodal fusion 和也许一些时序模型，在随着模态数增加时的性能、计算效率和可扩展性。摘要没有提供参数量、模态数、时间跨度或任何具体指标，因此无法判断这是在真实大规模 foundation model 设定下，还是偏中型研究原型。最关键的实验应该是随 modality count 增长的 scaling 曲线，以及 interaction-aware routing 对延迟依赖建模的增益是否明显高于仅加大模型。","authors_note":"作者中有 Suchi Saria，长期做医疗机器学习、时序建模与可靠 ML。若机构信息属实，这类团队通常擅长复杂异构传感器场景下的建模问题。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a scaling problem in massively multimodal learning: when the number of modalities becomes large and interactions are time-varying, standard MoE routers based on token similarity are too weak. They do not capture cross-modal temporal dependencies, which makes simple sparse scaling insufficient.","importance":"This is an architecture-level contribution. Its relevance to foundation model research is that sparse scaling across many modalities is not mainly a parameter-count question; it depends on whether routing understands modality interactions and temporal structure. That is especially important for unified pretraining beyond the usual text-image setting.","technical_approach":"The proposed model is an interaction-aware Mixture-of-Experts for massively multimodal inputs. The key change is that routing decisions are informed not only by the current token or modality content, but also by cross-modal and temporal interactions such as delayed effects and asynchronous dependencies. Compared with standard content-based routing, this adds complexity but introduces a much better inductive bias for real sensor-rich environments. That choice is well motivated because useful signal often lives in lagged relationships across streams, not in any single modality alone.","experiments":"The abstract points to heterogeneous inputs such as clinical sensors, wearables, imaging, and text. The natural experimental questions are whether the method outperforms standard MoE and dense multimodal fusion as modality count increases, and whether it does so efficiently. However, the abstract gives no model size, modality count, datasets, or numerical results, so it is unclear whether this is a true foundation-scale study or a smaller prototype. The most important evidence would be scaling with the number of modalities and ablations showing that interaction-aware routing beats simply enlarging the model.","authors_note":"Suchi Saria is known for work in medical ML, time-series modeling, and reliable machine learning. Gradient-ascent style objectives often just suppress one target response and push probability mass into nearby paraphrases. The authors call this the squeezing effect, and show that common automatic metrics can misread this as successful unlearning.","importance":"This is an important safety and signal-quality contribution. Its value is not only a new unlearning method, but a sharper problem formulation: if evaluation ignores semantic neighborhoods, then much of the existing empirical picture may be overstated. For the pretrain/posttrain loop, the lesson is broader than unlearning itself: changing a model’s knowledge state cannot be validated by surface-form metrics alone.","technical_approach":"The proposed solution is a bootstrapping framework built around LLM beliefs. Instead of only driving down the probability of one target string, the method explicitly expands and covers semantically related high-probability alternatives. In effect, it tries to identify and suppress a local belief cluster rather than a single response. That is the main difference from standard gradient-ascent unlearning. The approach is more faithful to the real objective, but it depends on the quality and coverage of the bootstrapped belief set; weak expansion could still miss evasive rephrasings.","experiments":"The abstract makes two key experimental claims: first, standard metrics such as ROUGE and truth ratio can substantially misreport unlearning success; second, the proposed framework better addresses this issue. Existing block-wise training methods use ad-hoc local objectives and are rarely validated beyond classification.","importance":"Method-level with paradigmatic flavor. Provides a principled framework for independent block training by connecting residual connections to denoising dynamics. Directly relevant to memory-efficient pretrain at scale.","technical_approach":"DiffusionBlocks: residual connections naturally correspond to dynamical system updates; with minimal modifications, these become denoising steps where each block trains independently using a diffusion objective. Unlike prior block-wise methods, the local objective has principled grounding rather than being ad-hoc.","experiments":"Abstract truncated. Claims competitive performance with end-to-end training while enabling genuinely independent block training. Specific tasks, model sizes, and quantitative comparisons not fully available.","authors_note":"Takuya Akiba is the creator of Optuna, associated with Preferred Networks."},"tags":["block-wise-training","diffusion-interpretation","memory-efficiency","training-method"],"notable_authors":["Takuya Akiba"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007411","title":"Command-V: Training-Free Representation Finetuning Transfer","authors":["Barry Wang","Avi Schwarzschild","Alexander Robey","Ali Payani","Charles Fleming","Mingjie Sun","Daphne Ippolito"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Retrofitting large language models (LLMs) with new behaviors typically requires full finetuning or distillation—costly steps that must be repeated for every architecture. In this work, we introduce ⌘V (Command-V), a backpropagation-free behavior transfer method that copies an existing residual representation adapter from a donor model and pastes its effect into an architecturally different recipient model. ⌘V profiles layer activations on a small prompt set, derives linear converters between corresponding layers, and applies the donor intervention in the recipient’s activation space. This process does not require access to the original training data and needs minimal compute. In three case studies—safety-refusal enhancement, jailbreak facilitation, and automatic chain-of-thought reasoning—⌘V matches the performance of direct finetuning while using orders of magnitude less resources. alignment 分数。现有安全和对齐评测大多把行为压成通过/不通过，或者一组宽泛维度，但模型在真实交互中经常是在多个效用之间动态折中，例如礼貌、直接性、帮助性、推理投入程度，这些 trade-off 才是真正决定输出风格和风险边界的地方。","importance":"这项工作更偏解释框架和测量框架，对 pretrain 本身不是直接改法，但对 post-train cognitive model，并把它作为分析 LLM 价值权衡的结构化镜头，而不是训练新的模型。核心不是让 cognitive model 生成文本，而是用它去反推出模型行为对应的 utility weighting：例如在更高 reasoning effort、不同 system prompt、以及 RL post-training 前后，模型对礼貌、信息量、社交成本等因素的权重如何变化。这个设计有效，是因为它把难解释的输出差异映射成少数可比较参数；它的边界也明显，前提是选用的认知模型足够贴合语言现象，否则解释会变成过拟合话语风格的代理分析。","experiments":"摘要显示实验覆盖两类设置：一是闭源前沿模型，在改变 reasoning effort 和 system prompt 时观察行为剖面；二是开源模型，在 RL post-training 动态中追踪价值权重变化。摘要没有提供模型名、样本规模和量化结果，因此目前能确认的是定性结论：LLM 的行为变化可以被认知模型中的可解释权重变化较好刻画，而不是完全无结构漂移。若论文进一步给出拟合优度、跨模型稳定性，以及与人工价值判断的一致性，那会显著增强其可信度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a missing tool in alignment: we can score model behavior, but we are much worse at explaining how a model trades off competing values. Existing evaluations often collapse behavior into pass/fail labels or broad dimensions, while real interactions involve shifting balances between politeness, informativeness, directness, safety, and effort. Those trade-offs are often where alignment actually lives.","importance":"This is primarily an interpretability and measurement contribution rather than a new training method, but it is relevant to post-training diagnosis and reward design. Its value is that it imports a structured cognitive model from human language research, allowing alignment researchers to ask not only whether behavior changed after RL or prompt changes, but which latent value weights moved. That is a more actionable view than a single preference score.","technical_approach":"The method uses an existing cognitive model of polite speech as an analysis lens, not as a generator. The model maps observed outputs to interpretable utility weightings, such as how much the system appears to prioritize politeness, informational value, or social cost under different reasoning-effort settings, system prompts, and RL post-training stages. This design is useful because it compresses messy behavioral differences into a small set of comparable parameters. The limitation is equally clear: if the cognitive model is a poor fit to the linguistic phenomenon, the interpretation may be neat but misleading.","experiments":"The abstract indicates two evaluation regimes: closed-source frontier models under different reasoning-effort and system-prompt manipulations, and open-source models tracked through RL post-training. No model names, dataset sizes, or quantitative fit numbers are reported in the abstract. The main empirical claim is therefore qualitative but important: behavioral shifts in LLMs can be captured as interpretable value-weight changes rather than arbitrary drift. The full paper needs fit quality, cross-model consistency, and agreement with human judgments to make that claim persuasive.","authors_note":""},"tags":["interpretability","cognitive-model","value-alignment","utility"],"notable_authors":["Sham Kakade"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007482","title":"ExpertLongBench: benchmark 大多不贴近专家工作流，评测也难以可靠地区分'写得长'和'真正满足复杂要求'。很多基准仍停留在 QA 或短格式回答，模型即使能生成几千 token，也未必能遵守领域约束、覆盖关键要点、保持结构一致；而没有结构化 rubric，自动评测通常会把风格流畅误判为专业完成度。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是 benchmark + evaluation framework，属于系统级评测基础设施。对 pretrain/post-train 研究的启示很直接：如果模型未来要服务法律、医学、金融、科研写作等高约束长文任务，那么训练目标不能只追求 perplexity、聊天偏好或泛化问答分数，必须关注长程规划、要求覆盖率和领域结构遵从性；没有像 ExpertLongBench checklist，并从参考答案和模型输出中抽取对应信息进行细粒度比对。这个设计有效，是因为它把'长文本质量'拆成一组可验证的局部要求，减少了纯 LLM-as-a-judge 对文风和长度的偏置；代价是 checklist 抽取本身如果不稳定，会把评测误差转移到信息抽取环节。","experiments":"摘要给出的硬信息包括：11 个任务、9 个领域，输出长度可超过 5,000 tokens。论文的关键实验大概率会比较主流闭源/开源模型在 ExpertLongBench 上的总分和 checklist 维度分数，并验证 CLEAR 相比直接打分或纯参考相似度方法更接近专家判断。摘要没有给出具体模型名单和分数，因此目前最可信的判断是：这个工作更重要的是揭示现有模型在 expert-level long-form generation their scoring methods struggle to separate 'long and fluent' from 'actually meeting complex requirements.' A model can generate thousands of tokens and still miss key constraints, omit required content, or violate domain structure. Without explicit rubrics, automatic evaluation often rewards style more than task completion.","importance":"This is a benchmark and evaluation infrastructure contribution. The main implication for pretraining and post-training is straightforward: if models are expected to handle legal, medical, financial, or scientific drafting, then standard metrics like perplexity, chat preference, or short-form QA scores are not enough. We need to measure long-range planning, coverage of requirements, and adherence to domain-specific structure. Without that, long-form capability is easy to overestimate.","technical_approach":"The paper introduces ExpertLongBench with 11 tasks across 9 domains, designed around realistic expert applications rather than contest-style QA. This is more informative than holistic scoring because it decomposes long-form quality into verifiable requirements. The trade-off is that extraction quality becomes part of the evaluation pipeline; if checklist grounding is noisy, the benchmark inherits that noise.","experiments":"The abstract provides a few concrete facts: 11 tasks, 9 domains, and outputs that can exceed 5,000 tokens. Neural next-symbol predictors are powerful for compression, but they are not perfectly deterministic across hardware, software stacks, or computation order. In standard generation this is often harmless; in lossless coding it is fatal.","importance":"This is not a mainstream pretraining paper, but it matters for any setting where a model is used as an exact probabilistic engine rather than a best-effort generator. The key contribution is to formalize prediction mismatch and provide a model-agnostic coding scheme that tolerates bounded discrepancies. That is relevant for compression, communication, storage, and any reversible sequence modeling application where the usual tolerance for numerical drift does not exist.","technical_approach":"The proposed PMATIC algorithm modifies interval coding so that bounded probability mismatches do not immediately derail decoding. The important part is that it is model-agnostic: it does not require changing the predictor architecture, only the coding procedure that consumes its probabilities. Compared with standard arithmetic-style coding, it relaxes the requirement of perfect probability synchronization in exchange for robustness. The natural trade-off is some coding overhead, and the practical question is whether that overhead is smaller than the systems burden of enforcing exact determinism everywhere.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide datasets, models, compression ratios, or mismatch tolerances. The decisive empirical evidence should compare PMATIC against standard model-driven compression under controlled prediction mismatch, measuring both decoding reliability and compression efficiency. For this paper, the most important outcome is not a raw compression SOTA, but whether it prevents cascading decode failures under realistic numerical discrepancies.","authors_note":""},"tags":["lossless-compression","language-model","next-token-prediction","numerical-precision"],"notable_authors":["Jennifer have been held back by training-time memory issues and by the difficulty of maintaining quality under long horizons and interactive control. Diffusion-based methods deliver strong quality, yet bidirectional attention makes them slow for real-time use. AR models have the right inference structure with KV caching, but they usually degrade as videos get longer.","importance":"This is important for unified token-based generative modeling across modalities. The broader message is that causal AR remains a viable video paradigm when the target is real-time, streaming, and interactive generation. That matters because it pushes back against the simplistic split where diffusion owns quality and AR owns speed; for multimodal foundation models, the design space is more nuanced.","technical_approach":"LongLive is a frame-level autoregressive framework designed for long, real-time, interactive video generation. Its distinction from diffusion-forcing style methods is that it treats video as a streamable sequence and optimizes for incremental generation rather than bidirectional refinement. The trade-off is standard for AR: lower latency and better online controllability, but more pressure on training to manage exposure bias and long-range error accumulation.","experiments":"The abstract reports qualitative targets—real-time, interactive, long-video generation—but gives no lengths, frame rates, model sizes, or metric values. Chua"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2d1","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007649"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007649","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["reasoning","personalization","long-form","alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007688","title":"Why Adversarially Train Diffusion Models?","authors":["Maria Rosaria Briglia","Mujtaba Mirza","Giuseppe Lisanti","Iacopo Masi"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2d2","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007688"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007688","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：扩散模型在噪声、腐蚀或输入扰动下的鲁棒性问题，过去缺少像分类模型 adversarial training 那样系统的方法。传统 AT 依赖“同一样本被扰动后预测应保持不变”的 invariance 目标，但扩散模型做的是逐步去噪，简单照搬分类器目标并不合适。","importance":"这是生成模型训练目标级的工作，意义在于把 adversarial robustness 正式带入 diffusion training，而不是只在下游采样时加防护。对 pretrain 的启发是：score-based model 的鲁棒性约束不该围绕最终类别不变，而应围绕 denoising dynamics 是否等变。这个改写很重要，因为它说明生成模型鲁棒训练不是分类器 AT 的直接移植，而需要和生成过程本身的几何结构对齐。","technical_approach":"核心方法是为 diffusion models 提出一个基于 equivariance 的 adversarial training 公式。作者不再要求模型对扰动输入给出“相同标签/相同输出”，而是要求扰动前后的去噪轨迹或 score 估计满足与扩散动力学一致的变换关系。实现上，方法可以加入随机扰动，类似 randomized smoothing，也可以加入针对输入的 adversarial optimization，并且能无缝并入标准 diffusion training。这样设计的原因很直接：在 score matching 里，输入本来就位于多噪声层级的连续轨道上，正确的鲁棒目标应该保护去噪场而不是静态预测。代价则是训练成本更高，而且鲁棒性与样本保真度之间可能存在张力。","experiments":"摘要表明作者做了较全面的实证评估，比较随机扰动版和对抗扰动版训练，并分析其对 diffusion model 鲁棒性的影响。关键结论是：基于 equivariance 的 AT 能在噪声或输入腐蚀场景下提升模型稳定性。摘要没有披露具体数据集、模型架构、采样器、鲁棒指标、FID 变化或提升幅度，因此无法报告定量结果。就实验解读而言，这篇论文最值得看的不是是否拿到生成 SOTA，而是鲁棒性提升是否会显著损伤 clean-sample quality，以及哪种扰动预算下收益最稳定。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a simple but underexplored question: how should adversarial training be defined for diffusion models? Standard adversarial training is built for discriminative models and enforces invariance of predictions under perturbations. That does not transfer cleanly to diffusion, where the model’s job is to follow denoising dynamics rather than output a single static label.","importance":"This is a training-objective contribution for generative models. Its main importance is conceptual: it argues that robustness in score-based models should be tied to equivariance along the denoising process, not classifier-style invariance. For pretraining researchers working on generative backbones, that is the right level of abstraction. It suggests that robust training objectives need to respect the geometry of the generation process instead of copying discriminative recipes.","technical_approach":"The method introduces adversarial training for diffusion models through an equivariance constraint aligned with score matching and denoising dynamics. Instead of asking the model to produce identical outputs after perturbation, it asks perturbed and unperturbed inputs to induce appropriately transformed denoising behavior. The framework can be implemented with random perturbations, in the spirit of randomized smoothing, or with adversarially optimized perturbations, and it plugs into standard diffusion training. The reason this design is sensible is that diffusion models already operate across a continuum of noise levels, so protecting the denoising field is more natural than protecting a fixed prediction. The expected trade-off is higher training cost and possible tension between robustness and clean sample quality.","experiments":"The abstract indicates a fairly thorough empirical assessment comparing random-perturbation and adversarial-perturbation variants and studying robustness under noisy or corrupted inputs. The central claim is that the proposed equivariant adversarial training improves diffusion robustness. However, the abstract does not report datasets, model architectures, robustness metrics, FID changes, or exact gains, so a quantitative summary is not possible. The most important experimental question is whether robustness gains come with a substantial drop in clean generation quality, and under what perturbation budgets the trade-off stays favorable.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion","adversarial-training","robustness","objective"],"notable_authors":["Iacopo Masi"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007697","title":"Graph Diffusion Transformers in-context learning 一直做得不理想，因为任务不是自然语言条件，而是稀缺标签下、跨大量性质空间的条件生成。现有分子生成方法通常为单任务或少量性质单独训练模型，难以像通用 LM 那样通过少量示例快速切换到新 assay 或新材料目标。","importance":"这是一个比较有分量的范式级工作，价值在于把 ICL、diffusion transformer 和 molecular tokenizer 结合成统一的可扩展框架。对 pretrain 研究的启发有两层：第一，demo-conditioned generation 说明上下文条件不一定是文本，也可以是“样本-分数”对，这和更广义的 any-context modeling 是一致的；第二，Node Pair Encoding 这种 motif-level tokenizer 明确展示了离散表示压缩对大规模图生成预训练的收益。对于图/分子领域，它是在向“基础模型化”推进，而不是传统任务专模。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 DemoDiff，一种 demonstration-conditioned diffusion model。模型不读自然语言提示，而是把若干“分子—性质分数”示例作为上下文，由一个去噪 Transformer 根据这些 demonstrations 生成满足目标性质的新分子。为了让大模型预训练可扩展，作者还提出 Node Pair Encoding，把原始分子图压成 motif-level token，节点数减少 5.5 倍，从而显著降低图序列长度和训练成本。这个设计很关键，因为没有合适 tokenizer，0.7B 级图生成模型在大规模数据上很难训得动。与传统 property-conditioned 分子生成相比，它放弃了为每个性质单独设计头或单独训练的路线，转而依靠上下文示例做任务适配。","experiments":"实验层面的关键事实比较完整：作者预训练了一个 0.7B 参数模型，数据覆盖药物和材料两个域，并在 33 个设计任务、6 个任务类别上评估。摘要声称 DemoDiff 达到或匹配现有方法的性能，同时具备更强的 in-context 任务适应能力；Node Pair Encoding 使图表示所需节点数降低 5.5×，这是一个明确的系统收益。摘要没有给出每个 benchmark 上的具体指标数值，也没说明与哪些 baseline 比较后取得何种幅度提升，因此不能进一步写精确分数。但从信息量上看，这篇论文至少证明了：大规模预训练的 graph diffusion transformer 可以通过 demonstrations 做跨任务分子设计，而不只是做单一性质优化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real bottleneck in molecular design: in-context learning has worked poorly because the conditioning signal is not natural language but sparse supervision over a huge space of biological and material properties. Most existing molecular generators are trained for specific objectives or small groups of properties, which makes rapid adaptation to new assays difficult.","importance":"This is close to a paradigm-level contribution for molecular foundation models. It combines in-context learning, diffusion transformers, and a scalable graph tokenizer into one pretraining framework. For pretraining research more broadly, it makes two useful points. First, the context for adaptation does not need to be text; example-score pairs can serve as a task specification. Second, tokenizer design is a first-order scaling lever in non-text domains, and motif-level compression can make large graph generative pretraining practical.","technical_approach":"The core method, DemoDiff, is a demonstration-conditioned diffusion model for molecules. Instead of reading a textual prompt, it conditions on a small set of molecule-score examples and uses a denoising Transformer to generate molecules aligned with target properties. To make large-scale pretraining feasible, the paper introduces Node Pair Encoding, a motif-level molecular tokenizer that reduces the number of graph nodes by 5.5x. That compression matters because graph sequence length is a major scaling bottleneck. Compared with standard property-conditioned molecular generators, DemoDiff shifts adaptation from dedicated task-specific heads to in-context demonstrations.","experiments":"The abstract provides several concrete facts. The model is 0.7B parameters, pretrained on data spanning drugs and materials, and evaluated on 33 design tasks across six categories. The authors claim DemoDiff matches strong baselines while enabling in-context adaptation, and Node Pair Encoding cuts representation size by 5.5x. The abstract does not report exact benchmark names, metrics, or numerical margins over prior methods, so those cannot be stated reliably. Still, the main result is substantive: a graph diffusion transformer at this scale can act as an in-context molecular designer rather than a narrow property optimizer.","authors_note":""},"tags":["diffusion","in-context-learning","molecular-design","conditioning"],"notable_authors":["Tengfei Luo"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007713","title":"Learn to Guide Your guidance 虽然能显著提升条件扩散模型的感知质量，但固定 guidance weight 往往把样本往“更好看但更偏离真实条件分布”的方向推。现有 CFG 基本把引导强度当作全局超参调节，这太粗糙，因为合适的 guidance 强度本来就应随条件内容和去噪阶段变化。","importance":"这是一个扩散模型采样/训练接口上的方法级改进，意义在于把手工调 guidance 从静态超参变成可学习函数。对生成式预训练的启发是：很多常见 inference heuristics 其实隐含着一个 distribution mismatch，只是过去靠经验超参去折中。若能把这些 heuristic 学成与条件和时间相关的策略，就有机会同时改善 perceptual quality 和 distributional alignment，而不必在两者间做粗暴二选一。","technical_approach":"核心方法是学习条件相关、时间相关的 guidance weight ω_{c,(s,t)}。作者不再给整个采样过程设一个固定 CFG 系数，而是把 guidance 视为条件 c、当前时间 t 和目标时间 s 的连续函数，并通过最小化 guided diffusion 产生的 noised 样本分布与真实条件分布之间的 mismatch 来学习这一函数。这样设计的原因是：不同条件复杂度、不同去噪阶段，对 conditional 与 unconditional score 的混合比例需求不同；固定权重只是在全局做单点妥协。与标准 CFG 相比，它保留了 CFG 的简单框架，但把“权重怎么选”从手调改成数据驱动。代价则是需要额外学习模块和训练过程。","experiments":"摘要的核心实验结论是：学习到的动态 guidance 能比静态 CFG 更好逼近目标条件分布，同时保持或提升视觉质量。可惜摘要没有给出数据集、图像模型、评测指标、以及相对固定 ω 的具体改进幅度，因此不能写定量结果。若从实验设计角度看，最值得关注的应是两类证据：一类是 FID/人偏等感知质量指标是否优于固定 CFG；另一类是 precision-recall、条件一致性或 likelihood proxy 是否证明分布偏移变小。若两者同时改善，这篇工作的说服力会很强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a well-known weakness of classifier-free guidance: a large fixed guidance weight often improves perceptual quality while pulling samples away from the true conditional distribution. In standard practice, the guidance strength is treated as a global hyperparameter, which is too coarse because the right amount of guidance should depend on both the condition and the denoising stage.","importance":"This is a method-level improvement at the interface between diffusion training and inference. Its significance is that it turns guidance from a manually tuned scalar into a learned policy. For generative pretraining, that is a useful lesson: many successful inference heuristics are really ways of navigating a distribution mismatch, and learning them as condition- and time-dependent functions can be better than hard-coding a single compromise.","technical_approach":"The method learns guidance weights \\(\\omega_{c,(s,t)}\\) as continuous functions of the condition \\(c\\), the current denoising time \\(t\\), and the target time \\(s\\). Instead of using one static CFG weight, the model optimizes these weights by minimizing the mismatch between noised samples from the true conditional distribution and samples produced by the guided diffusion process. The rationale is straightforward: the optimal balance between conditional and unconditional scores varies across prompts and across denoising stages. Relative to standard CFG, the framework keeps the same basic guidance mechanism but replaces manual tuning with a learned adaptive rule. The cost is extra modeling and training complexity.","experiments":"The abstract claims that learned dynamic guidance better approximates the target conditional distribution than static CFG while retaining or improving visual quality. quality-only tuning trick.","authors_note":""},"tags":["classifier-free-guidance","diffusion","guidance-schedule"],"notable_authors":["Arnaud Doucet","Arthur Gretton"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007715","title":"WINA: Weight Informed Neuron Activation for Accelerating Large Language Model Inference","authors":["Sihan Chen","Dan Zhao","Jongwoo Ko","Colby Banbury","Huiping Zhuang","Luming Liang","Pashmina Cameron","Tianyi Chen"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2d5","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007715"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007715","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：训练无关的 LLM 稀疏激活方法虽然部署方便，但现有方法几乎只看 hidden state 大小来决定激活哪些神经元，近似误差大，性能掉得明显。问题的关键在于，神经元对输出的重要性不只由输入激活值决定，还由后续权重矩阵如何放大或衰减这些激活决定。","importance":"这是一个系统/推理效率方向的方法工作，对 pretrain 本身不是直接贡献，但对大模型 serving 与架构可分析性有价值。它的重要性在于指出：training-free sparsity 不是只能做粗糙启发式，权重结构本身就是可利用的先验。对研究者而言，这也提供了一个更一般的思路——很多 activation pruning 误差来自只看 state、不看 operator，而 operator-aware 近似往往更稳。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 WINA（Weight-Informed Neuron Activation）。它在训练无关稀疏激活框架下，同时使用 hidden state magnitude 和权重矩阵的 ℓ2 范数来估计每个神经元的重要性，再据此选择激活子集。相比只用激活值排序的方法，WINA 等于在估计单个神经元对最终输出贡献时加入了一个线性层增益因子。这样设计有效的原因很直接：一个当前激活不算最大的通道，如果连接权重很大，仍可能对输出误差很敏感；反之亦然。与需要重训或结构改造的 sparse 方法相比，WINA 强调 plug-and-play；与已有 training-free 方法相比，它多引入了 weight-aware 信息，因此理论上近似更准。代价是仍需在运行时做额外选择逻辑，但比重训便宜得多。","experiments":"摘要说明作者将 WINA 与已有 training-free sparse activation 方法比较，结论是它在保持模型性能的同时实现更高效推理。摘要没有给出基座模型规模、稀疏率、吞吐/延迟提升、以及在 perplexity 或下游任务上的精度损失数字，因此无法写出具体结果。能确认的实验价值是：论文不是通过重训练拿效率，而是在零训练改动条件下减少性能退化，这对于已有大模型的直接部署更现实。若正文中显示它在不同层、不同模型族上都稳定优于 activation-only 规则，实用意义会比较强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a weakness of training-free sparse activation for LLM inference: most existing methods decide which neurons to keep using hidden-state magnitude alone, which leads to large approximation error and noticeable quality loss. The missing piece is that neuron importance depends not only on activation values but also on how downstream weights amplify or suppress those activations.","importance":"This is primarily a systems and inference-efficiency contribution rather than a pretraining result, but it is still relevant for large-model deployment and architecture analysis. The key insight is that training-free sparsity does not have to rely on crude state-only heuristics. Weight structure is available at no extra training cost and can improve importance estimates. More broadly, it highlights that activation pruning should be operator-aware, not just activation-aware.","technical_approach":"WINA, or Weight-Informed Neuron Activation, estimates neuron importance using both hidden-state magnitudes and the \\(\\ell_2\\)-norm of the model’s weight matrices. It then activates only a selected subset of neurons based on this combined score. Compared with activation-only ranking, WINA effectively adds a gain term reflecting how much a neuron can influence the output through downstream weights. The design is sensible because a moderately activated neuron with large outgoing weight can matter more than a highly activated neuron with weak downstream influence. Relative to retraining-based sparse methods, WINA remains plug-and-play. Relative to prior training-free methods, it uses more structural information and should therefore approximate the dense computation more faithfully.","experiments":"The abstract claims that WINA improves inference efficiency while preserving model quality better than prior training-free sparse activation methods. It does not provide model sizes, sparsity levels, throughput or latency gains, or exact quality metrics, so no quantitative summary can be given. The main practical value is that the method targets zero-retraining deployment. If the full paper shows stable gains across model families and layers, that would make it a strong serving-side technique.","authors_note":""},"tags":["sparse-activation","inference-efficiency","training-free"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007732","title":"Reliable Fine-Grained Evaluation of Natural Language Math Model Routing for Efficient LLM Inference","authors":["Wittawat Jitkrittum","Harikrishna Narasimhan","Ankit Singh Rawat","Jeevesh Juneja","Congchao Wang","Zifeng Wang","Alec Go","Chen-Yu Lee","Pradeep Shenoy","Rina Panigrahy","Aditya Krishna Menon","Sanjiv Kumar"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Model routing is a simple technique for reducing the inference cost of large language models (LLMs), wherein one maintains a pool of candidate LLMs, and learns to route each prompt to the smallest feasible LLM. Existing works focus on learning a router for a fixed pool of LLMs. In this paper, we consider the problem of dynamic routing, where new, previously unobserved LLMs are available at test time. We propose UniRoute, a new approach to this problem that relies on representing each LLM as afeature vector, derived based on predictions on a set of representative prompts. Based on this, we detail two effective instantiations of UniRoute, relying on cluster-based routing and a learned cluster map respectively. We show that these are estimates of a theoretically optimal routing rule, and quantify their errors via an excess risk bound. Experiments on a range of public benchmarks show the effectiveness of UniRoute in routing amongst more than 30 unseen LLMs. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007775"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007775","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["model-routing","inference-efficiency","llm-serving"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007778","title":"C-Voting:
