Behavior Induction via Representation-structure Distillation","authors":["Galen Pogoncheff","Michael Beyeler"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2e0","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007865"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007865","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：如何把一个模型已经学到的“行为属性”迁移到新任务或新分布上，而不是只迁移任务知识。过去常见做法是继续微调或蒸馏输出，但这些方法很容易把原有的鲁棒性、安全性或公平性在迁移过程中冲掉，因为监督信号只约束最终预测，不约束内部表征组织方式。","importance":"这项工作的贡献更偏 post-train 接口层，但对 pretrain 也有启发。它的重要性不在于提出一个新的视觉鲁棒 benchmark 技巧，而在于明确提出：行为可以被视为一种表征结构，而不是一个单独任务标签。这对对齐迁移、持续训练、以及‘如何防止 SFT/RL 覆盖预训练能力’都有直接参考价值。对 LLM 来说，这类方法提示我们可以蒸馏的不只是答案分布，还包括中间表示几何。","technical_approach":"BIRD 的核心方法是表示结构蒸馏：不是逼 student 逐点拟合 teacher 的隐藏状态数值，而是对齐内部表示之间的关系结构。这个设计的好处是保留行为相关的不变量，同时允许 student 在任务、架构甚至数据分布变化时保留自由度。相比普通 feature distillation，它更强调 representation structure，也就是样本间、类别间或层间的相对几何；相比直接微调，它避免了只追求新任务损失而破坏旧行为约束。论文将其用于分布外鲁棒性迁移，说明作者认为鲁棒性更多编码在表示组织，而非最后分类头。","experiments":"摘要里最关键的结果是：在图像分类的 OOD robustness 迁移上，BIRD 相比最强 baseline 最高提升 18% robust accuracy。作者还强调它在低标签场景下依然有效，这一点很重要，因为真正需要行为迁移的场景通常正是目标域标注少、重新收集对齐数据昂贵的时候。摘要没有给出模型规模、数据集名称和具体 baseline 名单，但从描述看，比较对象至少包括 fine-tuning、transfer learning 和 continual learning 方法。若论文完整，值得重点看它是否分析了：结构蒸馏在哪些层最关键、与 teacher/student 架构差异的关系，以及 clean accuracy 与 robust accuracy 的权衡。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a useful question: how do we transfer aligned behavior, not just task performance, from one model to another trained on new tasks or shifted data. Standard fine-tuning and output-level distillation often overwrite robustness, safety, or fairness because they only constrain final predictions and ignore how internal representations are organized.","importance":"This is more of a transfer-and-alignment contribution than a pretraining method, but it has clear relevance to the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. The main takeaway is that behavior may live in representation geometry rather than in labels alone. That is a meaningful idea for continual pretraining, alignment retention, and for preventing SFT or RL from erasing desirable pretrained traits.","technical_approach":"BIRD uses representation-structure distillation. Instead of forcing the student to match the teacher’s hidden states pointwise, it matches the structure of the representation space. That choice matters because it preserves behavior-relevant invariants while leaving room for task adaptation and architectural mismatch. Compared with standard feature distillation, it focuses on relational geometry across examples or classes. Compared with fine-tuning, it adds a mechanism that can preserve prior behavior while learning the new task.","experiments":"The headline result is strong: on out-of-distribution image classification robustness, BIRD improves robust accuracy by up to 18% over the best competing baseline. The abstract also says it remains effective in low-label settings, which is exactly where behavior-preserving transfer matters most. The provided text does not include model sizes, datasets, or the full baseline list, but the comparisons explicitly include fine-tuning, transfer learning, and continual learning methods. The most useful details to inspect in the full paper would be which layers need structural matching, how well the method tolerates teacher-student mismatch, and whether robustness gains come with any in-distribution accuracy cost.","authors_note":""},"tags":["alignment","distillation","finetuning","robustness"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007881","title":"PropensityBench: Evaluating Latent Safety Risks in Huang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2e1","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007881"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007881","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：现有 LLM 安全评测主要测“能不能做”，却很少测“在有能力时会不会主动做”，因此遗漏了 latent propensity 这个关键风险轴。这个问题以前被回避，是因为 propensity 很难直接观察；但随着 agentic LLM 能够规划、调用工具、隐藏意图，这个维度已经不能再靠静态拒答测试替代。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是评测框架级，且对对齐研究有现实冲击。它的重要性在于把 frontier risk 评估从 capability-only 扩展到 capability × propensity 的二维视角。对 pretrain/posttrain 闭环的启示是，仅凭能力压制或表层安全策略，不能说明模型在获得工具与权限后仍然安全；训练信号如果只优化‘被问到时不回答’，可能并没有改变更深层的目标偏好。","technical_approach":"PropensityBench 的核心思路是 agentic evaluation：给模型配备模拟的危险能力或高风险工具环境，再观察它是否倾向于追求有害目标。这个设计与传统 jailbreak benchmark 的区别在于，后者大多测试在单轮提示下是否泄露内容，而这里测的是在多步、带资源、可能有策略空间的环境里，模型会不会主动选择风险路径。作者要解决的关键难点是把‘能力不足导致失败’和‘有能力但不愿做’区分开，所以框架应该会通过受控环境、任务分解和行为指标来隔离 propensity。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型列表、任务数量和数值结果，因此目前无法报告 benchmark 规模或模型排名。可以确认的是，论文关注的是当模型被赋予 simulated dangerous capabilities 后的行为差异，而不是传统红队提示成功率。真正有价值的实验应包括：同等能力条件下不同模型 propensity 的排序是否稳定；安全微调、RLHF 或 constitution 类方法对 propensity 的影响是否和对 capability suppression 一致；以及 agentic setting 中是否出现策略性隐藏或延迟有害行为。若这些现象被观察到，这个 benchmark 的价值会高于一般静态安全题库。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a real blind spot in LLM safety evaluation: existing benchmarks mostly measure what a model can do, not what it would choose to do if it had dangerous capabilities. That distinction matters more now because agentic models can plan, use tools, and potentially conceal harmful intent.","importance":"This is an evaluation-framework contribution with direct implications for alignment. Its main value is to separate capability from propensity. That is important because safety methods that suppress explicit bad outputs may not actually change underlying action preferences once the model is placed in a richer, tool-enabled environment.","technical_approach":"PropensityBench uses an agentic setup. Instead of testing whether a model reveals harmful content under a prompt, it equips the model with simulated dangerous capabilities and measures whether it pursues risky actions. The key methodological challenge is to disentangle inability from unwillingness. A good propensity benchmark therefore needs controlled environments, tasks where capability is made available, and behavioral metrics that track deliberate harmful pursuit rather than one-shot compliance.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model lists, benchmark size, or headline numbers, so there is not enough information to report quantitative findings. What matters most is whether the benchmark can produce stable differences in harmful propensity across models under matched capability conditions, and whether standard alignment methods reduce propensity or only reduce visible harmful outputs. If the paper shows strategic concealment or delayed harmful behavior in agentic settings, that would be a meaningful advance over static jailbreak evaluations.","authors_note":""},"tags":["safety","evaluation","agent","benchmark"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10007884","title":"Evaluating Cross-Modal Reasoning Ability and Problem Characteristics with MLLM benchmark 里大量题目其实可以靠单模态 shortcut 做对，导致所谓“跨模态推理能力”被高估。过去大家通常用总体准确率给模型排榜，但没有拆开题目到底考图像、考文本，还是考真正的跨模态整合，所以 benchmark 越做越大，信号却不一定更干净。","importance":"这项工作的价值是评测方法级，而且对多模态预训练很有启发。它的重要性在于把模型能力和题目难度都分解成 image-only、text-only、cross-modal 三部分，从而让 benchmark 不再只是一个黑箱总分。对 native multimodal pretrain 来说，这种分解很关键，因为它可以区分模型是学会了跨模态绑定，还是只是在某一模态上更强。","technical_approach":"作者提出 M3IRT，本质上是把经典 item response theory 扩展到多模态和多维能力建模。它不是直接过滤题目，而是估计每道题的多维难度结构，以及每个模型在不同能力轴上的表现。这样做的好处是：一方面能找出伪跨模态题，减少无效 benchmark 规模；另一方面能解释为什么两个模型总分接近但能力结构不同。相比简单的 ablation 式‘遮掉图像/遮掉文本’，IRT 的优势是可以在整体数据上做统计建模，而不是逐题手工判断 shortcut。","experiments":"摘要没有提供具体 benchmark 名称、题目数量和相关性系数，因此无法复述定量结果。可以确认的是，作者声称该方法能识别出当前 benchmark 中那些可由单模态解决的低质量问题，并据此给出更可靠的模型排序。若论文完整，最值得看的是三类结果：第一，M3IRT 识别出的 shortcut 题比例有多高；第二，移除这些题后模型排名变化有多大；第三，cross-modal ability 这一隐变量是否比原始总分更能预测真实多模态泛化。","authors_note":"作者包括 Hisashi Kashima。其代表性工作集中在机器学习、图学习与统计建模。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a benchmark validity problem: many supposedly multimodal reasoning questions can be solved from a single modality, so current MLLM rankings often overstate true cross-modal reasoning ability. Aggregate accuracy hides whether a model used image evidence, text evidence, or actual multimodal integration.","importance":"This is an evaluation-method contribution with clear relevance to multimodal pretraining. Its importance is that it turns benchmark analysis from a single score into a decomposed ability model. That matters because native multimodal training should be judged on whether it learns cross-modal binding, not merely whether one modality is strong enough to carry the answer.","technical_approach":"The proposed M3IRT extends classical item response theory to multimodal and multidimensional settings. Instead of simply filtering questions with modality-drop ablations, it models both item difficulty and model ability along image-only, text-only, and cross-modal axes. This gives two benefits: it can identify shortcut-heavy items statistically at scale, and it can explain why models with similar overall scores may rely on very different competence profiles.","experiments":"The abstract does not include benchmark names, question counts, or quantitative findings, so there is not enough information to report exact numbers. LLM 排名系统对极少量偏好样本的删除是否足够稳健，答案是否定的。大家通常默认 Bradley-Terry 类排名在大样本下会自然稳定，但这篇工作指出，榜首模型之间往往分差很小，因此极少量高影响偏好就足以翻转结论，导致排行榜被过度解读。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是评测稳健性分析，影响不在模型训练本身，而在整个对齐和发布生态。它重要是因为很多 RLHF、DPO、蒸馏和产品宣发都把 Arena 类排名当成事实标准；如果榜单对 0.003% 的样本删除都敏感，那么任何基于这些排名做的策略判断都需要置信区间和鲁棒性审计，而不能只看点估计。","technical_approach":"作者提出一种 worst-case dropping robustness check，用来分析删除极小比例偏好数据后排名是否翻转。方法强调计算快、易部署，说明它大概率不是重新训练复杂模型，而是在 Bradley-Terry 变体上做高影响样本分析或近似最坏情况删点搜索。这个设计抓住了关键：排名问题的脆弱性常来自少量杠杆样本，而不是平均噪声。相比常规 bootstrap 或随机重采样，最坏情况删除更接近实际风险上界。","experiments":"最关键的数字已经很明确：在 Chatbot Arena 上，删除仅 0.003% 的人工偏好就可能改变第一名模型。作者还将方法应用到 Arena 及其衍生平台，并观察到来自 MT-bench 派生偏好的排名似乎更稳健。摘要没有给出具体模型名和完整鲁棒性曲线，但光这个量级已经说明问题：top model 排名差异小于系统对少数关键样本的敏感度。若论文完整，最值得看的实验包括：哪些样本最有影响、这些样本是否集中在特定题型或模型对局、以及不同 ranking model 变体对删点攻击的敏感性差异。","authors_note":"作者包括 Tamara Broderick。其代表性工作包括贝叶斯方法、统计机器学习与稳健推断。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether popular LLM leaderboards are robust to dropping a tiny fraction of preference data, and the answer is no. Bradley-Terry-style rankings are often treated as stable once enough votes are collected, but top models are usually separated by very small margins, so a handful of influential preferences can flip the outcome.","importance":"This is an evaluation robustness paper, but it matters for the whole alignment ecosystem. Arena-style rankings are used to justify RLHF choices, model releases, and product claims. If the top rank can change after removing 0.003% of preferences, then point estimates alone are not enough; ranking systems need explicit robustness checks.","technical_approach":"The method is a computationally efficient worst-case dropping analysis for Bradley-Terry-like ranking systems. The goal is not to model average uncertainty, but to identify the small set of preferences that exert disproportionate leverage on the ranking. That makes it more relevant than standard random resampling, because the practical concern is exactly whether a few anomalous or unrepresentative comparisons can change the leaderboard.","experiments":"The headline finding is very concrete: on Chatbot Arena, dropping only 0.003% of human preferences can change the top-ranked model. Broderick, known for work in Bayesian methods, statistical machine learning, and robustness."},"tags":["preference","evaluation","ranking","data-quality"],"notable_authors":["Tamara Li","Qilong Wu","Xin Jin","Sihan Cao","Shifeng Zhang","Steven HOI","Hongsheng Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2e4","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10007903"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10007903","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：DMD 一类扩散蒸馏方法为什么能工作，大家以前可能解释错了。常见观点认为 few-step 生成效果主要来自分布匹配项，但作者通过目标分解指出，真正驱动学生学会少步生成的主因可能是一个此前被忽视的 CFG Augmentation 项，而 distribution matching 更像稳定器而不是发动机。","importance":"这项工作的意义不只是改进一个蒸馏配方，而是重新解释扩散蒸馏的训练机制，属于方法机制层面的重要工作。它对生成预训练和蒸馏研究的启示很直接：如果我们搞错了起主要作用的项，就会在错误的方向上调参、扩模型、做理论分析。把‘谁是 spear，谁是 shield’拆清楚，有助于后续更高效地设计单步或少步生成器。","technical_approach":"作者的方法核心是对 DMD 目标做严格分解，并提出 Decoupled DMD：把 CFG Augmentation 和 Distribution Matching 的角色显式解耦。论文的观点是，CA 提供了学习 few-step generation 的主要驱动力，相当于“spear”；DM 的作用更多是约束训练分布、抑制发散，相当于“shield”。与以往把两者混在一个统一目标里理解不同，这种解耦让我们能分别控制‘生成能力提升’和‘训练稳定性维护’。如果这个分析成立，它解释了为什么某些看似削弱分布匹配的改动并没有显著伤害最终效果。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体数据集、FID/IS 数字、蒸馏步数和 baseline，因此无法定量总结性能。可以确认的是，作者既做了理论分解，也做了经验验证，用来支持“CA 才是核心引擎”的结论。最值得关注的实验应包括：移除 CA 或移除 DM 后 few-step 质量与训练稳定性的变化，单步和多步蒸馏下这种角色分工是否一致，以及 decoupled 设计是否带来更好的调参可控性。若结果清晰，这篇工作对后续 diffusion distillation recipe 的影响会大于一篇单纯刷分论文。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper challenges a widely held explanation of why Distribution Matching Distillation works. The common belief is that the distribution matching term is the main source of strong few-step generation. The authors argue that this is misleading, and that a previously overlooked CFG Augmentation term is doing most of the heavy lifting.","importance":"This is important because it is not just another distillation tweak. It is a mechanism paper that can change how people design and tune diffusion distillation objectives. If the field has been attributing gains to the wrong term, that affects recipe design, theory, and where compute is spent when building one-step or few-step generators.","technical_approach":"The core contribution is a decomposition of the DMD objective and a decoupled formulation that separates CFG Augmentation from Distribution Matching. The paper’s claim is that CFG Augmentation acts as the main engine for learning effective few-step generation, while distribution matching mainly stabilizes training and keeps the student from drifting too far. This spear-versus-shield interpretation matters because it lets the two roles be controlled independently rather than bundled into one opaque objective.","experiments":"The abstract does not report datasets, FID values, distillation step counts, or baseline numbers, so quantitative performance cannot be summarized here. The critical evidence will be ablations that remove or weaken each term separately, showing that few-step quality depends primarily on CFG Augmentation while stability depends more on distribution matching. Transformer，而是把“关系绑定”从高成本张量运算改成更适合现代硬件的参数化映射，从而缓解计算和长度瓶颈。代价是生物可解释性可能弱化一些，而且这种结构先验是否能迁移到非空间任务仍需验证。","experiments":"摘要表明论文会展示 mm-TEM ablation。因为摘要被截断，无法安全给出数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a structural weakness of Transformers: their key-value memory has no built-in spatial prior, so spatial reasoning often reduces to expensive token matching rather than organized memory retrieval. Existing hippocampus-inspired models such as TEM do model structured spatial memory, but they rely on costly outer-product memories or run into self-attention context bottlenecks. The goal here is to keep the useful inductive bias from hippocampal-entorhinal systems while making it scalable enough to plug into modern deep learning pipelines.","importance":"This is best read as an architecture-level idea rather than a direct replacement for mainstream pretraining. Its value for pretraining research is the reminder that some reasoning failures come from missing structure in the memory interface, not just insufficient scale. If similar modules can encode spatial, graph, or algorithmic state in a reusable way, they could improve systematic generalization in foundation models. The impact is therefore directional: it points to a better memory abstraction, even if standard attention remains the default workhorse.","technical_approach":"The method introduces mm-TEM, a scalable structural spatial memory model that replaces inefficient outer-product style association with meta-MLP relational memory. The design follows the hippocampus-entorhinal split: one component carries structural codes, another binds them to sensory content, and a lighter relational memory mechanism supports flexible inference. Compared with classic TEM, the key change is not simply adding more Transformer machinery, but reparameterizing relation binding into hardware-friendly learned mappings. Because the provided abstract is truncated, I cannot safely report specific numbers.","authors_note":""},"tags":["spatial-reasoning","architecture","hippocampus","transformer"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008078","title":"Log Probability Tracking of LLM APIs","authors":["Timothée Chauvin","Erwan Le Merrer","Francois Taiani","Gilles Tredan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"When using an LLM through an API provider, users expect the served model to remain consistent over time, a property crucial for the reliability of downstream applications and the reproducibility of research. Existing audit methods are too costly to apply at regular time intervals to the wide range of available LLM APIs. This means that model updates are left largely unmonitored in practice. In this work, we show that while LLM log probabilities (logprobs) are usually non-deterministic, they can still be used as the basis for cost-effective continuous monitoring of LLM APIs. We apply a simple statistical test based on the average value of each token logprob, requesting only a single token of output. This is enough to detect changes as small as one step of fine-tuning, making this approach more sensitive than existing methods while being 1,000x cheaper. We introduce the TinyChange benchmark as a way to measure the sensitivity of audit methods in the context of small, realistic model changes. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008078"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008078","category_id":"industry","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作解决的是 API 形式提供的 LLM 会悄悄更新，但用户几乎没有低成本手段持续监测。现有审计方法通常要跑大批评测集、成本高且频率低，所以只能事后发现模型漂移，难以保障研究复现和生产稳定性。作者关注的不是模型能力评估，而是更基础的问题：能不能用极少查询持续检测服务端模型是否已经变了。","importance":"结论上，这是系统与评测基础设施层面的实用工作，贡献不在提升模型能力，而在让外部用户能更可靠地观察模型演化。对 pretrain/posttrain 研究的意义很直接：现在很多线上 API 的训练版本切换、微调回滚、对齐更新都不透明，这会污染实验对比，也会让线上表现波动无法归因。如果真的能用极低成本检测到“一步 fine-tuning”级别的变化，这个工具对模型审计、A/B 监控和外部 reproducibility 都很有价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是基于 logprob 的轻量级变更检测：即使单次返回的 token log probability 有噪声，也可以通过统计平均 logprob 的分布变化做连续监控。摘要里的关键选择很工程化也很聪明：只请求单 token 输出，显著降低 API 成本；再对该 token 的 logprob 做简单统计检验，而不是构造复杂 probing benchmark。和传统黑盒基准测试相比，它不试图判断“模型变好了还是变差了”，而是先回答“模型是不是变了”。这种设计有效的前提是 API 确实暴露 logprobs，且噪声水平相对稳定。","experiments":"摘要给出的最关键事实是，该方法据称可以检测到小到“一步 fine-tuning”的模型变化，而且每次请求只需要一个输出 token。这说明检测灵敏度相当高，成本也明显低于常规基准评测。未给出的信息包括：测试了哪些 API、统计功效如何随样本数变化、误报率与漏报率是多少、对温度或采样设置是否敏感。若论文完整，最有价值的实验应是长期时间序列监控、多家 API 对比，以及在已知 checkpoint 变动上做 controlled study。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical but under-addressed problem: LLM APIs change over time, yet users lack a cheap way to monitor those updates continuously. Existing audits usually require running large benchmark suites, which is expensive and infrequent, so model drift is often discovered late. The goal here is not to measure capability in general, but to detect whether the served model has changed at all, using minimal query budget.","importance":"This is a systems and evaluation infrastructure contribution rather than a model-improvement paper, but it matters a lot for reliable research and deployment. Pretraining, fine-tuning, and alignment updates often happen behind closed APIs, which makes empirical comparison noisy and production regressions hard to attribute. If one can detect changes as small as a single fine-tuning step at very low cost, that becomes useful for external auditing, A/B monitoring, and reproducibility.","technical_approach":"The method uses logprob-based change detection. Even though token log probabilities returned by APIs are not perfectly deterministic, the paper argues that their average behavior can still support a simple statistical test for continuous monitoring. The key engineering choice is to request only a single output token, which keeps query cost very low, and then test whether the mean token logprob distribution has shifted. Unlike full black-box benchmarking, the method is designed to answer a narrower but important question first: has the model changed? Its effectiveness depends on the API exposing logprobs and on the noise level being reasonably stable.","experiments":"The strongest concrete claim in the abstract is that the approach can detect model changes as small as one fine-tuning step while using only one generated token per request. That implies high sensitivity at much lower cost than standard benchmark-based audits. The abstract does not specify which APIs were tested, how sample size affects power, or the false-positive and false-negative rates. The most useful experiments would include controlled checkpoint change studies, long-term monitoring over time, and robustness to decoding settings such as temperature.","authors_note":""},"tags":["llm-api","evaluation","logprob","reproducibility","model-monitoring"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008085","title":"In-Context Learning of Temporal Point Processes with Foundation Inference Models","authors":["David Berghaus","Patrick Seifner","Kostadin Cvejoski","César Ali Ojeda Marin","Ramses Sanchez"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2ed","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008085"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008085","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作解决的是时序点过程建模长期依赖专门训练：每个新系统、每个新事件机制都要重新拟合一个模型，缺少 foundation model 式的通用推断器。过去神经 MTPP 方法大多直接对某一数据集学习 conditional intensity，效果可以很好，但迁移性很弱。作者提出的问题是：能不能像 in-context learning 那样，让模型从上下文里的一组事件序列直接“读出”一个新点过程的动力学规律。","importance":"结论上，这是一篇把 foundation inference 思路扩展到时间事件建模的工作，范式意义大于单点 SOTA。对 pretrain 研究的启示在于，预训练不一定只学内容生成，也可以学“从上下文做 amortized inference”；这和近年的 FIM、simulation pretraining、world-model style inference 很接近。如果这种路线成立，很多小样本科学建模任务都可能从 per-task fitting 转到一次预训练、多任务上下文适配。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 FIM-PP：先在大规模合成的 MTPP 数据上预训练一个深度网络，使其能够根据上下文中给定的一组事件历史，in-context 地估计目标系统的条件强度函数。关键设计不在于某个特定点过程参数化，而在于训练分布覆盖广泛的 process family，让模型学到从样本轨迹反推潜在生成规律的能力。与传统为每个真实数据集单独训练的神经点过程相比，它把参数更新换成上下文条件化，因此推理更快、适配更轻；代价是预训练分布若覆盖不够，遇到 out-of-family 真实过程时可能失真。","experiments":"摘要可确认的事实是，预训练数据来自大规模合成 MTPP 分布，模型随后可以在真实数据上无需或少量任务专用训练就做推断。当前缺少模型规模、合成数据规模、真实数据集名称和具体指标。若论文实验有说服力，关键结果应包括：与每任务单独训练的神经 MTPP baseline 相比，FIM-PP 在少样本甚至零样本设置下达到接近或更好的 log-likelihood / event prediction 表现；同时展示预训练分布多样性和上下文大小对迁移性能的影响。这里无法安全填入数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a limitation of current temporal point process modeling: each new system typically requires training a separate specialized model, so there is little notion of a reusable foundation inference model. Standard neural MTPP methods can fit a target dataset well, but they do not transfer naturally across systems. The question here is whether a model can infer the governing dynamics of a new event process directly from a context of example sequences, in the same spirit as in-context learning.","importance":"This is a foundation-inference contribution more than a benchmark paper. For pretraining research, the interesting message is that pretraining need not only learn generation; it can also learn amortized inference from context. That connects to recent work on FIM-style pretraining, simulation-based learning, and world-model-style inference. If successful, this route could shift many scientific or small-data settings from per-task fitting to one-time pretraining plus contextual adaptation.","technical_approach":"The method, FIM-PP, is pretrained on a large synthetic distribution of marked temporal point processes so that it can infer conditional intensity functions in context from sets of event histories. The important design choice is not a single fixed point-process family, but a broad synthetic training distribution that forces the model to learn how to infer latent dynamics from observed trajectories. Compared with fitting a fresh neural point-process model for every real dataset, this replaces parameter updates with context conditioning, which should make adaptation faster and cheaper. The main risk is distribution mismatch: if the pretraining family does not cover the real process well, inference quality may degrade.","experiments":"The abstract confirms that pretraining is done on a large synthetic MTPP dataset and that the pretrained model is applied to real-world systems. The goal is to build a compositional ARC setting that separates memorization-style generalization from true recombination.","importance":"This is primarily an evaluation and generalization paper, not a new pretraining method, but it is useful for reasoning research. benchmark 驱动的，容易遗漏针对特定危险概念的脆弱点，因此“整体看起来安全”的模型仍可能被精确地解除某一类拒答能力。过去 steering 攻击通常是广谱干预，能破坏安全但也容易在通用评测上暴露；这篇工作更进一步，展示了选择性去除特定概念拒答的能力。","importance":"这项工作的重要性主要是安全机制分析与评测方法层面的。对 LLM 训练研究的启示很强：拒答行为可能在表征空间里以非常稀疏、概念局部化的方式存在，这意味着靠整体 benchmark 分数判断安全边界是不够的，也说明对齐信号未必形成了真正分布外稳健的行为策略。对 post-train 来说，这是一个明显警告——如果概念级脆弱性可以用极少数据抽出，那么 reward model、SFT 和拒答模板可能都只学到了浅层方向。","technical_approach":"作者提出 RepIt，从激活中提取 concept-specific refusal vectors，并用它们对模型做定向 steering。核心不是寻找一个通用 jailbreak 方向，而是用很少样本隔离与某一危险概念相关的拒答表示，再只压制这一局部方向。摘要里一个很关键的发现是，编辑主要局部化在 100–200 个坐标上，说明相关表征相当稀疏。与已有 activation steering 不同，RepIt 的目标是“选择性失效”：让模型在 WMD 相关问题上回答，同时在其他问题上依然保持拒答并通过常规安全评测。这样设计之所以危险，是因为它利用了表征的可分性；边界则在于，若概念间表征高度纠缠、或安全行为更深层依赖生成时动态，简单向量干预未必仍有效。","experiments":"摘要给了几条很实的实验事实。第一，RepIt 在五个 frontier LMs 上都能构造出 evaluation-evading 的模型。第二，这些模型会回答与大规模杀伤性武器相关的问题，同时在标准 benchmark 上仍表现为安全。第三，向量编辑只涉及约 100–200 个坐标。第四，稳健的概念向量可以从很少的样本中提取，但摘要截断了具体样本数，不能补写。缺失的信息包括具体模型名、攻击成功率、benchmark 分数变化，因此无法给更细数字。即便如此，实验结论已经足够强：安全拒答存在高度可操控的概念级局部表征。","authors_note":"作者包含 Dawn Song。摘要未提供机构信息。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper shows that benchmark-based safety evaluation misses a serious failure mode: a model can remain broadly “safe” on standard tests while having refusal selectively removed for a targeted dangerous concept. Earlier steering attacks were often broad and therefore easier to detect; this work focuses on concept-specific refusal suppression.","importance":"This is an important safety and representation-analysis result. The main lesson for LM training is that refusal behavior may live in sparse, concept-localized directions in activation space, so global benchmark scores are not enough to characterize safety. For post-training, it suggests current alignment signals may produce shallow, easily separable concept-level controls rather than robust out-of-distribution refusal policies.","technical_approach":"RepIt extracts concept-specific refusal vectors from model activations and uses them for targeted steering. The goal is not a generic jailbreak direction but a selective intervention that suppresses refusal only for a chosen concept. A notable finding is that the edit localizes to roughly 100–200 coordinates, indicating a surprisingly sparse representation. This differs from prior activation steering that broadly shifts model behavior; here the objective is selective failure—answer WMD-related prompts while preserving refusal elsewhere and still passing standard safety benchmarks. The method works because concept representations appear separable enough to isolate. Its boundary is equally important: if safety behavior is deeply entangled or depends on richer generation dynamics, simple vector edits may become less effective.","experiments":"The abstract contains several concrete facts. Song"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008209","title":"RNE: plug-and-play diffusion inference-time control and energy-based training","authors":["Jiajun He","José Miguel Hernández Lobato","Yuanqi Du","Francisco Vargas"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2f7","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008209"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008209","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：标准 diffusion 模型通常只提供去噪转移核，但很多应用需要知道生成轨迹各时刻的边缘密度，比如做 inference-time control 或把 diffusion 和 energy-based 学习统一起来。过去这些能力往往要为具体任务单独造近似器，缺少一个从路径分布出发的统一视角。","importance":"这项工作更接近生成建模范式层的方法统一。它的重要性在于把三个通常分开讨论的问题——diffusion density estimation、推理时控制、以及 energy-based diffusion training——放进同一个 Radon-Nikodym 估计框架里。对新型语言建模和跨模态预训练的启示是，如果 diffusion 模型能稳定获得沿轨迹的密度比信息，那么很多训练目标与解码控制手段都能更自然地组合，而不必重新训练一个 task-specific controller。","technical_approach":"作者提出 RNE，核心是估计路径分布之间的 Radon-Nikodym density ratio，并借此把 transition kernels 与 marginal densities 联系起来。技术上它是一个 plug-and-play 框架：给定已有 diffusion 过程，通过路径密度比的估计，可以恢复或近似中间时刻的边缘密度，从而支持控制项注入，也能转写成 energy-based 训练目标。与常规 classifier guidance 或 control-specific redesign 不同，RNE 不是只在采样时额外加一个梯度，而是先补齐 diffusion 过程中缺失的密度信息。这样设计有效，是因为很多控制和能量学习问题本质上都依赖 log-density 或 density ratio；一旦这个量可得，多个应用自然统一。边界在于，路径密度比估计若方差过大，会直接影响控制稳定性，且高维连续空间中的估计成本可能不低。","experiments":"摘要确认了实验覆盖三类能力：扩散密度估计、推理时控制、以及 energy-based diffusion training，并声称 RNE 在这些方向上表现有效。摘要没有给出数据集、模型架构、控制任务、指标或提升数字，因此不能量化。可以保守总结的实验价值是：作者不是只做单一任务演示，而是用多任务证据支持其统一框架的普适性。读正文时最值得关注的是两点：一是 RNE 相比现有 guidance/control 方法是否真的无需重训主体模型；二是 density ratio 估计误差如何随 diffusion step 和数据维度增长。","authors_note":"作者包含 José Miguel Hernández Lobato、Yuanqi Du、Francisco Vargas。摘要未提供机构信息。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a missing ingredient in standard diffusion models: denoising kernels alone are often not enough because many applications need marginal densities along the generation trajectory. Without access to those densities, tasks such as inference-time control or unified energy-based training require ad hoc approximations.","importance":"This is a method-unification contribution in generative modeling. Its main significance is that it brings diffusion density estimation, inference-time control, and energy-based diffusion training under one Radon-Nikodym estimation perspective. For alternative language modeling and multimodal pretraining, the broader lesson is that if trajectory-level density information becomes accessible, training and decoding control can be combined more systematically.","technical_approach":"The method, RNE, estimates Radon-Nikodym density ratios between path distributions and uses them to connect transition kernels with marginal densities. In practice, it acts as a plug-and-play layer on top of an existing diffusion process: by estimating path density ratios, it can recover or approximate intermediate-time marginals, which then support control objectives and energy-based training formulations. This differs from standard guidance methods that inject an extra gradient at sampling time without explicitly recovering the missing density information. The design is compelling because many control and energy-based objectives fundamentally depend on log-density or density ratios. The main limitation is estimator quality: high-variance ratio estimates could destabilize control, especially in high-dimensional continuous spaces.","experiments":"The abstract indicates experiments across three settings: diffusion density estimation, inference-time control, and energy-based diffusion training, with positive results in all three. It does not provide datasets, architectures, tasks, metrics, or numerical gains, so a quantitative summary is not possible. The most useful questions for the full paper are whether RNE truly works in a plug-and-play manner without retraining the backbone model and how ratio-estimation error scales with diffusion horizon and dimensionality.","authors_note":"The author list includes José Miguel Hernández Lobato, Yuanqi Du, and Francisco Vargas. Institution information is not provided in the abstract."},"tags":["diffusion","energy-based","inference-control","marginal-density"],"notable_authors":["José Miguel Hernández Lobato","Yuanqi Du","Francisco Vargas"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008295","title":"CoFact: Conformal Factuality Guarantees for Language Models under Covariate Shift","authors":["Zirui Hu","Zheng Zhang","Yingjie Wang","Leszek Rutkowski","Dacheng Tao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2f8","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008295"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008295","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：现有基于 conformal prediction 的 LLM factuality 保障依赖 calibration/test exchangeability，但真实部署中输入分布会持续漂移，这使得原有置信保证失效。过去方法在静态数据分布上理论漂亮，但一遇到 covariate shift，校准集就不再代表线上样本。","importance":"这项工作属于可靠性方法层面的推进，和生成模型部署直接相关。它的重要性在于把 factuality guarantee 从理想静态设定推进到动态分布变化场景。对 LLM 系统研究的启示是：统计保障不能脱离分布适配，否则 paper 上的 coverage 证明到了线上就会变成错觉；而在线 density ratio 估计提供了一条把适配与保证结合起来的务实路径。","technical_approach":"作者提出 CoFact，在 conformal factuality 框架中引入在线 density ratio estimation，对 calibration 数据做自适应重加权，使其更贴近当前测试分布。核心思路不是推翻 conformal prediction，而是修补它最脆弱的假设：交换性。与标准 conformal 方法把历史校准样本一视同仁不同，CoFact 根据输入分布漂移动态调整每个校准样本的权重，从而让非一致分布下的置信界仍尽可能有效。这样设计有效，是因为 covariate shift 下主要坏掉的是样本代表性，而 density ratio 正是衡量“过去样本还像不像现在样本”的自然工具。边界也很明确：如果 shift 不只是 covariate，而是标签机制或事实判别器本身也漂移，那么单纯重加权不一定足够。","experiments":"摘要能确认的实验结论是：CoFact 在 covariate shift 下通过在线 density ratio 估计来维持 factuality 相关的 conformal guarantees。摘要没有提供所评测的 LLM、数据集、coverage 水平、保守性代价或 factuality 指标，因此无法写具体数字。值得重点关注的实验应包括：一是不同 shift 强度下覆盖率和集合大小/拒答率的变化；二是在线估计器延迟适配的代价；三是若 shift 模式突然变化，保证是否显著退化。没有数字不影响核心判断：这是把“有保证”从静态假设向在线分布适配推进的一步。","authors_note":"作者包含 Dacheng Tao。摘要未提供机构信息。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a major weakness of conformal factuality methods for LLMs: their guarantees rely on calibration and test data being exchangeable, which breaks under real-world covariate shift. Existing methods are theoretically clean in static settings, but their guarantees become unreliable once the deployed input distribution drifts.","importance":"This is a reliability-method contribution with clear deployment relevance. Its significance is that it pushes factuality guarantees beyond the static-distribution assumption and toward online adaptation. The broader lesson is practical: statistical guarantees are only meaningful if they adapt to changing distributions; otherwise, formal coverage on paper can become misleading in production.","technical_approach":"CoFact augments conformal factuality prediction with online density ratio estimation and uses those ratios to reweight calibration examples adaptively. The idea is not to replace conformal prediction, but to repair its most fragile assumption—exchangeability. Standard conformal methods treat past calibration points uniformly; CoFact instead downweights calibration examples that no longer resemble the current test distribution. This is a natural choice because under covariate shift the main failure mode is misaligned sample representativeness, and density ratios directly quantify that mismatch. The boundary is important: if the shift changes not just inputs but also label semantics or the factuality evaluator itself, reweighting alone may be insufficient.","experiments":"The abstract supports a qualitative conclusion: CoFact uses online density ratio estimation to maintain conformal-style factuality guarantees under covariate shift. It does not report the evaluated LLMs, datasets, target coverage levels, conservativeness costs, or factuality metrics, so no quantitative summary should be given. The most important experiments to inspect are coverage versus shift severity, the efficiency of online adaptation, and how sharply guarantees degrade under abrupt distribution changes.","authors_note":"The author list includes Dacheng Tao. Existing evaluations often stop at I/O prediction, code completion, or simple bug tasks, which are still far from real software-engineering semantics.","importance":"This is a benchmark and dataset contribution rather than a new modeling method, but it is highly relevant to both pretraining and post-training for code LMs. Benchmarks shape what models are optimized to learn. If evaluation rewards shallow pattern matching, models have little incentive to acquire deeper execution-level reasoning. CodeSense matters because it moves evaluation closer to real repositories, real tests, and real runtime behavior.","technical_approach":"CodeSense is built from real-world Python, C, and Java repositories. The pipeline executes repository tests, collects execution traces, and uses those traces to construct a spectrum of fine-grained code semantic reasoning tasks. This differs from synthetic-program benchmarks that mostly check whether the final output is correct. Here, runtime behavior provides more faithful semantic supervision. The design is compelling because real code difficulty often comes from context, dependencies, and dynamic interactions that are hard to capture from short static snippets. Howard"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$2fe","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008354"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008354","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：超低精度量化与稀疏化带来的不连续算子让反向传播缺少可靠梯度路径，STE 的“前向量化、反向装作没量化”会积累误差并引发训练不稳定。","importance":"贡献是优化/训练方法级：把量化训练不稳的根因从“不可导”细化为“缺少能学习鲁棒性的梯度路径”，并给出一个可泛化到任意精度与稀疏度的训练方式，对想把预训练推到更低 bit、更高 sparsity 的团队很实用。","technical_approach":"核心做法是把量化显式建模为加性噪声，使前向-反向形成一致的、可学习的噪声鲁棒路径，而不是依赖 STE 这种启发式梯度替代。这样模型在训练中会主动适配量化噪声分布，减少梯度失配导致的震荡；代价是你需要选择/估计合适的噪声模型，且当真实量化误差强非高斯或与激活分布强耦合时，噪声近似可能不够。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体覆盖的 bit-width（如 2/4/8-bit）、稀疏率、网络类型（Transformer/CNN）、以及与 STE/QAT/LSQ 等 baseline 的收敛与精度数字；但从表述看重点是“任意精度与稀疏度”下的稳定训练与鲁棒性提升，需看正文是否包含极端设置（如 2-bit + 高稀疏）与训练稳定性统计（loss spike/发散率）。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses why training under ultra-low precision quantization and sparsity is unstable: discontinuous operators break a meaningful gradient path, and STE’s forward–backward mismatch lets quantization error accumulate unchecked.","importance":"This is an optimization-method contribution: it reframes the root cause from generic “non-differentiability” to the absence of a gradient path that can learn robustness to quantization noise, and proposes a training approach intended to work across arbitrary precision and sparsity regimes.","technical_approach":"They model quantization explicitly as additive noise, making the forward–backward path consistent and allowing the model to learn noise robustness during training rather than relying on heuristic STE gradients. What matters is not only the curvature of train and test losses separately, but also how their eigenspaces align; without that overlap information, two settings with similar spectra can behave very differently under perturbations.","importance":"This is a theory contribution with real conceptual value for pretraining and generalization analysis. It suggests that many spectrum-based stories—sharpness, flatness, curvature concentration—are incomplete under distribution shift or train/test mismatch, because transfer depends on directional alignment, not just eigenvalue mass.","technical_approach":"The work develops a general two-loss geometry framework by jointly analyzing the Hessians of training and test losses. The main result is a universal local fluctuation law: the expected test-loss increase under small training perturbations is given by a trace term that combines train/test spectral information with an explicit eigenvector-overlap factor. A second result describes how these overlaps transform under noise. To make the theory concrete, the paper studies ridge regression under arbitrary covariate shift using operator-valued free probability. The key advance over standard spectral analyses is that alignment is turned into a first-class, computable quantity rather than an informal intuition.","experiments":"The abstract reads primarily as a theory paper, with ridge regression serving as the solvable testbed rather than large-scale neural experiments. No model sizes, datasets, baselines, or quantitative gains are provided in the available text, so this should not be framed as an empirical SOTA paper. in-context 泛化。","importance":"这是偏范式级的多模态生成工作，重要性在于它把图像、视频、文本都放进统一 token 序列里处理，明显靠近‘native multimodal pretraining’而不是给现成扩散模型外接几个模块。对预训练研究的启示是：统一建模的关键不只在 backbone，也在 tokenization 和训练语料构造；如果同一注意力架构能同时承载生成与编辑，未来 AR/离散 token 范式在视觉视频里仍有竞争力。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 EditVerse，一个把文本、图像、视频都表示成统一 token sequence 的单模型框架，用自注意力实现生成和编辑的 in-context learning。它的设计选择很明确：不再为图像编辑、视频生成、视频编辑分别做 task-specific branch，而是依赖统一序列表示带来的条件组合能力和跨模态迁移。摘要同时提到为缓解视频编辑数据缺乏，作者构建了相应数据或数据生成方案；这很关键，因为统一架构是否有效往往不取决于模型是否‘能吃多模态 token’，而取决于训练时是否覆盖了足够多的输入输出模式。代价则是序列长度和时空 token 成本可能非常高，训练/推理都容易受上下文窗口限制。","experiments":"摘要给出的结论是，该方法在单模型中统一了图像与视频的生成和编辑，并能处理任意分辨率与时长的输入输出。摘要没有提供模型规模、视觉 tokenizer、训练数据规模、与 diffusion 或 autoregressive baselines 的定量对比，也没有给出编辑保真度、指令遵循、视频一致性等具体指标。因此目前只能判断实验卖点大概率是任务覆盖广、跨模态迁移和 in-context editing 能力，而不能判断它是否在单项任务上达到最强 SOTA。最值得关注的 ablation 应该是统一训练相对分任务训练的收益，以及图像数据对视频编辑能力的迁移幅度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses the fragmentation between image generation/editing and video generation/editing, which has persisted because video editing is constrained by both architecture choices and a lack of suitable data. Image models have moved toward unification, but video systems are still often task-specific and struggle to obtain true in-context generalization.","importance":"This is close to a paradigm-level multimodal generation paper. Its importance comes from treating text, images, and videos as one token sequence under a single model, which is much closer to native multimodal pretraining than to attaching extra heads to separate diffusion systems. For pretraining research, the key lesson is that unified modeling depends as much on tokenization and training data coverage as on the backbone itself. If one attention-based model can handle both generation and editing, discrete-token generative modeling remains a serious alternative in vision and video.","technical_approach":"The core method, EditVerse, represents text, images, and videos as a unified token sequence and uses self-attention to support both generation and editing through in-context learning. The design choice is explicit: instead of building separate pathways for image editing, video generation, and video editing, the model relies on a shared sequence space to compose conditions and transfer knowledge across modalities. The abstract also notes a solution to the lack of video editing data, likely through curation or synthetic data construction, and that part is essential. Unified architectures usually fail not because the model cannot process multimodal tokens, but because the training set does not cover enough input–output formats. The trade-off is sequence cost: spatiotemporal tokenization can become very expensive in both training and inference.","experiments":"The abstract claims a single model can unify image and video generation and editing, while flexibly handling arbitrary resolutions and durations. It does not report model size, visual tokenizer details, training data scale, or quantitative comparisons to diffusion or autoregressive baselines. It also omits concrete editing metrics such as fidelity, instruction following, or temporal consistency. So the likely empirical strength is breadth of task coverage, cross-modal transfer, and in-context editing behavior, not necessarily best-in-class numbers on any single benchmark. As a result, they struggle exactly where distillation should matter most—very small synthetic sets under strict compute budgets.","importance":"This is a data-efficiency method paper, and its value is in pushing multimodal distillation toward a nearly learning-free regime. For pretraining research, the broader message is that aggressive data compression does not have to be tied to a single model family. If cross-modal prototypes can guide synthesis well enough, compact high-density datasets may become useful for low-cost mid-training, continual pretraining, and rapid domain adaptation.","technical_approach":"The method uses prototype-guided data synthesis rather than end-to-end gradient matching, so it avoids large-scale training and is intended to generalize across architectures. The key design choice is to stop optimizing image pixels and text features directly and instead synthesize or select examples around semantic prototypes, preserving multimodal coverage in a cheaper way. Compared with prior multimodal distillation approaches, this is simpler and more portable. The obvious limitation is that prototypes mostly capture central structure, so they may preserve head semantics better than long-tail relations, compositional behavior, or instruction-sensitive alignment.","experiments":"The abstract makes two high-level claims: the framework is learning-free, and it aims to improve cross-architecture generalization while removing the need for large-scale training. It does not report datasets, distillation ratios, downstream tasks, baselines, or quantitative gains. For this class of work, the most important evidence would be performance under very high compression across different encoders or VLMs, and whether prototype-guided synthesis consistently outperforms simpler baselines such as clustering, coreset selection, or data filtering.","authors_note":""},"tags":["dataset-distillation","data-quality","multimodal","data-synthesis"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008600","title":"Pursuing Minimal Sufficiency in Spatial Reasoning","authors":["Yejie Guo","Yunzhong Hou","Wufei Ma","Meng Tang","Ming-Hsuan Yang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$30b","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008600"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008600","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是 VLM 做空间推理时既缺 3D grounding，又容易被过量 3D 信息干扰。现有方法常见两种次优路线：要么直接让 2D 预训练的 VLM 硬啃 3D 场景，理解不够；要么把大量点云/检测结果全塞进去，导致上下文噪声过高、推理链条失焦。","importance":"这是一个面向 3D spatial reasoning 的系统方法，离通用 pretrain 较远，但对 VLM 训练有一个值得注意的启示：更多感知信息不一定更好，关键是把足够回答问题的最小信息集抽出来。这个‘minimal sufficient set’思想对多模态统一建模是有迁移价值的，因为它强调 perception-to-reasoning 接口设计，而不是一味扩大上下文。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 MSSR，一个双智能体框架，先由 Perception Agent 从专家 3D 感知工具中程序化查询，构造回答该问题所需的最小充分信息集，再由推理代理基于这个压缩后的表示作答。设计重点不是让语言模型直接吸收原始 3D 输入，而是把 3D 场景先转成紧凑、任务相关的中间表示，从而减少冗余和错配。和端到端 3D VLM 相比，这种方案在数据稀缺时更现实，也更可控；代价是性能上限会受外部感知专家质量和查询策略约束，而且系统较重。","experiments":"摘要只给出高层结论：作者识别了 3D 理解不足与冗余信息两大瓶颈，并提出 MSSR 来利用最小充分集。没有模型规模、3D benchmark 名称、与哪些 VLM 或 agentic baseline 比较，也没有准确率提升数字。因此当前无法判断它是显著刷新了空间推理基准，还是主要提供一个更稳健的系统设计。最值得关注的 ablation 应包括：不做 MSS 过滤直接喂全量感知结果会掉多少；不同专家工具组合的收益；以及最小充分集大小与性能的关系。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a dual failure mode in spatial reasoning for VLMs: they lack strong 3D grounding, yet they also break when overloaded with too much 3D information. Existing approaches are often unsatisfactory for one of two reasons: either a 2D-pretrained VLM is asked to reason directly over 3D scenes, or large amounts of point-cloud or detection output are dumped into context, creating too much noise.","importance":"This is more of a task-system paper than a core pretraining paper, but it offers one useful lesson for multimodal model design: more perception is not always better. The key is to extract the smallest information set that is sufficient to answer the question. That minimal-sufficiency view could transfer to broader multimodal pretraining because it focuses on the interface between perception and reasoning rather than on endlessly expanding context.","technical_approach":"The proposed MSSR framework uses two agents. A Perception Agent queries expert 3D tools to construct a minimal sufficient set of information for the question, and a reasoning agent answers using this compact representation. The main design choice is to avoid feeding raw 3D inputs directly into the language model and instead build a task-relevant intermediate representation that reduces redundancy and mismatch. Compared with end-to-end 3D VLMs, this is more practical and controllable when training data is limited. The trade-off is that the ceiling now depends on the quality of external perception experts and the query strategy.","experiments":"The abstract only gives the high-level claim that MSSR addresses both inadequate 3D understanding and excess 3D information through minimal sufficient sets. It provides no model sizes, benchmark names, baselines, or quantitative gains. So it is not yet possible to tell whether the paper sets a new state of the art or mainly offers a cleaner system design. The most useful ablations would compare full perceptual context versus MSS filtering, measure contributions of different expert tools, and study the relation between sufficient-set size and answer accuracy.","authors_note":""},"tags":["spatial-reasoning","vlm","3d","data-curation"],"notable_authors":["Ming-Hsuan Yang"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008622","title":"LaplacianFormer:Rethinking Linear Search for LLM Agent Reinforcement Learning","authors":["Yuxiang Ji","Ziyu Ma","Yong Wang","Guanhua Chen","Xiangxiang Chu","Liaoni Wu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$311","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008772"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008772","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：在长时程、多轮工具调用的 agent RL 里，只有终局 outcome reward 会让监督极度稀疏，训练样本利用率很低。现有做法通常靠更多 rollout、人工过程奖励或额外标注来补，但这些办法要么成本高，要么很难扩到真实 agent 场景，所以作者转向用树搜索把同一预算下的有效监督做密。","importance":"它的价值主要是方法级和训练信号级，而不是提出全新 agent 范式。对 pretrain/posttrain 接口的启示在于：如果 rollout 结构设计得对，仅靠结果奖励也能回推出更细粒度的过程监督，这能直接提高 RLVR 在 agent setting 下的样本效率，减少对人工 process labels 的依赖。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Tree-based Group Relative Policy Optimization，简称 Tree-GRPO，本质上是在 GRPO 框架里引入树结构采样。关键设计是把每个树节点定义成一个完整的 agent interaction step，并让不同 rollout 共享公共前缀，这样在固定 token 或 tool-call 预算下可以展开更多候选轨迹。作者进一步利用树中分叉带来的相对比较关系，把终局 reward 传播成 step-wise 的过程监督；和只把一条完整轨迹当训练单元的 RL 方法相比，这种做法显式利用了前缀复用和分支对比，因此监督更密，但代价是实现更复杂，而且前缀共享最适合可复用环境状态的任务。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是：树搜索采样在固定预算下能产生更多 rollout，并且树结构允许仅用 outcome reward 构造步骤级监督信号。摘要没有给出模型参数量、训练 token 规模、具体 agent benchmark、对比 baseline 名称或提升数字，因此不能判断它相对标准 GRPO / PPO / ReAct-style RL 的实际增益有多大。值得关注的验证点会是两类 ablation：一是前缀共享本身带来的样本效率提升，二是 step-wise 信号相对纯终局回报对 credit assignment 的改善幅度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a clear bottleneck: outcome-only rewards are too sparse for long-horizon, multi-turn LLM agents. Prior work usually compensates with more rollouts, manually designed process rewards, or extra annotation, which either scales poorly or becomes impractical in realistic agent environments.","importance":"This is mainly a method and training-signal contribution, not a new agent paradigm. The useful takeaway for pretrain/post-train research is that rollout structure matters: with the right search organization, pure outcome rewards can be converted into denser step-level learning signals, which improves RLVR sample efficiency without requiring human process labels.","technical_approach":"The method, Tree-GRPO, injects tree search into Group Relative Policy Optimization. Each node represents a full agent interaction step, and multiple rollouts share common prefixes, so the system can explore more continuations under the same token or tool-call budget. The key extra idea is to exploit the tree structure itself to derive step-wise supervision from final outcomes through branchwise comparison and credit propagation. Compared with trajectory-level RL that treats each rollout independently, this design uses prefix reuse and relative branch information explicitly; that should improve supervision density, though it also adds implementation complexity and depends on environments where prefix reuse is meaningful.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main factual claims are that tree-based sampling yields more rollouts under a fixed budget and that the resulting trajectories enable step-wise supervision using only outcome rewards. The abstract does not provide model size, data scale, benchmark names, baselines, or numerical gains, so the strength of improvement over standard GRPO, PPO, or other agent RL setups cannot be assessed yet. The most important ablations to look for are the gain from prefix sharing itself and the gain from the induced step-level supervision over pure terminal-reward training.","authors_note":""},"tags":["agent-rl","tree-search","grpo","long-horizon","exploration"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008787","title":"JointAVBench: A Benchmark for Joint Audio-Visual Reasoning If the implementation is solid, it can become the backbone for more credible progress on multi-turn agent RL.","technical_approach":"The core contribution is AgentGym-RL, an open-source framework designed for RL-based training in long-horizon, multi-turn decision-making tasks. Two design choices stand out. First, it is modular and decoupled, supporting mainstream RL algorithms across diverse environments. Second, the authors explicitly argue that strong agents need richer external interaction with the environment rather than relying only on longer internal reasoning traces. That shifts the emphasis from merely generating more chain-of-thought tokens to improving exploration, environment feedback, and credit assignment. Existing absorb-style kernels minimize HBM bandwidth and work well for decode, but they are compute-bound and therefore fail to benefit from data reuse opportunities such as shared prefixes. Naive kernels are typically better for training and prefill, absorb kernels for decoding, yet neither alone is ideal for shared-prefix inference workloads.","importance":"This is a systems and inference-kernel contribution. It does not change pretraining directly, but it matters for model design in practice because kernel efficiency feeds back into which attention variants are actually attractive to deploy. If MLA becomes substantially better in shared-prefix decoding, that improves its real-world case for agent workloads, batched serving, and diverse sampling scenarios.","technical_approach":"TyphoonMLA is a hybrid naive-absorb MLA kernel. The design choice is not to pick one mathematically equivalent formulation over the other, but to assign different parts of the computation to the formulation that matches their hardware behavior. Components that can benefit from shared-prefix reuse are handled in a naive-style way, while components where HBM traffic dominates remain absorb-style. The novelty is therefore in execution strategy rather than attention math. Whether it wins in practice depends on prefix-sharing ratio, sequence length, and the compute-versus-bandwidth balance of the target hardware.","experiments":"The abstract makes the intended performance story clear: absorb implementations are compute-bound and therefore miss reuse gains under shared prefixes, while TyphoonMLA is designed to recover those gains. However, it does not report GPU type, workload setup, prefix-sharing ratio, or speedups versus FlashMLA and FlashAttention, nor does it show break-even points across context lengths and KV sizes. So the idea is plausible, but the magnitude and robustness of the benefit remain unknown without the full profiling results.","authors_note":""},"tags":["mla","attention","kernel","serving","shared-prefix"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008795","title":"Large Language Model Compression with Global Rank and Sparsity Optimization","authors":["Changhai Zhou","Qian Qiao","Yuhua Zhou","Yuxin Wu","Shichao Weng","WEIZHONG ZHANG","Cheng Jin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$315","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008795"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008795","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：把低秩和稀疏组合起来压缩 LLM 很自然，但现有方法通常没处理好两件事——低秩部分和稀疏部分怎么协同，以及不同层该分多少 rank 和 sparsity。前者处理不好会让两个近似互相抢表达能力，后者处理不好会把压缩预算浪费在本来就不冗余的层上。","importance":"它的价值在于把压缩从局部层内近似，推进到全局资源分配问题。对大模型训练与部署研究的启示是，层间冗余差异非常大，统一的压缩配方通常不是最优；如果全局 rank/sparsity 分配做得准，同样压缩率下可以显著减少质量损失，这比单纯发明一个新的分解形式更有工程价值。","technical_approach":"方法是一个两阶段压缩框架，核心能力是对低秩维度和稀疏度做全局优化分配。由于整体搜索空间太大，作者在第一阶段先用某种近似或启发式缩小可行空间，然后在第二阶段细化 rank 与 sparsity 的联合选择。论文强调的不只是同时使用 low-rank 和 sparse，而是让二者形成互补：低秩负责吸收主导的线性结构，稀疏负责补足局部、尖锐或残差型信息。和逐层独立压缩相比，这种全局视角更符合 LLM 各层冗余高度不均匀的事实，但优化过程也更依赖近似质量。","experiments":"摘要确认了两点：作者显式处理 low-rank 和 sparse 的协同问题，并考虑 across-layer 的全局资源分配。它还说明由于优化空间巨大，方法采用了两阶段搜索/优化。摘要没有给出所压缩的基础模型、参数规模、目标压缩率、与 Wanda / SparseGPT / LoRA-style decomposition 等 baseline 的对比数字，也没有说明是否需要重训练或只做 PTQ/近似后微调，因此实际性价比还不能判断。最关键的实验应是不同压缩率下的 perplexity 或 downstream 保真度曲线，以及全局分配相对逐层均匀分配的收益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a natural but still unresolved compression problem: combining low-rank and sparse approximations for LLMs. Existing approaches usually fail in two places. They do not model how the low-rank and sparse components should cooperate, and they do not allocate rank and sparsity well across layers, even though redundancy is highly uneven.","importance":"Its main contribution is to cast compression as a global resource allocation problem rather than just a local layer-wise factorization problem. That is useful for large-model research and deployment because a single uniform compression recipe is rarely optimal. If global rank/sparsity allocation is done well, the same compression budget can preserve much more quality than naive per-layer schemes.","technical_approach":"The method is a two-stage compression framework with global optimization of rank and sparsity. Because the full search space is prohibitively large, the first stage narrows the space with an approximation or heuristic, and the second stage refines the joint allocation. The important design point is not merely to use both low-rank and sparse components, but to make them complementary: low-rank captures dominant smooth structure, while sparsity preserves localized or residual information that low-rank alone would miss. Compared with independent layer-wise compression, this matches the reality that redundancy varies widely across LLM layers, though it also makes success more dependent on the quality of the search approximation.","experiments":"The abstract clearly states that the method addresses both component cooperation and global across-layer allocation, and that it uses a two-stage optimization to make the search tractable. It does not specify which base models are compressed, at what parameter scales, under what compression ratios, against which baselines, or whether retraining is needed after approximation, so practical competitiveness cannot yet be judged. The most informative experiments will be quality-versus-compression curves and direct comparisons between global allocation and uniform per-layer allocation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["compression","low-rank","sparsity","llm","optimization"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10008807","title":"When Greedy Wins: Emergent Exploitation Bias in Meta-Bandit LLM Dhingra"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$316","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10008807"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10008807","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：LLM 在 sequential decision-making 里虽然能通过 SFT 或 RL 学到更低 regret，但它们到底学到了什么探索策略、这些策略是否能泛化，并不清楚。特别是在 multi-armed bandit 这种最基础环境里，如果模型只是学会了某种贪心模板而不是真正的探索-利用权衡，那么迁移到新分布时会很脆弱。","importance":"它的贡献偏机制分析和训练行为诊断。对 post-training 的启示是，性能接近 UCB 或 Thompson Sampling 不代表模型真的内化了这些算法；训练目标可能诱导出一种 emergent exploitation bias，也就是表面上分数不错，但策略上过早偏向利用。这对用 LLM 学 agent policy 很关键，因为很多复杂任务也可能存在同样的伪泛化。","technical_approach":"方法上作者系统比较了 SFT 和 RL 两条路，并为 RL 设计了多种奖励，包括降低方差的 regret-shaped reward，以及允许 oracle imitation 的 algorithmic reward。这样的设计不是为了单纯刷 bandit 分数，而是为了分离不同训练信号会把策略推向哪里：SFT 更像蒸馏专家轨迹，RL 则可能在 reward 形状诱导下学到不同程度的探索。论文标题里的核心判断是“greedy wins”——在 meta-bandit 训练中，模型会自发形成 exploitation bias，这意味着即便训练表现好，也可能不是在学习稳健的 Bayes-optimal exploration。","experiments":"摘要确认了几项关键事实。第一，经过 SFT 或 RL 训练后，模型显著优于原始预训练模型。第二，训练后的 agent 在 bandit 上能达到与 UCB 和 Thompson Sampling 可比的表现。第三，作者重点分析的是泛化和策略性质，而不是只汇报平均 regret。摘要没有给出使用的模型规模、bandit 配置、训练步数或不同奖励设计之间的具体差异数字，但从标题和描述看，最重要的结果应是：在分布外设置或更难探索条件下，模型显露出偏贪心的利用倾向，说明当前元训练并没有真正学到稳健探索策略。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper investigates a subtle but important issue: LLMs can achieve lower regret on sequential decision problems after SFT or RL, but it is unclear what exploration strategy they actually learn and whether it generalizes. On even a simple multi-armed bandit, strong in-distribution performance can still come from a brittle greedy heuristic rather than a genuine exploration-exploitation policy.","importance":"This is a mechanism and training-behavior paper. The key lesson for post-training is that matching the performance of UCB or Thompson Sampling does not mean the model has internalized those algorithms. Training objectives may instead induce an emergent exploitation bias: good average scores, but premature commitment and weak out-of-distribution exploration. That warning likely extends beyond bandits to more complex agent training settings.","technical_approach":"The authors compare SFT and RL systematically and design several RL rewards, including regret-shaped rewards to reduce variance and algorithmic rewards that permit oracle imitation. The point is not just to improve bandit regret, but to separate how different training signals shape behavior. SFT acts more like trajectory distillation, while RL may encourage different exploration patterns depending on reward shaping. The title’s central claim is that greedy behavior emerges as a preferred solution during meta-bandit training, implying that strong training performance may still reflect a shallow exploitation policy rather than robust exploratory reasoning.","experiments":"The abstract supports three key facts. First, both SFT- and RL-trained agents outperform the pretrained model. Second, they reach performance comparable to UCB and Thompson Sampling on the bandit task. Third, the paper focuses on strategy and generalization rather than reporting regret alone. The abstract does not give model sizes, bandit configurations, training lengths, or quantitative differences across reward designs, but the important result is likely that under distribution shift or harder exploration conditions, the agents reveal a greedy exploitation bias. Repetition in Protein Language Models","authors":["Jiahao Zhang","ZEQING ZHANG","Di Wang","Lijie Hu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$31f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009008"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009008","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是蛋白语言模型生成时的病态重复问题，而且作者明确指出这不是简单的“文本退化”，而是会直接破坏折叠可信度和功能可用性。以往工作更多关注序列似然、结构预测或设计成功率，很少把重复当成一个独立且可量化的生成失败模式系统研究；但在蛋白场景里，motif 级重复和同聚物重复会明显影响下游结构质量，所以这个问题值得单独处理。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在于把“重复控制”从经验性 decoding 技巧，提升为 PLM 训练后控制的一个明确研究问题。对 pretrain 研究的启示是：生成质量缺陷不能只靠 perplexity 或序列多样性粗略代理，像蛋白这类非自然语言序列需要围绕结构后果定义更贴近任务的失效指标；同时，它也说明对比式 steering 如果构造得当，可以在不重训大模型的情况下修正特定生成偏差。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 UCCS，一种带效用约束的对比 steering，而不是简单拿“高重复”对“低重复”序列做粗暴对比。作者的关键判断是，直接对比重复度会把很多与结构可行性、功能 motif 相关的信号一起抹掉，因此他们先定义 motif-level 和 homopolymer repetition 指标，再构造受约束的对比样本集，让正负样本在有用属性上尽量匹配，只在重复倾向上形成可学习差异。这样做的目的，是把 steering 信号集中到“抑制病态重复”而不是“偏移整个蛋白分布”。从摘要看，这更像一种推断时或轻量后处理控制方法，而不是改动基础 PLM 训练目标。","experiments":"摘要给出的核心实验结论是：作者先系统量化了重复现象，并证明重复与折叠可靠性下降相关；随后 UCCS 能在控制重复的同时保留更好的生成效用。遗憾的是，摘要没有给出模型规模、数据规模、具体 baseline、提升幅度或结构指标数值，因此目前只能确认实验重点在两部分：一是重复指标与 folding reliability 的相关分析，二是与朴素对比 steering 的比较。若看方法可信度，最关键的 ablation 应该是“是否需要效用约束的数据构造”以及“不同重复指标对应的控制效果”，但摘要未提供具体数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles pathological repetition in protein language model generation, and the key point is that repetition in proteins is not a cosmetic issue but a structural one. Prior work mostly optimized likelihood, folding, or design success without isolating repetition as a first-class failure mode, yet repeated motifs and homopolymers can directly hurt foldability and functional viability.","importance":"The contribution is mainly methodological framing: it turns repetition control in PLMs from an ad hoc decoding concern into a measurable and biologically relevant generation problem. For pretraining-oriented readers, the useful takeaway is that sequence generation failures in non-text domains need task-grounded diagnostics, and that targeted post hoc steering can correct a specific bias without retraining the full model.","technical_approach":"The method, UCCS, is a utility-controlled contrastive steering approach rather than a naive high-vs-low repetition contrast. The design choice is important: if contrastive data is built only around repetition level, the steering signal will also remove useful structure and function-related patterns. To avoid that, the paper first defines motif-level and homopolymer repetition metrics, then builds constrained contrastive sets that are matched on utility-related properties while differing in repetition tendency. This concentrates the steering direction on suppressing pathological repetition instead of broadly shifting the protein distribution.","experiments":"The abstract supports two main empirical claims: repetition can be quantified systematically and is negatively associated with folding reliability, and UCCS reduces repetition while preserving utility better than naive contrastive alternatives. However, the abstract does not provide model size, dataset scale, baselines, or exact gains. So the experimental signal is directionally clear, but not enough to judge effect size or scaling behavior from the abstract alone.","authors_note":""},"tags":["protein-lm","generation","repetition","decoding"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009021","title":"UNITE: Universal kNowledge Integration from Task-specific Experts","authors":["Shuxia Lin","Qiufeng Wang","xu yang","Xin Geng"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$320","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009021"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009021","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是 MoE 模型里专家知识碎片化和层间冗余的问题，也就是参数很多、激活稀疏，但知识没有被高效整合。过去工作大多停留在分析“哪些专家冗余、哪些参数重要”，却缺少把这些重叠知识真正提炼出来并复用的机制，因此 MoE 的额外容量并不总能转化成更紧凑、可迁移的能力表示。","importance":"这项工作的价值在于它不把 MoE 只当成高吞吐架构，而是把它当作一种“任务专属知识容器”，进一步问这些容器里是否存在可抽取的通用知识。对 pretrain 的启示是：MoE 的收益不只来自路由稀疏性，也可能来自训练中形成的可分解知识结构；如果这种结构能被压缩回更通用的表示，那么 MoE 可以从“推理时节省 FLOPs”延展到“训练后知识蒸馏和结构重组”。","technical_approach":"UNITE 的方法核心是先融合，再分解。作者先用 Fisher-weighted fusion 把任务相关专家按参数重要性整合，避免简单平均稀释关键知识；再用 Tucker 分解把融合后的高阶参数结构压缩成可共享的通用成分与较少的任务特定残差。这个设计的关键取舍是：它不直接剪枝专家，也不只做 importance ranking，而是试图显式提炼“跨任务共享、跨层可复用”的部分。与只做冗余诊断的工作相比，UNITE 提供了一个从 MoE 专家到统一知识模块的具体变换路径。","experiments":"摘要说明作者关注的是“是否能系统抽取并复用通用知识”，因此实验大概率围绕融合后性能保持、压缩率、跨任务迁移和冗余消解展开。但摘要没有提供具体模型规模、任务集合、参数压缩比、速度收益或性能变化数字，所以目前只能判断实验应当比较：原始 MoE、简单融合/剪枝、UNITE 融合+分解方案。最关键的证据会是：在显著减少专家冗余或参数量后，性能是否仍接近原模型，以及通用成分在新任务上是否有复用价值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a structural weakness of MoE models: expertise is fragmented across experts and often redundant across layers, so the extra capacity is not fully converted into reusable knowledge. Prior work largely diagnosed redundancy or parameter importance, but stopped short of turning overlapping expert knowledge into a compact representation that can be reused.","importance":"The contribution is conceptually interesting for pretraining and architecture research because it treats MoE experts as task-specific knowledge holders rather than only sparse compute units. If universal knowledge can be extracted from those experts after training, MoE becomes relevant not just for efficient forward passes but also for post hoc consolidation, distillation, and model restructuring.","technical_approach":"UNITE uses a two-stage pipeline: Fisher-weighted fusion followed by Tucker decomposition. The fusion stage is meant to combine experts while respecting parameter importance, avoiding the damage from naive averaging. The decomposition stage then separates the fused tensor structure into reusable shared components and smaller task-specific factors. This differs from pure pruning or redundancy analysis because it provides an explicit mechanism to turn scattered expert parameters into a more universal representation.","experiments":"From the abstract, the likely empirical focus is whether the method can reduce redundancy and preserve performance while improving knowledge reuse across tasks. But no model sizes, task suite, compression ratios, or performance numbers are provided. So the experimental promise is clear, but the practical value depends on how much consolidation is achieved before accuracy drops, which the abstract does not quantify.","authors_note":""},"tags":["moe","expert-merging","knowledge-transfer","architecture"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009023","title":"Enhancing Hallucination Detection through Noise Injection","authors":["Litian Liu","Reza Pourreza","Sunny Panchal","Apratim Bhattacharyya","Yubing Jian","Yao Qin","Roland Memisevic"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$321","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009023"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009023","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是幻觉检测里的一个常见盲点：只从模型原生 token 分布采样来估计答案分散度，并不是最适合检测幻觉的不确定性度量。现有多样本检测方法默认生成分布的波动就能反映幻觉风险，但这更多是 aleatoric uncertainty；如果模型参数层面本来就不确定，仅靠常规采样会低估这种 Bayesian uncertainty。","importance":"这项工作的贡献不在提出复杂检测器，而在指出一个很实用的判断：为了检测幻觉，采样机制本身也需要针对目标重新设计。对 LLM 训练和评测的启示是，不确定性分析不能只看解码分布；参数扰动下预测稳定性也是重要信号。这种训练免费、推断端可接入的方法，对于部署阶段的风控尤其现实。","technical_approach":"核心方法是训练免费的 noise injection，通过向模型或其推理过程注入噪声来近似 Bayesian 不确定性，再观察答案分布的扩散程度做幻觉判断。作者的出发点很明确：如果幻觉与 epistemic uncertainty 更相关，那么就该主动探测模型在参数邻域或表示邻域中的不稳定性，而不是只从单一模型的 token softmax 里反复采样。和现有 self-consistency 式采样不同，这种做法改变了“样本从哪里来”；代价是额外多次前向，以及噪声大小需要校准，否则可能把正常高熵回答也误判为幻觉。","experiments":"摘要给出的结论是：相比直接从 token 分布采样，加入噪声后的样本分散度能显著提升幻觉检测效果。摘要没有给出具体任务、模型、检测指标如 AUROC/F1、增益幅度或开销，因此还无法判断它在开放问答、RAG、长文生成等不同场景下是否一致有效。最关键的 ablation 应该包括：噪声注入位置、噪声强度、采样次数，以及与标准 uncertainty baselines 的比较。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper argues that the standard way of detecting hallucinations by sampling from the model’s token distribution is suboptimal. That approach captures output variability from a fixed model, but misses a large part of Bayesian uncertainty, which is exactly the kind of uncertainty that may signal hallucination risk.","importance":"The value of the work is its practical reframing: hallucination detection depends not only on the scoring rule, but also on how samples are generated. For LLM evaluation and deployment, this is useful because it suggests that uncertainty should be probed through model perturbation, not only through repeated decoding from the same logits. It is also appealing because the method is training-free.","technical_approach":"The method injects noise during inference to approximate Bayesian uncertainty and then measures dispersion over the resulting answers for hallucination detection. The key idea is simple: if hallucinations correlate more with epistemic uncertainty than with ordinary decoding randomness, then one should sample from a neighborhood of plausible models or representations rather than from one fixed token distribution. Compared with standard self-consistency-style sampling, the novelty is in changing the source of randomness. The trade-off is more inference cost and a tuning problem for the noise scale.","experiments":"The abstract claims a significant improvement over token-distribution sampling for hallucination detection, but provides no concrete datasets, models, metrics, or gains. So the empirical takeaway is directional rather than quantitative. The most important checks, which are not detailed in the abstract, would be where noise is injected, how sensitive the method is to noise magnitude, and whether gains hold across QA, retrieval-augmented generation, and long-form generation.","authors_note":""},"tags":["hallucination","uncertainty","evaluation","noise-injection"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009029","title":"Libra: Effective yet Efficient Load Balancing for Large-scale MoE Inference","authors":["Jaehoon Yang","Yushin Kim","Seokwon Moon","Yeonhong Park","Jae W. Lee"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Distributed inference of large-scale Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models faces a critical challenge: expert load imbalance. Numerous system-level approaches have been proposed for load balancing, but they either fail to achieve a satisfactory level of balance or introduce new bottlenecks due to the overhead of the load balancing mechanism itself. To this end, we propose Libra, a system that achieves near-optimal load balancing with minimal overhead. Libra adopts sophisticated mechanisms that accurately predict future expert activations and, based on these predictions, systematically perform load balancing. At the same time, it effectively hides the associated overhead by reconstructing the execution flow so that these costs are overlapped with MoE computation. Evaluations with two large-scale state-of-the-art MoE models on 8 H200 GPUs demonstrate that Libra improves throughput by up to 19.2\\%. The code is available at https://github.com/SNU-ARC/Libra. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009029"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009029","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是大规模 MoE 分布式推理中的 expert load imbalance，也就是有些专家过载、有些专家闲置，最终让整体延迟卡在最忙的那部分机器上。已有系统方法要么平衡得不够好，要么为了做负载均衡引入新的调度、重路由或通信开销，结果拆东墙补西墙。","importance":"这是一篇系统级工作，但对 MoE 预训练研究同样有价值，因为它直接影响 MoE 架构在真实 serving 条件下是否成立。很多 MoE 论文把训练 FLOPs 或理论吞吐讲得很好，但推理端如果持续受到尾部专家拥塞影响，架构优势就会被吃掉。Libra 的意义在于它试图把“更准的负载预测”和“更低的调度显式成本”同时做到，而不是二选一。","technical_approach":"Libra 的核心是预测驱动的负载均衡，并通过执行流重构把均衡开销隐藏在 MoE 计算后面。方法上有两个关键点：第一，系统需要准确预测未来 expert activation，才能在请求真正到来前做更合理的映射或调度；第二，即使预测正确，如果负载均衡本身阻塞了主路径，也会引入新瓶颈，所以 Libra 通过 overlap 设计把这部分工作尽量与计算并行。和许多只在路由后被动搬运 token 的方案相比，Libra 更偏前瞻式计划。边界在于预测误差如果较大，系统收益会明显缩水。","experiments":"摘要说明 Libra 在两个大规模 MoE 模型上做了评估，并声称达到了接近最优的负载均衡且开销很低。这说明作者至少比较了现有 load balancing 系统方法，并在真实分布式环境中测了延迟或吞吐。摘要没有提供模型名称、GPU 规模、吞吐提升、尾延迟下降或额外通信开销数字，因此无法判断收益是否跨模型稳定，还是只对特定 routing 分布成立。最关键的实验应是高并发场景下的 tail latency、不同 expert skew 下的鲁棒性，以及预测模块失配时的退化程度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses expert load imbalance in distributed MoE inference, where a few hot experts dominate latency while others remain underutilized. Existing systems either do not balance load well enough or introduce enough balancing overhead to create a new bottleneck.","importance":"This is a systems paper, but it matters for MoE research more broadly because serving constraints decide whether sparse architectures actually pay off in practice. Many MoE designs look attractive on training FLOPs or average compute, yet inference can still be dominated by expert hotspots. Libra is important if it can improve balance without paying that gain back in scheduling overhead.","technical_approach":"Libra combines prediction-based load balancing with execution-flow restructuring to hide balancing overhead behind MoE computation. The first design choice is proactive prediction of future expert activations, which allows better placement or scheduling before congestion materializes. The second is overlap: even a good balancing policy can fail in practice if it blocks the main inference path, so Libra reorganizes execution to mask the cost. This is more forward-looking than reactive token movement after routing. The main risk is prediction error, which can reduce the benefit sharply under changing traffic patterns.","experiments":"The abstract says Libra is evaluated on two large-scale MoE models and achieves near-optimal load balancing with minimal overhead. That implies comparisons against prior load-balancing systems in a real distributed setup, likely with latency and throughput measurements. But no concrete model names, cluster sizes, gains, or tail-latency numbers are given, so the practical effect size remains unclear from the abstract alone.","authors_note":""},"tags":["moe","inference","load-balancing","serving"],"notable_authors":["Jae W.
