Hwang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$328","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009139"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009139","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：现有 weight-space model merging 很高效，但基本默认架构相同、尺寸相近、层能一一对齐，一旦模型异构，合并就会很脆弱甚至不可做。过去大家回避这个问题，通常靠同架构 checkpoint 插值或 task vector 加减，因为直接在参数空间里比较不同模型没有统一坐标系。","importance":"这项工作的重要性在于它把 model merging 从“同构参数运算”推进到“跨架构函数近邻操作”，属于方法级且带一点范式意味。对 pretrain 研究的启示很直接：如果权重可以被压到一个平滑且可操作的潜空间，那么预训练、蒸馏、适配和模型编辑可能不必都回到原始参数空间处理。它也触碰了一个更大的问题——能否为模型族建立共享表示，从而让模型组合、搜索和复用更像表示学习，而不是手工对齐工程。","technical_approach":"作者提出 LS-Merge，在 latent space 里而不是 weight space 里做模型合并。核心是一个 transformer-based VAE，把模型权重编码成平滑潜变量，再在潜空间执行 merge，最后解码回权重。难点有两个：LLM 参数量太大，直接编码成本高；高压缩率又会损害 VAE 对未见权重的泛化。为此作者采用两阶段压缩 curriculum，并加入结构化、layer-aware 的压缩设计，让编码器既保留层级结构，又能在可承受开销下学习到跨模型可比的表示。和已有同构 merge 方法的区别不只是“换个空间做平均”，而是先学一个可对齐、可插值的模型表示空间，这一步决定了异构 merge 是否成立。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验重点是：方法支持跨架构、跨尺寸的模型合并，并且解决了高维权重编码和高压缩比泛化的问题。但目前没有给出具体模型家族、参数规模、merge 场景、比较基线或任务指标，因此无法严谨写出数值结果。值得重点检查的实验应包括：同构 merge 下是否至少不输传统 weight averaging；异构 merge 下是否明显优于 adapter routing、logit ensemble 或硬性层对齐；以及 VAE 压缩率与 merge 质量之间的拐点在哪里。如果两阶段 curriculum 明显改善 unseen weights 重建质量，那会是方法成立的关键证据。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a clear limitation of weight-space model merging: it works well when models have matching architectures and roughly aligned parameters, but becomes brittle or impossible for heterogeneous models. Most prior methods avoid this by staying within one architecture family, because raw parameter space offers no common coordinate system across different model designs.","importance":"This is a methodological contribution with some paradigm-level implications. It shifts merging from direct parameter arithmetic to operations over a learned model representation space. For pretraining research, the broader message is useful: if model weights can be encoded into a smooth, manipulable latent space, then reuse, editing, and composition may not need to happen in raw weight space at all. That opens a path toward model-family representations that support search and recombination more naturally.","technical_approach":"LS-Merge performs merging in latent space rather than weight space. The core component is a transformer-based VAE that encodes model weights into a smooth latent representation, merges there, and decodes back to weights. The design faces two constraints: LLMs are too large to encode naively, and aggressive compression hurts generalization to unseen weights. The paper addresses this with a two-stage compression curriculum and structured, layer-aware compression so the encoder preserves enough architectural structure while staying tractable. The key difference from standard merge methods is not just averaging in another space; it is learning a shared space where heterogeneous models become alignable and interpolable.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical claim is that the method enables cross-architecture merging while handling the scale and generalization issues of weight encoding. The provided text does not include concrete model families, parameter counts, baselines, or metrics, so precise quantitative reporting would be unreliable. The most important experiments to verify in the full paper are: whether LS-Merge matches standard weight-space merging on homogeneous settings, whether it materially improves over hard alignment or ensemble-style baselines on heterogeneous merges, and where the compression-quality trade-off breaks. Evidence that the two-stage curriculum improves reconstruction and merge quality on unseen models would be central.","authors_note":""},"tags":["model-merging","latent-space","cross-architecture"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009229","title":"Exploratory Memory-Augmented LLM Agent via Hybrid On- and Off-Policy Optimization","authors":["Zeyuan Liu","Jeonghye Kim","Xufang Luo","Dongsheng Li","Yuqing Yang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Exploration remains the key bottleneck for large language model agents trained with reinforcement learning. While prior methods exploit pretrained knowledge, they fail in environments requiring the discovery of novel states. We propose EMPO$^2$, a hybrid RL framework that leverages memory for exploration and combines on- and off-policy updates to make LLMs perform well with memory while also ensuring robustness without it. On ScienceWorld and WebShop, EMPO$^2$ achieves 128.6% and 11.3% improvements over GRPO, respectively. Moreover, in out-of-distribution tests, EMPO$^2$ demonstrates superior adaptability to new tasks, requiring only a few trials with memory and no parameter updates. These results highlight EMPO$^2$ as a promising framework for building more exploratory and generalizable LLM-based agents. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009229"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009229","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 LLM agent 用 RL 训练时最难的一环：探索不足，尤其是在需要发现新状态而不是调用已有知识的环境里。过去方法更多利用预训练先验或在已有轨迹上做优化，但这对 open-ended 环境不够，因为模型不会主动去到没见过但关键的状态。","importance":"这项工作更偏 post-train agent RL，但对 pretrain/posttrain 闭环有参考价值。它说明当环境需要长期探索时，单靠更强基础模型并不能替代探索机制；外部记忆和 RL 更新规则会决定模型能否形成可迁移的交互策略。贡献类型属于方法级，重点不是刷一个 agent 榜单，而是把 memory-augmented 行为和 hybrid RL 结合起来，兼顾有记忆时的性能和无记忆时的鲁棒性。","technical_approach":"作者提出 EMPO²，一个结合 memory、on-policy 和 off-policy 的混合优化框架。核心设计有两个目的：第一，用记忆帮助 agent 在训练和测试时记录关键状态、扩展探索范围；第二，不把策略过度绑死在“有记忆”这个训练条件上，因此加入 off-policy 更新来提升在无记忆或分布变化下的稳健性。这个设计比纯 on-policy 更适合稀疏反馈探索，因为 on-policy 很依赖当前策略覆盖到足够有价值的轨迹；也比纯 memory-augmented imitation 更强，因为它让记忆成为探索工具而不是固定脚本。","experiments":"摘要给出了两个明确结果：在 ScienceWorld 和 WebShop 上，EMPO² 相比 GRPO 分别提升 128.6% 和 11.3%。另外，在 OOD 测试中，方法只需少量带记忆试验、无需参数更新，就能更好适应新任务。摘要没有说明所用基础模型、参数规模、训练预算和其他 baseline，因此无法判断绝对性能上限。最有价值的验证点是：去掉 memory、去掉 off-policy、或只保留其中一项时性能如何变化；如果 memory 主要提升 in-domain，而 off-policy 明显改善 OOD，无记忆鲁棒性的论点就更站得住。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets the main failure mode of RL-trained LLM agents: weak exploration, especially in environments where success requires discovering new states rather than exploiting pretrained knowledge. Many prior approaches lean on the model’s prior or optimize over available trajectories, which is not enough when the important states are never visited in the first place.","importance":"This is mainly a post-training agent-RL contribution, but it is relevant to the pretrain/posttrain loop. The paper shows that stronger pretrained knowledge does not remove the need for explicit exploration mechanisms in interactive settings. The contribution is methodological: it combines external memory with a hybrid RL recipe to improve performance with memory while preserving robustness when memory is absent or less useful.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, EMPO², is a hybrid optimization framework combining memory with both on-policy and off-policy RL updates. The design serves two purposes. Memory helps the agent retain useful interaction history and reach novel states more effectively. Off-policy updates prevent the policy from overfitting to the specific training condition where memory is available, improving robustness when memory is missing or the task shifts. This is more suitable for sparse-reward exploration than a pure on-policy approach, and more adaptive than treating memory as a fixed retrieval layer.","experiments":"The abstract reports two concrete gains over GRPO: +128.6% on ScienceWorld and +11.3% on WebShop. It also claims better out-of-distribution adaptation, requiring only a few memory-assisted trials and no parameter updates on new tasks. The abstract does not specify the backbone model, model size, training budget, or additional baselines, so the absolute competitiveness is hard to judge. The most important ablations are whether memory and off-policy updates contribute differently to in-domain versus OOD performance, and whether robustness without memory actually holds when memory is removed at test time.","authors_note":""},"tags":["llm-agent","reinforcement-learning","memory","exploration"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009232","title":"Mitigating Noise Shift in Denoising Generative Models with Noise Awareness Guidance","authors":["Jincheng Zhong","Boyuan Jiang","Xin Tao","Pengfei Wan","Kun Gai","Mingsheng Long"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$329","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009232"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009232","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文指出了一个被长期忽视但很基础的问题：在 diffusion / denoising 生成模型采样时，中间状态的真实噪声水平常常和预设时间步对应的噪声水平不一致，作者把它称为 noise shift。过去大家通常默认离散求解器沿着预定义噪声日程前进，因此误差更多归因于步长离散化或模型预测误差，而没有单独分析‘状态已经偏离当前噪声层级’这件事。","importance":"这项工作的贡献偏方法级，但影响面可能比较广，因为它针对的是现代 denoising generative models 的共同采样假设。对生成预训练研究的启示是：采样误差不只是数值积分误差，还包括状态语义和时间标签失配；如果这个失配普遍存在，那么许多看似架构相关或调度器相关的问题，部分其实来自相同的 noise-level miscalibration。","technical_approach":"作者提出 NAG（Noise Awareness Guidance），核心是显式估计或感知当前采样状态的实际噪声程度，并引导采样轨迹重新贴合预定义 noise schedule。这个思路不是替换扩散模型本身，也不是重新训练新的 score model，而是在采样时做校正。它之所以可能有效，是因为一旦中间状态落到‘错误噪声层’，后续 denoising 更新就同时面临 OOD 输入和错误步长语义，模型会以不匹配的先验去解释当前状态；NAG要做的是把这种偏移拉回去。相比单纯减小步长，这种方法更直接针对偏差来源。","experiments":"摘要给出的定量信息有限，但有两个明确结论：第一，noise shift 在现代 diffusion 模型中是普遍存在且具有系统偏置的；第二，NAG 能改善因此带来的次优生成问题。没有给出所用模型、数据集、采样器、指标和提升数值，因此无法安全补充具体结果。最值得看的实验是：不同采样器和步数下 noise shift 的测量曲线；NAG 在少步采样时是否收益更大；以及它是否在不明显增加计算量的情况下稳定提升 FID、生成质量或下游感知指标。如果收益只在某一类求解器上成立，方法边界就比较清楚。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper identifies a basic but under-discussed issue in denoising generative models: during sampling, the actual noise level of intermediate states often does not match the nominal noise level implied by the time step. The authors call this mismatch noise shift. Prior work usually attributes sampling errors to discretization or model prediction quality, without isolating the fact that the state may already be off its intended noise manifold.","importance":"This is a methodological contribution with potentially broad implications because it targets a shared assumption across modern denoising samplers. For generative pretraining, the takeaway is useful: sampling error is not only a numerical integration problem; it is also a state-label calibration problem. If noise shift is widespread, some failures currently blamed on architecture or scheduler choice may partly come from the same underlying misalignment.","technical_approach":"The proposed method, Noise Awareness Guidance (NAG), explicitly accounts for the actual noise level in the current sample state and guides the trajectory back toward consistency with the predefined noise schedule. Importantly, this is a sampling-time correction rather than a new training objective or a replacement diffusion model. The rationale is straightforward: once a state drifts to the wrong noise regime, subsequent denoising updates become mismatched both statistically and semantically. NAG tries to correct that drift directly instead of only reducing step size and hoping the mismatch shrinks.","experiments":"The abstract supports two main empirical claims: noise shift is pervasive and systematically biased in modern diffusion models, and correcting it with NAG improves generation. It does not provide model names, datasets, samplers, metrics, or absolute gains, so a detailed quantitative summary is not possible from the provided text. The key experiments to inspect are how noise shift is measured across samplers and step counts, whether NAG helps more in low-step regimes where trajectory errors are larger, and whether the gains come without substantial extra compute. Existing approaches are typically task-specific, tied to fixed model sets, or dependent on matching architectures and tokenizers, which makes them hard to use as a general tracing tool.","importance":"The contribution is methodological with clear infrastructure value. It shifts the notion of model identity from raw weights or metadata to a functional representation of behavior. For pretraining research, that is interesting because it offers a possible common coordinate system for inheritance, forgetting, distillation drift, and continual pretraining effects. It could also matter for model auditing and provenance, where training logs are incomplete or unavailable.","technical_approach":"The authors define LLM DNA as a low-dimensional bi-Lipschitz representation of a model’s functional behavior, and provide theory claiming inheritance-like and determinism-like properties. Compared with parameter-space fingerprints, a functional representation is more flexible, provided the probing procedure is stable and informative enough.","experiments":"The abstract includes one concrete scale number: experiments over 305 LLMs. The main claim is that the extracted DNA aligns with model evolutionary relationships. For VLM and multimodal pretraining, the key implication is that sensitivity to image-embedded text may be concentrated in a relatively small circuit rather than distributed uniformly across the network. The design choice is targeted circuit ablation rather than global suppression, so the defense aims to remove attack-sensitive text extraction while preserving ordinary visual recognition. Compared with augmentation-based defenses, this is a mechanistic patch.","experiments":"The abstract reports two key numbers: Dyslexify improves performance by up to 22.06% on a typographic variant of ImageNet-100 while reducing standard ImageNet-100 accuracy by less than 1%. reward model 粗糙替代，前者成本太高，后者又很难捕捉用户间细粒度差异，所以作者把问题改写成“few-shot 识别用户奖励函数”的元学习问题。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在 post-train 与 pretrain 接口层。它不是提出一个更强的通用对齐算法，而是说明：如果训练目标从“学一个全局偏好函数”改成“学会根据少量样本快速适配用户”，那么合成数据也能更有效地服务真实个性化，这对偏好数据构造、指令跟随和用户建模都有直接启发。对大模型训练的意义在于，它把 synthetic preference 的用途从替代真实标注，推进到作为 personalization prior RAT（user description rationalization），让模型显式生成或利用用户描述，增强 reward inference 和 instruction following。和标准 DPO / RM 路线相比，关键区别不是换损失那么简单，而是训练单元从“样本级偏好对”变成“用户级 few-shot episode”；这样做的好处是逼模型学习跨用户共享的偏好结构，但代价是合成 persona 数据分布如果设计得太单薄，元学习到的适配能力会失真。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的实验结论是：FSPO 能用少量标注偏好有效个性化到真实用户，且 RAT 在给定 oracle user description 时还能进一步恢复性能。作者还强调他们仔细设计了 synthetic preference dataset 来覆盖 persona 级差异，这说明收益不只来自优化器或 loss，而高度依赖数据构造。摘要未给出模型规模、数据量、具体 baseline 名称和绝对数值，因此目前只能判断其主要证据是“synthetic-to-real personalization transfer”而不是通用 benchmark 刷分。读者需要重点关注正式论文里 few-shot shot 数、真实用户评测协议，以及与 DPO / contextual RM / meta-RM 的对比是否充分。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a practical bottleneck: personalizing an LLM to a real user from only a handful of preference labels, even when most training data is synthetic. Prior work either needs substantial per-user feedback or relies on a single global reward model, which is cheaper but too coarse to capture user-specific trade-offs. FSPO reframes the problem as fast inference of a user-conditioned reward function from a few examples.","importance":"The contribution is mainly at the pretrain/post-train interface rather than a new generic alignment recipe. The key message is that synthetic preference data becomes much more useful when the objective is meta-adaptation to users, not fitting one universal preference function. That matters for large-model training because it turns synthetic preference generation into a way to learn personalization priors, which is a stronger and more scalable use case than simple data substitution.","technical_approach":"FSPO is a few-shot preference optimization framework that treats reward modeling as meta-learning over users. Instead of learning only which response wins for a pair, the model is trained to infer a latent user reward from a small support set of that user’s labeled preferences, and then use that inferred reward for personalized ranking or generation. The RAT component adds user-description rationalization, encouraging the model to form explicit user representations that improve reward inference and instruction following. Compared with standard DPO or reward-model pipelines, the important shift is that training episodes are organized at the user level rather than the pair level. This should improve transfer to unseen users, but it also makes data design much more critical: weak or narrow synthetic personas will likely teach brittle adaptation.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical claim is that FSPO personalizes effectively to real users with only a few preference labels, and that RAT recovers additional performance when oracle user descriptions are available. The paper also emphasizes careful synthetic dataset construction for persona-level preferences, suggesting that gains are strongly tied to training distribution design rather than only the optimization rule. The abstract does not provide model size, dataset scale, baselines, or exact margins, so the current read is that the value lies in synthetic-to-real personalization transfer rather than raw benchmark leadership. The most important details to verify in the full paper are the number of shots, the real-user evaluation protocol, and comparisons against contextual reward models and standard preference optimization baselines.","authors_note":""},"tags":["personalization","preference-optimization","meta-learning","few-shot"],"notable_authors":["Anikait Singh","Eric Mitchell","Stefano Ermon"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009374","title":"Eliciting Numerical Predictive Distributions of LLMs Without Auto-Regression","authors":["Julianna Piskorz","Katarzyna Kobalczyk","Mihaela van der Schaar"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$334","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009374"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009374","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：在数值预测任务里，能不能不走自回归采样，也直接拿到 LLM 对连续目标的预测分布。以前把 LLM 用在回归、时间序列或表格预测时，通常要反复生成数值样本再估计均值、分位数或不确定性，这既慢又不稳定，而且自回归 token 生成对连续值本来就不是最自然的接口。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于，它挑战了“LLM 的分布输出必须靠生成近似”的默认范式。对 pretrain 研究者来说，启发不在于回归 probe 本身，而在于一个更普遍的问题：模型内部表征里是否已经编码了完整或足够充分的 predictive distribution，外部生成只是读取方式之一。如果答案成立，那么很多非文本、非离散输出任务都可能从“生成问题”改写成“representation readout 问题”，这会影响我们如何理解 AR LM 的内部统计表征能力。","technical_approach":"核心方法是训练一组 regression probes，直接从 LLM 内部表示预测数值输出分布的统计泛函，例如均值、中位数和不同分位数。它不是改造底座模型，也不是做非 AR 新解码器，而是把已有 AR LLM 视为隐式分布编码器，然后学习一个轻量读出头去恢复这些统计量。关键设计点在于：作者关心的是 distributional properties，而不是单点预测，所以 probe 的目标不是逼近某个 token 序列，而是逼近数值响应分布的 functionals。与 repeated sampling 相比，这样做省掉了高成本生成，但边界也很明确——probe 只能恢复它被监督到的统计量，若内部表征没有保留足够信息，或者分布是强多峰且 functionals 不够描述，读出质量就会受限。","experiments":"摘要能确认的实验范围包括回归类任务，如时间序列预测和表格预测，并比较“不生成、直接 probe 读出”与传统自回归采样恢复分布统计的效果与成本。作者声称可以恢复 numerical output distribution 的多个统计特征，但摘要没有给出模型大小、probe 结构、数据规模、推理时延节省比例，也没有给出相对 repeated sampling 的误差差距。就目前信息看，这篇论文更像一项 probing/measurement 研究，而不是端到端建模方法替代；读者应重点看 full paper 中 probe 读取哪些层最有效、不同统计量哪个最容易恢复，以及这些结论在模型尺度变化下是否稳定。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a focused question: for numerical prediction tasks, can we recover an LLM’s predictive distribution without autoregressive sampling? Existing LLM-based regression setups usually estimate uncertainty or quantiles by repeatedly generating numeric outputs, which is both expensive and conceptually awkward because token-by-token decoding is a poor fit for continuous targets.","importance":"The main importance is conceptual. It questions the default assumption that an LLM’s distributional output must be accessed through generation. For pretraining and representation-learning researchers, the interesting implication is that internal states may already contain usable summaries of the model’s predictive distribution, and decoding is only one interface for exposing them. If that holds more broadly, some continuous-output tasks may be better framed as representation readout rather than generation.","technical_approach":"The method is to train regression probes on internal LLM representations to predict statistical functionals of the model’s numerical output distribution, such as the mean, median, and quantiles. This is not a new non-autoregressive generator and it does not modify the backbone LLM. Instead, it treats the pretrained AR model as an implicit distribution encoder and learns lightweight readout heads for specific distributional quantities. The design choice is deliberate: the target is not a single number or a token sequence, but distribution summaries. That removes repeated sampling cost, but it also defines the limits clearly. A probe can only recover what is both represented internally and supervised externally; highly multimodal distributions or unsupported functionals may still require explicit generation.","experiments":"From the abstract, the evaluation covers regression settings including time-series forecasting and tabular prediction, comparing direct probe-based recovery of distributional statistics against autoregressive sampling approaches. The authors claim that multiple statistical properties of the output distribution can be recovered from internal states, but the abstract provides no model sizes, dataset scales, latency reductions, or exact error gaps relative to repeated sampling. At this stage, the paper reads more like a probing and measurement study than a replacement modeling paradigm. The key things to inspect in the full paper are which layers contain the strongest signal, which functionals are easiest or hardest to recover, and whether the findings remain stable across model scale.","authors_note":""},"tags":["llm-regression","predictive-distribution","non-autoregressive","icl"],"notable_authors":["Mihaela van der Schaar"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009459","title":"Math Blind: MLLM 在图形数学题上的失败，不是先坏在推理，而是先坏在 diagram perception。以往社区经常把图表、几何图、流程图上的错误统称为“多模态推理不足”，但作者认为这里混进了更基础的感知缺陷，所以先把“看懂图”和“基于图推理”拆开诊断。","importance":"这项工作的价值在于重新定位了 MLLM 的短板来源。对 VLM/MLLM failure 才能被合理解释。和一般“出一套更难图文问答题”不同，它更像针对 MLLM 视觉前端的单元测试。代价是这种诊断不能直接给出通用任务分数提升方案，但它能更准确告诉你该补数据、补编码器还是补推理器。","experiments":"摘要明确说，系统评测发现 MLLM 在基础 diagram perceptual tasks 上表现较差，例子包括 shape classification 和 occlusion 相关任务；这说明问题在进入 reasoning 之前就已经发生。摘要没有给出具体参与评测的模型名单、指标、准确率区间或 drop 幅度，因此目前无法判断是所有主流 MLLM 普遍失效，还是特定视觉 backbone 更脆弱。就研究含义而言，最值得关注的是：作者是否比较了自然图像能力强的模型与文档/图示数据增强模型之间的差异，以及 perceptual error 与最终数学解题错误之间的相关性有多强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper’s main conclusion is that many MLLM failures on diagram-based math are rooted in perception, not only in reasoning. The field often labels these errors as multimodal reasoning failures, but diagrams mix symbolic structure, spatial layout, and visual parsing in a way that makes attribution messy. This work explicitly separates diagram perception from downstream reasoning.","importance":"This matters because it changes where we should intervene. If a model cannot reliably parse shapes, occlusions, and spatial relations in diagrams, then adding more reasoning traces or CoT supervision will not fix the real bottleneck. For VLM and multimodal pretraining, the paper is useful less as a new method and more as a cleaner failure-attribution framework. That has direct implications for diagram-focused tokenization, synthetic data generation, alignment losses, and curriculum design.","technical_approach":"The core contribution is a diagnostic test suite that isolates perceptual skills required for diagram understanding from higher-level reasoning. Instead of using end tasks that entangle visual parsing, symbolic interpretation, and logical inference, the authors factor the problem into basic perceptual subskills such as shape classification, occlusion recognition, and spatial understanding. This design is effective because reasoning failures are hard to interpret unless the input representation is known to be correct first. Relative to standard benchmark construction, this is closer to a unit test for the visual front end of MLLMs. The trade-off is that it diagnoses the source of failure more than it provides a direct recipe for improving end-task scores.","experiments":"The abstract states that MLLMs perform poorly on basic perceptual tasks for diagrams, including shape classification and occlusion-related recognition, indicating that breakdown happens before reasoning starts. The most informative details to check in the full paper are whether models that are strong on natural images still fail on diagrams, whether document- or chart-heavy pretraining helps, and how strongly perceptual failure predicts final mathematical reasoning errors.","authors_note":""},"tags":["mllm","diagram-understanding","reasoning","benchmark"],"notable_authors":["Piotr LLM 在不得不权衡多个价值时会优先站哪一边。过去很多评测用单选题或单一原则判断模型是否符合某套价值，但真实部署里更常见的是价值之间互相拉扯，这时模型的排序偏好比单点正确性更关键。","importance":"这项工作的意义主要在评测与对齐分析层。它不是直接改进模型能力，而是提供了一种自动生成价值冲突情境并诱导模型显式暴露优先级的方法。对 alignment 研究的启发是：仅看是否支持某项价值会高估模型一致性；一旦把自由生成回答映射回 value ranking，模型的真实偏好结构会更清楚，也更容易发现训练目标与部署行为之间的落差。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 ConflictScope，一个自动化 pipeline。给定用户定义的价值集合，它先生成两个价值发生冲突的情境，再为目标模型构造一个由 LLM 写成的 user prompt，随后根据模型的自由文本回应推断其对价值集合的排序。关键设计在于它同时比较 multiple-choice 和 open-ended 两种评测形式，因为作者怀疑封闭式题型会人为约束模型表达，掩盖其在真实交互中的价值倾向。和传统 alignment benchmark 相比，这种设计更接近部署条件下的生成行为分析，而不是标签匹配。边界则在于：value ranking 更灵活。摘要没有给出参与测试的模型名单、价值集合规模、冲突场景数量、排序一致性指标或人工验证精度，因此目前更适合把它看成一个 alignment diagnostics 工具，而不是得出关于某个模型“价值观”的最终结论。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a gap in current alignment evaluation: most datasets do not force models to make trade-offs between competing values, so we learn little about their actual priorities. Standard benchmarks often test support for one principle at a time, but real deployment frequently presents conflicts where ranking values matters more than endorsing any single one in isolation.","importance":"The contribution is primarily evaluative rather than a new training method. It provides an automatic way to generate value-conflict scenarios and elicit a model’s ordering over values. That is useful for alignment research because it shows that apparent consistency can be overstated when evaluation ignores trade-offs. Once free-form responses are mapped back to value rankings, the gap between training targets and deployed behavior becomes easier to inspect.","technical_approach":"The core method is ConflictScope, an automatic pipeline for generating and evaluating value conflicts. Given a user-specified value set, it samples pairs of potentially conflicting values, generates scenarios where the conflict is salient, constructs an LLM-written user prompt, and then infers a ranking over the value set from the target model’s free-text response. A key design choice is to compare multiple-choice evaluation with open-ended generation, because constrained formats may hide the model’s true value preferences. Compared with standard alignment benchmarks, this is closer to behavior elicitation under realistic interaction. The main limitation is that extracting rankings from free text is itself a measurement problem and may introduce interpretation noise.","experiments":"The abstract reports a central finding: relative to multiple-choice evaluation, open-ended responses shift models away from supporting some values, implying that evaluation format materially changes the observed value ordering. The framework also appears flexible enough to cover arbitrary user-defined value sets rather than a fixed benchmark ontology. The abstract does not specify which models were tested, how many values or conflict scenarios were used, what ranking metrics were reported, or how reliable the inferred rankings are against human judgment. For now, the paper is best read as a diagnostic tool for alignment analysis rather than a definitive statement about any particular model’s One-Token Procedural Memory for Large Language Models","authors":["Zijun Wu","Yongchang Hao","Lili Mou"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$337","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009482"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009482","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：提示词作为任务控制接口太臃肿、每次都要重复编码，而且难以模块化复用。对大量固定 procedure 的场景，今天常见做法要么反复塞长 prompt，要么做 LoRA / finetune，但前者推理浪费，后者又不够轻量、也容易发生干扰。","importance":"这项工作的贡献在于提出一种更像“可寻址程序记忆”的控制单元，而不是再堆 prompt engineering。对大模型训练研究者有启发的一点是：任务程序未必需要分布在大量自然语言 token 中，也可以压缩进专门训练的记忆 token，并作为 generation control signal 使用。这和 soft prompt、prefix tuning 接近，但它把重点放在 procedure 的可组合存储与 continual 增量添加上，因此更接近参数外程序库。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 TokMem：把每个可复用任务过程编译成一个单独、可训练的 memory token。这个 token 同时承担 procedure index 和生成控制信号的作用，调用时只需常数级开销；底座 LLM 保持冻结，所有程序知识都存进这些专门 token 中，因此可以持续添加新 procedure 而尽量不干扰旧的。和传统 prompt-based control 相比，它舍弃了人类可读性，换来可复用、低 token 开销和较好的模块性；和 LoRA / adapter 相比，它不需要维护整套额外权重分支。设计之所以有效，是因为很多任务 procedure 更像隐式控制状态而非显式内容本身，用一个 learned token 去触发这种状态切换是可行的。边界是：单 token 容量有限，复杂长程序可能需要组合式 token 或层级调用。","experiments":"摘要给出两个明确场景：一是在 1,000 个 Super-Natural Instructions 任务上的 atomic recall，二是在 multi-step function-calling 上的 compositional recall。作者声称 TokMem 表现出良好的可扩展性与复用性，但摘要没有给出冻结 backbone 的规模、memory token 数量、与 soft prompt / prompt tuning / retrieval prompt 的具体比较数字，也没有说明新增任务后旧任务遗忘情况。当前可以确定的是，论文想证明的不是开放域能力提升，而是“常数开销调用 procedure memory”这一系统性质。最值得看的实验是容量曲线：任务数从几十扩到上千时性能如何退化，以及多个 memory token 组合时是否真能近似程序组合。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical control problem: prompts are expensive to reuse because they must be reprocessed every time, and they are poor modular interfaces for reusable procedures. Today, repeated long prompts waste inference budget, while finetuning or LoRA-based task modules are heavier than necessary and can interfere with one another.","importance":"The contribution is a procedural-memory view of task control rather than another prompt-engineering method. For LLM training researchers, the interesting idea is that reusable task procedures may not need to live in many natural-language tokens at all. They can be compressed into dedicated learned memory tokens that act as generation control signals. This is related to soft prompting and prefix methods, but the emphasis here is on modular storage, addressability, and continual addition of new procedures.","technical_approach":"TokMem compiles each reusable procedure into a single trainable memory token. That token serves both as a procedure identifier and as a control signal that steers generation, while the backbone LLM stays frozen. All procedural knowledge is stored in these dedicated tokens, so new procedures can be added without updating the base model. Relative to prompt-based control, the method gives up human readability in exchange for constant inference overhead and better modularity. Relative to adapters or LoRA, it avoids maintaining separate parameter branches. The design makes sense if many procedures are better understood as latent control states than as explicit textual instructions. The obvious limit is capacity: a single token may be too small for highly complex procedures unless composition or hierarchical routing is added.","experiments":"The abstract names two evaluation settings: atomic recall over 1,000 Super-Natural Instructions tasks and compositional recall in multi-step function calling. The claimed takeaway is that TokMem supports scalable and reusable procedural memory, but the abstract does not provide the backbone size, number of memory tokens, forgetting rates, or direct comparisons against soft prompts, prompt tuning, or retrieval-based prompting. What is clear is that the paper is testing a systems property more than open-ended capability gains: can reusable procedures be invoked with constant token cost? The most important empirical details will be the capacity curve as the number of stored tasks grows and whether combining multiple memory tokens truly enables procedure composition.","authors_note":""},"tags":["memory","control-token","adaptation","inference"],"notable_authors":["Zijun Wu","Lili Mou"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009486","title":"How does the optimizer implicitly bias the model merging loss landscape?","authors":["Chenxiang Zhang","Alexander Theus","Damien Teney","Antonio Orvieto","Jun Pang","Sjouke Mauw"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$338","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009486"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009486","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：为什么有些模型可以 merge 得很好，有些不行，而且这种差异和优化器到底有什么关系。过去 model merging 多半从参数几何或任务相似性解释成功与否，但训练动力学如何塑造可合并的 loss landscape，一直缺少统一视角。","importance":"这项工作的主要价值是提出一个可操作的统一量——effective noise scale——来解释优化器组件如何影响 merging 成功率。对 pretrain/post-train 研究者来说，这很重要，因为它把 mergeability 从“训练完再看运气”推进到“训练时就能调控的性质”。如果结论稳固，那意味着学习率、batch size、动量等设置不只影响最终指标，也影响解在参数空间中的几何位置以及后续能否线性组合。","technical_approach":"核心方法是从优化动力学角度分析 model merging，并证明一个量能统一不同优化器成分的影响。作者研究两类常见 merge：linear interpolation 和 task arithmetic，然后看 effective noise scale 如何改变 loss landscape geometry 以及 merge 后的性能。关键发现是 merging success 与 noise scale 是非单调关系，存在中间最优区间。这个结果很有解释力：噪声太小，解可能过尖、过专门化，彼此之间没有平坦连接；噪声太大，训练又可能过度扰动，损伤任务性能或一致性。与先前只看两个 checkpoint 距离或夹角的分析不同，这篇工作把“为什么训练出来的解容易 merge”追溯到了优化过程本身。","experiments":"摘要明确给出几个关键信息：分析覆盖多种 architecture 和 dataset；merge 方式包括 linear interpolation 和 task arithmetic；主要结论是 merge 成功率对 effective noise scale 呈非单调关系，并存在最佳区间。摘要没有提供具体模型类型、任务数量、noise scale 调节方式、性能峰值位置或提升幅度，因此现阶段更适合把它看成机制研究，而不是某个实用 merge 配方。最值得关注的是 full paper 里是否给出跨规模一致的规律，以及能否通过显式调 batch size / lr / weight decay 来稳定移动到更可 merge 的区域。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks why some independently trained models merge well while others do not, and what role the optimizer plays in shaping that outcome. Prior work on model merging has mostly focused on parameter geometry or task similarity after training. A unified account of how optimization dynamics create a merge-friendly or merge-hostile loss landscape has been missing.","importance":"The key contribution is a concrete unifying quantity, the effective noise scale, for explaining how optimizer components affect merging success. This matters for both pretraining and post-training because it turns mergeability into something that may be influenced during optimization rather than inspected only after the fact. If the result is robust, then choices such as learning rate, batch size, and momentum affect not just final task metrics but also where the solution lands in parameter space and how compatible it is with linear combination later on.","technical_approach":"The paper studies model merging through the lens of optimization dynamics and argues that effective noise scale captures the relevant influence of different optimizer ingredients. It examines two standard merging procedures, linear interpolation and task arithmetic, and relates merge performance to how optimization shapes the surrounding loss geometry. The main finding is non-monotonicity: merging works best at an intermediate noise scale. That is a useful explanation. Too little noise may lead to sharp, overly specialized solutions without flat connecting regions. Too much noise may damage task quality or consistency. Compared with analyses based only on checkpoint distance or angle, this work traces mergeability back to the training process itself.","experiments":"The abstract gives several important facts: the study spans multiple architectures and datasets; it evaluates both linear interpolation and task arithmetic; and it finds a non-monotonic relationship between merging success and effective noise scale, with an optimal regime in the middle. It does not provide model types, task counts, exact performance margins, or how noise scale is manipulated in practice. So this currently reads as a mechanism paper rather than a new production recipe. The most important details to verify are whether the pattern holds consistently across scale and whether simple optimizer knobs such as batch size and learning rate can reliably move training into a more merge-friendly regime.","authors_note":""},"tags":["model-merging","optimizer","loss-landscape","finetuning"],"notable_authors":["Antonio Orvieto"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009490","title":"Two (narrow) heads are better than (an arbitrarily wide) one","authors":["Amanuel Tesfaye","Zeno Kujawa","Rajmohan Rajaraman","Ravi Sundaram"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$339","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009490"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009490","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"单头单层 attention-only transformer 的表达能力边界在哪？作者通过一个叫 Endpoint Selection Problem（ESP）的图论任务来刻画：单头在含环图上不可解，但两个窄头就能解决所有图上的 ESP。此前对 attention head 数量与表达力的关系缺乏与维度/精度无关的不可能性结果。","importance":"理论级贡献，对理解 transformer 中 multi-head attention 的必要性提供了干净的分离结果。对 pretrain 的直接启示有限，但对架构设计中 head 数量的选择提供了理论下界——即使维度和精度无限大，单头也有本质局限。","technical_approach":"定义了 ESP 任务（在有向图的弧上做端点选择），证明了两个方向的结果：(i) 单头 transformer 无论维度和精度多大，都无法解决任何含环图上的 ESP；(ii) 两个头（即使很窄）就足以解决所有图（包括含环图）上的 ESP。分离结果的关键在于 attention 的 softmax 归一化使得单头在环结构上产生不可避免的信息混淆。","experiments":"主要是理论工作，实验部分（如有）应为验证性质。摘要未提供实验细节。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"What are the fundamental expressiveness limits of single-head attention? The authors formalize this via the Endpoint Selection Problem (ESP) on directed graphs, showing a clean separation: 1 head fails on any graph with a cycle regardless of dimension/precision, while 2 narrow heads suffice for all graphs.","importance":"A theoretical contribution providing a dimension- and precision-independent impossibility result for single-head attention. It gives a principled lower bound on head count, though direct pretrain implications are limited.","technical_approach":"Defines ESP on directed graphs and proves: (i) 1-head, 1-layer attention-only transformers cannot solve ESP on any graph containing a cycle, even with unbounded dimension and precision; (ii) 2 heads suffice for all graphs including cyclic ones. The impossibility stems from softmax normalization causing unavoidable information conflation in cycles.","experiments":"Primarily a theory paper. No experimental details provided in the abstract.","authors_note":""},"tags":["attention","expressivity","theory","transformer"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009509","title":"The Effect of Attention Head Count on Transformer Approximation","authors":["Penghao Yu","Haotian Jiang","Zeyu Bao","Ruoxi Yu","Qianxiao Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$33a","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009509"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009509","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"Transformer 中 attention head 数量如何影响模型的逼近能力？此前缺乏关于 head 数量的参数复杂度上下界。作者通过一个广义 D-retrieval 任务建立了理论框架，证明 head 数量不足时参数量必须大幅增长。","importance":"理论级贡献。对 pretrain 架构设计中 head 数量的选择提供了理论依据：head 太少时，即使增加参数也无法高效逼近目标函数。这为 GQA/MQA 等减少 head 的实践提供了理论边界参考。","technical_approach":"引入广义 D-retrieval 任务，证明其在连续函数空间中是稠密的，以此作为理论分析的基础。然后建立 ε-逼近所需参数复杂度的上下界：head 数量充足时可高效逼近；head 数量不足时参数量必须按某种速率增长。这是一个 head 数量与参数效率之间的 trade-off 刻画。","experiments":"主要是理论工作。摘要未提供实验细节。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"How does the number of attention heads affect transformer approximation power? Prior work lacked parameter complexity bounds as a function of head count. The authors establish both upper and lower bounds via a generalized D-retrieval task.","importance":"A theoretical contribution providing principled guidance for head count in architecture design. With too few heads, parameter count must scale up significantly—relevant context for GQA/MQA and similar head-reduction practices.","technical_approach":"Introduces a generalized D-retrieval task proven to be dense in the space of continuous functions, serving as the theoretical foundation. Establishes upper and lower bounds on parameter complexity for ε-approximation: sufficient heads enable efficient approximation, while too few heads force parameter count to scale up.","experiments":"Primarily a theory paper. Many trajectories fail at the original task but still accomplish other meaningful goals. Existing post-training pipelines usually discard those rollouts because they only score success against the initial objective, leaving useful supervision on the floor.","importance":"This is a method contribution with potentially broad utility. It brings hindsight relabeling into natural-language goal learning for LLM agents, and the practical message is important: in sparse-reward, expensive-to-label environments, better data reuse may buy more than a more sophisticated RL algorithm. If the method is stable, it could become a standard recovery step in agent training pipelines.","technical_approach":"The proposed Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL) pipeline asks an auxiliary LLM to review a completed trajectory and relabel it with the natural-language goals that were actually achieved. The relabeled goal and the original trajectory are then used as an additional supervised training pair. The key idea is not to pretend a failure was a success, but to change the target so that the supervision matches what the trajectory genuinely demonstrates. To reduce suboptimality in the relabeled data, the paper adds irrelevant-action masking, which removes actions unrelated to the new goal, and sample reweighting, which downweights low-quality relabels. Compared with classic hindsight replay, the challenge here is that goals are open-ended language descriptions rather than discrete state predicates, so the quality of the relabeling LLM is likely a major limiting factor.","experiments":"The abstract gives no model sizes, environments, baselines, or exact gains, so only the likely experimental focus can be summarized. The central tests should ask whether HSL consistently improves success rate or sample efficiency across multiple agent settings, how much additional supervision it recovers from otherwise discarded trajectories, and how much the masking and reweighting steps each matter. One especially important analysis is robustness to relabel noise: if performance collapses when the auxiliary LLM is weaker, then HSL is mostly a teacher-dependent pipeline; if it remains effective, its engineering value is much higher.","authors_note":""},"tags":["hindsight-relabeling","agent-training","sft","data-augmentation"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009595","title":"QWHA: Quantization-Aware Walsh-Hadamard Adaptation for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning on Large Language Models","authors":["Hyesung Jeon","Seojune Lee","Beomseok Kang","Yulhwa Kim","jae-joon kim"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$33d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009595"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009595","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：在量化感知的 PEFT 场景里，如何在不增加太多训练与部署负担的前提下，更有效地补偿量化误差。现有低秩适配器容量不足，往往压不住量化带来的表示损失；而基于 Fourier/变换的适配器虽然表达力更强，直接接到量化模型上又容易带来误差补偿无效和额外开销。","importance":"这项工作是方法级改进，落点在量化与 PEFT 的接口上。对 LLM 研究的启示在于，低比特部署不只是后处理问题，适配器形式会直接决定量化后还能保留多少下游可调性。如果 QWHA 能在量化约束下稳定优于 LoRA 一类方法，它说明高表达力但结构友好的 adapter 设计，是量化时代 PEFT 的关键方向。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 QWHA：一个量化感知的 Walsh-Hadamard 变换适配器。它不是继续沿着低秩分解做改良，而是利用 Walsh-Hadamard 这类快速正交变换提供更强的表示混合能力，同时尽量保持计算结构简单、硬件友好。摘要强调它是 quantization-aware，这意味着适配器设计会显式考虑量化误差分布，而不是先量化再盲目微调。和一般 Fourier-related transform adapter 相比，Walsh-Hadamard 的一个现实优势是变换实现更轻、乘法更少，更适合在量化推理链路里控制额外开销。设计上的取舍很明确：它想比 LoRA 更有容量，但又不能像全参数补偿那样失去效率优势。","experiments":"摘要没有给出所用模型、bit-width、任务集合、基线和提升数值，因此暂时无法总结具体结果。最关键的实验应包括：在常见量化设置下，如 4-bit 或类似低比特权重/激活量化，QWHA 相比 LoRA、QLoRA 或已有 transform-based adapter 的精度差距；参数量与训练开销是否仍保持 PEFT 级别；以及不同量化强度下的鲁棒性。值得重点看两个 ablation：第一，若去掉 quantization-aware 设计，仅保留 Walsh-Hadamard 结构，收益还剩多少；第二，性能改善究竟来自更强表示能力，还是来自更好的量化误差对齐。如果论文只在少量分类任务上有效，而在生成任务或 instruction tuning 上不稳定，那它的适用面会受限。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper focuses on a practical gap in quantization-aware PEFT: how to compensate quantization error without losing the efficiency benefits that make PEFT attractive in the first place. Low-rank adapters often lack the capacity to recover aggressively quantized models, while stronger transform-based adapters can become ineffective or too costly when plugged into quantized pipelines directly.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution at the interface between quantization and PEFT. The broader lesson for LLM work is that low-bit deployment is not just a post-processing issue; the adapter form strongly affects how much task-specific adaptability survives quantization. If QWHA consistently outperforms LoRA-style baselines under quantization constraints, it would strengthen the case for higher-capacity but still structured adapters in the low-bit regime.","technical_approach":"QWHA proposes a quantization-aware adapter built around the Walsh-Hadamard transform. Instead of pushing further on low-rank factorization, it uses a fast orthogonal transform to provide richer feature mixing while keeping the computation simple and hardware-friendly. The quantization-aware aspect is important: the adapter is designed with quantization error in mind rather than added as a generic PEFT layer after the model has already been compressed. Compared with more general Fourier-family adapters, Walsh-Hadamard has a practical advantage in implementation cost because it can be realized with very light arithmetic. The trade-off is straightforward: the goal is to exceed LoRA’s representational capacity without drifting toward the overhead of full-parameter correction.","experiments":"The abstract does not report the underlying models, bit-widths, tasks, baselines, or quantitative gains, so the evidence cannot yet be summarized numerically. The key experiments should compare QWHA against LoRA, QLoRA, and prior transform-based adapters under common low-bit settings, likely around 4-bit weight or weight-activation quantization. The most useful ablations would test whether the gain comes mainly from the Walsh-Hadamard structure itself or from the quantization-aware design, and how robust the method is as quantization becomes more aggressive. If improvements only appear on narrow classification tasks but not on generative or instruction-following settings, the practical scope would be limited.","authors_note":""},"tags":["quantization","peft","lora","hadamard"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009687","title":"Get RICH or Die Scaling: Profitably Trading Inference Compute for Robustness","authors":["Tavish McDonald","Bo Lei","Stanislav Fort","Bhavya Kailkhura","Brian Bartoldson"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$33e","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009687"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009687","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：推理时增加 reasoning compute 是否真的能提升模型面对对抗性 OOD 输入时的鲁棒性，以及这种收益在更强攻击者下是否还能成立。已有工作指出更多 test-time reasoning 对 jailbreak 防御有帮助，但一旦攻击者能用梯度或多模态输入，这种收益会明显减弱，因此关键问题变成：test-time compute 的鲁棒性收益边界到底在哪里。","importance":"这项工作更偏机制与评估框架层面，而不是单纯提出一个新防御技巧。它的重要性在于澄清了‘inference scaling 带来 robustness’这件事何时成立、为何成立，对 reasoning model 的训练和部署都有启发。对 pretrain/post-train 的间接意义是，如果鲁棒性的一部分来自组合泛化能力，而不是专门记住攻击模板，那么提升 reasoning 结构能力可能比堆更多对抗样本更可扩展。","technical_approach":"核心思路是把鲁棒性收益归因于 compositional generalization：即使输入整体是 OOD 的，只要它能被拆成模型熟悉的 ID 组件，模型就可能借助更多推理步骤去满足防御规范。作者不是简单重复‘想久一点更安全’，而是试图给出在梯度攻击和多模态攻击存在时，何种结构条件下额外 test compute 仍有价值。和直接训练一个更强 reward model 或安全 classifier 不同，这种路线关注的是推理过程本身是否能作为防御资源。边界也很明确：如果攻击样本不是由可理解组件组合而成，或者推理链本身容易被攻击操控，那么增加 compute 未必能换来鲁棒性，甚至可能扩大攻击面。","experiments":"摘要没有提供模型、攻击设置、指标和提升数字，因此无法做数值总结。按论文主张，最关键的实验应包括：在 jailbreak、梯度可访问攻击、多模态对抗输入等设置下，随着 inference compute 增加，鲁棒性曲线如何变化；这种收益是否在不同模型和不同规范任务上都存在；以及组合性强弱如何影响收益。最值得关注的分析不是平均防御率，而是 scaling curve 的形状——收益是持续增加、早早饱和，还是在强攻击下回落。如果作者还比较了训练时 robustification 与测试时 compute 的成本收益，这会更有工程意义。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a sharp question: when does increasing test-time reasoning actually improve robustness to adversarial OOD inputs, and when does that benefit break down? Prior work suggested that more reasoning can help models satisfy defensive specifications, especially against jailbreaks, but the effect weakens once attackers have stronger tools such as gradient access or multimodal inputs.","importance":"This is more a mechanism and evaluation contribution than a new defense primitive. Its value is in clarifying when inference scaling buys robustness and why. That matters for both training and deployment of reasoning models. The broader implication is that if part of robustness comes from compositional generalization rather than memorized attack patterns, then improving structured reasoning may scale better than simply adding more adversarial training data.","technical_approach":"The central argument is that robustness from inference compute depends on compositional generalization: an input may be globally OOD but still understandable as a composition of in-distribution parts. Under that condition, extra reasoning steps can help the model adhere to defensive specifications even on adversarial inputs. This is more specific than the generic claim that 'more thinking is safer.' The paper appears to analyze when this remains true under gradient-based and multimodal attacks. Unlike approaches that rely on stronger reward models or separate safety classifiers, this line of work treats the reasoning process itself as the defensive resource. The boundary is important: if adversarial inputs are not decomposable into familiar components, or if the reasoning trace itself is easy to manipulate, additional compute may provide little benefit or even create new attack surface.","experiments":"The abstract does not report models, attack settings, metrics, or gains, so no quantitative summary is possible yet. The decisive experiments should measure robustness as a function of inference compute under jailbreak attacks, gradient-access attacks, and multimodal adversarial settings, ideally across multiple model families and defensive specifications. The most informative result would be the scaling curve itself: does robustness improve steadily, saturate early, or collapse under stronger attacks? An analysis that separates tasks by their degree of compositional structure would be especially useful. If the paper also compares the cost-effectiveness of training-time robustification versus test-time compute, that would make the contribution much more actionable.","authors_note":""},"tags":["inference-time","reasoning","robustness","jailbreak","alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10009708","title":"RLVER: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Emotion Rewards for Empathetic Agents","authors":["Peisong Wang","Ruotian Ma","Bang Zhang","Xingyu Chen","Zhiwei He","Kang Luo","Qingsong Lv","Qingxuan Jiang","Zheng Xie","Shanyi Wang","CIXING LI","Yuan Li","Fanghua Ye","Jian Li","Yifan Yang","Jia Li","Zhaopeng Tu","Xiaolong Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$33f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10009708"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10009708","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：当前 LLM 在情感智能和共情对话上的提升，缺少像数学/代码那样可验证、可稳定优化的 RL 信号。传统偏好学习很难把‘是否真正共情’拆成稳定 reward，而纯人工标注又贵且噪声大，所以 EQ 训练长期停留在 SFT 和经验性对齐。","importance":"这项工作属于方法级，也带一点任务范式上的扩展。它的重要性不在于‘让聊天更温柔’，而在于尝试把 RLVR 从 correctness-heavy 任务推进到高阶对话能力。如果 verifiable emotion rewards 能形成稳定训练信号，这会拓宽‘可验证奖励’的边界，对未来把更多软能力转成程序化反馈有参考价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 RLVER：通过自洽的 affective simulated users 与模型多轮对话，并在对话过程中产生确定性的情绪分数，作为 end-to-end RL 的奖励。关键设计不是直接让另一个 LLM 打分‘是否有共情’，而是构造一个情感一致的用户模拟器，使 reward 来自交互后用户状态变化或情绪满足程度，因此更接近过程性反馈。作者把它称为 verifiable emotion rewards，说明 reward 应当有较明确的规则或确定性评分，而非纯主观偏好。与标准 RLHF 相比，它牺牲了一部分开放世界真实感，换来更低噪声、更高可重复性的训练信号。边界也明显：模拟用户的情感模型如果过于简化，模型可能学会讨好 simulator 而不是真正提升对真人的共情质量。","experiments":"摘要提到在公开 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct 上微调，但后半句被截断，没有给出完整结果、数据规模和提升数字。可以确认的关键实验应包括：与 SFT、标准偏好对齐、或其他 empathetic dialogue 方法相比，在情感理解、支持性回应、一致性等指标上的提升；以及 simulator reward 与人类评估之间的相关性。最值得看的 ablation 是 simulated user 的自洽性设计、reward 组成项、以及 RL 是否真的优于单轮监督信号。如果收益主要体现在 simulator 内评分而对真人评测提升有限，那么方法的外部有效性会存疑。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real gap in post-training: unlike math or code, empathetic dialogue lacks reliable verifiable rewards that make RL stable and scalable. Most work on emotional intelligence in LLMs still depends on SFT or noisy preference supervision because it is hard to turn 'being genuinely empathetic' into a consistent reward signal.","importance":"This is a method contribution with a broader implication for reward design. The point is not merely to make models sound nicer. It is to test whether the RLVR paradigm can be extended beyond correctness-dominated tasks into higher-order dialogue behavior. If verifiable emotion rewards can train useful EQ skills, that would expand the frontier of what counts as a programmatically trainable ability.","technical_approach":"The proposed RLVER framework uses affective simulated users that interact with the model over multiple turns and emit deterministic emotion scores during the dialogue, which then serve as RL rewards. The important design choice is that the reward is tied to state changes in a self-consistent user simulator rather than a generic post hoc LLM judge saying whether a response seems empathetic. That makes the signal more process-based and, in principle, more reproducible. Compared with standard RLHF, the method gives up some open-world realism in exchange for lower reward noise and clearer optimization targets. The obvious limitation is simulator mismatch: if the emotional model of the user simulator is too simplistic, the policy may overfit to pleasing the simulator rather than helping real users.","experiments":"The abstract states that the method fine-tunes Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, but the remainder is truncated and provides no full benchmark list, dataset scale, or gains. The critical experiments should compare RLVER against SFT and preference-based baselines on empathy-related benchmarks, while also checking how well simulator rewards correlate with human judgments. The most informative ablations would test the consistency design of the simulated users, the composition of the reward, and whether multi-turn RL provides gains beyond single-turn supervision. 差异。这个方法比单纯相关性分析更有因果味道，但边界在于“脑活动预测差”本身是否真正排除了所有与认知结构相关的表征因素。","experiments":"摘要给出的关键信息是：作者在 200 Prior work often treated brain alignment as a sign of cognitive plausibility or interpretability, but lacked the right counterfactual. This paper builds that counterfactual by training models that are intentionally brain-misaligned while preserving strong language modeling performance.","importance":"Its value is analytical rather than algorithmic. monolithic policy 去串 thoughts 和 tool calls，在长时程、多工具场景里会越来越难训也越来越难泛化。很多 agentic system 虽然做了模块化，但往往是 training-free orchestration，或者离线训练各模块，没把真实多轮交互中的反馈闭环纳入优化。","importance":"这篇工作的贡献更偏 agent training 系统的训练组织方式是一个值得关注的方向。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 AgentFlow，一个 in-the-flow、可训练的 agentic framework。它用四个模块——planner、executor、verifier、generator——通过持续演化的 memory 协同工作，并且把 planner 的优化直接放到多轮交互闭环里做 on-policy 训练；也就是说，系统不是先离线学一个规划器再部署，而是在活环境中边交互边修正高层决策。这个设计抓住了长时程 agent 的主要瓶颈：错误通常出在规划与验证，而不是每一步生成本身。代价是系统复杂度更高，credit assignment 也从 token 级转成模块级。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型、任务、指标和数字，所以无法复述性能提升。能确定的是，作者主张其方法在 effective planning 和 tool use 上优于现有做法；正文里最重要的证据应包括：相对 monolithic policy 的长时程增益、planner on-policy 更新的贡献、模块拆分对 sample efficiency 的影响，以及系统在新工具、新场景上的迁移是否真的更强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a scaling problem in tool-augmented reasoning: a single monolithic policy that interleaves thoughts and tool calls under full context becomes hard to optimize and generalize as horizons grow and tool diversity increases. Many agentic systems address this with modularity, but most are either training-free orchestration or offline-trained components that do not adapt inside live multi-turn interaction.","importance":"This is mainly an agent-training framework contribution, but it has practical relevance for post-training and possibly future pretraining interfaces. The main lesson is that decomposing planning, execution, verification, and generation—and optimizing the critical high-level module inside the live interaction loop—may scale better than training one giant policy end to end.","technical_approach":"AgentFlow is a trainable in-the-flow agentic system with four modules: planner, executor, verifier, and generator, coordinated through an evolving memory. The key design choice is to optimize the planner on-policy within the actual multi-turn loop instead of training it offline and freezing it before deployment. This is well targeted: in long-horizon tool use, many failures come from poor high-level control and weak verification rather than token-level generation quality. The trade-off is higher system complexity and more difficult module-level credit assignment.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide concrete model scales, tasks, metrics, or gains, so no quantitative summary can be stated reliably. LLM 里的视觉 token 压缩做得太粗，导致时空交互信息在进入语言模型前就被抹平。很多 LLaVA 系方法仍用简单 pooling 或插值处理视频 token，这对图像还勉强够用，但对视频这种时间结构很强的模态，会明显损伤动作、事件顺序和局部显著区域的表达。","importance":"这项工作的价值在于提供了一个训练免费的改进路径。对多模态预训练和部署都重要，因为它说明视觉 token 质量未必只能靠再训练来补，合理的 token selection/aggregation 设计本身就能带来收益；这对视频 MLLM 的高效扩展尤其实际。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 ST-GridPool，一个 training-free 的视觉 token 增强模块。它由两部分组成：Pyramid Temporal Gridding 通过分层时间网格提取多粒度时序交互，避免单尺度压缩丢失事件节奏；Norm-based Spatial Pooling 则利用 token norm 与信息量的相关性，保留高信息区域，减少无效背景 token。这个设计的关键在于同时处理时间和空间两个压缩瓶颈，而不是只在某一个维度做平均化；相比普通 pooling，它更偏向信息引导的选择性保留。","experiments":"摘要没有提供模型规模、视频 benchmark 名称、主要基线和具体提升数值，因此无法写出定量结果。可以确认的是，作者声称现有方法忽视复杂时空动态，而 ST-GridPool 在不训练的条件下改善 Video LLM 的视觉 token 表征；正文里最值得看的是：在哪些任务类型收益最大，例如动作理解、时序排序还是长视频 QA，以及 PTG 与 NSP 各自的独立贡献和叠加效果。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a common weakness in Video LLM pipelines: visual token compression is often too crude, so spatiotemporal interactions are already washed out before the language model sees them. Methods in the LLaVA family frequently rely on simple pooling or interpolation, which may be adequate for images but is much less suitable for video with strong temporal structure.","importance":"Its value is in offering a training-free upgrade path. That matters for both multimodal pretraining and deployment, because it shows that visual token quality is not determined only by expensive retraining; better token aggregation and selection alone can improve the representation fed into a Video LLM.","technical_approach":"The method, ST-GridPool, is a training-free visual token enhancement module with two components. Pyramid Temporal Gridding captures multi-granular temporal interactions through hierarchical temporal grids, which helps avoid losing event structure under single-scale compression. Norm-based Spatial Pooling keeps spatial regions whose token norms indicate higher information content, reducing wasted budget on less useful background tokens. The design is effective because it addresses temporal and spatial compression jointly instead of averaging them away independently.","experiments":"The abstract does not include model sizes, benchmark names, baseline systems, or exact gains, so no quantitative claims can be reproduced reliably. text-to-audio 生成缺少规模化数据基础，导致模型会生成“有声音”但不一定“关系对”的音频。现有 TTA 数据集更多覆盖单一音频事件或简单文本描述，难以系统表达“谁在前后、谁包含谁、谁因谁发生”这类关系，因此模型很难学到组合式音频语义。","importance":"这项工作更偏数据与任务设定层面。它的重要性在于把 text-to-audio 从单事件生成推进到关系建模，并且不是靠小规模人工 benchmark，而是构建可扩展的数据基础设施。对 pretrain/统一音频 LM 的启示是：音频建模如果只学事件词汇表，不学事件之间的关系结构，生成和理解都会卡在浅层匹配；而可组合的数据构造方式，可能比单纯扩大无标注音频更快地带来条件生成能力提升。","technical_approach":"核心方法不是提出一个新生成器，而是搭建一套 relation-aware TTA 研究框架。作者先构建两个数据资源：AudioEventSet，覆盖 110 个常见音频事件类别；AudioRelSet，覆盖 100 种可由文本清晰描述的关系。关键设计是把事件和关系独立建库，再通过 pair generation strategy 组合成大规模训练对，这样比直接枚举完整文本-音频样本更可扩展，也更适合研究组合泛化。这个设计有效的原因是：它把“事件识别能力”和“关系绑定能力”拆开采集，再在训练时重组，从而降低了数据采集成本并增加了关系覆盖度。代价是合成组合可能和真实世界分布存在偏差，关系是否在声学上充分可辨也会影响上限。","experiments":"摘要里能确认的数据规模信息有限，但有两个明确数字：AudioEventSet 包含 110 个事件类别，AudioRelSet 包含 100 个关系类别。论文主张这两个语料可以组合出大规模 relation-aware TTA 训练对，用于支撑规模化研究。真正关键的实验通常会包括：在 relation-sensitive 生成评测上，相比只用事件级数据训练的模型是否明显提升；关系类型、事件类型和组合难度上的泛化是否成立；以及真实录音与合成配对混合时模型是否更稳。由于摘要没有给出模型架构、参数量、评价指标和提升数字，不能判断其是否在主流 TTA benchmark 上达到 SOTA，但可以明确它的主要贡献更像“数据底座 + 任务框架”，不是单一模型刷新榜单。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a data bottleneck in relation-aware text-to-audio generation: current TTA systems can often produce plausible sounds, but they are not trained to respect structured relations between events. Existing datasets focus more on isolated audio events or simple captions, which makes compositional audio semantics hard to learn.","importance":"This is mainly a data and task-setup contribution. Its significance is that it pushes TTA research beyond single-event generation toward relation modeling, and does so with scalable dataset construction rather than a small handcrafted benchmark. For audio-language pretraining, the message is useful: learning event vocabularies alone is not enough; models also need structured supervision over relations if we want compositional generation and understanding.","technical_approach":"The main contribution is a relation-aware TTA framework built on two separate corpora. AudioEventSet covers 110 common audio event categories, while AudioRelSet defines 100 relation types that can be cleanly described in text. The key design choice is to collect events and relations independently, then combine them through a pair-generation strategy to create large-scale training pairs. This is a pragmatic choice because it scales better than collecting fully annotated relation-rich audio-text pairs from scratch and is better suited to studying compositional generalization. The trade-off is also clear: synthetic pairing may introduce distribution mismatch, and some textual relations may not be equally distinguishable in audio.","experiments":"The abstract provides only limited quantitative detail, but two numbers are explicit: 110 event categories and 100 relation types. The experimental claim is that these resources can be combined into a large-scale benchmark and training source for relation-aware TTA. The most informative evaluations should test whether models trained with this framework improve on relation-sensitive generation, whether they generalize to unseen event-relation compositions, and how robust they are when mixing synthetic pair construction with real audio. Since no model sizes, baselines, metrics, or gains are reported in the abstract, this should be read primarily as a dataset-and-benchmark paper rather than a clear SOTA model paper.","authors_note":""},"tags":["text-to-audio","audio-generation","dataset"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010148","title":"From Abstract to Contextual: What LLMs Still Cannot Do in Mathematics","authors":["Bowen Cao","Dongdong Zhang","Yixia Li","Junpeng Liu","Shijue Huang","Chufan Shi","Hongyuan Lu","Yaokang Wu","Guanhua Chen","Wai Lam","Furu Wei"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$356","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010148"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010148","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：为什么 LLM 在标准数学 benchmark 上看起来很强，但到了真实应用中的文字情境题就明显失灵。过去 AIME、MATH-500 这类数据多数把数学结构直接写在题面里，模型主要做符号推导；但现实场景常常要求先从叙述中抽取变量、约束和子问题，这一步如果做不好，后面的推理再强也用不上。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要是 benchmark 与能力拆解层面。它的重要性在于把“数学推理”进一步拆成“抽象推导能力”和“情境建模能力”，并证明后者仍是当前模型的明显短板。对 pretrain/posttrain 的启示很直接：如果训练数据主要奖励形式化解题，而很少覆盖从自然描述到数学形式的转译，模型会在真实任务中高估自己。这个结论会影响合成数学数据设计、reward 构造，以及 reasoning benchmark 的有效性判断。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出 CORE-MATH，把已有高难数学题重写成两类 contextual setting，而不是重新造一套新题。第一类是 Scenario Grounding，把抽象题嵌入真实叙事，但不增加推理复杂度，用来测模型是否能在不丢失数学核心的情况下完成问题表述映射；第二类是 Complexity Scaling，把原本显式给出的条件拆成若干子问题，更接近现实中约束隐含在上下文中的形式。这个设计有效，是因为它尽量保持数学核心不变，从而把性能下降更可信地归因到情境化和问题建模，而不是纯粹题目更难。它和常见 benchmark 扩展的区别是，不是简单加长文本，而是有针对性地操纵“从抽象到情境”的这一步。","experiments":"实验覆盖 61 个专有和开源模型，规模上已经足够看出趋势，而不是单一模型现象。摘要给出的明确结果是：在 contextual math 上性能出现显著下滑，开源模型平均下降幅度更大；虽然摘要截断没有完整数字，但至少说明这个退化是系统性的。关键对比维度应包括：原始 AIME/MATH-500 vs SG/CS 两种改写版本，不同模型家族在问题表述、约束整合和最终解题上的错误分布，以及上下文长度是否只是次要因素。没有完整数值时，最稳妥的结论是：现有 LLM 在“把现实描述转成数学问题”这一步仍不可靠，这个瓶颈并没有被现有高分 benchmark 掩盖掉。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks why LLMs that perform well on standard math benchmarks still fail in real-world mathematical settings. The answer it investigates is that benchmark math often presents the formal structure explicitly, while real applications require an additional step: extracting variables, constraints, and subproblems from natural descriptions before formal reasoning even begins.","importance":"This is mainly a benchmark and capability-dissection paper, and it is valuable because it separates abstract symbolic reasoning from contextual mathematical formulation. That distinction matters for both pretraining and post-training: if training mostly rewards formal solution execution, models can look strong on benchmark math while remaining weak at converting natural scenarios into mathematical structure. That has direct implications for synthetic data design and for how seriously we should take current math scores.","technical_approach":"The paper introduces CORE-MATH by rewriting existing AIME and MATH-500 problems into two contextual settings rather than creating unrelated new tasks. Scenario Grounding embeds an abstract math problem into a realistic narrative without increasing the underlying reasoning complexity, isolating the problem-formulation step. Complexity Scaling turns explicit conditions into subproblems, better matching how constraints appear in practice. This is a good design because it holds the mathematical core relatively fixed and attributes performance drops more cleanly to contextualization and formulation rather than simply making the problems harder in an uncontrolled way.","experiments":"The evaluation spans 61 proprietary and open-source models, which is broad enough to support a robust trend rather than a one-off result. The headline finding from the abstract is a sharp drop on contextual math, with open-source models degrading substantially on average; the exact number is truncated in the provided text. The key comparisons should be between original benchmark versions and the SG/CS rewrites, along with error analysis on constraint extraction, formulation, and final solving. Without full metrics, the safe conclusion is still strong: current LLMs remain unreliable at translating contextual descriptions into mathematical problems, even if they score highly on standard benchmark math.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reasoning","math","benchmark","generalization","evaluation"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010168","title":"Contrastive Predictive Coding Done Right for Mutual
