Attribution-Controlled Knowledge Editing for Multi-hop Factual Recall","authors":["Jiayu Yang","Yuxuan Fan","Songning Lai","Shengen Wu","Jiaqi Tang","Chun Kang","Zhijiang Guo","Yutao Yue"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$35f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010255"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010255","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：现有知识编辑方法在多跳事实召回上明显失效，尤其改动涉及推理链中的隐式中间实体时，模型经常更新不到位或连带破坏别的知识。以往方法大多把编辑看成局部事实映射替换，默认“subject→object”是静态写在少数参数里的，但多跳检索其实依赖跨层动态激活链，这正是过去方法回避掉的部分。","importance":"它的重要性在于把知识编辑从“改一个事实”推进到“改一条推理链里的归因路径”。这对 pretrain 研究的启示不是又多了一个 KE 技巧，而是说明 factual recall 在 transformer 里并非单点存储，而是由中间查询神经元和取值神经元协同完成；如果这个判断成立，后续做 continual pretrain、在线更新、模型记忆定位时都不能只盯单层局部参数。","technical_approach":"ACE 的核心做法是：先显式找出多跳召回时承担“隐式主体查询”作用的神经元，再按归因关系约束编辑这些神经元通向目标知识的激活链，而不是只改终点答案相关参数。作者的因果分析认为，隐式主体会在不同层依次触发对应的 value neurons，逐步积累到最终答案；ACE据此把编辑目标从“结果 token”扩展到“中间主体—结果”的神经级路径控制。和 ROME、MEMIT 一类参数写入法相比，它更强调跨层链式归因，一般会更复杂，但理论上更适合处理需要中间实体桥接的更新。摘要截断后缺少具体公式，因此这里能确认的是设计思想和归因控制框架，无法确定其参数更新是否仍落在 MLP value projection 一类局部模块上。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的关键实验结论是：ACE主要针对 multi-hop factual recall，并声称相对现有 KE 方法显著缓解性能衰减，尤其是在编辑涉及 implicit subjects 时更稳。摘要没有给出模型规模、数据集名称、基线名称和具体提升数字，因此不能负责任地补充。按论文叙述，最值得关注的验证应当包括：单跳不退化、多跳提升明显、邻近知识污染更小，以及对中间实体激活链的因果探针；如果这些 ablation 做扎实，这篇工作的说服力会主要来自机制证据，而不只是编辑成功率。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a specific failure mode in knowledge editing: existing methods break down on multi-hop factual recall, especially when the edit touches an implicit intermediate entity rather than the final answer slot. Prior work mostly treats editing as a local fact rewrite, but multi-hop recall is realized through a dynamic cross-layer retrieval process, which those methods largely ignore.","importance":"The contribution matters because it reframes knowledge editing from changing an isolated fact to modifying an attributed reasoning path. For pretraining researchers, the useful takeaway is not just a better KE recipe; it is the mechanistic claim that factual recall is distributed over neuron-level query–value interactions across layers. If that view is correct, continual updates and memory localization should target pathways, not only local parameter patches.","technical_approach":"ACE appears to identify neurons that act as implicit-subject query units during multi-hop recall, then edits the attributed activation chain that connects those units to the target knowledge. The key design choice is to control intermediate attribution rather than only forcing the final answer token. The causal story is that implicit subjects sequentially activate value neurons across layers, accumulating evidence toward the answer; ACE edits this chain-aware structure. Compared with methods like ROME or MEMIT, this is less of a single-site write and more of a path-level intervention, which should help when the edited fact depends on an intermediate bridge entity. The abstract is truncated, so the exact parameterization of the intervention cannot be confirmed.","experiments":"What can be stated from the abstract is limited but clear: ACE is evaluated on multi-hop factual recall and is claimed to reduce the large degradation seen in prior KE methods, with particular gains when edits involve implicit subjects. The abstract does not provide model sizes, datasets, baselines, or numerical margins, so those should not be invented. The most important evidence to look for in the full paper would be: strong gains on multi-hop editing, minimal regression on single-hop cases, less collateral damage to neighboring facts, and causal probes showing that the edited neuron pathway actually changes in the intended way.","authors_note":""},"tags":["knowledge-editing","multi-hop-reasoning","causal-analysis"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010257","title":"$$p\\textrm{-less}$ Sampling: A Robust Hyperparameter-Free Approach for LLM Decoding","authors":["Runyan Tan","Shuang Wu","Phillip Howard"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$360","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010257"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010257","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：LLM 采样解码强依赖 top-p、min-p 之类阈值超参，而这些超参对任务、温度和模型都很敏感，导致同一个模型很难用一套默认配置稳定输出高质量结果。过去的做法是不断调阈值，或者接受某些温度下质量明显波动，但这在通用部署里成本很高。","importance":"它的贡献量级更偏方法级和系统级，而不是范式级。重要之处在于，如果一个无超参的截断采样法能在不同温度下稳定工作，它会直接降低 serving 和评测中的调参负担，也让不同模型、不同任务间的 decoding 比较更公平；对 pretrain 本身没有改变训练目标，但会影响我们如何判断模型真实能力，而不是把一部分差异混在解码技巧里。","technical_approach":"p-less sampling 的核心思想是：不用手工指定概率质量阈值，而是基于当前完整 token 分布的信息论结构，动态决定每一步该截断到哪里。它本质上仍是 truncation sampling，但把外部给定的 p 变成了由分布自适应推导出的阈值。这样设计的原因很直接：固定 p 只看累计质量，不看分布形状；当分布很尖或很平时，同样的 p 会过度保守或过度放开。p-less 试图让阈值随熵、尾部形状等分布特征变化，因此在温度升高时不容易像 top-p 那样突然纳入太多低质尾部 token。代价是它需要读取全分布统计，且效果依赖这些统计是否足够稳定地刻画“可采样边界”。","experiments":"摘要给出的关键结论是：p-less 在温度升高时仍能持续产出高质量输出，而且不需要任何超参数。摘要没有给出使用的模型规模、评测任务、对比基线以及具体数值，因此不能补数字。按这类工作通常的判断标准，最有价值的实验应是与 top-k、top-p、typical sampling、min-p 在多个温度和任务上的横向对比，并报告一套固定配置跨任务的稳健性；如果论文还展示了分布形状变化时的案例分析，那会比单纯的平均分更能说明它为什么有效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical but persistent issue in LLM decoding: sampling quality depends heavily on hand-tuned thresholds such as top-p, and those settings vary across tasks, temperatures, and models. The standard workaround is more tuning, but that makes deployment brittle and evaluation noisy.","importance":"This is mainly a method and systems contribution rather than a new modeling paradigm. Its value is straightforward: if a hyperparameter-free truncation rule is robust across temperatures, it reduces decoding tuning cost and makes model comparisons less confounded by sampler choice. It does not change pretraining, but it changes how reliably we can expose model quality at inference time.","technical_approach":"p-less sampling keeps the truncation-sampling template but replaces the user-chosen cutoff with a threshold derived from the full token distribution at each step. The motivation is that a fixed probability mass cutoff ignores distribution shape: the same top-p can be too conservative for sharp distributions and too permissive for flat ones. By adapting the truncation boundary to information-theoretic properties of the full distribution, p-less aims to stay selective when temperature rises instead of admitting too much low-quality tail mass. The trade-off is that it relies on full-distribution statistics and on those statistics being a good proxy for the right support set.","experiments":"The abstract makes one main empirical claim: p-less is hyperparameter-free and remains high quality as temperature increases. It does not report model sizes, datasets, baselines, or exact margins, so those should be treated as unavailable. The most informative experiments in the full paper would be broad comparisons against top-k, top-p, min-p, and typical sampling across multiple tasks and temperatures, with emphasis on one-setting-across-many-tasks robustness rather than best-case tuning.","authors_note":""},"tags":["decoding","sampling","hyperparameter-free"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010265","title":"Towards Scalable Oversight via Partitioned Human Supervision","authors":["Ren Yin","Takashi Ishida","Masashi Sugiyama"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$361","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010265"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010265","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：当 AI 任务跨越多个高专业领域、单个人类专家无法给出完整正确答案时，怎样仍然从人类获得可扩展监督。传统监督默认人能判断“哪个是对的”，但在超人任务上更现实的信号往往是“这个选项肯定不对”，也就是局部、补充性的负标签。","importance":"这项工作属于监督范式设计，和对齐、评估、RL 奖励建模直接相关。它的重要性在于把人类监督从完整标签放宽到 partitioned supervision：不同专家只需排除自己领域内错误选项，就可能拼出比单专家更强的监督。这对 posttrain 很直接，对 pretrain 的间接启示是：高质量训练信号未必非要是全标签，弱但结构化的互补信号也可以成为可扩展数据管道的一部分。","technical_approach":"核心方法是分区式人类监督：将复杂任务拆成由不同狭义专家可局部判错的结构，然后把这些 complementary labels 汇总成可用于评估或训练的信号。它不是依赖每位标注者给正解，而是利用“谁能排除什么”来逐步收缩候选集合。这样设计的原因很实际：在超人任务里，完整答案不可得，但局部否定判断常常便宜且可靠。关键挑战在于如何聚合互补标签，避免因专家覆盖不均、标签噪声或错误排除而放大偏差；摘要里没有给出具体聚合算法，因此这里只能确认问题设定和总体框架。","experiments":"摘要没有提供具体实验数字，但从任务设定看，关键实验应当围绕多领域任务，比较完整监督、单专家监督和 partitioned supervision 的效果差异，并测量在专家各自只掌握局部知识时，最终决策或训练信号还能保留多少质量。若论文做得扎实，还应报告对专家覆盖度、互补标签噪声、领域数量的敏感性，因为这些因素决定方案是否真的可扩展。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real oversight bottleneck: on tasks that span multiple expert domains, no single human can reliably provide the correct answer, so standard full-label supervision breaks down. In many such cases, humans can still provide a weaker but useful signal by ruling out options within their own area of expertise.","importance":"This is a supervision-design contribution with direct relevance to alignment, evaluation, and reward construction. Its importance is that it relaxes the assumption that scalable supervision requires full positive labels. If complementary negative judgments from narrow experts can be combined effectively, that opens a more realistic path for supervising systems on tasks beyond any one human’s expertise. The lesson for pretraining is indirect but relevant: structured weak signals may be a viable data source when full labels are unavailable.","technical_approach":"The proposed idea is partitioned human supervision. Instead of asking each annotator to identify the correct answer, the framework asks domain experts to eliminate options they know are wrong, then aggregates these complementary labels into a supervision signal for evaluation or training. The design is appealing because negative expertise is often easier to obtain than complete correctness on superhuman tasks. The hard part is aggregation: the method must be robust to uneven domain coverage, noisy eliminations, and the possibility that a mistaken exclusion removes the right answer. The abstract does not specify the exact aggregation algorithm, so only the high-level framework can be summarized confidently.","experiments":"The abstract provides no quantitative details. The decisive experiments should compare partitioned supervision against full supervision and single-expert baselines on tasks that require multiple domains, and should measure how much useful supervision survives when each expert only knows a slice of the problem. Sensitivity analyses for expert coverage, label noise, and number of domains would be especially important because those determine whether the framework is actually scalable.","authors_note":""},"tags":["scalable-oversight","human-supervision","alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010282","title":"Stronger-MAS: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Collaborative LLMs","authors":["Yujie Zhao","Lanxiang Hu","Yang Wang","Minmin Hou","Hao Zhang","Ke Ding","Jishen Zhao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$362","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010282"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010282","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：多智能体 LLM 系统虽然常靠角色分工提升复杂任务能力，但现有 on-policy RL，尤其 GRPO 一类方法，默认同组样本共享 prompt 分布，这在多角色多轮对话里不成立，导致算法和训练系统都难直接套用。过去大家更多是把 MAS 当推理编排，而不是一个可稳定做 RL 的联合策略系统。","importance":"它的重要性在于把 MAS 从“静态 orchestration”推进到“可 on-policy 优化的协作策略”。这主要是 posttrain 方法贡献，但对 agentic pretrain/posttrain 接口也有价值，因为它明确指出多角色、多轮工作流需要新的 credit assignment 和 rollout 基础设施，不能把单智能体 RL 直接平移过去。","technical_approach":"论文提出 AT-GRPO，核心是针对 MAS 场景重写 GRPO 的分组与训练单位，使其能在 agent 维度和 turn 维度上处理不同 prompt、不同角色的轨迹。摘要明确指出两类挑战：算法上，标准 GRPO 的 grouping 假设失效；系统上，需要支持基于 MAS workflow 的 rollout，以及单/多 policy 模式下的 on-policy 更新。AT-GRPO 因此应包含 agent- and turn-wise 的相对优势构造，以及与工作流耦合的训练系统。和把整个 MAS 当单一大 agent 相比，这种设计更细粒度，理论上更适合分配信用，但复杂度和稳定性也更难控制。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体数字，但它清楚表明：作者不仅提出算法，还实现了支持 MAS rollout 与更新的训练系统，并将其用于 collaborative LLMs。完整论文最值得看的实验是：与单智能体 RL、静态 MAS orchestration、以及直接套用标准 GRPO 的比较；在单 policy 与多 policy 设置下的差异；以及 agent 数量、对话轮数增加时训练是否仍稳定。由于缺少任务集和结果数字，这里不能补充 SOTA 结论。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real gap in multi-agent LLM training: role-based multi-agent systems often improve task performance, and on-policy RL works well for single agents, but standard methods such as GRPO assume grouped samples share the same prompt structure. That assumption breaks in multi-role, multi-turn workflows, so existing RL recipes do not transfer cleanly.","importance":"This is an important post-training contribution for collaborative LLM systems. Its value is that it treats MAS not just as an inference-time orchestration pattern, but as a policy class that should be optimized on-policy. The broader lesson is relevant to agentic pretrain–posttrain interfaces: once behavior is distributed across roles and turns, credit assignment and rollout infrastructure need to be redesigned rather than inherited from single-agent RL.","technical_approach":"The paper introduces AT-GRPO, which adapts GRPO-style optimization to the agent and turn structure of multi-agent workflows. The abstract highlights two challenges: algorithmically, standard grouping assumptions fail because prompts differ by role and dialogue turn; system-wise, the trainer must support MAS-workflow rollouts and on-policy updates for either a shared policy or multiple policies. The likely core idea is agent-wise and turn-wise relative advantage construction aligned with the workflow. Compared with collapsing the whole system into one giant agent, this is a more faithful but also more complex way to assign credit.","experiments":"The abstract does not include quantitative results, but it does make clear that the work includes both an algorithm and a training system capable of MAS rollouts and on-policy updates. The most informative experiments in the full paper would compare AT-GRPO against single-agent RL, static MAS orchestration, and naive use of standard GRPO, while also testing shared-policy versus multi-policy settings and stability as the number of agents and turns grows. Multimodal Coverage Maximization for Efficient Inference of VLMs","authors":["Sixun Dong","Juhua Hu","Mian Zhang","Ming Yin","Yanjie Fu","Qi Qian"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$36d","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010447"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010447","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 VLM 推理阶段 vision token 过多、冗余高、导致延迟和算力成本恶化的问题。已有 token pruning 方法大多只看图像侧或文本侧单模态信号，因此容易删掉对跨模态对齐真正重要的视觉 token；同时不同方法的打分准则往往绑定具体架构，泛化性有限。","importance":"结论上，这是一个偏推理效率的系统级方法，但它对多模态预训练和统一建模也有启示：视觉 token 的价值本来就是相对于文本需求定义的，而不是图像内部自洽定义的。它的重要性不在于再做一个 heuristic pruning，而在于提出一个更通用的多模态选择准则——coverage maximization，强调 token 保留应服务于跨模态覆盖。如果这一准则稳定有效，它可以成为 VLM inference compression 的通用接口，而不是某个 backbone 的特化技巧。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 MMTok：用图像 token 和文本 token 的联合覆盖关系来选择应保留的视觉 token。作者把 token 子集选择形式化为 maximum coverage 问题，目标不是保留视觉上最显著的 patch，而是保留能最大程度覆盖多模态信息需求的少量视觉 token。相比只依据视觉 attention、文本 relevance 或中间层激活阈值来剪枝，MMTok 的设计更贴近 VLM 真正的推理目标，因为用户问题会决定哪些局部视觉证据有价值。这样的设计通常能在相同 token budget 下保留更多 task-relevant 信息，代价是需要显式建模跨模态关联。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验事实是：MMTok 在减少 vision token 数的同时，提升了 VLM 推理效率，并且方法强调适用于不同模态和不同模型的通用准则。作者将其定位为一种比单模态剪枝更有效的 token selection 方案，但摘要未提供具体模型、token 压缩比、吞吐/延迟改善幅度、精度保持率或基线名称，因此无法写出定量结果。可以明确的是，论文的关键卖点是同样压缩率下更好的多模态信息保留，而不是单纯激进降 token。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a common VLM inference bottleneck: too many visual tokens, much of them redundant, causing poor latency and compute efficiency. Existing pruning methods mostly rely on unimodal signals from either vision or text, which means they often remove tokens that are unimportant visually but critical for the cross-modal task. Their scoring rules are also often tied to a specific architecture.","importance":"This is mainly an inference-efficiency contribution, but it also carries a useful pretraining lesson: the value of a visual token is defined relative to the language query, not only by image-side salience. The key contribution is not just another pruning heuristic, but a more principled multimodal criterion based on coverage maximization. If robust, that gives VLM token compression a reusable interface that is less model-specific than many current approaches.","technical_approach":"The method, MMTok, selects visual tokens using a joint coverage criterion over vision and text tokens. The subset selection problem is formulated as maximum coverage: keep the smallest set of visual tokens that covers the most multimodal information. This differs from pruning based only on visual attention, text relevance, or activation magnitude. The design is sensible because VLMs do not need the visually most salient patches in general; they need the patches that best support the current language-conditioned inference. The trade-off is that one must explicitly estimate cross-modal associations rather than score visual tokens in isolation.","experiments":"The abstract supports the claim that MMTok reduces the number of visual tokens while improving VLM inference efficiency, and that the criterion is intended to generalize across modalities and models. The authors position it as more effective than unimodal pruning at preserving task-relevant information under compression. Standard training usually relies on outcome rewards tied to the final answer, which gives too little control over the many small retrieval decisions made along the way.","importance":"This is a concrete and useful post-training contribution. Its main value is shifting optimization from merely getting the answer right to getting the retrieval process right and efficient. That matters for the pretrain-to-posttrain interface as well: once deciding whether to search, how much to search, and when to stop becomes a core capability, final-answer supervision alone is too weak. In deployment terms, this directly affects latency, tool cost, and reliability.","technical_approach":"The method, HiPRAG, introduces hierarchical process rewards within an RL framework for agentic RAG. Instead of rewarding only final success, it provides structured intermediate rewards over retrieval behavior, explicitly targeting over-search and under-search. This is well motivated because retrieval is a sequential control problem, not a single action. Without process-level feedback, policies can easily learn cheap local shortcuts, such as always searching more than needed or skipping useful retrieval to save steps. The hierarchical design aims to shape both high-level search timing and low-level retrieval quality.","experiments":"The abstract makes the main claim that HiPRAG reduces both over-search and under-search, improving efficiency and output reliability relative to outcome-reward-only RL training. The primary baseline class is therefore standard outcome-based reward optimization. The abstract does not provide model names, environments, benchmarks, success rates, retrieval cost reductions, or exact gains, so no quantitative summary can be given reliably. What is clear is that the paper optimizes the accuracy-cost trade-off rather than raw answer accuracy alone.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rag","process-reward","agent","retrieval","rl"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010457","title":"Zero-Overhead Introspection for Adaptive Test-Time Compute","authors":["Rohin Manvi","Joey Hong","Tim Seyde","Maxime Labonne","Mathias Lechner","Sergey Levine"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$36f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010457"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010457","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 test-time scaling 缺少廉价自我评估信号的问题。当前 Best-of-N、self-consistency 这类方法默认用固定采样预算，不管题目难不难、当前解答是否已经足够好，都会继续花算力；而外接 verifier 虽然能给置信度，但会引入额外模型、训练和推理开销。","importance":"结论上，这是一个很实用的方法级工作，因为它瞄准的是 adaptive test-time compute 的核心瓶颈：没有低成本 introspection，就无法按需分配推理预算。它对 pretrain/post-train 的启发在于，模型内部可能已经含有可直接读出的成功概率或不确定性信号，只是我们过去习惯额外训练 reward model 或 verifier。如果这种 zero-overhead introspection 有效，那么部署侧的成本-性能曲线会比固定预算采样更好。","technical_approach":"核心方法是从模型自身生成过程中提取 introspection 信号，用于决定是否继续思考、重试、停止或报告失败，而且不额外引入推理开销。与 learned verifier 路线不同，它不依赖外部辅助模型；与固定 N 次采样不同，它把 test-time compute 变成按样本自适应的策略问题。方法的关键价值在于“zero-overhead”：只有在额外控制信号几乎免费时，动态预算分配才真正值得。虽然摘要未展开具体实现，但可以推断作者利用的是生成轨迹中已有的内部统计或表征，而非新模型分支。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是：该方法能让 LLM 更好地做元认知决策，包括判断成功概率、决定投入多少计算、何时多次尝试以及何时停止，从而优于固定预算的 test-time scaling。论文的主要比较对象应包括 Best-of-N、self-consistency 或基于 verifier 的方案。由于摘要未提供模型规模、任务、延迟成本、准确率提升和预算节省的具体数字，无法给出定量结果；但论文的核心卖点非常明确：在不增加额外推理开销的前提下做自适应算力分配。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a central weakness of test-time scaling: models lack a cheap introspection signal for deciding how much computation to spend. Methods like Best-of-N and self-consistency use fixed budgets regardless of instance difficulty or current solution quality. External verifiers can estimate confidence, but they add training complexity and inference cost.","importance":"This is a practical method contribution because it attacks the main bottleneck in adaptive test-time compute: without low-cost introspection, compute cannot be allocated intelligently. The broader implication for pretraining and post-training is that useful confidence or success signals may already exist inside the model and can potentially be read out directly, instead of always training separate reward models or verifiers. If that works, deployment can achieve a better cost-quality frontier than fixed-budget sampling.","technical_approach":"The method extracts introspective signals from the model’s own generation process to decide whether to keep reasoning, make another attempt, stop, or report failure, all without extra inference overhead. This distinguishes it from learned-verifier approaches, which depend on auxiliary models, and from fixed-N sampling, which ignores instance-specific value of additional compute. The key design principle is zero overhead: adaptive budgeting is only compelling if the control signal is nearly free. The abstract does not expose the exact mechanism, but it strongly suggests the method reads existing internal statistics or representations rather than adding a new heavy branch.","experiments":"The abstract supports the claim that the method improves meta-cognitive decisions such as anticipating success, choosing how much compute to spend, deciding when to retry, and when to stop, thereby outperforming fixed-budget test-time scaling strategies. The likely comparison points include Best-of-N, self-consistency, and verifier-based methods. However, the abstract gives no model sizes, benchmarks, latency costs, accuracy gains, or budget savings, so the effect cannot be quantified here. The core empirical promise is adaptive compute without added inference cost.","authors_note":""},"tags":["test-time-compute","introspection","adaptive-inference"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010471","title":"LLMs Struggle to Balance Reasoning and World Knowledge in Causal Narrative Understanding","authors":["Khurram Yamin","Shantanu Gupta","Gaurav Ghosal","Zachary Lipton","Bryan Wilder"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$370","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010471"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010471","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 LLM 在叙事因果理解中无法稳定平衡“抽象推理”和“世界知识”两种信息源的问题。模型常见的失败方式有两类：一类是偷懒用事件先后顺序当因果，另一类是直接调用记忆中的常识模板而忽略当前上下文。过去很多 benchmark 混杂了这两种能力，因此模型看起来能做因果推断，但未必真的在做稳健的 causal reasoning。","importance":"结论上，这是一篇能力评测与诊断工作，不是新模型，但对 reasoning data 和评估设计很重要。它的启示是：如果 benchmark 不能把世界知识和逻辑推理 disentangle，模型可能通过启发式拿高分，我们却误判其因果理解能力。对 pretrain/post-train 而言，这意味着未来若想提升真实推理，不能只多喂 CoT 或更多常识数据，还要设计让模型学会何时依赖知识、何时抑制知识偏置的训练信号。","technical_approach":"核心方法是通过 synthetic、semi-synthetic 和 real-world 三类设置，系统考察模型在叙事因果推断里如何权衡知识与推理。作者不是简单报告准确率，而是构造受控实验来隔离不同启发式，例如事件顺序偏置和背景知识偏置，并进一步研究任务表述改写是否能诱导更稳健的推理策略。相比直接追求更难 benchmark，这种设计更有诊断性，因为它能告诉你模型答对是靠什么答对，答错又错在什么依赖上。","experiments":"摘要明确给出的实验事实是：SOTA LLM 在 synthetic、semi-synthetic 和真实叙事数据上都经常依赖表层启发式，具体表现为把事件顺序误当因果，或过度依赖记忆中的世界知识而忽略上下文；同时，简单的任务重表述就能诱发更稳健的推理行为。摘要没有给出所评测的具体模型、数据集规模、准确率差值和 reformulation 带来的提升数字，因此无法做定量总结。可以确认的价值点是，这篇论文证明了提示形式本身会显著改变知识与推理的权衡方式。","authors_note":"作者中包括 Zachary Lipton。其代表性工作集中在可靠机器学习、时间序列、NLP 与模型评估。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a specific weakness in narrative causal understanding: LLMs struggle to balance abstract reasoning with world knowledge. Their failures often follow two shortcuts. They infer causality from temporal order, or they retrieve memorized commonsense patterns without respecting the actual context. Many existing evaluations blur these two abilities, so strong benchmark performance does not necessarily mean robust causal reasoning.","importance":"This is a diagnosis and evaluation paper rather than a new model, but it matters for reasoning data and benchmark design. The main lesson is that if world knowledge and logical reasoning are not disentangled, models can score well through heuristics and we may overestimate their causal understanding. For pretraining and post-training, that suggests simply adding more chain-of-thought or more knowledge data is unlikely to solve the problem; training signals must also teach when to rely on knowledge and when to suppress it.","technical_approach":"The approach is to study the interaction between knowledge and reasoning through controlled synthetic, semi-synthetic, and real-world narrative tasks. Instead of reporting accuracy alone, the paper designs settings that isolate specific shortcuts such as event-order bias and background-knowledge bias, then tests whether simple task reformulations induce more robust reasoning. This is more diagnostic than simply building a harder benchmark, because it reveals not only whether the model is correct, but how it got there and which dependency failed when it was wrong.","experiments":"The abstract makes three clear empirical claims. First, state-of-the-art LLMs rely heavily on superficial heuristics across synthetic, semi-synthetic, and real-world narrative settings. Second, the two main shortcuts are temporal-order-as-causality and memorized world knowledge overriding context. Third, simple reformulations of the task can elicit more robust reasoning behavior. The abstract does not list model names, dataset sizes, exact accuracies, or gains from reformulation, so a quantitative summary is not possible here. A key takeaway is that prompt format itself strongly shifts the balance between reasoning and knowledge use.","authors_note":"The author list includes Zachary Lipton, whose representative work spans reliable machine learning, time series, NLP, and evaluation."},"tags":["causal-reasoning","world-knowledge","llm-evaluation"],"notable_authors":["Zachary Harandi"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$378","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010629"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010629","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["vlm","modality-alignment","hierarchy","representation"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010632","title":"Safety at One Shot: Patching Fine-Tuned LLMs with A Single Instance","authors":["Jiawen Zhang","Lipeng He","Kejia Chen","Jian Lou","Jian Liu","Xiaohu Yang","Ruoxi Jia"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Fine-tuning safety-aligned large language models (LLMs) can substantially compromise their safety. Previous approaches require many safety samples or calibration sets, which not only incur significant computational overhead during realignment but also lead to noticeable degradation in model utility. Contrary to this belief, we show that safety alignment can be fully recovered with only a single safety example, without sacrificing utility and at minimal cost. Remarkably, this recovery is effective regardless of the number of harmful examples used in fine-tuning or the size of the underlying model, and convergence is achieved within just a few epochs. Furthermore, we uncover the low-rank structure of the safety gradient, which explains why such efficient correction is possible. We validate our findings across five safety-aligned LLMs and multiple datasets, demonstrating the generality of our approach. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010632"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010632","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：安全对齐过的大模型在后续任务微调后经常明显失去安全性，而现有修复方法通常要额外收集不少安全样本并重新校准，成本高且容易伤到原有能力。作者挑战了“安全回补必须靠较多数据”的默认假设，主张只用单个安全样本就能把安全性基本补回来，这个问题之所以值得重看，是因为现实里模型常常频繁做 domain finetune，低成本 safety patching 比重新对齐更实用。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在方法级和训练机理级。方法级上，它把安全回补的样本复杂度压到几乎极限，意味着 post-train 安全修复可能比行业常识便宜一个数量级。机理级上，它给出“安全梯度具有低秩结构”的解释，这对理解安全能力在参数空间中的可修复性有直接启发：如果安全更新确实集中在少数方向，那么很多安全退化可能不是全面遗忘，而是被少数有害梯度方向覆盖。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个极简的单样本安全补丁微调，而不是重新做一轮完整安全训练。作者的关键判断是：破坏安全性的下游微调虽然可能用了很多有害样本，但把模型拉回安全区所需的梯度方向很集中，因此一个安全示例就足以提供有效校正信号。和以往依赖安全数据集、校准集或额外正则的方法不同，这里没有强调复杂目标函数，而是强调安全梯度的低秩性与快速收敛。这样的设计之所以可能有效，是因为它不试图重学完整安全边界，而是在参数空间里做方向性纠偏；边界也很清楚：如果任务微调改坏的不只是安全表层行为，而是深层能力分布或 reward preference，被单样本修复的上限可能有限。","experiments":"摘要里给出的关键事实是：该方法对不同模型规模都有效，对不同数量的有害微调样本都有效，而且只需几个 epoch 就能收敛，同时不会牺牲 utility。论文还声称在多个开源 LLM 上验证了这一点，但摘要没有提供具体模型名、参数量、数据规模和精确提升数字，因此目前能确认的是结论方向而不是量化幅度。最有价值的实验观察不是绝对分数，而是鲁棒性：修复效果对底座大小和有害微调强度都不敏感，这与“安全梯度低秩”这一解释是相互支撑的。如果正文给出梯度谱或 rank ablation，这会是判断其机理是否站得住的关键证据。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical failure mode: a safety-aligned LLM can lose much of its safety after downstream fine-tuning, and existing repair methods usually need many safety examples or calibration data. The authors argue this is overkill. They claim safety can be largely restored with a single safety instance, which matters because real systems are frequently re-tuned and need cheap post-hoc safety patching rather than full realignment.","importance":"The contribution is methodological and mechanistic. Methodologically, it suggests the sample complexity of safety repair may be far lower than commonly assumed. Mechanistically, the paper attributes this to a low-rank structure in the safety gradient, implying that safety degradation may often come from a small number of harmful update directions rather than broad erasure of aligned behavior. That is a useful lens for the pretrain–posttrain interface.","technical_approach":"The method is a minimal safety patch: fine-tune the already damaged model on a single safety example instead of running a full safety re-alignment pipeline. The key design claim is that the corrective direction for safety is highly concentrated, so one example provides enough gradient signal to steer parameters back. This differs from prior work that relies on larger safety sets, calibration data, or more elaborate objectives. The design is plausible because it aims to undo a directional drift rather than relearn the full safety frontier. The obvious boundary is that if downstream tuning changed deeper preference structure or task behavior more broadly, a one-shot patch may not be enough.","experiments":"From the abstract, the main empirical claim is robustness: the repair works across model sizes, across different amounts of harmful fine-tuning data, and converges within a few epochs without hurting utility. The abstract does not provide model names, parameter counts, dataset sizes, or exact gains, so the current takeaway is directional rather than fully quantitative. The most interesting result is not raw score improvement but invariance to scale and damage severity, which is consistent with the low-rank gradient hypothesis. Gradient spectrum or rank ablations would be the key evidence to inspect in the full paper.","authors_note":""},"tags":["safety","fine-tuning","alignment","patching"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010651","title":"Learning to Weight Parameters for Training Data Attribution","authors":["Shuangqi Li","Hieu Le","Jingyi Xu","Mathieu Salzmann"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"We study gradient-based data attribution, aiming to identify which training examples most influence a given output. Existing methods for this task either treat network parameters uniformly or rely on implicit weighting derived from Hessian approximations, which do not fully model functional heterogeneity of network parameters. To address this, we propose a method to explicitly learn parameter importance weights directly from data, without requiring annotated labels. Our approach improves attribution accuracy across diverse tasks, including image classification, language modeling, and diffusion, and enables fine-grained attribution for concepts like subject and style. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010651"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010651","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：基于梯度的训练数据归因方法通常默认不同参数的重要性相同，或者把参数权重交给 Hessian 近似隐式决定，但这两种做法都没有真正建模网络参数在功能上的异质性。结果就是，归因分数常常混杂噪声，难以准确回答“哪个训练样本真正影响了这个输出”。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是方法级的，但覆盖面广，因为数据归因同时影响数据清洗、污染追踪、知识溯源和版权/删除请求等多个问题。对 pretrain 研究尤其相关：当我们想知道模型从哪里学到某条知识、某种风格或某种错误时，归因精度是基础能力。如果能把参数层面的作用权重学出来，而不是一视同仁，很多 token-level 或 sample-level 结论会更可信。","technical_approach":"核心方法是显式学习参数重要性权重，用它重新加权梯度式数据归因，而不是依赖统一参数权重或 Hessian 的间接近似。作者强调这一学习过程不需要额外人工标注，这意味着他们是在数据自身结构或模型行为一致性上学习哪些参数更该被信任。和传统 influence-function 风格方法相比，区别不在于是否看梯度，而在于承认“相同大小的梯度落在不同参数上，功能意义并不相同”。这种设计之所以合理，是因为网络中的参数确实承担不同角色：有的更像局部特征提取器，有的更接近任务读出层。边界在于，若学习出的参数权重过度依赖特定任务或层分布，跨模型和跨任务泛化可能受限。","experiments":"摘要明确说该方法在图像分类、语言建模和 diffusion 上都提高了归因准确率，并且能做 subject 和 style 这类更细粒度概念的归因。这说明方法不局限于单一模态，也不是只对分类标签有效。不过摘要没有给出具体模型规模、数据集、baseline 名称和提升数字，因此暂时还无法判断增益幅度与计算代价。最值得看的实验会是：相对哪些梯度归因 baseline 提升多少；参数权重是全局学习还是样本条件化；以及在语言建模里是否真能更准确追到知识来源，而不是只提高相似样本检索的表面指标。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a weakness in gradient-based training data attribution: most methods either treat all parameters equally or rely on parameter weighting only indirectly through Hessian approximations. Both choices ignore the fact that different parameters play different functional roles, which can blur attribution and make it harder to identify which training examples truly influenced a prediction.","importance":"This is a methods contribution with broad relevance. Better attribution matters for data curation, contamination analysis, provenance tracking, unlearning, and understanding where specific capabilities or errors come from. For pretraining research, that is directly useful: if parameter heterogeneity is real, then attribution that ignores it is likely leaving signal on the table.","technical_approach":"The main idea is to explicitly learn parameter importance weights and use them to reweight gradient-based attribution, instead of assuming uniform parameter importance or inheriting weights from Hessian-based approximations. The authors emphasize that the weights are learned without annotated labels, which suggests they are inferred from data structure or model consistency rather than supervised relevance signals. The design makes sense because a gradient on one parameter is not functionally equivalent to the same gradient magnitude on another. Some parameters act as reusable feature detectors, others as narrow readout pathways. The main question is how well the learned weighting transfers across tasks, architectures, and layers.","experiments":"The abstract claims improved attribution accuracy across image classification, language modeling, and diffusion, and says the method supports fine-grained attribution of concepts such as subject and style. That indicates it is not tied to a single modality or a simple classification setting. However, the abstract does not provide model sizes, datasets, baselines, or exact gains, so the practical magnitude remains unclear. The key evidence to inspect is how large the gains are over standard gradient-based baselines, whether the learned parameter weights are global or input-conditional, and whether improvements in language modeling reflect real provenance recovery rather than better nearest-neighbor retrieval.","authors_note":""},"tags":["data-attribution","training-data","gradients","influence"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010658","title":"ZeroTuning: Unlocking the Initial Token's Power to Enhance Large Language Models Without Training","authors":["Feijiang Han","Xiaodong Yu","Jianheng Tang","Delip Rao","Weihua Du","Lyle Ungar"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$379","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010658"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010658","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：已有 training-free 的 attention intervention 方法虽然能改善冻结 LLM，但通常需要先识别任务相关的重要 token，这一步依赖启发式，容易带偏，而且在高性能 kernel 下还可能拿不到完整 attention map。作者提出一个更极端的简化：不找关键 token，只调初始 token。","importance":"这项工作属于推理时控制与训练后轻量干预的方法级贡献。它的重要性在于，如果只改初始 token 的 attention logit 就能稳定影响后续注意力分布，那么很多复杂的 token 级 steering 方法都可以被更简单、更 kernel-friendly 的方案替代。对大模型研究的启发是，某些全局控制并不需要细粒度定位，利用 Transformer 中天然的 attention sink 结构就足够。","technical_approach":"核心方法 ZeroTuning 是一种无训练干预：只对初始 token（例如 LLaMA 中的首 token）添加轻量 attention bias，以此系统性地改变后续 token 的注意力模式。作者的理论论点是，初始 token 天生就有 attention sink 的角色，很多位置都会给它分配一定注意力，所以对它的 logit 做小改动能被层层放大并重塑全局注意力。和 PASTA、ACT 这类方法相比，区别在于它不需要借助启发式先找“重要 token”，因此更简洁，也避免了因任务特异 token 选择错误而导致的偏差。代价是控制粒度会更粗，适合做全局偏置修正，不一定适合需要精准定位局部证据的任务。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型、任务和数字，但明确声称该方法在理论上解释了为何只调初始 token 就足以改变下游注意力，并在实验上验证其有效。最关键的实证问题会是：它相对 PASTA、ACT 等 baseline 的收益差距有多大；是否在无法访问完整 attention map 的优化 kernel 下仍保留优势；以及这种单点干预是否会带来副作用，比如某些任务收益而另一些任务退化。如果正文包含跨层干预强度、不同位置 token 对比和 attention sink 强度的 ablation，就能更清楚判断这是不是普适机制还是只对特定模型有效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper revisits training-free attention interventions for frozen LLMs and argues that existing methods are more complicated than necessary. Methods like PASTA and ACT first identify task-important tokens using heuristics, which can introduce bias and are awkward when optimized kernels do not expose attention maps. The authors propose a much simpler alternative: intervene only on the initial token.","importance":"This is a lightweight inference-time control paper, but it is interesting because it suggests some global steering effects do not require token-level importance estimation at all. If manipulating the initial token consistently reshapes downstream attention, then a simpler and more deployment-friendly intervention can replace more brittle token-selection pipelines. The broader lesson is that transformer attention already has structural asymmetries that can be exploited.","technical_approach":"ZeroTuning adds small biases to the attention logits of the initial token and relies on its natural role as an attention sink to propagate that intervention through later layers and positions. The theoretical claim is that a small perturbation at this privileged token can systematically shift downstream attention patterns. This differs from prior methods that require identifying important task tokens and then steering attention toward or away from them. The design is appealing because it removes the token-selection heuristic entirely and works even when direct access to detailed attention maps is limited. The trade-off is granularity: this is a coarse global control mechanism, not a precise way to target local evidence.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model names, tasks, or exact numbers, but it claims both a theoretical explanation and empirical validation. The key empirical questions are how it compares with PASTA and ACT, whether it still works under optimized kernels where standard attention-based interventions become inconvenient, and whether the global intervention helps broadly or creates task-specific regressions. Ablations on intervention strength, token position, and attention-sink behavior will be important for assessing how general the mechanism really is.","authors_note":""},"tags":["attention","training-free","token-level","intervention"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010673","title":"Context parroting: A simple but tough-to-beat baseline for foundation models in scientific machine learning","authors":["Yuanzhao Zhang","William Gilpin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$37a","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010673"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010673","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"时间序列基础模型在零样本预测物理系统时，其预测能力到底来自哪里？作者发现这些模型大量依赖一种简单的'上下文复读'策略——直接从输入上下文中复制模式，而非真正学到了动力学规律。","importance":"对 pretrain 研究的启示是间接但有价值的：它揭示了基础模型在分布外泛化时的一个通病——看似强大的零样本能力可能只是模式匹配。这个发现对评估任何基础模型（包括 LLM）的泛化能力都有警示意义。贡献类型是 benchmark/分析级。","technical_approach":"作者构建了一个极其简单的 baseline——context parroting model，它直接从输入上下文中复制片段作为预测。然后在低维混沌、湍流、耦合振子、心电图等多种动力系统上，与主流时间序列基础模型对比。当基础模型不在复读时，它们倾向于退化到均值回归。","experiments":"Context parroting 这个朴素 baseline 在多种动力系统预测任务上超过了领先的时间序列基础模型，且计算成本只是后者的极小比例。这说明这些基础模型的零样本预测能力被严重高估了。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Time-series foundation models appear strong at zero-shot forecasting of physical systems, but the authors show this ability largely comes from a trivial strategy: copying patterns directly from the input context rather than learning dynamics.","importance":"An analysis/benchmark contribution with broader implications. It warns that impressive zero-shot performance in foundation models can be an artifact of pattern matching rather than genuine generalization—a lesson relevant beyond time-series to any foundation model evaluation.","technical_approach":"The authors build a naive context parroting baseline that simply copies segments from the input context as predictions. They compare it against leading time-series foundation models across diverse dynamical systems. When models are not parroting, they tend to regress to the mean.","experiments":"The naive parroting baseline outperforms leading time-series foundation models on low-dimensional chaos, turbulence, coupled oscillators, and ECG forecasting, at a tiny fraction of the compute cost. The framework includes dynamic workflows for multi-agent interactions, which integrate both rule-based verifiable rewards and LLM-based generative rewards. We validate the effectiveness of MARTI through comprehensive experiments on diverse mathematical tasks, demonstrating that multi-agent LLM-based systems outperform single-agent systems within the same inference budget after convergence. CLIP 表征质量的前提下，把其稠密且难解释的跨模态表示直接做成稀疏表示。过去主流做法通常默认“可解释性和性能冲突”，所以要么训练时加稀疏约束导致精度掉点，要么事后再用 SAE 一类方法做解释，但后者经常破坏 CLIP 原有的下游迁移能力，而且学到的大量特征只覆盖单模态，没真正保住图文共享语义。","importance":"如果论文结论成立，它的价值是方法级但影响面很广：它在 CLIP 这类多模态基础表征上，给出了一条“训练时就把可解释性做进去”的路线，而不是事后修补。这对 VLM 预训练很重要，因为 CLIP 仍是很多 MLLM 的默认视觉骨干；如果稀疏表示能同时保住零样本检索和跨模态对齐，就意味着后续做机制分析、特征编辑、数据审计时会更可操作。边界也很清楚：它更像是改进表示形态，而不是改变 CLIP 训练范式本身。","technical_approach":"核心方法看起来是把稀疏性直接并入对比学习训练目标里，联合优化可解释性与性能，而不是先训一个标准 CLIP 再做后处理。它的关键设计点应当在于：稀疏约束不是单独压缩某一模态，而是要维持图文共享的判别结构，因此需要让稀疏激活仍然支持跨模态匹配；这和 SAE 的差别在于，SAE是在冻结表示后重构 latent，容易学到对重构有用但对对比语义未必最优的特征。作者强调 learned features 不再大多是 unimodal，说明他们在目标或结构上显式避免了“文本稀疏特征一套、图像稀疏特征另一套”的分裂。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验主线是：作者同时评估了可解释性、下游性能和多模态性，而不是只报线性 probe 或重构误差。他们主张相较训练后 SAE 方法，自己的方案能避免 downstream performance degradation，并保留 CLIP 的 multimodal capabilities；这意味着关键 baseline 大概率包括标准 CLIP、训练时稀疏化方法和 post-hoc SAE。摘要未给出模型规模、数据规模、零样本指标或提升幅度，因此目前只能判断实验结论方向明确，但量级尚无法从已给信息中确认。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a clean question: can CLIP be made sparse and interpretable during training without paying the usual price in representation quality. Prior work largely treated interpretability and performance as a trade-off, so people either enforced sparsity and lost accuracy, or applied post-hoc methods such as sparse autoencoders; the latter often damages downstream utility and tends to recover mostly unimodal features instead of genuine cross-modal concepts.","importance":"If the claim holds, this is a method-level contribution with broad practical relevance for multimodal pretraining. CLIP remains the default vision backbone for many MLLMs, so a way to bake interpretability into the pretrained representation itself would make analysis, auditing, and feature-level intervention much easier without giving up zero-shot transfer. The scope is important but bounded: this is not a new pretraining paradigm, but a better representation geometry for an already central one.","technical_approach":"The method appears to integrate sparsity directly into contrastive CLIP training, rather than training a dense model first and interpreting it afterward. The key design choice is that sparsity must preserve the shared image-text decision structure, not merely compress each modality separately; otherwise the model becomes interpretable in a narrow sense but loses multimodal semantics. That is the likely distinction from SAE-style post-hoc analysis, which optimizes latent reconstruction after the fact and can recover features useful for reconstruction but not for cross-modal alignment.","experiments":"From the abstract, the evaluation is centered on three axes at once: interpretability, downstream performance, and multimodal feature quality. The main empirical claim is that the proposed approach avoids the downstream degradation seen in post-hoc SAE pipelines while retaining CLIP’s native multimodal behavior; likely baselines include standard CLIP, training-time sparsification variants, and post-hoc sparse autoencoders. The abstract does not expose model sizes, dataset scale, or exact gains, so the direction of the result is clear but the magnitude cannot be verified from the provided text.","authors_note":""},"tags":["clip","sparse-representation","interpretability","contrastive-learning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010838","title":"STORK: Faster Diffusion and Flow Matching Sampling by Resolving both Stiffness and Structure-Dependence","authors":["Zheng Tan","Weizhen Wang","Andrea Bertozzi","Ernest Ryu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Diffusion models (DMs) and flow-matching models have demonstrated remarkable performance in image and video generation. However, such models require a significant number of function evaluations (NFEs) during sampling, leading to costly inference. Consequently, quality-preserving fast sampling methods that require fewer NFEs have been an active area of research. However, prior training-free sampling methods fail to simultaneously address two key challenges: the stiffness of the ODE (i.e., the non-straightness of the velocity field) and dependence on the semi-linear structure of the DM ODE (which limits their direct applicability to flow-matching models). In this work, we introduce the Stabilized Taylor Orthogonal Runge–Kutta (STORK) method, addressing both design concerns. We demonstrate that STORK consistently improves the quality of diffusion and flow-matching sampling for image and video generation. model merging 虽然比 ensemble 轻量，但通常达不到分别 fine-tune 后各端点模型的完整精度，尤其在多任务场景下容易相互干扰。作者想解决的不是‘怎么把参数平均得更聪明’，而是‘如何在一个共享模型里保留各任务更新的低秩有用子空间，并在推理时按输入自适应调用它们’。","importance":"这项工作对参数高效适配和多任务统一很有现实价值。对大模型训练链路来说，merge 能否逼近独立模型性能，决定了它是个省存储的小技巧，还是能进入真正生产系统的方法。MASS 的重要性在于，它把 model merging 从静态权重融合往更像条件计算的方向推了一步：共享主体参数，但按输入选择任务相关子空间，这和 MoE 的思想有相似之处，只是发生在 fine-tuned update 的低秩空间里。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 MASS，MoErging through Adaptive Subspace Selection。它先对每个任务的 fine-tuning update 做低秩分解，只保留最显著的奇异分量，再把这些任务子空间合并进共享模型；推理时则用一个非参数、data-free 的 router，根据输入的中间激活判断哪个子空间或哪些子空间最能解释当前样本。和普通 merge 相比，它没有把所有任务更新无差别压成一个固定解，而是显式保留任务特异方向，并做按样本选择。设计上舍弃了训练一个额外门控网络的复杂度，但边界在于 data-free router 的判别能力是否足够稳定。","experiments":"摘要的核心结论是：MASS 能在多任务合并中接近分别 fine-tuned 模型的性能，并优于现有 merging 方法。实验上最关键的 baseline 应包括 task arithmetic、TIES、DARE、或其他 low-rank / merging 方法，并比较 merged model 与 single-task endpoints 之间的精度差距。摘要未给出任务数、模型尺寸、保留秩、router 开销或具体提升数字，因此目前只能确认其亮点在‘近似闭合 merge 与 endpoint recover the full accuracy of separately finetuned endpoints. The real issue is interference—useful task-specific directions get averaged away when multiple updates are forced into one static parameter setting.","importance":"This is a practical contribution for multi-task adaptation and parameter-efficient deployment. Its significance is that it moves merging a step closer to conditional computation: instead of producing a single compromise update, it keeps salient task subspaces and chooses among them at inference time. That makes the method conceptually closer to MoE-style specialization, but applied in the low-rank space of finetuning updates rather than in the base model architecture.","technical_approach":"MASS—MoErging through Adaptive Subspace Selection—first takes low-rank decompositions of per-task finetuning updates and retains only the most salient singular components. These components are merged into a shared model, and a non-parametric, data-free router then selects the subspace or mixture of subspaces that best explains an input based on intermediate activations. The key distinction from standard merge methods is that the final model is not a single static average; it preserves task-specific directions and activates them adaptively. The trade-off is simplicity versus routing power: avoiding a learned router keeps the method lightweight, but may limit robustness in harder task mixtures.","experiments":"The abstract claims that MASS closes much of the performance gap between merged models and independently finetuned endpoints while outperforming prior merge baselines. Previously this required re-fine-tuning or expensive alignment procedures.","importance":"Method-level contribution. Offers a practical way to reuse fine-tuning artifacts across model versions without retraining. For pretrain research, the finding that gradient-sign structure governs cross-model transferability provides insight into the geometry of pretrained parameter spaces.","technical_approach":"The key insight is that transfer success depends on the gradient-sign structure of the target model. GradFix computes a few target-model gradients from a handful of labeled samples, extracts their sign pattern, and uses it as a mask to correct the transferred task vector. No fine-tuning is needed—just a few forward-backward passes. Neacșu","Harry Mayne","Ryan Kearns","Andrew Bean","Adam Mahdi"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Frontier language models demonstrate increasing ability at solving reasoning problems, but their performance is often inflated by circumventing reasoning and instead relying on their expanding knowledge and memorisation capacity. We introduce LINGOLY-TOO, a challenging reasoning benchmark of 1,203 questions and a total of 6,995 sub-questions that counters these shortcuts by applying expert- designed obfuscations to Linguistics Olympiad problems. These obfuscations preserve the underlying solution logic while reducing the likelihood problems are solvable with via knowledge or memorisation. Our experiments show that models exploit shortcuts on the original question as performance markedly drop upon obfuscation. Even the best reasoning models remain highly sensitive, with scores dropping from around 0.59 on original problems to 0.48 after obfuscation. LINGOLY-TOO disentangles reasoning from knowledge, offering a clearer measure of true reasoning capabilities. This means pretrain hyperparameter choices affect not just convergence but feature preference and robustness.","technical_approach":"The key finding is that batch size is a critical additional factor—larger learning rates combined with smaller batch sizes intensify SGD's implicit regularization, reducing shortcut reliance. Existing methods focus on parameter conflicts at merge time, not representation stability during editing.","importance":"Method-level contribution. The use of hyperspherical uniformity as a stability indicator during weight modification could inform continual pretraining and understanding representation degradation during training.","technical_approach":"Hypothesizes that hyperspherical uniformity—neuron weights uniformly distributed on a hypersphere—helps models stay stable through edits. Uses Hyperspherical Energy (HE) to quantify uniformity during editing, finds it correlates with editing performance, and adds HE as a regularizer to constrain weight distributions during sequential edits. Efficient and Routing-Stable Knowledge Editing for Mixture-of-Experts LLMs","authors":["Yupu Gu","Rongzhe Wei","Andy Zhu","Pan Li"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$38f","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010943"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010943","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：如何在 MoE 大模型里做知识编辑，同时不破坏路由稳定性。现有知识编辑方法几乎都假设模型是 dense 的，直接迁移到 MoE 会同时遇到两个问题：一是要更新的参数分散在多个 expert 上，代价高；二是局部改动会改变 token 到 expert 的分配分布，导致编辑后的行为不稳定、泛化变差。这个问题现在值得重做，因为主流高容量模型越来越多采用 MoE，而 dense 场景下成立的“局部改一处即可”的假设在稀疏路由结构里并不自然成立。","importance":"结论是：这是一篇方法层面的 MoE 知识编辑工作，价值主要在于把“编辑效果”和“路由扰动”放到同一个优化目标里考虑。对 pretrain/posttrain 研究的启发不在于编辑本身，而在于它明确指出了 MoE 特有的一个接口问题：任何局部参数更新——无论是编辑、SFT、RL 还是 continual tuning——都可能通过路由漂移放大副作用。这个视角是有意义的，因为 MoE 的训练和后训练通常默认路由器近似固定，但这篇工作强调了 expert 更新与路由分布之间的耦合需要被显式约束。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个面向 MoE 的 routing-stable knowledge editing 框架，关键设计应该是把 expert 更新重参数化，并显式控制编辑前后的路由分布变化。它不是简单把 dense editor 套到每个 expert 上，而是承认 MoE 的主要风险来自“更新后 token 走错 expert”，所以优化目标除了事实改写，还要约束 gating 或 expert activation 的偏移。这样的设计之所以合理，是因为如果事实改对了但路由模式变了，MoE 会在未编辑样本上出现广泛副作用；反过来，如果只冻结路由不允许任何表达调整，编辑容量又会不足。论文的取舍大概率是在少量 expert 内做低秩或局部参数更新，并通过路由一致性正则避免全局分布漂移，这与 dense KE 最大的区别就是把结构稀疏性当成一等公民来处理。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是：作者主打效率更高且路由更稳定，但当前给到的信息没有参数规模、数据规模、具体 baseline 和数值结果，无法写出可靠数字。可以合理预期实验会比较 dense KE 迁移版、MoE 原生编辑版以及有无路由稳定约束的 ablation，并同时报告编辑成功率、局部性、可迁移性和路由分布偏移。真正值得关注的不是单点编辑成功率，而是编辑后在未编辑事实、长尾 prompt 和不同 expert 负载下是否仍稳定；如果论文有这部分结果，它会比单纯提升几个点更说明方法有效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a specific but increasingly relevant problem: how to perform knowledge editing in MoE LLMs without destabilizing routing. Existing editors are built for dense models, and applying them naively to MoEs is a poor fit because updates are spread across experts and can shift the gating distribution, causing instability beyond the edited fact. This is worth revisiting now because MoE has become a mainstream scaling strategy, and dense-model assumptions about localized edits do not transfer cleanly to sparse routed architectures.","importance":"The main contribution is methodological: it treats edit quality and routing stability as a coupled problem rather than optimizing factual changes alone. The broader takeaway for pretraining and post-training is useful: in MoEs, any local update—not just knowledge editing, but also SFT, RL, or continual tuning—can induce side effects through routing drift. That is an important systems-level reminder, because MoE pipelines often act as if the router is only a background component, while this work highlights that expert updates and routing behavior must be controlled jointly.","technical_approach":"MoEEdit is presented as the first routing-stable knowledge editing framework for MoE LLMs. The key idea appears to be a reparameterized expert update coupled with an explicit constraint on routing distribution shift. This is not just a dense editor copied over experts; it is designed around the fact that the main failure mode in MoEs is not only wrong factual overwrite, but also changed token-to-expert assignment after editing. That design makes sense because a successful edit with altered routing can still damage unrelated behavior, while a fully routing-frozen edit would likely lack capacity. The likely trade-off is to edit a small subset of expert parameters, possibly in a low-rank or localized way, while regularizing router consistency.","experiments":"From the abstract alone, the credible experimental conclusion is that the method is intended to be both more efficient and more routing-stable than naive adaptations. The provided text does not include model sizes, datasets, baselines, or headline numbers, so no reliable quantitative summary can be given. The meaningful evaluation here would be edit success, locality, generalization across prompts, and explicit routing-shift metrics, plus ablations with and without the routing-stability objective. For this paper, post-edit stability on untouched facts matters more than a small gain in one-shot edit accuracy.","authors_note":""},"tags":["moe","knowledge-editing","llm","routing"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010951","title":"SASFT: Sparse Autoencoder-guided Supervised Finetuning to Mitigate Unexpected Code-Switching in LLMs","authors":["Boyi Deng","Yu Wan","Baosong Yang","Fei Huang","Wenjie Wang","Fuli Feng"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$390","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010951"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010951","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文关注一个很具体但真实存在的问题：多语 LLM 会在不该切换语言的时候突然 code-switch，导致回答可读性和可用性下降。过去这类问题多被当成数据或 prompt 工程问题处理，缺少机制层面的解释，因此方法常常治标不治本。作者的核心问题是，能否先定位导致异常语言切换的内部特征，再用这个信号去指导 finetuning。","importance":"结论是：这篇工作的重要性主要在机制分析与可操作后训练结合得比较紧。它不是单纯又做一个去混语的数据配方，而是试图用 sparse autoencoder 找到“语言激活过强”的内部表征，并把这一发现转成训练约束。对 multilingual pretrain/posttrain 的启示是，语言控制问题未必只是数据配比失衡，也可能是少量高激活特征在解码时失控；如果这一点成立，那么后训练可以更像特征层干预，而不是只靠更多监督样本去覆盖现象。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 SASFT：先用 sparse autoencoder 对模型内部表征做分解，识别与特定语言相关的稀疏特征，再在监督微调时引导模型抑制不该出现的语言特征过度预激活。关键观察是，当模型切换到某种语言时，该语言相关特征会出现异常高的 pre-activation。基于这个现象，SASFT 不是直接惩罚最终输出的混语结果，而是在训练中教模型维持目标语言特征的适度激活。这种设计比只做输出层约束更有机会改善泛化，因为它作用于中间机制；但边界也明确，前提是 SAE 学到的特征确实可解释且稳定，否则干预可能只对特定模型层或语种组合有效。","experiments":"摘要没有给出模型规模、语种覆盖、具体 benchmark 或提升数字，因此无法写出可信的量化结果。可以确认的是，作者做了两类实验：一类是机制分析，证明 code-switch 时语言特征 pre-activation 过高；另一类是用 SASFT 缓解该问题，并声称优于现有方法。真正值得看的是：一，是否在多种语言对上都成立，而不只是少数高资源语种；二，抑制混语后是否损害正常的多语能力和翻译能力；三，SAE 特征定位对层选择和稀疏度超参是否敏感。这些 ablation 决定它是一个可迁移方法，还是一个现象驱动的特例修补。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a practical multilingual failure mode: LLMs sometimes switch languages unexpectedly when they should stay in one language, hurting readability and usability. Prior work has mostly treated this as a data or prompting issue, with limited mechanistic understanding. The authors ask whether the behavior can first be traced to internal language-specific features and then mitigated through targeted fine-tuning.","importance":"The value of the work is the combination of mechanistic analysis and a concrete post-training intervention. Rather than proposing yet another anti-code-switching data recipe, it uses sparse autoencoders to identify overactive language-related features and turns that finding into a training signal. The broader takeaway for multilingual pretraining and post-training is that language control problems may not be explained solely by corpus balance; they may also reflect a small set of highly activated internal features that dominate decoding.","technical_approach":"The method, SASFT, first uses a sparse autoencoder to decompose hidden representations and identify features associated with specific languages. It then performs supervised fine-tuning with guidance that suppresses excessive pre-activation of unintended language features. The key observation is mechanistic: when the model switches into a language, features tied to that language become overly activated. Acting on those internal activations is more principled than only penalizing mixed-language outputs, because it targets a likely cause rather than only the symptom. The limitation is equally clear: this depends on SAE features being stable and interpretable enough to support reliable intervention.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide model sizes, language coverage, benchmarks, or exact gains, so a quantitative summary would be speculative. What we can infer is that the experiments include both a mechanistic study showing elevated language-feature pre-activations during code-switching and downstream fine-tuning results showing mitigation of the behavior. The important checks are whether the effect holds across many language pairs, whether reducing unwanted mixing hurts legitimate multilingual ability, and how sensitive the method is to SAE layer choice and sparsity settings. Those details determine whether SASFT is broadly usable or narrowly tuned to one setup.","authors_note":""},"tags":["code-switching","sparse-autoencoder","multilingual","sft"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010963","title":"PixNerd: Pixel Neural Field Diffusion","authors":["Shuai Wang","Ziteng Gao","Chenhui Zhu","Weilin Huang","Limin Wang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$391","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010963"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010963","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文想解决的是：能否在不依赖预训练 VAE latent 的情况下，直接做高质量 pixel-space diffusion，同时避免传统 pixel diffusion 的级联复杂度和 token 开销。过去图像生成之所以主流转向 latent diffusion，是因为像素空间太重；但 latent 路线又会引入编码器误差和解码伪影，尤其在重建细节时是结构性瓶颈。作者尝试重新打开 pixel-space 这条路，但不是回到老式级联扩散，而是用更适合 Transformer 的 patch 化建模。","importance":"结论是：这是一篇图像生成建模路径上的系统级改造，意义在于提供了一种单阶段、端到端的 pixel diffusion 方案。对统一预训练或跨模态建模的启发在于，它在某种程度上弱化了‘一定要先学一个离散或连续 tokenizer/VAE 才能扩散建模’的假设。如果这条路线成立，它会影响我们如何看待视觉 tokenizer 在生成系统中的必要性：tokenizer 不再只是压缩工具，也可能是性能上不得不接受的折衷，而不是唯一选择。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 PixNerd：用 large-patch diffusion transformer 在像素级建模，再用 neural field 解码这些大 patch，形成单阶段 end-to-end 训练。关键选择有两个。第一，不直接在单像素或小 patch 上扩散，而是扩大 patch 粒度，降低序列长度和 Transformer 负担；第二，不用固定反卷积式解码，而是用 neural field 去恢复 patch 内细节，从而在粗粒 token 和细粒像素之间搭一个连续表示桥梁。这样设计的原因很直接：如果只放大 patch 而没有更强的 patch 内解码器，细节会丢；如果保留小 patch，计算又回到 pixel diffusion 的老问题。它与 latent diffusion 的根本区别是把表示学习与生成统一成一阶段训练，代价则是像素空间训练稳定性和内存带宽压力可能更高。","experiments":"摘要只说该方法依赖高效 neural field 设计，提供了简化且有效的像素空间 diffusion transformer 方案，但没有列出数据集、分辨率、参数量、FID 或训练成本，因此不能给出量化结论。真正关键的实验应该回答三件事：一，和 latent diffusion/DiT 相比，是否在相近算力下改善伪影或细节保真；二，和现有 pixel-space 或 cascade 方法比，是否明显降低复杂度；三，大 patch 大到什么程度后会开始损失全局一致性或局部纹理。没有这些数字，这篇工作目前更像有潜力的系统方向，而不是已经坐实的替代范式。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper revisits a hard question in image generation: can we do high-quality diffusion directly in pixel space without relying on a pretrained VAE latent, while also avoiding the complexity of old cascade-style pixel diffusion? Latent diffusion became dominant because pixel-space modeling is expensive, but the latent route introduces encoder error and decoder artifacts. The authors try to reopen the pixel-space path in a transformer-friendly way.","importance":"This is best seen as a systems-level modeling proposal. Its importance is that it offers a single-stage, end-to-end alternative to the usual latent-diffusion pipeline. For multimodal pretraining, the broader implication is that visual tokenizers or VAEs may be a practical compromise rather than a permanent necessity. If this approach scales, it weakens the assumption that high-quality generation must be built on a separate learned compression stage.","technical_approach":"PixNerd combines a large-patch diffusion transformer with a neural-field decoder that reconstructs the contents of each patch. The design makes two important choices. First, it increases patch size to reduce sequence length and make transformer-based pixel-space diffusion tractable. Second, it avoids a simple discrete patch decoder and instead uses a neural field to recover within-patch detail, giving a continuous representation inside each coarse token. That pairing is sensible: large patches alone would lose fine detail, while small patches would bring back the original pixel-space cost problem. Compared with latent diffusion, the main difference is that representation learning and generation are trained jointly in one stage rather than split across a VAE and a generator.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide datasets, resolutions, parameter counts, FID numbers, or training cost, so there is no reliable quantitative summary yet. The important empirical questions are whether it improves fidelity or reduces artifacts relative to latent diffusion at comparable compute, whether it simplifies the pipeline relative to prior pixel-space methods, and how far patch size can be increased before local texture or global consistency degrades. Without those numbers, the paper reads as a promising direction rather than a proven replacement.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pixel-diffusion","dit","vae-free","image-generation"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10010966","title":"Test-time Verification via Optimal Transport: Coverage, ROC, & Sub-optimality","authors":["Arpan Mukherjee","Marcello Bullo","Debabrota Basu","Deniz Gunduz"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$392","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10010966"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10010966","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是：test-time verification 为什么有时有效、有时失效，以及失败到底来自生成器覆盖不足、验证器收敛域有限，还是采样算法本身不够好。过去关于 verification-based test-time scaling 的讨论通常只分析其中一两个因素，没有统一框架解释三者如何耦合。作者试图给出一个几何化、可分解的观点，帮助判断该往哪一侧投入算力和研究工作。","importance":"结论是：这是一篇对 test-time scaling 机制很有价值的理论统一工作。它的重要性不在于提出一个新 verifier，而在于明确区分了 generator coverage、verifier ROC 和 sampling sub-optimality 这三个瓶颈，并把它们放进一个 transport 框架里分析。对 post-train 与 inference 研究都很 relevant，因为现在很多系统默认“更强 verifier + 更多采样”就会更好，但这篇工作指出三者存在分 regime 的交互，不是线性叠加收益。","technical_approach":"核心方法是把可验证的 test-time scaling 形式化为一个 optimal transport 问题。这样做的好处是，可以把生成样本分布、验证器可接受区域以及采样偏差统一写成几何关系，而不是分别做经验讨论。作者的关键发现是 sub-optimality 与 coverage 的关系存在三个 regime，其中至少有一个 transport regime 表现为 coverage 增加反而伴随 sub-optimality 上升。这一结论很重要，因为它说明单纯追求更广探索并不总能带来更好最终结果；如果 verifier 的 ROC 或采样机制不匹配，扩覆盖只会把概率质量推到验证器也利用不好的区域。这个框架的边界在于，它更适合解释性分析和策略设计，不一定直接产出一个端到端最优算法。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体任务、模型或数值结果，但可以确认实验/分析重点是验证 transport 框架揭示的 coverage-ROC-suboptimality 关系，并展示三种 regime。真正需要看的实证部分包括：不同 verifier 强度下的 scaling 曲线、不同采样算法在固定 coverage 下的损失，以及 generator 分布改善和 verifier 改善哪一个更划算。如果论文能把这些曲线在真实 LLM 推理或可验证任务上画清楚，它对工程的指导意义会比单独提一个更复杂 verifier 更大。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks why verification-based test-time scaling sometimes works and sometimes fails, and whether the bottleneck comes from poor generator coverage, a limited verifier region of convergence, or sub-optimal sampling. Prior work has typically analyzed only parts of this picture. The goal here is to build a unified framework for how these three factors interact.","importance":"This is a useful theory-and-framework paper for test-time scaling. Its contribution is not a stronger verifier, but a cleaner decomposition of failure modes into generator coverage, verifier ROC, and sampling sub-optimality. That matters for both post-training and inference research, because many current systems implicitly assume that stronger verification plus more sampling should help monotonically. The paper argues that the interaction is regime-dependent, not additive.","technical_approach":"The key move is to formulate verifiable test-time scaling as an optimal transport problem. That gives a geometric way to reason jointly about the generator distribution, the verifier’s acceptable region, and imperfections in the sampling algorithm. The main finding is that the sub-optimality-coverage relationship has three regimes, including a transport regime where increasing coverage can actually increase sub-optimality. This is an important correction to the usual intuition: broader exploration is not always beneficial if the verifier’s ROC or the sampling procedure cannot make good use of the extra mass. The likely limitation is that the framework is more diagnostic and prescriptive than directly algorithmic.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide task details, model scales, or quantitative gains. What it does make clear is that the empirical or analytical validation centers on the geometry predicted by the transport framework and the observed three-regime behavior. The most useful evidence would be scaling curves under different verifier strengths, comparisons across sampling algorithms at fixed coverage, and cost-benefit trade-offs between improving the generator versus improving the verifier. If those are well demonstrated on real LLM settings, the paper would be practically informative even without introducing a new verifier architecture.","authors_note":""},"tags":["test-time-scaling","verification","optimal-transport","llm"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011062","title":"Micro-Macro Retrieval: Reducing Long-Form Hallucination in Large Language Models","authors":["Yujie Feng","Jian Li","Zhihan Zhou","Pengfei Xu","Yujia Zhang","xiaoyu li","Xiaohui Zhou","Alan Zhao","Xi Chen","Xiao-Ming Wu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$393","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011062"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011062","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是长文本生成中的 hallucination，尤其是 RAG 场景下检索内容很多、推理链很长时，关键证据离最终输出太远，模型更容易事实漂移。以往 retrieve-while-generate 方法虽然能多轮补充信息，但并不保证最关键证据在生成时仍处于局部可利用的位置。作者抓住的核心点是：不是‘检索到’就够了，还要让关键证据在时间上和位置上尽量贴近输出片段。","importance":"结论是：这是一篇 RAG 机制改造工作，贡献在于把‘证据接近输出’从观察现象变成显式设计目标。对 LLM 系统和后训练都有启发，因为它说明长文本 hallucination 不只是检索召回问题，也是上下文组织问题。对 pretrain 本身冲击不大，但对如何设计 retrieval interface 很有参考价值：如果外部证据在注意力图上过远，模型即便有能力，也未必会稳定地用它。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Micro-Macro Retrieval（M^2R），一个 retrieve-while-generate 框架，在两个尺度上组织证据。宏观层面先从外部语料取 coarse-grained 证据，提供主题和全局事实约束；微观层面在生成过程中继续为局部输出段落检索更细粒度、与当前内容强相关的证据，让关键事实更靠近将要写出的句子。这样的设计有效，是因为长文生成的事实需求是分层的：只做 macro retrieval 容易把上下文撑得很长但关键证据被稀释，只做 micro retrieval 又可能缺少全局一致性。M^2R 的 trade-off 在于系统更复杂，而且频繁细粒度检索会带来延迟和可能的局部贪心，如何在全局规划与局部证据刷新之间平衡，是它的核心设计点。","experiments":"摘要没有给出任务、模型、数据集和数值提升，所以不能可靠写具体结果。可以确认的是，论文应该围绕长文本 factual accuracy 做评测，并比较传统 RAG、多轮检索和 M^2R。最有价值的实验不只是平均 hallucination 降多少，而是分析证据与输出距离、上下文长度、以及不同检索粒度对事实准确率的影响；如果作者证明“关键信息越接近输出，准确率越高”这一现象被 M^2R 系统性利用起来，那么方法的说服力会很强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets long-form hallucination in retrieval-augmented generation. The key observation is that factual accuracy depends not only on whether evidence is retrieved, but also on whether the crucial evidence remains close to the generated output when it is needed. Existing retrieve-while-generate methods can inject more evidence over time, but they do not explicitly enforce this proximity.","importance":"This is a mechanism-level RAG paper rather than a new pretraining method. Its contribution is to turn an empirical observation—evidence closer to the output tends to improve factuality—into an explicit retrieval design principle. The broader lesson is useful: long-form hallucination is not just a recall problem, but also a context-organization problem. A model may have the right evidence somewhere in context and still fail to use it reliably if that evidence is too far from the local generation step.","technical_approach":"M^2R uses a two-scale retrieve-while-generate strategy. At the macro level, it retrieves coarse evidence from external sources to establish global topic and factual scaffolding. At the micro level, it retrieves finer-grained evidence during generation to support the current local segment and keep key facts near the next output tokens. This design is sensible because long-form generation needs both global consistency and local factual grounding. Macro retrieval alone risks burying the most useful evidence in a long context, while micro retrieval alone may become myopic and lose document-level coherence. The trade-off is higher system complexity and potentially higher latency due to repeated fine-grained retrieval.","experiments":"The abstract does not include datasets, model sizes, baselines, or exact gains, so there is no trustworthy quantitative summary. The evaluation should compare standard RAG, iterative retrieval baselines, and M^2R on long-form factuality. The most informative results would go beyond average hallucination rates and instead analyze evidence-to-output distance, context length, and retrieval granularity. If the paper shows that M^2R systematically converts the proximity observation into better factual accuracy, that would be the strongest empirical case.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rag","hallucination","retrieval","long-form","reasoning"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011063","title":"Pushing on Multilingual Reasoning Models with Language-Mixed 蒸馏的差异；不同模型家族是否都受益；以及小模型是否受益更大。如果 gains 主要集中在中小模型，这会支持它是一个有效的蒸馏桥接策略，而不只是更多数据带来的平均增益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a gap in reasoning distillation: most long-CoT training is English-centric, which leaves non-English reasoning models in a poor position. Training directly on translated CoTs often introduces artifacts, while relying on English only does not improve target-language usability. The authors ask whether a language-mixed CoT format can use English as a reasoning anchor while preserving target-language interaction quality.","importance":"This is primarily a data-and-training-recipe contribution for multilingual reasoning. Its main value is giving a concrete answer to how supervision for non-English reasoning might be structured. The broader takeaway is twofold. First, multilingual reasoning may not require learning full reasoning traces independently in every language; a mixed-language format may better match current model priors. Second, high-quality native-language data still matters, because pure English distillation can amplify translation noise and cultural mismatch. It is practical rather than paradigm-shifting.","technical_approach":"The method combines Language-Mixed CoT with a Korean-focused dataset, Yi-Sang-HQ. The design is not arbitrary code-mixing: English is used as a reasoning anchor, while Korean carries the prompt context and part of the response surface form, aiming to balance reasoning stability with native-language naturalness. On the data side, the paper assembles 5.79M native-Korean prompts, 3.7M long reasoning traces generated by Qwen3-32B, and a targeted 260k high-yield subset. It then trains nine models ranging from 4B to 35B across six model families. Measuring Knowledge-Aware Refusal in Factual Tasks","authors":["Wenbo Pan","Jie Xu","Qiguang Chen","Junhao Dong","Libo Qin","Xinfeng Li","Yu Haining","Xiaohua Jia"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$398","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011093"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011093","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["factuality","refusal","evaluation","hallucination","alignment"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011109","title":"Counterfactual Reasoning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation","authors":["Huaiyu Qin","Chunyu Wei","Yueguo Chen","Yunhai Wang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has advanced knowledge-intensive tasks, we identify a fundamental vulnerability: the Correlation Trap. Existing systems cannot distinguish causally decisive evidence from overwhelmingly correlated yet misleading information, leading to systematic failures. We introduce Counterfactual RAG (CF-RAG), a new framework that operationalizes causal reasoning to overcome this limitation. CF-RAG systematically generates and evaluates counterfactual queries to identify causally relevant distinctions, and employs a parallel arbitration mechanism to reconcile conflicting evidence without interference. On challenging benchmarks, CF-RAG substantially improves robustness against the Correlation Trap, achieving state-of-the-art performance while maintaining comparable efficiency to standard RAG models. Show more","venue":"ICLR","year":2026,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"","doi":"","virtual":"https://iclr.cc/virtual/2026/poster/10011109"},"_virtual_path":"/virtual/2026/poster/10011109","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["rag","causal","retrieval","reasoning","hallucination"]},{"id":"iclr-2026-10011142","title":"SERE:
